authors_text: Debajyoti Datta,Maria Phillips,James P Bywater,Jennifer Chiu,Ginger S. Watson,Laura E. Barnes,Donald E Brown
title: Improving mathematical questioning in teacher training
title_zh: 改进教师培训中的数学提问
comment: Accepted to appear at the NeurIPS 2021 Human Centered AI Workshop (HCAI). Data collection process for this data is described here arXiv:2112.00985
comments: Accepted to appear at the NeurIPS 2021 Human Centered AI Workshop (HCAI). Data collection process for this data is described here arXiv:2112.00985
abstract: High-fidelity, AI-based simulated classroom systems enable teachers to rehearse effective teaching strategies. However, dialogue-oriented open-ended conversations such as teaching a student about scale factors can be difficult to model. This paper builds a text-based interactive conversational agent to help teachers practice mathematical questioning skills based on the well-known Instructional Quality Assessment. We take a human-centered approach to designing our system, relying on advances in deep learning, uncertainty quantification, and natural language processing while acknowledging the limitations of conversational agents for specific pedagogical needs. Using experts' input directly during the simulation, we demonstrate how conversation success rate and high user satisfaction can be achieved.
summary: High-fidelity, AI-based simulated classroom systems enable teachers to rehearse effective teaching strategies. However, dialogue-oriented open-ended conversations such as teaching a student about scale factors can be difficult to model. This paper builds a text-based interactive conversational agent to help teachers practice mathematical questioning skills based on the well-known Instructional Quality Assessment. We take a human-centered approach to designing our system, relying on advances in deep learning, uncertainty quantification, and natural language processing while acknowledging the limitations of conversational agents for specific pedagogical needs. Using experts' input directly during the simulation, we demonstrate how conversation success rate and high user satisfaction can be achieved.
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能的高保真模拟课堂系统使教师能够演练有效的教学策略。然而，面向对话的开放式对话（例如向学生教授比例因子）可能很难建模。本文构建了一个基于文本的交互式会话代理，以帮助教师基于著名的教学质量评估练习数学提问技巧。我们采用以人为本的方法来设计我们的系统，依靠深度学习、不确定性量化和自然语言处理方面的进步，同时承认对话代理对于特定教学需求的局限性。在模拟过程中直接使用专家的输入，我们演示了如何实现对话成功率和高用户满意度。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个基于文本的交互式对话代理，帮助教师通过模拟练习提升数学提问技能，采用以人为本的设计方法并结合深度学习与自然语言处理技术。
AI.motivation: 现有AI模拟课堂难以有效建模开放式的数学对话教学场景，教师需要更精准的工具来练习提问策略以提高教学质量。
AI.method: 融合深度学习、不确定性量化和自然语言处理技术，基于教学质量评估框架设计对话系统，并通过专家输入优化模拟交互过程。
AI.result: 系统实现了高对话成功率和用户满意度，验证了AI辅助教师训练数学提问能力的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过AI技术与专家指导结合，有效支持教师提问技能训练，但需正视对话代理在特定教学场景中的局限性。

authors_text: Sang-gil Lee,Eunji Kim,Jae Seok Bae,Jung Hoon Kim,Sungroh Yoon
title: Robust End-to-End Focal Liver Lesion Detection using Unregistered Multiphase Computed Tomography Images
title_zh: 使用未配准的多相计算机断层扫描图像进行稳健的端到端局灶性肝脏病变检测
comment: IEEE TETCI. 14 pages, 8 figures, 5 tables
comments: IEEE TETCI. 14 pages, 8 figures, 5 tables
abstract: The computer-aided diagnosis of focal liver lesions (FLLs) can help improve workflow and enable correct diagnoses; FLL detection is the first step in such a computer-aided diagnosis. Despite the recent success of deep-learning-based approaches in detecting FLLs, current methods are not sufficiently robust for assessing misaligned multiphase data. By introducing an attention-guided multiphase alignment in feature space, this study presents a fully automated, end-to-end learning framework for detecting FLLs from multiphase computed tomography (CT) images. Our method is robust to misaligned multiphase images owing to its complete learning-based approach, which reduces the sensitivity of the model's performance to the quality of registration and enables a standalone deployment of the model in clinical practice. Evaluation on a large-scale dataset with 280 patients confirmed that our method outperformed previous state-of-the-art methods and significantly reduced the performance degradation for detecting FLLs using misaligned multiphase CT images. The robustness of the proposed method can enhance the clinical adoption of the deep-learning-based computer-aided detection system.
summary: The computer-aided diagnosis of focal liver lesions (FLLs) can help improve workflow and enable correct diagnoses; FLL detection is the first step in such a computer-aided diagnosis. Despite the recent success of deep-learning-based approaches in detecting FLLs, current methods are not sufficiently robust for assessing misaligned multiphase data. By introducing an attention-guided multiphase alignment in feature space, this study presents a fully automated, end-to-end learning framework for detecting FLLs from multiphase computed tomography (CT) images. Our method is robust to misaligned multiphase images owing to its complete learning-based approach, which reduces the sensitivity of the model's performance to the quality of registration and enables a standalone deployment of the model in clinical practice. Evaluation on a large-scale dataset with 280 patients confirmed that our method outperformed previous state-of-the-art methods and significantly reduced the performance degradation for detecting FLLs using misaligned multiphase CT images. The robustness of the proposed method can enhance the clinical adoption of the deep-learning-based computer-aided detection system.
abstract_zh: 肝脏局灶性病变 (FLL) 的计算机辅助诊断有助于改进工作流程并实现正确诊断； FLL 检测是此类计算机辅助诊断的第一步。尽管最近基于深度学习的方法在检测 FLL 方面取得了成功，但当前的方法对于评估未对齐的多相数据还不够稳健。通过在特征空间中引入注意力引导的多相对齐，本研究提出了一个全自动的端到端学习框架，用于从多相计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像中检测 FLL。由于其完全基于学习的方法，我们的方法对于未对准的多相图像具有鲁棒性，这降低了模型性能对配准质量的敏感性，并使得模型能够在临床实践中独立部署。对包含 280 名患者的大规模数据集进行的评估证实，我们的方法优于以前最先进的方法，并显着减少了使用未对准的多相 CT 图像检测 FLL 的性能下降。该方法的鲁棒性可以增强基于深度学习的计算机辅助检测系统的临床应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需图像配准的端到端深度学习框架，用于从多期CT图像中稳健检测局灶性肝病变（FLLs）。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理未对齐的多期CT图像时鲁棒性不足，且依赖图像配准步骤限制了临床部署。
AI.method: 通过引入注意力引导的特征空间多期对齐机制，构建端到端学习框架，直接利用未配准的多期CT图像进行FLL检测。
AI.result: 在280例患者的大规模数据集上验证，该方法优于现有最先进方法，显著降低了未对齐图像下的性能退化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过消除配准依赖性提升了检测鲁棒性，可促进深度学习辅助检测系统在临床实践中的应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需图像配准的端到端深度学习框架，用于从多期CT图像中稳健检测局灶性肝病变（FLLs）。

authors_text: Paul T. Kim,Alex J. Noble,Anchi Cheng,Tristan Bepler
title: Learning to automate cryo-electron microscopy data collection with Ptolemy
title_zh: 学习利用托勒密自动化冷冻电子显微镜数据收集
comment: Main: 12 pages, 11 figures. Appendix: 2 pages, 1 figure
comments: Main: 12 pages, 11 figures. Appendix: 2 pages, 1 figure
abstract: Over the past decade, cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM) has emerged as a primary method for determining near-native, near-atomic resolution 3D structures of biological macromolecules. In order to meet increasing demand for cryo-EM, automated methods to improve throughput and efficiency while lowering costs are needed. Currently, all high-magnification cryo-EM data collection softwares require human input and manual tuning of parameters. Expert operators must navigate low- and medium-magnification images to find good high-magnification collection locations. Automating this is non-trivial: the images suffer from low signal-to-noise ratio and are affected by a range of experimental parameters that can differ for each collection session. Here, we use various computer vision algorithms, including mixture models, convolutional neural networks, and U-Nets to develop the first pipeline to automate low- and medium-magnification targeting. Learned models in this pipeline are trained on a large internal dataset of images from real world cryo-EM data collection sessions, labeled with locations that were selected by operators. Using these models, we show that we can effectively detect and classify regions of interest in low- and medium-magnification images, and can generalize to unseen sessions, as well as to images captured using different microscopes from external facilities. We expect our open-source pipeline, Ptolemy, will be both immediately useful as a tool for automation of cryo-EM data collection, and serve as a foundation for future advanced methods for efficient and automated cryo-EM microscopy.
summary: Over the past decade, cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM) has emerged as a primary method for determining near-native, near-atomic resolution 3D structures of biological macromolecules. In order to meet increasing demand for cryo-EM, automated methods to improve throughput and efficiency while lowering costs are needed. Currently, all high-magnification cryo-EM data collection softwares require human input and manual tuning of parameters. Expert operators must navigate low- and medium-magnification images to find good high-magnification collection locations. Automating this is non-trivial: the images suffer from low signal-to-noise ratio and are affected by a range of experimental parameters that can differ for each collection session. Here, we use various computer vision algorithms, including mixture models, convolutional neural networks, and U-Nets to develop the first pipeline to automate low- and medium-magnification targeting. Learned models in this pipeline are trained on a large internal dataset of images from real world cryo-EM data collection sessions, labeled with locations that were selected by operators. Using these models, we show that we can effectively detect and classify regions of interest in low- and medium-magnification images, and can generalize to unseen sessions, as well as to images captured using different microscopes from external facilities. We expect our open-source pipeline, Ptolemy, will be both immediately useful as a tool for automation of cryo-EM data collection, and serve as a foundation for future advanced methods for efficient and automated cryo-EM microscopy.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，低温电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 已成为确定生物大分子近天然、近原子分辨率 3D 结构的主要方法。为了满足对冷冻电镜日益增长的需求，需要采用自动化方法来提高通量和效率，同时降低成本。目前，所有高倍冷冻电镜数据采集软件都需要人工输入和手动调整参数。专业操作员必须浏览低放大倍率和中放大倍率图像才能找到良好的高放大倍率收集位置。自动化这一过程并非易事：图像的信噪比较低，并且受到一系列实验参数的影响，这些参数对于每个收集会话可能有所不同。在这里，我们使用各种计算机视觉算法，包括混合模型、卷积神经网络和 U-Net，来开发第一个自动化低倍和中倍放大瞄准的流程。该管道中的学习模型在来自现实世界冷冻电镜数据收集会话的大型内部图像数据集上进行训练，并标有操作员选择的位置。使用这些模型，我们表明我们可以有效地检测和分类低倍和中倍放大图像中的感兴趣区域，并且可以推广到看不见的会话，以及使用来自外部设施的不同显微镜捕获的图像。我们预计我们的开源管道 Ptolemy 将立即成为冷冻电镜数据收集自动化工具，并作为未来高效、自动化冷冻电镜显微镜先进方法的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Ptolemy的自动化低温电子显微镜数据采集方法，利用计算机视觉算法实现低中倍率图像的目标定位。
AI.motivation: 低温电子显微镜（cryo-EM）需求激增，但现有高倍率数据采集软件依赖人工操作，效率低且成本高，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 结合混合模型、卷积神经网络（CNN）和U-Net等计算机视觉算法，基于真实cryo-EM采集会话的标注数据训练模型，实现低中倍率图像的感兴趣区域检测与分类。
AI.result: 模型能有效识别低中倍率图像中的目标区域，并在未见过的采集会话及不同显微镜设备上实现泛化，验证了Ptolemy的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 开源工具Ptolemy可立即用于cryo-EM数据采集自动化，并为未来高效自动化显微技术提供基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Ptolemy的自动化低温电子显微镜数据采集方法，利用计算机视觉算法实现低中倍率图像的目标定位。

search_text: Learning to automate cryo-electron microscopy data collection with Ptolemy 学习利用托勒密自动化冷冻电子显微镜数据收集 Over the past decade, cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM) has emerged as a primary method for determining near-native, near-atomic resolution 3D structures of biological macromolecules. In order to meet increasing demand for cryo-EM, automated methods to improve throughput and efficiency while lowering costs are needed. Currently, all high-magnification cryo-EM data collection softwares require human input and manual tuning of parameters. Expert operators must navigate low- and medium-magnification images to find good high-magnification collection locations. Automating this is non-trivial: the images suffer from low signal-to-noise ratio and are affected by a range of experimental parameters that can differ for each collection session. Here, we use various computer vision algorithms, including mixture models, convolutional neural networks, and U-Nets to develop the first pipeline to automate low- and medium-magnification targeting. Learned models in this pipeline are trained on a large internal dataset of images from real world cryo-EM data collection sessions, labeled with locations that were selected by operators. Using these models, we show that we can effectively detect and classify regions of interest in low- and medium-magnification images, and can generalize to unseen sessions, as well as to images captured using different microscopes from external facilities. We expect our open-source pipeline, Ptolemy, will be both immediately useful as a tool for automation of cryo-EM data collection, and serve as a foundation for future advanced methods for efficient and automated cryo-EM microscopy. 在过去的十年中，低温电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 已成为确定生物大分子近天然、近原子分辨率 3D 结构的主要方法。为了满足对冷冻电镜日益增长的需求，需要采用自动化方法来提高通量和效率，同时降低成本。目前，所有高倍冷冻电镜数据采集软件都需要人工输入和手动调整参数。专业操作员必须浏览低放大倍率和中放大倍率图像才能找到良好的高放大倍率收集位置。自动化这一过程并非易事：图像的信噪比较低，并且受到一系列实验参数的影响，这些参数对于每个收集会话可能有所不同。在这里，我们使用各种计算机视觉算法，包括混合模型、卷积神经网络和 U-Net，来开发第一个自动化低倍和中倍放大瞄准的流程。该管道中的学习模型在来自现实世界冷冻电镜数据收集会话的大型内部图像数据集上进行训练，并标有操作员选择的位置。使用这些模型，我们表明我们可以有效地检测和分类低倍和中倍放大图像中的感兴趣区域，并且可以推广到看不见的会话，以及使用来自外部设施的不同显微镜捕获的图像。我们预计我们的开源管道 Ptolemy 将立即成为冷冻电镜数据收集自动化工具，并作为未来高效、自动化冷冻电镜显微镜先进方法的基础。 本文提出了一种名为Ptolemy的自动化低温电子显微镜数据采集方法，利用计算机视觉算法实现低中倍率图像的目标定位。 Paul T. Kim,Alex J. Noble,Anchi Cheng,Tristan Bepler eess.IV,cs.CV,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Pierpaolo Vendittelli,Esther M. M. Smeets,Geert Litjens
title: Automatic tumour segmentation in H&E-stained whole-slide images of the pancreas
title_zh: H&E 染色的胰腺全切片图像中的自动肿瘤分割
abstract: Pancreatic cancer will soon be the second leading cause of cancer-related death in Western society. Imaging techniques such as CT, MRI and ultrasound typically help providing the initial diagnosis, but histopathological assessment is still the gold standard for final confirmation of disease presence and prognosis. In recent years machine learning approaches and pathomics pipelines have shown potential in improving diagnostics and prognostics in other cancerous entities, such as breast and prostate cancer. A crucial first step in these pipelines is typically identification and segmentation of the tumour area. Ideally this step is done automatically to prevent time consuming manual annotation. We propose a multi-task convolutional neural network to balance disease detection and segmentation accuracy. We validated our approach on a dataset of 29 patients (for a total of 58 slides) at different resolutions. The best single task segmentation network achieved a median Dice of 0.885 (0.122) IQR at a resolution of 15.56 $μ$m. Our multi-task network improved on that with a median Dice score of 0.934 (0.077) IQR.
summary: Pancreatic cancer will soon be the second leading cause of cancer-related death in Western society. Imaging techniques such as CT, MRI and ultrasound typically help providing the initial diagnosis, but histopathological assessment is still the gold standard for final confirmation of disease presence and prognosis. In recent years machine learning approaches and pathomics pipelines have shown potential in improving diagnostics and prognostics in other cancerous entities, such as breast and prostate cancer. A crucial first step in these pipelines is typically identification and segmentation of the tumour area. Ideally this step is done automatically to prevent time consuming manual annotation. We propose a multi-task convolutional neural network to balance disease detection and segmentation accuracy. We validated our approach on a dataset of 29 patients (for a total of 58 slides) at different resolutions. The best single task segmentation network achieved a median Dice of 0.885 (0.122) IQR at a resolution of 15.56 $μ$m. Our multi-task network improved on that with a median Dice score of 0.934 (0.077) IQR.
abstract_zh: 胰腺癌很快将成为西方社会癌症相关死亡的第二大原因。 CT、MRI 和超声等成像技术通常有助于提供初步诊断，但组织病理学评估仍然是最终确认疾病存在和预后的金标准。近年来，机器学习方法和病理组学流程已显示出改善其他癌症实体（例如乳腺癌和前列腺癌）的诊断和预后的潜力。这些流程中关键的第一步通常是识别和分割肿瘤区域。理想情况下，此步骤自动完成，以防止耗时的手动注释。我们提出了一种多任务卷积神经网络来平衡疾病检测和分割精度。我们在不同分辨率的 29 名患者数据集（总共 58 张幻灯片）上验证了我们的方法。最好的单任务分割网络在分辨率为 15.56 $μ$m 时实现了 0.885 (0.122) IQR 的中值 Dice。我们的多任务网络在此基础上进行了改进，Dice 得分中位数为 0.934 (0.077) IQR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多任务卷积神经网络，用于自动分割胰腺组织的H&E染色全切片图像中的肿瘤区域。
AI.motivation: 胰腺癌是西方社会癌症相关死亡的第二大原因，病理学评估是确诊和预后判断的金标准。手动标注耗时且效率低，亟需自动化方法提升诊断效率。
AI.method: 设计多任务卷积神经网络，平衡肿瘤检测与分割精度，并在包含29名患者（共58张切片）的数据集上验证，测试不同分辨率下的性能。
AI.result: 单任务分割网络在15.56μm分辨率下的Dice系数中位数为0.885（IQR 0.122），而多任务网络提升至0.934（IQR 0.077）。
AI.conclusion: 多任务网络显著提升了胰腺肿瘤分割精度，为自动化病理分析提供了有效工具，可辅助临床诊断与预后评估。

search_text: Automatic tumour segmentation in H&E-stained whole-slide images of the pancreas H&E 染色的胰腺全切片图像中的自动肿瘤分割 Pancreatic cancer will soon be the second leading cause of cancer-related death in Western society. Imaging techniques such as CT, MRI and ultrasound typically help providing the initial diagnosis, but histopathological assessment is still the gold standard for final confirmation of disease presence and prognosis. In recent years machine learning approaches and pathomics pipelines have shown potential in improving diagnostics and prognostics in other cancerous entities, such as breast and prostate cancer. A crucial first step in these pipelines is typically identification and segmentation of the tumour area. Ideally this step is done automatically to prevent time consuming manual annotation. We propose a multi-task convolutional neural network to balance disease detection and segmentation accuracy. We validated our approach on a dataset of 29 patients (for a total of 58 slides) at different resolutions. The best single task segmentation network achieved a median Dice of 0.885 (0.122) IQR at a resolution of 15.56 $μ$m. Our multi-task network improved on that with a median Dice score of 0.934 (0.077) IQR. 胰腺癌很快将成为西方社会癌症相关死亡的第二大原因。 CT、MRI 和超声等成像技术通常有助于提供初步诊断，但组织病理学评估仍然是最终确认疾病存在和预后的金标准。近年来，机器学习方法和病理组学流程已显示出改善其他癌症实体（例如乳腺癌和前列腺癌）的诊断和预后的潜力。这些流程中关键的第一步通常是识别和分割肿瘤区域。理想情况下，此步骤自动完成，以防止耗时的手动注释。我们提出了一种多任务卷积神经网络来平衡疾病检测和分割精度。我们在不同分辨率的 29 名患者数据集（总共 58 张幻灯片）上验证了我们的方法。最好的单任务分割网络在分辨率为 15.56 $μ$m 时实现了 0.885 (0.122) IQR 的中值 Dice。我们的多任务网络在此基础上进行了改进，Dice 得分中位数为 0.934 (0.077) IQR。 本文提出了一种多任务卷积神经网络，用于自动分割胰腺组织的H&E染色全切片图像中的肿瘤区域。 Pierpaolo Vendittelli,Esther M. authors_text: Lukas Höllein,Justin Johnson,Matthias Nießner
title: StyleMesh: Style Transfer for Indoor 3D Scene Reconstructions
title_zh: StyleMesh：室内 3D 场景重建的风格迁移
comment: Accepted to CVPR2022; project page: https://lukashoel.github.io/stylemesh/ ; video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZqgiTLcNcks ; code: https://github.com/lukasHoel/stylemesh
comments: Accepted to CVPR2022; project page: https://lukashoel.github.io/stylemesh/ ; video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZqgiTLcNcks ; code: https://github.com/lukasHoel/stylemesh
abstract: We apply style transfer on mesh reconstructions of indoor scenes. This enables VR applications like experiencing 3D environments painted in the style of a favorite artist. Style transfer typically operates on 2D images, making stylization of a mesh challenging. When optimized over a variety of poses, stylization patterns become stretched out and inconsistent in size. On the other hand, model-based 3D style transfer methods exist that allow stylization from a sparse set of images, but they require a network at inference time. To this end, we optimize an explicit texture for the reconstructed mesh of a scene and stylize it jointly from all available input images. Our depth- and angle-aware optimization leverages surface normal and depth data of the underlying mesh to create a uniform and consistent stylization for the whole scene. Our experiments show that our method creates sharp and detailed results for the complete scene without view-dependent artifacts. Through extensive ablation studies, we show that the proposed 3D awareness enables style transfer to be applied to the 3D domain of a mesh. Our method can be used to render a stylized mesh in real-time with traditional rendering pipelines.
summary: We apply style transfer on mesh reconstructions of indoor scenes. This enables VR applications like experiencing 3D environments painted in the style of a favorite artist. Style transfer typically operates on 2D images, making stylization of a mesh challenging. When optimized over a variety of poses, stylization patterns become stretched out and inconsistent in size. On the other hand, model-based 3D style transfer methods exist that allow stylization from a sparse set of images, but they require a network at inference time. To this end, we optimize an explicit texture for the reconstructed mesh of a scene and stylize it jointly from all available input images. Our depth- and angle-aware optimization leverages surface normal and depth data of the underlying mesh to create a uniform and consistent stylization for the whole scene. Our experiments show that our method creates sharp and detailed results for the complete scene without view-dependent artifacts. Through extensive ablation studies, we show that the proposed 3D awareness enables style transfer to be applied to the 3D domain of a mesh. Our method can be used to render a stylized mesh in real-time with traditional rendering pipelines.
abstract_zh: 我们将风格迁移应用于室内场景的网格重建。这使得 VR 应用程序能够像体验以喜爱的艺术家的风格绘制的 3D 环境一样。样式迁移通常在 2D 图像上进行，这使得网格的风格化变得具有挑战性。当针对各种姿势进行优化时，风格化图案会变得拉长且大小不一致。另一方面，存在基于模型的 3D 风格转移方法，允许对稀疏图像集进行风格化，但它们在推理时需要网络。为此，我们为场景的重建网格优化显式纹理，并根据所有可用的输入图像对其进行联合风格化。我们的深度和角度感知优化利用底层网格的表面法线和深度数据为整个场景创建统一且一致的风格化。我们的实验表明，我们的方法可以为整个场景创建清晰而详细的结果，而不会出现依赖于视图的伪影。通过广泛的消融研究，我们表明所提出的 3D 感知使样式迁移能够应用于网格的 3D 域。我们的方法可用于通过传统渲染管道实时渲染风格化网格。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将风格迁移应用于室内3D场景重建的方法，使用户能够在虚拟现实等应用中体验由艺术家风格绘制的3D环境。
AI.motivation: 传统的风格迁移方法主要针对2D图像，难以直接应用于3D网格，且现有基于模型的3D风格迁移方法需要在推理时使用网络，效率较低。
AI.method: 本文通过优化重建网格的显式纹理，结合所有可用输入图像进行联合风格迁移，并利用网格的表面法线和深度数据进行深度和角度感知的优化，以实现统一且一致的风格迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能够在不依赖视图的情况下生成清晰且细节丰富的完整场景风格迁移结果，并通过大量消融实验验证了3D感知能力的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够实时渲染风格化的网格，适用于传统渲染流程，为3D风格迁移提供了新的解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方法能够在不依赖视图的情况下生成清晰且细节丰富的完整场景风格迁移结果，并通过大量消融实验验证了3D感知能力的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法能够实时渲染风格化的网格，适用于传统渲染流程，为3D风格迁移提供了新的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种将风格迁移应用于室内3D场景重建的方法，使用户能够在虚拟现实等应用中体验由艺术家风格绘制的3D环境。
motivation: 传统的风格迁移方法主要针对2D图像，难以直接应用于3D网格，且现有基于模型的3D风格迁移方法需要在推理时使用网络，效率较低。
method: 本文通过优化重建网格的显式纹理，结合所有可用输入图像进行联合风格迁移，并利用网格的表面法线和深度数据进行深度和角度感知的优化，以实现统一且一致的风格迁移。
result: 实验表明，该方法能够在不依赖视图的情况下生成清晰且细节丰富的完整场景风格迁移结果，并通过大量消融实验验证了3D感知能力的有效性。
conclusion: 该方法能够实时渲染风格化的网格，适用于传统渲染流程，为3D风格迁移提供了新的解决方案。
search_text: StyleMesh: Style Transfer for Indoor 3D Scene Reconstructions StyleMesh：室内 3D 场景重建的风格迁移 We apply style transfer on mesh reconstructions of indoor scenes. This enables VR applications like experiencing 3D environments painted in the style of a favorite artist. Style transfer typically operates on 2D images, making stylization of a mesh challenging. When optimized over a variety of poses, stylization patterns become stretched out and inconsistent in size. On the other hand, model-based 3D style transfer methods exist that allow stylization from a sparse set of images, but they require a network at inference time. To this end, we optimize an explicit texture for the reconstructed mesh of a scene and stylize it jointly from all available input images. Our depth- and angle-aware optimization leverages surface normal and depth data of the underlying mesh to create a uniform and consistent stylization for the whole scene. Our experiments show that our method creates sharp and detailed results for the complete scene without view-dependent artifacts. Through extensive ablation studies, we show that the proposed 3D awareness enables style transfer to be applied to the 3D domain of a mesh. Our method can be used to render a stylized mesh in real-time with traditional rendering pipelines. 我们将风格迁移应用于室内场景的网格重建。这使得 VR 应用程序能够像体验以喜爱的艺术家的风格绘制的 3D 环境一样。样式迁移通常在 2D 图像上进行，这使得网格的风格化变得具有挑战性。当针对各种姿势进行优化时，风格化图案会变得拉长且大小不一致。另一方面，存在基于模型的 3D 风格转移方法，允许对稀疏图像集进行风格化，但它们在推理时需要网络。为此，我们为场景的重建网格优化显式纹理，并根据所有可用的输入图像对其进行联合风格化。我们的深度和角度感知优化利用底层网格的表面法线和深度数据为整个场景创建统一且一致的风格化。我们的实验表明，我们的方法可以为整个场景创建清晰而详细的结果，而不会出现依赖于视图的伪影。通过广泛的消融研究，我们表明所提出的 3D 感知使样式迁移能够应用于网格的 3D 域。我们的方法可用于通过传统渲染管道实时渲染风格化网格。 本文提出了一种将风格迁移应用于室内3D场景重建的方法，使用户能够在虚拟现实等应用中体验由艺术家风格绘制的3D环境。 Lukas Höllein,Justin Johnson,Matthias Nießner cs.CV

authors_text: Rui Wang,Dongdong Chen,Zuxuan Wu,Yinpeng Chen,Xiyang Dai,Mengchen Liu,Yu-Gang Jiang,Luowei Zhou,Lu Yuan
title: BEVT: BERT Pretraining of Video Transformers
title_zh: BEVT：视频 Transformer 的 BERT 预训练
comment: To Appear at CVPR 2022, code is available at https://github.com/xyzforever/BEVT
comments: To Appear at CVPR 2022, code is available at https://github.com/xyzforever/BEVT
abstract: This paper studies the BERT pretraining of video transformers. It is a straightforward but worth-studying extension given the recent success from BERT pretraining of image transformers. We introduce BEVT which decouples video representation learning into spatial representation learning and temporal dynamics learning. In particular, BEVT first performs masked image modeling on image data, and then conducts masked image modeling jointly with masked video modeling on video data. This design is motivated by two observations: 1) transformers learned on image datasets provide decent spatial priors that can ease the learning of video transformers, which are often times computationally-intensive if trained from scratch; 2) discriminative clues, i.e., spatial and temporal information, needed to make correct predictions vary among different videos due to large intra-class and inter-class variations. We conduct extensive experiments on three challenging video benchmarks where BEVT achieves very promising results. On Kinetics 400, for which recognition mostly relies on discriminative spatial representations, BEVT achieves comparable results to strong supervised baselines. On Something-Something-V2 and Diving 48, which contain videos relying on temporal dynamics, BEVT outperforms by clear margins all alternative baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance with a 71.4\% and 87.2\% Top-1 accuracy respectively. Code will be made available at \url{https://github.com/xyzforever/BEVT}.
summary: This paper studies the BERT pretraining of video transformers. It is a straightforward but worth-studying extension given the recent success from BERT pretraining of image transformers. We introduce BEVT which decouples video representation learning into spatial representation learning and temporal dynamics learning. In particular, BEVT first performs masked image modeling on image data, and then conducts masked image modeling jointly with masked video modeling on video data. This design is motivated by two observations: 1) transformers learned on image datasets provide decent spatial priors that can ease the learning of video transformers, which are often times computationally-intensive if trained from scratch; 2) discriminative clues, i.e., spatial and temporal information, needed to make correct predictions vary among different videos due to large intra-class and inter-class variations. We conduct extensive experiments on three challenging video benchmarks where BEVT achieves very promising results. On Kinetics 400, for which recognition mostly relies on discriminative spatial representations, BEVT achieves comparable results to strong supervised baselines. On Something-Something-V2 and Diving 48, which contain videos relying on temporal dynamics, BEVT outperforms by clear margins all alternative baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance with a 71.4\% and 87.2\% Top-1 accuracy respectively. Code will be made available at \url{https://github.com/xyzforever/BEVT}.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了视频 Transformer 的 BERT 预训练。鉴于最近图像转换器的 BERT 预训练取得的成功，这是一个简单但值得研究的扩展。我们引入 BEVT，它将视频表示学习解耦为空间表示学习和时间动态学习。具体来说，BEVT首先对图像数据进行掩模图像建模，然后对视频数据联合进行掩模图像建模和掩模视频建模。这种设计的动机有两个：1）在图像数据集上学习的变换器提供了良好的空间先验，可以简化视频变换器的学习，如果从头开始训练，视频变换器通常需要大量计算； 2）由于类内和类间差异较大，不同视频之间进行正确预测所需的判别线索（即空间和时间信息）也有所不同。我们对三个具有挑战性的视频基准进行了广泛的实验，其中 BEVT 取得了非常有希望的结果。在 Kinetics 400 上，识别主要依赖于判别性空间表示，BEVT 取得了与强监督基线相当的结果。在 Something-Something-V2 和 Diving 48（包含依赖于时间动态的视频）上，BEVT 明显优于所有替代基线，并分别以 71.4% 和 87.2% 的 Top-1 准确率实现了最先进的性能。代码将在 \url{https://github.com/xyzforever/BEVT} 提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEVT方法，通过解耦空间表示学习和时间动态学习，实现视频Transformer的BERT预训练。
AI.motivation: 视频Transformer训练计算成本高且需处理类内类间差异，需利用图像预训练的空间先验并动态适应视频特性。
AI.method: 分两阶段预训练：先在图像数据上进行掩码图像建模，再在视频数据上联合进行掩码图像建模与掩码视频建模。
AI.result: 在Kinetics 400上达到与强监督基线相当的性能，在Something-Something-V2和Diving 48上分别以71.4%和87.2%的Top-1准确率取得SOTA。
AI.conclusion: BEVT通过解耦学习策略有效提升视频表征能力，在多个基准测试中验证了方法有效性并开源代码。

search_text: BEVT: BERT Pretraining of Video Transformers BEVT：视频 Transformer 的 BERT 预训练 This paper studies the BERT pretraining of video transformers. It is a straightforward but worth-studying extension given the recent success from BERT pretraining of image transformers. We introduce BEVT which decouples video representation learning into spatial representation learning and temporal dynamics learning. In particular, BEVT first performs masked image modeling on image data, and then conducts masked image modeling jointly with masked video modeling on video data. This design is motivated by two observations: 1) transformers learned on image datasets provide decent spatial priors that can ease the learning of video transformers, which are often times computationally-intensive if trained from scratch; 2) discriminative clues, i.e., spatial and temporal information, needed to make correct predictions vary among different videos due to large intra-class and inter-class variations. We conduct extensive experiments on three challenging video benchmarks where BEVT achieves very promising results. On Kinetics 400, for which recognition mostly relies on discriminative spatial representations, BEVT achieves comparable results to strong supervised baselines. On Something-Something-V2 and Diving 48, which contain videos relying on temporal dynamics, BEVT outperforms by clear margins all alternative baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance with a 71.4\% and 87.2\% Top-1 accuracy respectively. Code will be made available at \url{https://github.com/xyzforever/BEVT}. 本文研究了视频 Transformer 的 BERT 预训练。鉴于最近图像转换器的 BERT 预训练取得的成功，这是一个简单但值得研究的扩展。我们引入 BEVT，它将视频表示学习解耦为空间表示学习和时间动态学习。具体来说，BEVT首先对图像数据进行掩模图像建模，然后对视频数据联合进行掩模图像建模和掩模视频建模。这种设计的动机有两个：1）在图像数据集上学习的变换器提供了良好的空间先验，可以简化视频变换器的学习，如果从头开始训练，视频变换器通常需要大量计算； 2）由于类内和类间差异较大，不同视频之间进行正确预测所需的判别线索（即空间和时间信息）也有所不同。我们对三个具有挑战性的视频基准进行了广泛的实验，其中 BEVT 取得了非常有希望的结果。在 Kinetics 400 上，识别主要依赖于判别性空间表示，BEVT 取得了与强监督基线相当的结果。在 Something-Something-V2 和 Diving 48（包含依赖于时间动态的视频）上，BEVT 明显优于所有替代基线，并分别以 71.4% 和 87.2% 的 Top-1 准确率实现了最先进的性能。代码将在 \url{https://github.com/xyzforever/BEVT} 提供。 本文提出BEVT方法，通过解耦空间表示学习和时间动态学习，实现视频Transformer的BERT预训练。 Rui Wang,Dongdong Chen,Zuxuan Wu,Yinpeng Chen,Xiyang Dai,Mengchen Liu,Yu-Gang Jiang,Luowei Zhou,Lu Yuan cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhiqiang Shen,Eric Xing
title: A Fast Knowledge Distillation Framework for Visual Recognition
title_zh: 视觉识别的快速知识蒸馏框架
comment: Our project page: http://zhiqiangshen.com/projects/FKD/index.html, code and models are available at: https://github.com/szq0214/FKD
comments: Our project page: http://zhiqiangshen.com/projects/FKD/index.html, code and models are available at: https://github.com/szq0214/FKD
abstract: While Knowledge Distillation (KD) has been recognized as a useful tool in many visual tasks, such as supervised classification and self-supervised representation learning, the main drawback of a vanilla KD framework is its mechanism, which consumes the majority of the computational overhead on forwarding through the giant teacher networks, making the entire learning procedure inefficient and costly. ReLabel, a recently proposed solution, suggests creating a label map for the entire image. During training, it receives the cropped region-level label by RoI aligning on a pre-generated entire label map, allowing for efficient supervision generation without having to pass through the teachers many times. However, as the KD teachers are from conventional multi-crop training, there are various mismatches between the global label-map and region-level label in this technique, resulting in performance deterioration. In this study, we present a Fast Knowledge Distillation (FKD) framework that replicates the distillation training phase and generates soft labels using the multi-crop KD approach, while training faster than ReLabel since no post-processes such as RoI align and softmax operations are used. When conducting multi-crop in the same image for data loading, our FKD is even more efficient than the traditional image classification framework. On ImageNet-1K, we obtain 79.8% with ResNet-50, outperforming ReLabel by ~1.0% while being faster. On the self-supervised learning task, we also show that FKD has an efficiency advantage. Our project page: http://zhiqiangshen.com/projects/FKD/index.html, source code and models are available at: https://github.com/szq0214/FKD.
summary: While Knowledge Distillation (KD) has been recognized as a useful tool in many visual tasks, such as supervised classification and self-supervised representation learning, the main drawback of a vanilla KD framework is its mechanism, which consumes the majority of the computational overhead on forwarding through the giant teacher networks, making the entire learning procedure inefficient and costly. ReLabel, a recently proposed solution, suggests creating a label map for the entire image. During training, it receives the cropped region-level label by RoI aligning on a pre-generated entire label map, allowing for efficient supervision generation without having to pass through the teachers many times. However, as the KD teachers are from conventional multi-crop training, there are various mismatches between the global label-map and region-level label in this technique, resulting in performance deterioration. In this study, we present a Fast Knowledge Distillation (FKD) framework that replicates the distillation training phase and generates soft labels using the multi-crop KD approach, while training faster than ReLabel since no post-processes such as RoI align and softmax operations are used. When conducting multi-crop in the same image for data loading, our FKD is even more efficient than the traditional image classification framework. On ImageNet-1K, we obtain 79.8% with ResNet-50, outperforming ReLabel by ~1.0% while being faster. On the self-supervised learning task, we also show that FKD has an efficiency advantage. Our project page: http://zhiqiangshen.com/projects/FKD/index.html, source code and models are available at: https://github.com/szq0214/FKD.
abstract_zh: 虽然知识蒸馏（KD）已被认为是许多视觉任务中的有用工具，例如监督分类和自监督表示学习，但普通 KD 框架的主要缺点是其机制，它消耗了通过巨型教师网络转发的大部分计算开销，使得整个学习过程效率低下且成本高昂。 ReLabel是最近提出的解决方案，建议为整个图像创建标签图。在训练过程中，它通过在预先生成的整个标签图上对齐的 RoI 接收裁剪后的区域级标签，从而实现高效的监督生成，而无需多次经过教师。然而，由于 KD 教师来自传统的多作物训练，因此该技术中全局标签图和区域级标签之间存在各种不匹配，导致性能下降。在本研究中，我们提出了一个快速知识蒸馏（FKD）框架，该框架复制蒸馏训练阶段并使用多作物 KD 方法生成软标签，同时训练速度比 ReLabel 更快，因为没有使用 RoI 对齐和 softmax 操作等后处理。当在同一图像中进行多重裁剪以进行数据加载时，我们的 FKD 比传统的图像分类框架更加高效。在 ImageNet-1K 上，我们使用 ResNet-50 获得了 79.8%，比 ReLabel 快了约 1.0%，同时速度更快。在自监督学习任务上，我们还表明 FKD 具有效率优势。我们的项目页面：http://zhiqiangshen.com/projects/FKD/index.html，源代码和模型位于：https://github.com/szq0214/FKD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速知识蒸馏框架（FKD），旨在提高视觉识别任务中知识蒸馏的效率，减少计算开销。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏（KD）因需多次前向传播教师网络导致计算成本高，而现有解决方案如ReLabel存在标签映射不匹配问题，影响性能。
AI.method: FKD通过多裁剪KD方法生成软标签，避免RoI对齐和softmax操作，无需后处理步骤，从而在数据加载时实现更高效的训练。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上，使用ResNet-50达到79.8%的准确率，优于ReLabel约1.0%，且训练速度更快；在自监督学习任务中也展现效率优势。
AI.conclusion: FKD通过优化知识蒸馏流程，在保持性能的同时显著提升训练效率，适用于监督和自监督视觉识别任务。

motivation: 传统知识蒸馏（KD）因需多次前向传播教师网络导致计算成本高，而现有解决方案如ReLabel存在标签映射不匹配问题，影响性能。
method: FKD通过多裁剪KD方法生成软标签，避免RoI对齐和softmax操作，无需后处理步骤，从而在数据加载时实现更高效的训练。
result: 在ImageNet-1K上，使用ResNet-50达到79.8%的准确率，优于ReLabel约1.0%，且训练速度更快；在自监督学习任务中也展现效率优势。
conclusion: FKD通过优化知识蒸馏流程，在保持性能的同时显著提升训练效率，适用于监督和自监督视觉识别任务。
search_text: A Fast Knowledge Distillation Framework for Visual Recognition 视觉识别的快速知识蒸馏框架 While Knowledge Distillation (KD) has been recognized as a useful tool in many visual tasks, such as supervised classification and self-supervised representation learning, the main drawback of a vanilla KD framework is its mechanism, which consumes the majority of the computational overhead on forwarding through the giant teacher networks, making the entire learning procedure inefficient and costly. ReLabel, a recently proposed solution, suggests creating a label map for the entire image. During training, it receives the cropped region-level label by RoI aligning on a pre-generated entire label map, allowing for efficient supervision generation without having to pass through the teachers many times. However, as the KD teachers are from conventional multi-crop training, there are various mismatches between the global label-map and region-level label in this technique, resulting in performance deterioration. In this study, we present a Fast Knowledge Distillation (FKD) framework that replicates the distillation training phase and generates soft labels using the multi-crop KD approach, while training faster than ReLabel since no post-processes such as RoI align and softmax operations are used. When conducting multi-crop in the same image for data loading, our FKD is even more efficient than the traditional image classification framework. On ImageNet-1K, we obtain 79.8% with ResNet-50, outperforming ReLabel by ~1.0% while being faster. On the self-supervised learning task, we also show that FKD has an efficiency advantage. Our project page: http://zhiqiangshen.com/projects/FKD/index.html, source code and models are available at: https://github.com/szq0214/FKD. 虽然知识蒸馏（KD）已被认为是许多视觉任务中的有用工具，例如监督分类和自监督表示学习，但普通 KD 框架的主要缺点是其机制，它消耗了通过巨型教师网络转发的大部分计算开销，使得整个学习过程效率低下且成本高昂。 ReLabel是最近提出的解决方案，建议为整个图像创建标签图。在训练过程中，它通过在预先生成的整个标签图上对齐的 RoI 接收裁剪后的区域级标签，从而实现高效的监督生成，而无需多次经过教师。然而，由于 KD 教师来自传统的多作物训练，因此该技术中全局标签图和区域级标签之间存在各种不匹配，导致性能下降。在本研究中，我们提出了一个快速知识蒸馏（FKD）框架，该框架复制蒸馏训练阶段并使用多作物 KD 方法生成软标签，同时训练速度比 ReLabel 更快，因为没有使用 RoI 对齐和 softmax 操作等后处理。当在同一图像中进行多重裁剪以进行数据加载时，我们的 FKD 比传统的图像分类框架更加高效。在 ImageNet-1K 上，我们使用 ResNet-50 获得了 79.8%，比 ReLabel 快了约 1.0%，同时速度更快。在自监督学习任务上，我们还表明 FKD 具有效率优势。我们的项目页面：http://zhiqiangshen.com/projects/FKD/index.html，源代码和模型位于：https://github.com/szq0214/FKD。 本文提出一种快速知识蒸馏框架（FKD），旨在提高视觉识别任务中知识蒸馏的效率，减少计算开销。 Zhiqiang Shen,Eric Xing cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Bowen Cheng,Ishan Misra,Alexander G. Schwing,Alexander Kirillov,Rohit Girdhar
title: Masked-attention Mask Transformer for Universal Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于通用图像分割的 Masked-attention Mask Transformer
comment: CVPR 2022. Project page/code/models: https://bowenc0221.github.io/mask2former
comments: CVPR 2022. Project page/code/models: https://bowenc0221.github.io/mask2former
abstract: Image segmentation is about grouping pixels with different semantics, e.g., category or instance membership, where each choice of semantics defines a task. While only the semantics of each task differ, current research focuses on designing specialized architectures for each task. We present Masked-attention Mask Transformer (Mask2Former), a new architecture capable of addressing any image segmentation task (panoptic, instance or semantic). Its key components include masked attention, which extracts localized features by constraining cross-attention within predicted mask regions. In addition to reducing the research effort by at least three times, it outperforms the best specialized architectures by a significant margin on four popular datasets. Most notably, Mask2Former sets a new state-of-the-art for panoptic segmentation (57.8 PQ on COCO), instance segmentation (50.1 AP on COCO) and semantic segmentation (57.7 mIoU on ADE20K).
summary: Image segmentation is about grouping pixels with different semantics, e.g., category or instance membership, where each choice of semantics defines a task. While only the semantics of each task differ, current research focuses on designing specialized architectures for each task. We present Masked-attention Mask Transformer (Mask2Former), a new architecture capable of addressing any image segmentation task (panoptic, instance or semantic). Its key components include masked attention, which extracts localized features by constraining cross-attention within predicted mask regions. In addition to reducing the research effort by at least three times, it outperforms the best specialized architectures by a significant margin on four popular datasets. Most notably, Mask2Former sets a new state-of-the-art for panoptic segmentation (57.8 PQ on COCO), instance segmentation (50.1 AP on COCO) and semantic segmentation (57.7 mIoU on ADE20K).
abstract_zh: 图像分割是将具有不同语义的像素分组，例如类别或实例成员资格，其中每个语义选择定义一个任务。虽然每个任务的语义有所不同，但当前的研究重点是为每个任务设计专门的架构。我们提出了 Masked-attention Mask Transformer (Mask2Former)，这是一种能够解决任何图像分割任务（全景、实例或语义）的新架构。其关键组成部分包括屏蔽注意力，它通过限制预测屏蔽区域内的交叉注意力来提取局部特征。除了将研究工作量减少至少三倍之外，它在四个流行数据集上的性能也显着优于最好的专用架构。最值得注意的是，Mask2Former 为全景分割（COCO 上的 57.8 PQ）、实例分割（COCO 上的 50.1 AP）和语义分割（ADE20K 上的 57.7 mIoU）设定了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Mask2Former的统一图像分割架构，能够处理全景、实例和语义分割等多种任务。
AI.motivation: 当前图像分割研究需为每种语义任务设计专用模型，导致研究效率低下且缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 通过引入掩码注意力机制，在预测的掩码区域内限制交叉注意力，提取局部特征，构建统一的Mask2Former架构。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上达到全景分割57.8 PQ、实例分割50.1 AP，在ADE20K上达到语义分割57.7 mIoU，均创历史新高。
AI.conclusion: Mask2Former通过通用架构显著降低了研究成本，并在多项任务上超越现有最佳专用模型。

authors_text: Yanghao Li,Chao-Yuan Wu,Haoqi Fan,Karttikeya Mangalam,Bo Xiong,Jitendra Malik,Christoph Feichtenhofer
title: MViTv2: Improved Multiscale Vision Transformers for Classification and Detection
title_zh: MViTv2：改进的多尺度视觉转换器，用于分类和检测
comment: CVPR 2022 Camera Ready
comments: CVPR 2022 Camera Ready
abstract: In this paper, we study Multiscale Vision Transformers (MViTv2) as a unified architecture for image and video classification, as well as object detection. We present an improved version of MViT that incorporates decomposed relative positional embeddings and residual pooling connections. We instantiate this architecture in five sizes and evaluate it for ImageNet classification, COCO detection and Kinetics video recognition where it outperforms prior work. We further compare MViTv2s' pooling attention to window attention mechanisms where it outperforms the latter in accuracy/compute. Without bells-and-whistles, MViTv2 has state-of-the-art performance in 3 domains: 88.8% accuracy on ImageNet classification, 58.7 boxAP on COCO object detection as well as 86.1% on Kinetics-400 video classification. Code and models are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/mvit.
summary: In this paper, we study Multiscale Vision Transformers (MViTv2) as a unified architecture for image and video classification, as well as object detection. We present an improved version of MViT that incorporates decomposed relative positional embeddings and residual pooling connections. We instantiate this architecture in five sizes and evaluate it for ImageNet classification, COCO detection and Kinetics video recognition where it outperforms prior work. We further compare MViTv2s' pooling attention to window attention mechanisms where it outperforms the latter in accuracy/compute. Without bells-and-whistles, MViTv2 has state-of-the-art performance in 3 domains: 88.8% accuracy on ImageNet classification, 58.7 boxAP on COCO object detection as well as 86.1% on Kinetics-400 video classification. Code and models are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/mvit.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究多尺度视觉变换器（MViTv2）作为图像和视频分类以及对象检测的统一架构。我们提出了 MViT 的改进版本，它结合了分解的相对位置嵌入和残差池连接。我们以五种尺寸实例化该架构，并对其 ImageNet 分类、​​COCO 检测和动力学视频识别进行评估，其性能优于之前的工作。我们进一步将 MViTv2s 的池化注意力与窗口注意力机制进行比较，它在准确性/计算方面优于后者。没有任何附加功能，MViTv2 在 3 个领域具有最先进的性能：ImageNet 分类准确率为 88.8%，COCO 目标检测准确率为 58.7 boxAP，Kinetics-400 视频分类准确率为 86.1%。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/mvit 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的多尺度视觉变换器（MViTv2），用于图像和视频分类以及目标检测任务。
AI.motivation: 为了解决现有视觉变换器在多尺度特征建模和计算效率上的不足，本文通过引入分解的相对位置嵌入和残差池化连接，提升模型性能。
AI.method: 改进的MViTv2架构包含分解的相对位置嵌入和残差池化连接，并在图像分类、目标检测和视频识别任务中进行评估，同时对比池化注意力与窗口注意力机制。
AI.result: MViTv2在ImageNet分类（88.8%）、COCO检测（58.7 boxAP）和Kinetics-400视频分类（86.1%）任务中均达到当时最优性能，且计算效率优于窗口注意力机制。
AI.conclusion: MViTv2通过结构改进实现了跨领域的先进性能，验证了其在多任务场景下的有效性，且代码已开源。

authors_text: Utkarsh Singhal,Yifei Xing,Stella X. Yu
title: Co-domain Symmetry for Complex-Valued Deep Learning
title_zh: 复值深度学习的共域对称性
abstract: We study complex-valued scaling as a type of symmetry natural and unique to complex-valued measurements and representations. Deep Complex Networks (DCN) extends real-valued algebra to the complex domain without addressing complex-valued scaling. SurReal takes a restrictive manifold view of complex numbers, adopting a distance metric to achieve complex-scaling invariance while losing rich complex-valued information. We analyze complex-valued scaling as a co-domain transformation and design novel equivariant and invariant neural network layer functions for this special transformation. We also propose novel complex-valued representations of RGB images, where complex-valued scaling indicates hue shift or correlated changes across color channels. Benchmarked on MSTAR, CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and SVHN, our co-domain symmetric (CDS) classifiers deliver higher accuracy, better generalization, robustness to co-domain transformations, and lower model bias and variance than DCN and SurReal with far fewer parameters.
summary: We study complex-valued scaling as a type of symmetry natural and unique to complex-valued measurements and representations. Deep Complex Networks (DCN) extends real-valued algebra to the complex domain without addressing complex-valued scaling. SurReal takes a restrictive manifold view of complex numbers, adopting a distance metric to achieve complex-scaling invariance while losing rich complex-valued information. We analyze complex-valued scaling as a co-domain transformation and design novel equivariant and invariant neural network layer functions for this special transformation. We also propose novel complex-valued representations of RGB images, where complex-valued scaling indicates hue shift or correlated changes across color channels. Benchmarked on MSTAR, CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and SVHN, our co-domain symmetric (CDS) classifiers deliver higher accuracy, better generalization, robustness to co-domain transformations, and lower model bias and variance than DCN and SurReal with far fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 我们将复值缩放作为一种自然且独特的复值测量和表示的对称性进行研究。深度复杂网络 (DCN) 将实值代数扩展到复数域，而无需解决复值缩放问题。 SurReal 采用复数的限制性流形视图，采用距离度量来实现复数尺度不变性，同时丢失丰富的复值信息。我们将复值缩放分析为共域变换，并为这种特殊变换设计新颖的等变和不变神经网络层函数。我们还提出了 RGB 图像的新颖的复值表示，其中复值缩放表示颜色通道之间的色调偏移或相关变化。我们的共域对称 (CDS) 分类器以 MSTAR、CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 SVHN 为基准，与 DCN 和 SurReal 相比，具有更高的准确度、更好的泛化能力、对共域变换的鲁棒性，以及更低的模型偏差和方差，且参数少得多。

AI.tldr: 本文研究复值深度学习中的共域对称性，提出新的网络层设计和复值图像表示方法以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有复值神经网络（如DCN、SurReal）未能有效处理复值缩放对称性，导致信息丢失或参数冗余。
AI.method: 将复值缩放视为共域变换，设计等变/不变网络层，并提出关联色调变化与颜色通道的复值图像表示方法。
AI.result: 在MSTAR、CIFAR等数据集上，CDS分类器参数更少但准确率更高，泛化性、鲁棒性及模型稳定性优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 共域对称性为复值深度学习提供新视角，所提方法在多个任务中验证了有效性，推动复值神经网络发展。

search_text: Co-domain Symmetry for Complex-Valued Deep Learning 复值深度学习的共域对称性 We study complex-valued scaling as a type of symmetry natural and unique to complex-valued measurements and representations. Deep Complex Networks (DCN) extends real-valued algebra to the complex domain without addressing complex-valued scaling. SurReal takes a restrictive manifold view of complex numbers, adopting a distance metric to achieve complex-scaling invariance while losing rich complex-valued information. We analyze complex-valued scaling as a co-domain transformation and design novel equivariant and invariant neural network layer functions for this special transformation. We also propose novel complex-valued representations of RGB images, where complex-valued scaling indicates hue shift or correlated changes across color channels. Benchmarked on MSTAR, CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and SVHN, our co-domain symmetric (CDS) classifiers deliver higher accuracy, better generalization, robustness to co-domain transformations, and lower model bias and variance than DCN and SurReal with far fewer parameters. 我们将复值缩放作为一种自然且独特的复值测量和表示的对称性进行研究。深度复杂网络 (DCN) 将实值代数扩展到复数域，而无需解决复值缩放问题。 SurReal 采用复数的限制性流形视图，采用距离度量来实现复数尺度不变性，同时丢失丰富的复值信息。我们将复值缩放分析为共域变换，并为这种特殊变换设计新颖的等变和不变神经网络层函数。我们还提出了 RGB 图像的新颖的复值表示，其中复值缩放表示颜色通道之间的色调偏移或相关变化。我们的共域对称 (CDS) 分类器以 MSTAR、CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 SVHN 为基准，与 DCN 和 SurReal 相比，具有更高的准确度、更好的泛化能力、对共域变换的鲁棒性，以及更低的模型偏差和方差，且参数少得多。 本文研究复值深度学习中的共域对称性，提出新的网络层设计和复值图像表示方法以提升模型性能。 Utkarsh Singhal,Yifei Xing,Stella X. Yu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ye Yuan,Umar Iqbal,Pavlo Molchanov,Kris Kitani,Jan Kautz
title: GLAMR: Global Occlusion-Aware Human Mesh Recovery with Dynamic Cameras
title_zh: GLAMR：使用动态相机进行全局遮挡感知的人体网格恢复
comment: CVPR 2022 (Oral). Project page: https://nvlabs.github.io/GLAMR
comments: CVPR 2022 (Oral). Project page: https://nvlabs.github.io/GLAMR
abstract: We present an approach for 3D global human mesh recovery from monocular videos recorded with dynamic cameras. Our approach is robust to severe and long-term occlusions and tracks human bodies even when they go outside the camera's field of view. To achieve this, we first propose a deep generative motion infiller, which autoregressively infills the body motions of occluded humans based on visible motions. Additionally, in contrast to prior work, our approach reconstructs human meshes in consistent global coordinates even with dynamic cameras. Since the joint reconstruction of human motions and camera poses is underconstrained, we propose a global trajectory predictor that generates global human trajectories based on local body movements. Using the predicted trajectories as anchors, we present a global optimization framework that refines the predicted trajectories and optimizes the camera poses to match the video evidence such as 2D keypoints. Experiments on challenging indoor and in-the-wild datasets with dynamic cameras demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms prior methods significantly in terms of motion infilling and global mesh recovery.
summary: We present an approach for 3D global human mesh recovery from monocular videos recorded with dynamic cameras. Our approach is robust to severe and long-term occlusions and tracks human bodies even when they go outside the camera's field of view. To achieve this, we first propose a deep generative motion infiller, which autoregressively infills the body motions of occluded humans based on visible motions. Additionally, in contrast to prior work, our approach reconstructs human meshes in consistent global coordinates even with dynamic cameras. Since the joint reconstruction of human motions and camera poses is underconstrained, we propose a global trajectory predictor that generates global human trajectories based on local body movements. Using the predicted trajectories as anchors, we present a global optimization framework that refines the predicted trajectories and optimizes the camera poses to match the video evidence such as 2D keypoints. Experiments on challenging indoor and in-the-wild datasets with dynamic cameras demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms prior methods significantly in terms of motion infilling and global mesh recovery.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从动态摄像机录制的单眼视频中恢复 3D 全局人体网格的方法。我们的方法对于严重和长期的遮挡具有鲁棒性，即使人体超出了相机的视野，也能跟踪人体。为了实现这一目标，我们首先提出了一种深度生成运动填充器，它根据可见运动自回归填充被遮挡人类的身体运动。此外，与之前的工作相比，我们的方法即使使用动态摄像机，也可以在一致的全局坐标中重建人体网格。由于人体运动和相机姿势的联合重建受到约束，我们提出了一种全局轨迹预测器，它根据局部身体运动生成全局人体轨迹。使用预测轨迹作为锚点，我们提出了一个全局优化框架，该框架可以细化预测轨迹并优化相机姿势以匹配视频证据（例如 2D 关键点）。使用动态摄像机对室内和野外数据集进行的实验表明，所提出的方法在运动填充和全局网格恢复方面显着优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从动态摄像头拍摄的单目视频中恢复3D人体网格的方法，能够处理严重遮挡并跟踪人体离开镜头的情况。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态摄像头场景下难以处理长期遮挡和人体离开镜头的跟踪问题，且无法在全局坐标系中重建人体网格。
AI.method: 提出深度生成运动补全器、全局轨迹预测器及优化框架，通过局部运动预测全局轨迹，并结合2D关键点优化相机姿态。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的室内和野外数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其在运动补全和全局网格恢复方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了动态摄像头下的遮挡和全局重建问题，为复杂场景下的人体建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Benjamin Attal,Jia-Bin Huang,Michael Zollhoefer,Johannes Kopf,Changil Kim
title: Learning Neural Light Fields with Ray-Space Embedding Networks
title_zh: 使用光线空间嵌入网络学习神经光场
comment: CVPR 2022 camera ready revision. Major changes include: 1. Additional comparison to NeX on Stanford, RealFF, Shiny datasets 2. Experiment on 360 degree lego bulldozer scene in the appendix, using Pluecker parameterization 3. Moving student-teacher results to the appendix 4. Clarity edits -- in particular, making it clear that our Stanford evaluation *does not* use subdivision
comments: CVPR 2022 camera ready revision. Major changes include: 1. Additional comparison to NeX on Stanford, RealFF, Shiny datasets 2. Experiment on 360 degree lego bulldozer scene in the appendix, using Pluecker parameterization 3. Moving student-teacher results to the appendix 4. Clarity edits -- in particular, making it clear that our Stanford evaluation *does not* use subdivision
abstract: Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) produce state-of-the-art view synthesis results. However, they are slow to render, requiring hundreds of network evaluations per pixel to approximate a volume rendering integral. Baking NeRFs into explicit data structures enables efficient rendering, but results in a large increase in memory footprint and, in many cases, a quality reduction. In this paper, we propose a novel neural light field representation that, in contrast, is compact and directly predicts integrated radiance along rays. Our method supports rendering with a single network evaluation per pixel for small baseline light field datasets and can also be applied to larger baselines with only a few evaluations per pixel. At the core of our approach is a ray-space embedding network that maps the 4D ray-space manifold into an intermediate, interpolable latent space. Our method achieves state-of-the-art quality on dense forward-facing datasets such as the Stanford Light Field dataset. In addition, for forward-facing scenes with sparser inputs we achieve results that are competitive with NeRF-based approaches in terms of quality while providing a better speed/quality/memory trade-off with far fewer network evaluations.
summary: Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) produce state-of-the-art view synthesis results. However, they are slow to render, requiring hundreds of network evaluations per pixel to approximate a volume rendering integral. Baking NeRFs into explicit data structures enables efficient rendering, but results in a large increase in memory footprint and, in many cases, a quality reduction. In this paper, we propose a novel neural light field representation that, in contrast, is compact and directly predicts integrated radiance along rays. Our method supports rendering with a single network evaluation per pixel for small baseline light field datasets and can also be applied to larger baselines with only a few evaluations per pixel. At the core of our approach is a ray-space embedding network that maps the 4D ray-space manifold into an intermediate, interpolable latent space. Our method achieves state-of-the-art quality on dense forward-facing datasets such as the Stanford Light Field dataset. In addition, for forward-facing scenes with sparser inputs we achieve results that are competitive with NeRF-based approaches in terms of quality while providing a better speed/quality/memory trade-off with far fewer network evaluations.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 产生最先进的视图合成结果。然而，它们的渲染速度很慢，需要对每个像素进行数百次网络评估才能近似体积渲染积分。将 NeRF 烘焙成显式数据结构可以实现高效渲染，但会导致内存占用量大幅增加，并且在许多情况下还会导致质量下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经光场表示，相比之下，它是紧凑的并且直接预测沿光线的积分辐射率。我们的方法支持对小型基线光场数据集使用每个像素单个网络评估进行渲染，并且也可以应用于较大的基线，每个像素仅进行几次评估。我们方法的核心是光线空间嵌入网络，它将 4D 光线空间流形映射到中间的、可插值的潜在空间。我们的方法在密集的前向数据集（例如斯坦福光场数据集）上实现了最先进的质量。此外，对于输入稀疏的前向场景，我们获得的结果在质量方面与基于 NeRF 的方法具有竞争力，同时以更少的网络评估提供更好的速度/质量/内存权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种紧凑的神经光场表示方法，通过单次或少量网络评估直接预测光线积分辐射，提升渲染效率。
AI.motivation: 神经辐射场（NeRF）虽能生成高质量视图合成结果，但渲染速度慢且显存占用高，显式数据结构转换会牺牲质量。
AI.method: 设计光线空间嵌入网络，将4D光线流形映射到可插值的中间潜在空间，实现单次像素级网络评估的光场渲染。
AI.result: 在斯坦福光场数据集等密集数据集上达到SOTA质量，稀疏输入场景下较NeRF方法实现更优的速度/质量/内存权衡。
AI.conclusion: 光线空间嵌入网络为光场表示提供了高效解决方案，在保持高质量的同时显著降低计算和存储开销。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种紧凑的神经光场表示方法，通过单次或少量网络评估直接预测光线积分辐射，提升渲染效率。
ai_content.motivation: 神经辐射场（NeRF）虽能生成高质量视图合成结果，但渲染速度慢且显存占用高，显式数据结构转换会牺牲质量。

ai_content.result: 在斯坦福光场数据集等密集数据集上达到SOTA质量，稀疏输入场景下较NeRF方法实现更优的速度/质量/内存权衡。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 光线空间嵌入网络为光场表示提供了高效解决方案，在保持高质量的同时显著降低计算和存储开销。

search_text: Learning Neural Light Fields with Ray-Space Embedding Networks 使用光线空间嵌入网络学习神经光场 Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) produce state-of-the-art view synthesis results. However, they are slow to render, requiring hundreds of network evaluations per pixel to approximate a volume rendering integral. Baking NeRFs into explicit data structures enables efficient rendering, but results in a large increase in memory footprint and, in many cases, a quality reduction. In this paper, we propose a novel neural light field representation that, in contrast, is compact and directly predicts integrated radiance along rays. Our method supports rendering with a single network evaluation per pixel for small baseline light field datasets and can also be applied to larger baselines with only a few evaluations per pixel. At the core of our approach is a ray-space embedding network that maps the 4D ray-space manifold into an intermediate, interpolable latent space. Our method achieves state-of-the-art quality on dense forward-facing datasets such as the Stanford Light Field dataset. In addition, for forward-facing scenes with sparser inputs we achieve results that are competitive with NeRF-based approaches in terms of quality while providing a better speed/quality/memory trade-off with far fewer network evaluations. 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 产生最先进的视图合成结果。然而，它们的渲染速度很慢，需要对每个像素进行数百次网络评估才能近似体积渲染积分。将 NeRF 烘焙成显式数据结构可以实现高效渲染，但会导致内存占用量大幅增加，并且在许多情况下还会导致质量下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经光场表示，相比之下，它是紧凑的并且直接预测沿光线的积分辐射率。我们的方法支持对小型基线光场数据集使用每个像素单个网络评估进行渲染，并且也可以应用于较大的基线，每个像素仅进行几次评估。我们方法的核心是光线空间嵌入网络，它将 4D 光线空间流形映射到中间的、可插值的潜在空间。我们的方法在密集的前向数据集（例如斯坦福光场数据集）上实现了最先进的质量。此外，对于输入稀疏的前向场景，我们获得的结果在质量方面与基于 NeRF 的方法具有竞争力，同时以更少的网络评估提供更好的速度/质量/内存权衡。 本文提出一种紧凑的神经光场表示方法，通过单次或少量网络评估直接预测光线积分辐射，提升渲染效率。 Benjamin Attal,Jia-Bin Huang,Michael Zollhoefer,Johannes Kopf,Changil Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Xizhou Zhu,Jinguo Zhu,Hao Li,Xiaoshi Wu,Xiaogang Wang,Hongsheng Li,Xiaohua Wang,Jifeng Dai
title: Uni-Perceiver: Pre-training Unified Architecture for Generic Perception for Zero-shot and Few-shot Tasks
title_zh: Uni-Perceiver：零样本和少样本任务通用感知的预训练统一架构
abstract: Biological intelligence systems of animals perceive the world by integrating information in different modalities and processing simultaneously for various tasks. In contrast, current machine learning research follows a task-specific paradigm, leading to inefficient collaboration between tasks and high marginal costs of developing perception models for new tasks. In this paper, we present a generic perception architecture named Uni-Perceiver, which processes a variety of modalities and tasks with unified modeling and shared parameters. Specifically, Uni-Perceiver encodes different task inputs and targets from arbitrary modalities into a unified representation space with a modality-agnostic Transformer encoder and lightweight modality-specific tokenizers. Different perception tasks are modeled as the same formulation, that is, finding the maximum likelihood target for each input through the similarity of their representations. The model is pre-trained on several uni-modal and multi-modal tasks, and evaluated on a variety of downstream tasks, including novel tasks that did not appear in the pre-training stage. Results show that our pre-trained model without any tuning can achieve reasonable performance even on novel tasks. The performance can be improved to a level close to state-of-the-art methods by conducting prompt tuning on 1% of downstream task data. Full-data fine-tuning further delivers results on par with or better than state-of-the-art results. Code shall be released.
summary: Biological intelligence systems of animals perceive the world by integrating information in different modalities and processing simultaneously for various tasks. In contrast, current machine learning research follows a task-specific paradigm, leading to inefficient collaboration between tasks and high marginal costs of developing perception models for new tasks. In this paper, we present a generic perception architecture named Uni-Perceiver, which processes a variety of modalities and tasks with unified modeling and shared parameters. Specifically, Uni-Perceiver encodes different task inputs and targets from arbitrary modalities into a unified representation space with a modality-agnostic Transformer encoder and lightweight modality-specific tokenizers. Different perception tasks are modeled as the same formulation, that is, finding the maximum likelihood target for each input through the similarity of their representations. The model is pre-trained on several uni-modal and multi-modal tasks, and evaluated on a variety of downstream tasks, including novel tasks that did not appear in the pre-training stage. Results show that our pre-trained model without any tuning can achieve reasonable performance even on novel tasks. The performance can be improved to a level close to state-of-the-art methods by conducting prompt tuning on 1% of downstream task data. Full-data fine-tuning further delivers results on par with or better than state-of-the-art results. Code shall be released.
abstract_zh: 动物的生物智能系统通过整合不同方式的信息并同时处理各种任务来感知世界。相比之下，当前的机器学习研究遵循特定于任务的范式，导致任务之间的协作效率低下，并且为新任务开发感知模型的边际成本很高。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Uni-Perceiver 的通用感知架构，它通过统一建模和共享参数处理各种模式和任务。具体来说，Uni-Perceiver 使用与模态无关的 Transformer 编码器和轻量级的模态特定标记器将来自任意模态的不同任务输入和目标编码到统一的表示空间中。不同的感知任务被建模为相同的公式，即通过每个输入表示的相似性找到最大似然目标。该模型在多个单模态和多模态任务上进行了预训练，并在各种下游任务上进行了评估，包括预训练阶段未出现的新任务。结果表明，我们的预训练模型无需任何调整，即使在新任务上也能实现合理的性能。通过对 1% 的下游任务数据进行即时调优，可以将性能提高到接近最先进方法的水平。全数据微调进一步提供了与最先进的结果相当或更好的结果。代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种统一的预训练架构Uni-Perceiver，用于处理多种模态和任务的通用感知，适用于零样本和少样本场景。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习方法采用任务特定范式，导致任务协作效率低且开发新感知模型成本高，需更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过模态无关Transformer编码器与轻量模态分词器，将多模态输入编码为统一表示空间，所有任务均建模为最大似然目标搜索，预训练涵盖单模态与多模态任务。
AI.result: 预训练模型无需微调即可在新任务中表现合理，1%数据提示调优接近SOTA，全数据微调效果达或超越现有最佳。
AI.conclusion: Uni-Perceiver通过统一架构实现跨模态通用感知，少量数据调优即可获得优异性能，为零样本/少样本任务提供有效方案。

authors_text: Enis Simsar,Evin Pınar Örnek,Fabian Manhardt,Helisa Dhamo,Nassir Navab,Federico Tombari
title: Object-aware Monocular Depth Prediction with Instance Convolutions
title_zh: 使用实例卷积进行对象感知单目深度预测
abstract: With the advent of deep learning, estimating depth from a single RGB image has recently received a lot of attention, being capable of empowering many different applications ranging from path planning for robotics to computational cinematography. Nevertheless, while the depth maps are in their entirety fairly reliable, the estimates around object discontinuities are still far from satisfactory. This can be contributed to the fact that the convolutional operator naturally aggregates features across object discontinuities, resulting in smooth transitions rather than clear boundaries. Therefore, in order to circumvent this issue, we propose a novel convolutional operator which is explicitly tailored to avoid feature aggregation of different object parts. In particular, our method is based on estimating per-part depth values by means of superpixels. The proposed convolutional operator, which we dub "Instance Convolution", then only considers each object part individually on the basis of the estimated superpixels. Our evaluation with respect to the NYUv2 as well as the iBims dataset clearly demonstrates the superiority of Instance Convolutions over the classical convolution at estimating depth around occlusion boundaries, while producing comparable results elsewhere. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
summary: With the advent of deep learning, estimating depth from a single RGB image has recently received a lot of attention, being capable of empowering many different applications ranging from path planning for robotics to computational cinematography. Nevertheless, while the depth maps are in their entirety fairly reliable, the estimates around object discontinuities are still far from satisfactory. This can be contributed to the fact that the convolutional operator naturally aggregates features across object discontinuities, resulting in smooth transitions rather than clear boundaries. Therefore, in order to circumvent this issue, we propose a novel convolutional operator which is explicitly tailored to avoid feature aggregation of different object parts. In particular, our method is based on estimating per-part depth values by means of superpixels. The proposed convolutional operator, which we dub "Instance Convolution", then only considers each object part individually on the basis of the estimated superpixels. Our evaluation with respect to the NYUv2 as well as the iBims dataset clearly demonstrates the superiority of Instance Convolutions over the classical convolution at estimating depth around occlusion boundaries, while producing comparable results elsewhere. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的出现，从单个 RGB 图像估计深度最近受到了广泛关注，它能够支持从机器人路径规划到计算电影摄影等许多不同的应用。然而，虽然深度图整体上相当可靠，但围绕对象不连续性的估计仍然远远不能令人满意。这可能是因为卷积算子自然地聚合了对象不连续性的特征，从而产生平滑的过渡而不是清晰的边界。因此，为了避免这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的卷积算子，它被明确地定制以避免不同对象部分的特征聚合。特别是，我们的方法基于通过超像素估计每个部分的深度值。所提出的卷积运算符（我们将其称为“实例卷积”）仅根据估计的超像素单独考虑每个对象部分。我们对 NYUv2 以及 iBims 数据集的评估清楚地证明了实例卷积在估计遮挡边界周围的深度方面优于经典卷积，同时在其他地方产生了可比较的结果。代码将在接受后公开发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于实例卷积的单目深度预测方法，以提高物体边界处的深度估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积操作在物体不连续区域会聚合跨物体特征，导致深度估计边界模糊，需改进以提升边界处的预测效果。
AI.method: 设计实例卷积操作，通过超像素分割估计物体各部分深度，并独立处理每个物体部分以避免特征混淆。
AI.result: 在NYUv2和iBims数据集上，实例卷积在遮挡边界深度估计优于传统卷积，其他区域表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 实例卷积有效提升了物体边界深度估计精度，为单目深度预测提供了新方法。

The proposed convolutional operator, which we dub "Instance Convolution", then only considers each object part individually on the basis of the estimated superpixels. Our evaluation with respect to the NYUv2 as well as the iBims dataset clearly demonstrates the superiority of Instance Convolutions over the classical convolution at estimating depth around occlusion boundaries, while producing comparable results elsewhere. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance. 随着深度学习的出现，从单个 RGB 图像估计深度最近受到了广泛关注，它能够支持从机器人路径规划到计算电影摄影等许多不同的应用。然而，虽然深度图整体上相当可靠，但围绕对象不连续性的估计仍然远远不能令人满意。这可能是因为卷积算子自然地聚合了对象不连续性的特征，从而产生平滑的过渡而不是清晰的边界。因此，为了避免这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的卷积算子，它被明确地定制以避免不同对象部分的特征聚合。特别是，我们的方法基于通过超像素估计每个部分的深度值。所提出的卷积运算符（我们将其称为“实例卷积”）仅根据估计的超像素单独考虑每个对象部分。我们对 NYUv2 以及 iBims 数据集的评估清楚地证明了实例卷积在估计遮挡边界周围的深度方面优于经典卷积，同时在其他地方产生了可比较的结果。代码将在接受后公开发布。 提出一种基于实例卷积的单目深度预测方法，以提高物体边界处的深度估计精度。 Enis Simsar,Evin Pınar Örnek,Fabian Manhardt,Helisa Dhamo,Nassir Navab,Federico Tombari cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Shengyi Qian,Alexander Kirillov,Nikhila Ravi,Devendra Singh Chaplot,Justin Johnson,David F. Fouhey,Georgia Gkioxari
title: Recognizing Scenes from Novel Viewpoints
title_zh: 从新奇的角度认识场景
abstract: Humans can perceive scenes in 3D from a handful of 2D views. For AI agents, the ability to recognize a scene from any viewpoint given only a few images enables them to efficiently interact with the scene and its objects. In this work, we attempt to endow machines with this ability. We propose a model which takes as input a few RGB images of a new scene and recognizes the scene from novel viewpoints by segmenting it into semantic categories. All this without access to the RGB images from those views. We pair 2D scene recognition with an implicit 3D representation and learn from multi-view 2D annotations of hundreds of scenes without any 3D supervision beyond camera poses. We experiment on challenging datasets and demonstrate our model's ability to jointly capture semantics and geometry of novel scenes with diverse layouts, object types and shapes.
summary: Humans can perceive scenes in 3D from a handful of 2D views. For AI agents, the ability to recognize a scene from any viewpoint given only a few images enables them to efficiently interact with the scene and its objects. In this work, we attempt to endow machines with this ability. We propose a model which takes as input a few RGB images of a new scene and recognizes the scene from novel viewpoints by segmenting it into semantic categories. All this without access to the RGB images from those views. We pair 2D scene recognition with an implicit 3D representation and learn from multi-view 2D annotations of hundreds of scenes without any 3D supervision beyond camera poses. We experiment on challenging datasets and demonstrate our model's ability to jointly capture semantics and geometry of novel scenes with diverse layouts, object types and shapes.
abstract_zh: 人类可以从少量 2D 视图中感知 3D 场景。对于人工智能代理来说，只需提供少量图像即可从任何角度识别场景的能力使它们能够有效地与场景及其对象进行交互。在这项工作中，我们试图赋予机器这种能力。我们提出了一种模型，该模型将新场景的一些 RGB 图像作为输入，并通过将其分割为语义类别来从新的角度识别场景。所有这一切都无需访问这些视图中的 RGB 图像。我们将 2D 场景识别与隐式 3D 表示配对，并从数百个场景的多视图 2D 注释中学习，除了相机姿势之外，没有任何 3D 监督。我们在具有挑战性的数据集上进行实验，并证明我们的模型能够联合捕获具有不同布局、对象类型和形状的新颖场景的语义和几何形状。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需3D监督的模型，通过少量2D图像实现对新视角场景的语义分割与识别。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过少量视角感知3D场景，但现有AI在视角变化时识别能力受限，需提升机器对场景的交互效率。
AI.method: 结合2D语义识别与隐式3D表示，利用多视角2D标注数据训练模型，仅依赖相机姿态信息无需3D监督。
AI.result: 模型在多个复杂数据集上验证，能有效捕捉多样场景布局、物体类型的语义与几何特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了通过多视角2D数据学习场景语义与几何的可行性，为少样本新视角识别提供有效方案。

authors_text: Yongming Rao,Wenliang Zhao,Guangyi Chen,Yansong Tang,Zheng Zhu,Guan Huang,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: DenseCLIP: Language-Guided Dense Prediction with Context-Aware Prompting
title_zh: DenseCLIP：具有上下文感知提示的语言引导密集预测
comment: Accepted to CVPR2022. Project page: https://denseclip.ivg-research.xyz
comments: Accepted to CVPR2022. Project page: https://denseclip.ivg-research.xyz
abstract: Recent progress has shown that large-scale pre-training using contrastive image-text pairs can be a promising alternative for high-quality visual representation learning from natural language supervision. Benefiting from a broader source of supervision, this new paradigm exhibits impressive transferability to downstream classification tasks and datasets. However, the problem of transferring the knowledge learned from image-text pairs to more complex dense prediction tasks has barely been visited. In this work, we present a new framework for dense prediction by implicitly and explicitly leveraging the pre-trained knowledge from CLIP. Specifically, we convert the original image-text matching problem in CLIP to a pixel-text matching problem and use the pixel-text score maps to guide the learning of dense prediction models. By further using the contextual information from the image to prompt the language model, we are able to facilitate our model to better exploit the pre-trained knowledge. Our method is model-agnostic, which can be applied to arbitrary dense prediction systems and various pre-trained visual backbones including both CLIP models and ImageNet pre-trained models. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of our methods on semantic segmentation, object detection, and instance segmentation tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/raoyongming/DenseCLIP
summary: Recent progress has shown that large-scale pre-training using contrastive image-text pairs can be a promising alternative for high-quality visual representation learning from natural language supervision. Benefiting from a broader source of supervision, this new paradigm exhibits impressive transferability to downstream classification tasks and datasets. However, the problem of transferring the knowledge learned from image-text pairs to more complex dense prediction tasks has barely been visited. In this work, we present a new framework for dense prediction by implicitly and explicitly leveraging the pre-trained knowledge from CLIP. Specifically, we convert the original image-text matching problem in CLIP to a pixel-text matching problem and use the pixel-text score maps to guide the learning of dense prediction models. By further using the contextual information from the image to prompt the language model, we are able to facilitate our model to better exploit the pre-trained knowledge. Our method is model-agnostic, which can be applied to arbitrary dense prediction systems and various pre-trained visual backbones including both CLIP models and ImageNet pre-trained models. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of our methods on semantic segmentation, object detection, and instance segmentation tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/raoyongming/DenseCLIP
abstract_zh: 最近的进展表明，使用对比图像-文本对进行大规模预训练可以成为从自然语言监督中学习高质量视觉表示的有希望的替代方案。受益于更广泛的监督来源，这种新范式对下游分类任务和数据集表现出令人印象深刻的可转移性。然而，将从图像文本对学到的知识转移到更复杂的密集预测任务的问题却几乎没有被提及。在这项工作中，我们通过隐式和显式利用 CLIP 的预训练知识，提出了一个用于密集预测的新框架。具体来说，我们将 CLIP 中的原始图像文本匹配问题转换为像素文本匹配问题，并使用像素文本得分图来指导密集预测模型的学习。通过进一步使用图像中的上下文信息来提示语言模型，我们能够促进我们的模型更好地利用预先训练的知识。我们的方法与模型无关，可应用于任意密集预测系统和各种预训练的视觉主干，包括 CLIP 模型和 ImageNet 预训练模型。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在语义分割、对象检测和实例分割任务上的卓越性能。代码可在 https://github.com/raoyongming/DenseCLIP 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出DenseCLIP框架，通过语言引导实现密集预测任务，利用CLIP预训练知识解决图像-文本到像素-文本的迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管对比学习在分类任务中表现优异，但将图像-文本预训练知识迁移至复杂密集预测任务（如分割）的研究尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 将CLIP的图像-文本匹配转化为像素-文本匹配，生成得分图指导模型训练；结合图像上下文信息优化语言模型提示，方法兼容多种视觉主干和密集预测系统。
AI.result: 在语义分割、目标检测和实例分割任务中均取得优于现有方法的性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DenseCLIP通过上下文感知提示机制有效利用预训练知识，为密集预测任务提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Haotong Lin,Sida Peng,Zhen Xu,Yunzhi Yan,Qing Shuai,Hujun Bao,Xiaowei Zhou
title: Efficient Neural Radiance Fields for Interactive Free-viewpoint Video
title_zh: 用于交互式自由视点视频的高效神经辐射场
comment: SIGGRAPH Asia 2022; Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/enerf/
comments: SIGGRAPH Asia 2022; Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/enerf/
abstract: This paper aims to tackle the challenge of efficiently producing interactive free-viewpoint videos. Some recent works equip neural radiance fields with image encoders, enabling them to generalize across scenes. When processing dynamic scenes, they can simply treat each video frame as an individual scene and perform novel view synthesis to generate free-viewpoint videos. However, their rendering process is slow and cannot support interactive applications. A major factor is that they sample lots of points in empty space when inferring radiance fields. We propose a novel scene representation, called ENeRF, for the fast creation of interactive free-viewpoint videos. Specifically, given multi-view images at one frame, we first build the cascade cost volume to predict the coarse geometry of the scene. The coarse geometry allows us to sample few points near the scene surface, thereby significantly improving the rendering speed. This process is fully differentiable, enabling us to jointly learn the depth prediction and radiance field networks from RGB images. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that our approach exhibits competitive performance while being at least 60 times faster than previous generalizable radiance field methods.
summary: This paper aims to tackle the challenge of efficiently producing interactive free-viewpoint videos. Some recent works equip neural radiance fields with image encoders, enabling them to generalize across scenes. When processing dynamic scenes, they can simply treat each video frame as an individual scene and perform novel view synthesis to generate free-viewpoint videos. However, their rendering process is slow and cannot support interactive applications. A major factor is that they sample lots of points in empty space when inferring radiance fields. We propose a novel scene representation, called ENeRF, for the fast creation of interactive free-viewpoint videos. Specifically, given multi-view images at one frame, we first build the cascade cost volume to predict the coarse geometry of the scene. The coarse geometry allows us to sample few points near the scene surface, thereby significantly improving the rendering speed. This process is fully differentiable, enabling us to jointly learn the depth prediction and radiance field networks from RGB images. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that our approach exhibits competitive performance while being at least 60 times faster than previous generalizable radiance field methods.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在解决高效制作交互式自由视点视频的挑战。最近的一些工作为神经辐射场配备了图像编码器，使它们能够跨场景泛化。在处理动态场景时，他们可以简单地将每个视频帧视为单独的场景，并执行新颖的视图合成以生成自由视点视频。然而，它们的渲染过程很慢并且不能支持交互式应用程序。一个主要因素是他们在推断辐射场时对空白空间中的大量点进行采样。我们提出了一种新颖的场景表示，称为 ENeRF，用于快速创建交互式自由视点视频。具体来说，给定一帧的多视图图像，我们首先构建级联成本量来预测场景的粗略几何形状。粗糙的几何结构允许我们对场景表面附近的几个点进行采样，从而显着提高渲染速度。这个过程是完全可微分的，使我们能够从 RGB 图像中联合学习深度预测和辐射场网络。多个基准测试的实验表明，我们的方法表现出有竞争力的性能，同时比以前的通用辐射场方法至少快 60 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效神经辐射场（ENeRF）方法，用于快速生成交互式自由视角视频。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理动态场景时渲染速度慢，无法支持交互应用，主要原因是推理时在空域中采样过多点。
AI.method: 通过构建级联代价体积预测场景粗略几何，仅在表面附近采样少量点，并实现端到端微分学习以联合优化深度预测与辐射场网络。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中表现优异，速度较现有通用辐射场方法提升至少60倍。
AI.conclusion: ENeRF在保证质量的同时显著提升了渲染效率，为交互式自由视角视频生成提供了可行方案。
