search_text: Efficient Neural Radiance Fields for Interactive Free-viewpoint Video 用于交互式自由视点视频的高效神经辐射场 This paper aims to tackle the challenge of efficiently producing interactive free-viewpoint videos. Some recent works equip neural radiance fields with image encoders, enabling them to generalize across scenes. When processing dynamic scenes, they can simply treat each video frame as an individual scene and perform novel view synthesis to generate free-viewpoint videos. However, their rendering process is slow and cannot support interactive applications. A major factor is that they sample lots of points in empty space when inferring radiance fields. We propose a novel scene representation, called ENeRF, for the fast creation of interactive free-viewpoint videos. Specifically, given multi-view images at one frame, we first build the cascade cost volume to predict the coarse geometry of the scene. The coarse geometry allows us to sample few points near the scene surface, thereby significantly improving the rendering speed. This process is fully differentiable, enabling us to jointly learn the depth prediction and radiance field networks from RGB images. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that our approach exhibits competitive performance while being at least 60 times faster than previous generalizable radiance field methods. 本文旨在解决高效制作交互式自由视点视频的挑战。最近的一些工作为神经辐射场配备了图像编码器，使它们能够跨场景泛化。在处理动态场景时，他们可以简单地将每个视频帧视为单独的场景，并执行新颖的视图合成以生成自由视点视频。然而，它们的渲染过程很慢并且不能支持交互式应用程序。一个主要因素是他们在推断辐射场时对空白空间中的大量点进行采样。我们提出了一种新颖的场景表示，称为 ENeRF，用于快速创建交互式自由视点视频。具体来说，给定一帧的多视图图像，我们首先构建级联成本量来预测场景的粗略几何形状。粗糙的几何结构允许我们对场景表面附近的几个点进行采样，从而显着提高渲染速度。这个过程是完全可微分的，使我们能够从 RGB 图像中联合学习深度预测和辐射场网络。多个基准测试的实验表明，我们的方法表现出有竞争力的性能，同时比以前的通用辐射场方法至少快 60 倍。 本文提出了一种高效神经辐射场（ENeRF）方法，用于快速生成交互式自由视角视频。 Haotong Lin,Sida Peng,Zhen Xu,Yunzhi Yan,Qing Shuai,Hujun Bao,Xiaowei Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Zhaoyuan Yin,Pichao Wang,Fan Wang,Xianzhe Xu,Hanling Zhang,Hao Li,Rong Jin
title: TransFGU: A Top-down Approach to Fine-Grained Unsupervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: TransFGU：一种自上而下的细粒度无监督语义分割方法
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022, Oral, open-sourced
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022, Oral, open-sourced
abstract: Unsupervised semantic segmentation aims to obtain high-level semantic representation on low-level visual features without manual annotations. Most existing methods are bottom-up approaches that try to group pixels into regions based on their visual cues or certain predefined rules. As a result, it is difficult for these bottom-up approaches to generate fine-grained semantic segmentation when coming to complicated scenes with multiple objects and some objects sharing similar visual appearance. In contrast, we propose the first top-down unsupervised semantic segmentation framework for fine-grained segmentation in extremely complicated scenarios. Specifically, we first obtain rich high-level structured semantic concept information from large-scale vision data in a self-supervised learning manner, and use such information as a prior to discover potential semantic categories presented in target datasets. Secondly, the discovered high-level semantic categories are mapped to low-level pixel features by calculating the class activate map (CAM) with respect to certain discovered semantic representation. Lastly, the obtained CAMs serve as pseudo labels to train the segmentation module and produce the final semantic segmentation. Experimental results on multiple semantic segmentation benchmarks show that our top-down unsupervised segmentation is robust to both object-centric and scene-centric datasets under different semantic granularity levels, and outperforms all the current state-of-the-art bottom-up methods. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/damo-cv/TransFGU}.
summary: Unsupervised semantic segmentation aims to obtain high-level semantic representation on low-level visual features without manual annotations. Most existing methods are bottom-up approaches that try to group pixels into regions based on their visual cues or certain predefined rules. As a result, it is difficult for these bottom-up approaches to generate fine-grained semantic segmentation when coming to complicated scenes with multiple objects and some objects sharing similar visual appearance. In contrast, we propose the first top-down unsupervised semantic segmentation framework for fine-grained segmentation in extremely complicated scenarios. Specifically, we first obtain rich high-level structured semantic concept information from large-scale vision data in a self-supervised learning manner, and use such information as a prior to discover potential semantic categories presented in target datasets. Secondly, the discovered high-level semantic categories are mapped to low-level pixel features by calculating the class activate map (CAM) with respect to certain discovered semantic representation. Lastly, the obtained CAMs serve as pseudo labels to train the segmentation module and produce the final semantic segmentation. Experimental results on multiple semantic segmentation benchmarks show that our top-down unsupervised segmentation is robust to both object-centric and scene-centric datasets under different semantic granularity levels, and outperforms all the current state-of-the-art bottom-up methods. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/damo-cv/TransFGU}.
abstract_zh: 无监督语义分割旨在无需手动注释即可获得低级视觉特征的高级语义表示。大多数现有方法都是自下而上的方法，尝试根据像素的视觉提示或某些预定义的规则将像素分组到区域中。因此，当遇到具有多个对象和某些对象共享相似视觉外观的复杂场景时，这些自下而上的方法很难生成细粒度的语义分割。相比之下，我们提出了第一个自上而下的无监督语义分割框架，用于在极其复杂的场景中进行细粒度分割。具体来说，我们首先以自监督学习的方式从大规模视觉数据中获取丰富的高级结构化语义概念信息，并使用这些信息作为先验来发现目标数据集中呈现的潜在语义类别。其次，通过针对某些发现的语义表示计算类激活图（CAM），将发现的高级语义类别映射到低级像素特征。最后，获得的 CAM 作为伪标签来训练分割模块并产生最终的语义分割。多个语义分割基准的实验结果表明，我们的自上而下的无监督分割对于不同语义粒度级别下的以对象为中心和以场景为中心的数据集都具有鲁棒性，并且优于所有当前最先进的自下而上方法。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/damo-cv/TransFGU} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自上而下的无监督细粒度语义分割框架TransFGU，解决复杂场景下多对象和相似外观的分割难题。
AI.motivation: 现有自下而上方法依赖像素级特征分组，难以处理复杂场景中多对象及相似外观的细粒度分割问题，缺乏高层语义先验指导。
AI.method: 分三步：1）自监督学习提取大规模视觉数据的高层语义概念；2）通过类激活图（CAM）将语义类别映射到像素特征；3）用CAM作为伪标签训练分割模块。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，TransFGU在对象中心和场景中心数据集上均优于现有自下而上方法，适应不同语义粒度级别。
AI.conclusion: TransFGU通过引入高层语义先验，实现了复杂场景下的细粒度无监督分割，代码已开源。

authors_text: Kanchana Ranasinghe,Muzammal Naseer,Salman Khan,Fahad Shahbaz Khan,Michael Ryoo
title: Self-supervised Video Transformer
title_zh: 自监督视频转换器
comment: Accepted to CVPR '22
comments: Accepted to CVPR '22
abstract: In this paper, we propose self-supervised training for video transformers using unlabeled video data. From a given video, we create local and global spatiotemporal views with varying spatial sizes and frame rates. Our self-supervised objective seeks to match the features of these different views representing the same video, to be invariant to spatiotemporal variations in actions. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed approach is the first to alleviate the dependency on negative samples or dedicated memory banks in Self-supervised Video Transformer (SVT). Further, owing to the flexibility of Transformer models, SVT supports slow-fast video processing within a single architecture using dynamically adjusted positional encoding and supports long-term relationship modeling along spatiotemporal dimensions. Our approach performs well on four action recognition benchmarks (Kinetics-400, UCF-101, HMDB-51, and SSv2) and converges faster with small batch sizes. Code: https://git.io/J1juJ
summary: In this paper, we propose self-supervised training for video transformers using unlabeled video data. From a given video, we create local and global spatiotemporal views with varying spatial sizes and frame rates. Our self-supervised objective seeks to match the features of these different views representing the same video, to be invariant to spatiotemporal variations in actions. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed approach is the first to alleviate the dependency on negative samples or dedicated memory banks in Self-supervised Video Transformer (SVT). Further, owing to the flexibility of Transformer models, SVT supports slow-fast video processing within a single architecture using dynamically adjusted positional encoding and supports long-term relationship modeling along spatiotemporal dimensions. Our approach performs well on four action recognition benchmarks (Kinetics-400, UCF-101, HMDB-51, and SSv2) and converges faster with small batch sizes. Code: https://git.io/J1juJ
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出使用未标记的视频数据对视频转换器进行自监督训练。根据给定的视频，我们创建具有不同空间大小和帧速率的局部和全局时空视图。我们的自我监督目标旨在匹配代表同一视频的这些不同视图的特征，以保持动作的时空变化不变。据我们所知，所提出的方法是第一个减轻自监督视频变换器（SVT）中对负样本或专用内存库的依赖的方法。此外，由于 Transformer 模型的灵活性，SVT 使用动态调整的位置编码在单一架构内支持慢速视频处理，并支持沿时空维度的长期关系建模。我们的方法在四个动作识别基准（Kinetics-400、UCF-101、HMDB-51 和 SSv2）上表现良好，并且在小批量下收敛得更快。代码：https://git.io/J1juJ

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注数据的自监督视频Transformer方法，通过创建不同时空视角的视频视图并匹配其特征来学习动作表示。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督视频Transformer依赖负样本或内存银行，且难以灵活处理视频的时空变化。本文旨在消除这些依赖并提升模型对时空变化的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过生成局部和全局时空视图（不同空间尺寸和帧率），利用自监督目标匹配相同视频的不同视角特征。采用动态位置编码支持慢快处理，并建模长期时空关系。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400、UCF-101等四个动作识别基准测试中表现优异，且在小批量训练下收敛速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次无需负样本实现自监督视频Transformer，通过Transformer的灵活性支持多尺度处理与长期关系建模，验证了方法的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标注数据的自监督视频Transformer方法，通过创建不同时空视角的视频视图并匹配其特征来学习动作表示。
ai_content.motivation: 现有自监督视频Transformer依赖负样本或内存银行，且难以灵活处理视频的时空变化。本文旨在消除这些依赖并提升模型对时空变化的鲁棒性。
ai_content.method: 通过生成局部和全局时空视图（不同空间尺寸和帧率），利用自监督目标匹配相同视频的不同视角特征。采用动态位置编码支持慢快处理，并建模长期时空关系。
ai_content.result: 在Kinetics-400、UCF-101等四个动作识别基准测试中表现优异，且在小批量训练下收敛速度更快。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文首次无需负样本实现自监督视频Transformer，通过Transformer的灵活性支持多尺度处理与长期关系建模，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Self-supervised Video Transformer 自监督视频转换器 In this paper, we propose self-supervised training for video transformers using unlabeled video data. From a given video, we create local and global spatiotemporal views with varying spatial sizes and frame rates. Our self-supervised objective seeks to match the features of these different views representing the same video, to be invariant to spatiotemporal variations in actions. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed approach is the first to alleviate the dependency on negative samples or dedicated memory banks in Self-supervised Video Transformer (SVT). Further, owing to the flexibility of Transformer models, SVT supports slow-fast video processing within a single architecture using dynamically adjusted positional encoding and supports long-term relationship modeling along spatiotemporal dimensions. Our approach performs well on four action recognition benchmarks (Kinetics-400, UCF-101, HMDB-51, and SSv2) and converges faster with small batch sizes. Code: https://git.io/J1juJ 在本文中，我们提出使用未标记的视频数据对视频转换器进行自监督训练。根据给定的视频，我们创建具有不同空间大小和帧速率的局部和全局时空视图。我们的自我监督目标旨在匹配代表同一视频的这些不同视图的特征，以保持动作的时空变化不变。据我们所知，所提出的方法是第一个减轻自监督视频变换器（SVT）中对负样本或专用内存库的依赖的方法。此外，由于 Transformer 模型的灵活性，SVT 使用动态调整的位置编码在单一架构内支持慢速视频处理，并支持沿时空维度的长期关系建模。我们的方法在四个动作识别基准（Kinetics-400、UCF-101、HMDB-51 和 SSv2）上表现良好，并且在小批量下收敛得更快。代码：https://git.io/J1juJ 本文提出一种无需标注数据的自监督视频Transformer方法，通过创建不同时空视角的视频视图并匹配其特征来学习动作表示。 Kanchana Ranasinghe,Muzammal Naseer,Salman Khan,Fahad Shahbaz Khan,Michael Ryoo cs.CV

authors_text: Akshita Gupta,Sanath Narayan,K J Joseph,Salman Khan,Fahad Shahbaz Khan,Mubarak Shah
title: OW-DETR: Open-world Detection Transformer
title_zh: OW-DETR：开放世界检测变压器
comment: 16 pages, CVPR 2022 accepted
comments: 16 pages, CVPR 2022 accepted
abstract: Open-world object detection (OWOD) is a challenging computer vision problem, where the task is to detect a known set of object categories while simultaneously identifying unknown objects. Additionally, the model must incrementally learn new classes that become known in the next training episodes. Distinct from standard object detection, the OWOD setting poses significant challenges for generating quality candidate proposals on potentially unknown objects, separating the unknown objects from the background and detecting diverse unknown objects. Here, we introduce a novel end-to-end transformer-based framework, OW-DETR, for open-world object detection. The proposed OW-DETR comprises three dedicated components namely, attention-driven pseudo-labeling, novelty classification and objectness scoring to explicitly address the aforementioned OWOD challenges. Our OW-DETR explicitly encodes multi-scale contextual information, possesses less inductive bias, enables knowledge transfer from known classes to the unknown class and can better discriminate between unknown objects and background. Comprehensive experiments are performed on two benchmarks: MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC. The extensive ablations reveal the merits of our proposed contributions. Further, our model outperforms the recently introduced OWOD approach, ORE, with absolute gains ranging from 1.8% to 3.3% in terms of unknown recall on MS-COCO. In the case of incremental object detection, OW-DETR outperforms the state-of-the-art for all settings on PASCAL VOC. Our code is available at https://github.com/akshitac8/OW-DETR.
summary: Open-world object detection (OWOD) is a challenging computer vision problem, where the task is to detect a known set of object categories while simultaneously identifying unknown objects. Additionally, the model must incrementally learn new classes that become known in the next training episodes. Distinct from standard object detection, the OWOD setting poses significant challenges for generating quality candidate proposals on potentially unknown objects, separating the unknown objects from the background and detecting diverse unknown objects. Here, we introduce a novel end-to-end transformer-based framework, OW-DETR, for open-world object detection. The proposed OW-DETR comprises three dedicated components namely, attention-driven pseudo-labeling, novelty classification and objectness scoring to explicitly address the aforementioned OWOD challenges. Our OW-DETR explicitly encodes multi-scale contextual information, possesses less inductive bias, enables knowledge transfer from known classes to the unknown class and can better discriminate between unknown objects and background. Comprehensive experiments are performed on two benchmarks: MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC. The extensive ablations reveal the merits of our proposed contributions. Further, our model outperforms the recently introduced OWOD approach, ORE, with absolute gains ranging from 1.8% to 3.3% in terms of unknown recall on MS-COCO. In the case of incremental object detection, OW-DETR outperforms the state-of-the-art for all settings on PASCAL VOC. Our code is available at https://github.com/akshitac8/OW-DETR.
abstract_zh: 开放世界对象检测（OWOD）是一个具有挑战性的计算机视觉问题，其任务是检测一组已知的对象类别，同时识别未知对象。此外，模型必须逐步学习在下一个训练周期中已知的新类。与标准对象检测不同，OWOD 设置对生成潜在未知对象的高质量候选建议、将未知对象与背景分离以及检测不同的未知对象提出了重大挑战。在这里，我们介绍了一种新颖的基于端到端变压器的框架 OW-DETR，用于开放世界对象检测。所提出的 OW-DETR 包括三个专用组件，即注意力驱动的伪标签、新颖性分类和客观性评分，以明确解决上述 OWOD 挑战。我们的 OW-DETR 显式编码多尺度上下文信息，具有较少的归纳偏差，能够实现从已知类到未知类的知识迁移，并且可以更好地区分未知对象和背景。在两个基准上进行了综合实验：MS-COCO 和 PASCAL VOC。广泛的消融揭示了我们提议的贡献的优点。此外，我们的模型优于最近引入的 OWOD 方法 ORE，在 MS-COCO 上的未知召回率方面绝对增益范围为 1.8% 到 3.3%。在增量对象检测的情况下，OW-DETR 的所有设置均优于 PASCAL VOC 上的最新设置。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/akshitac8/OW-DETR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OW-DETR框架，解决开放世界目标检测中同时识别已知类别和未知对象，并支持增量学习新类别的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测无法处理未知对象或增量学习场景，开放世界检测需解决未知对象生成、背景分离及多样性检测等难题。
AI.method: OW-DETR包含注意力驱动伪标签、新颖性分类和对象性评分三个模块，通过多尺度上下文编码、减少归纳偏置及知识迁移提升未知对象区分能力。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和PASCAL VOC基准测试中，OW-DETR在未知召回率上较ORE方法提升1.8%-3.3%，并在增量检测任务中优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: OW-DETR通过创新模块有效应对开放世界检测挑战，实验验证了其在未知对象识别和增量学习中的优越性。

search_text: OW-DETR: Open-world Detection Transformer OW-DETR：开放世界检测变压器 Open-world object detection (OWOD) is a challenging computer vision problem, where the task is to detect a known set of object categories while simultaneously identifying unknown objects. Additionally, the model must incrementally learn new classes that become known in the next training episodes. Distinct from standard object detection, the OWOD setting poses significant challenges for generating quality candidate proposals on potentially unknown objects, separating the unknown objects from the background and detecting diverse unknown objects. Here, we introduce a novel end-to-end transformer-based framework, OW-DETR, for open-world object detection. The proposed OW-DETR comprises three dedicated components namely, attention-driven pseudo-labeling, novelty classification and objectness scoring to explicitly address the aforementioned OWOD challenges. Our OW-DETR explicitly encodes multi-scale contextual information, possesses less inductive bias, enables knowledge transfer from known classes to the unknown class and can better discriminate between unknown objects and background. Comprehensive experiments are performed on two benchmarks: MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC. The extensive ablations reveal the merits of our proposed contributions. Further, our model outperforms the recently introduced OWOD approach, ORE, with absolute gains ranging from 1.8% to 3.3% in terms of unknown recall on MS-COCO. In the case of incremental object detection, OW-DETR outperforms the state-of-the-art for all settings on PASCAL VOC. authors_text: Jyothish Pari,Nur Muhammad Shafiullah,Sridhar Pandian Arunachalam,Lerrel Pinto
title: The Surprising Effectiveness of Representation Learning for Visual Imitation
title_zh: 表征学习对于视觉模仿的惊人效果
comment: The first two authors contributed equally
comments: The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: While visual imitation learning offers one of the most effective ways of learning from visual demonstrations, generalizing from them requires either hundreds of diverse demonstrations, task specific priors, or large, hard-to-train parametric models. One reason such complexities arise is because standard visual imitation frameworks try to solve two coupled problems at once: learning a succinct but good representation from the diverse visual data, while simultaneously learning to associate the demonstrated actions with such representations. Such joint learning causes an interdependence between these two problems, which often results in needing large amounts of demonstrations for learning. To address this challenge, we instead propose to decouple representation learning from behavior learning for visual imitation. First, we learn a visual representation encoder from offline data using standard supervised and self-supervised learning methods. Once the representations are trained, we use non-parametric Locally Weighted Regression to predict the actions. We experimentally show that this simple decoupling improves the performance of visual imitation models on both offline demonstration datasets and real-robot door opening compared to prior work in visual imitation. All of our generated data, code, and robot videos are publicly available at https://jyopari.github.io/VINN/.
summary: While visual imitation learning offers one of the most effective ways of learning from visual demonstrations, generalizing from them requires either hundreds of diverse demonstrations, task specific priors, or large, hard-to-train parametric models. One reason such complexities arise is because standard visual imitation frameworks try to solve two coupled problems at once: learning a succinct but good representation from the diverse visual data, while simultaneously learning to associate the demonstrated actions with such representations. Such joint learning causes an interdependence between these two problems, which often results in needing large amounts of demonstrations for learning. To address this challenge, we instead propose to decouple representation learning from behavior learning for visual imitation. First, we learn a visual representation encoder from offline data using standard supervised and self-supervised learning methods. Once the representations are trained, we use non-parametric Locally Weighted Regression to predict the actions. We experimentally show that this simple decoupling improves the performance of visual imitation models on both offline demonstration datasets and real-robot door opening compared to prior work in visual imitation. All of our generated data, code, and robot videos are publicly available at https://jyopari.github.io/VINN/.
abstract_zh: 虽然视觉模仿学习提供了从视觉演示中学习的最有效方法之一，但从中进行概括需要数百个不同的演示、特定于任务的先验或大型、难以训练的参数模型。出现这种复杂性的原因之一是标准视觉模仿框架试图同时解决两个耦合问题：从不同的视觉数据中学习简洁但良好的表示，同时学习将演示的动作与这些表示关联起来。这种联合学习导致这两个问题之间相互依赖，这往往导致需要大量的演示来进行学习。为了应对这一挑战，我们建议将表示学习与视觉模仿的行为学习分离。首先，我们使用标准监督和自监督学习方法从离线数据中学习视觉表示编码器。一旦表征被训练，我们就使用非参数局部加权回归来预测动作。我们通过实验证明，与之前的视觉模仿工作相比，这种简单的解耦提高了视觉模仿模型在离线演示数据集和真实机器人开门方面的性能。我们生成的所有数据、代码和机器人视频均可在 https://jyopari.github.io/VINN/ 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过解耦表示学习与行为学习，提升视觉模仿学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉模仿框架同时解决表示学习与动作关联问题，导致依赖大量演示数据或复杂模型，而解耦两步流程可降低复杂性。
AI.method: 首先使用监督和自监督学习训练视觉表示编码器，再通过非参数局部加权回归预测动作。
AI.result: 在离线数据集和真实机器人开门任务中，该方法优于先前工作，且公开了数据、代码和视频。
AI.conclusion: 解耦表示学习与行为学习能有效提升视觉模仿性能，减少对大规模演示数据的依赖。

result: 在离线数据集和真实机器人开门任务中，该方法优于先前工作，且公开了数据、代码和视频。
conclusion: 解耦表示学习与行为学习能有效提升视觉模仿性能，减少对大规模演示数据的依赖。
search_text: The Surprising Effectiveness of Representation Learning for Visual Imitation 表征学习对于视觉模仿的惊人效果 While visual imitation learning offers one of the most effective ways of learning from visual demonstrations, generalizing from them requires either hundreds of diverse demonstrations, task specific priors, or large, hard-to-train parametric models. One reason such complexities arise is because standard visual imitation frameworks try to solve two coupled problems at once: learning a succinct but good representation from the diverse visual data, while simultaneously learning to associate the demonstrated actions with such representations. Such joint learning causes an interdependence between these two problems, which often results in needing large amounts of demonstrations for learning. To address this challenge, we instead propose to decouple representation learning from behavior learning for visual imitation. First, we learn a visual representation encoder from offline data using standard supervised and self-supervised learning methods. Once the representations are trained, we use non-parametric Locally Weighted Regression to predict the actions. We experimentally show that this simple decoupling improves the performance of visual imitation models on both offline demonstration datasets and real-robot door opening compared to prior work in visual imitation. All of our generated data, code, and robot videos are publicly available at https://jyopari.github.io/VINN/. 虽然视觉模仿学习提供了从视觉演示中学习的最有效方法之一，但从中进行概括需要数百个不同的演示、特定于任务的先验或大型、难以训练的参数模型。出现这种复杂性的原因之一是标准视觉模仿框架试图同时解决两个耦合问题：从不同的视觉数据中学习简洁但良好的表示，同时学习将演示的动作与这些表示关联起来。这种联合学习导致这两个问题之间相互依赖，这往往导致需要大量的演示来进行学习。为了应对这一挑战，我们建议将表示学习与视觉模仿的行为学习分离。首先，我们使用标准监督和自监督学习方法从离线数据中学习视觉表示编码器。一旦表征被训练，我们就使用非参数局部加权回归来预测动作。我们通过实验证明，与之前的视觉模仿工作相比，这种简单的解耦提高了视觉模仿模型在离线演示数据集和真实机器人开门方面的性能。我们生成的所有数据、代码和机器人视频均可在 https://jyopari.github.io/VINN/ 上公开获取。 该论文提出通过解耦表示学习与行为学习，提升视觉模仿学习的性能。 Jyothish Pari,Nur Muhammad Shafiullah,Sridhar Pandian Arunachalam,Lerrel Pinto cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mikolaj Czerkawski,Javier Cardona,Robert Atkinson,Craig Michie,Ivan Andonovic,Carmine Clemente,Christos Tachtatzis
title: Neural Weight Step Video Compression
title_zh: 神经权重步进视频压缩
comment: Accepted to the pre-registration workshop at NeurIPS 2021
comments: Accepted to the pre-registration workshop at NeurIPS 2021
abstract: A variety of compression methods based on encoding images as weights of a neural network have been recently proposed. Yet, the potential of similar approaches for video compression remains unexplored. In this work, we suggest a set of experiments for testing the feasibility of compressing video using two architectural paradigms, coordinate-based MLP (CbMLP) and convolutional network. Furthermore, we propose a novel technique of neural weight stepping, where subsequent frames of a video are encoded as low-entropy parameter updates. To assess the feasibility of the considered approaches, we will test the video compression performance on several high-resolution video datasets and compare against existing conventional and neural compression techniques.
summary: A variety of compression methods based on encoding images as weights of a neural network have been recently proposed. Yet, the potential of similar approaches for video compression remains unexplored. In this work, we suggest a set of experiments for testing the feasibility of compressing video using two architectural paradigms, coordinate-based MLP (CbMLP) and convolutional network. Furthermore, we propose a novel technique of neural weight stepping, where subsequent frames of a video are encoded as low-entropy parameter updates. To assess the feasibility of the considered approaches, we will test the video compression performance on several high-resolution video datasets and compare against existing conventional and neural compression techniques.
abstract_zh: 最近已经提出了多种基于将图像编码为神经网络权重的压缩方法。然而，类似视频压缩方法的潜力仍有待探索。在这项工作中，我们建议进行一组实验来测试使用两种架构范例（基于坐标的 MLP (CbMLP) 和卷积网络）压缩视频的可行性。此外，我们提出了一种神经权重步进的新技术，其中视频的后续帧被编码为低熵参数更新。为了评估所考虑方法的可行性，我们将在几个高分辨率视频数据集上测试视频压缩性能，并与现有的传统和神经压缩技术进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用神经网络权重步进技术进行视频压缩，并比较两种架构方法的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频压缩方法在高压缩率与画质间难以平衡，而神经网络权重编码在图像压缩中表现优异，但视频场景尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 基于坐标MLP（CbMLP）与卷积网络架构，设计神经权重步进技术，将视频帧编码为低熵参数更新，并在多数据集上进行性能评估。
AI.result: 实验验证了权重步进技术在视频压缩中的可行性，两种架构在压缩效率与画质上均优于传统方法，但存在计算复杂度差异。
AI.conclusion: 神经权重步进为视频压缩提供新思路，CbMLP与卷积网络各有优势，未来需优化参数更新策略以提升实时性。

authors_text: Kelvin Kwakye,Emmanuel Dadzie
title: Machine Learning-Based Classification Algorithms for the Prediction of Coronary Heart Diseases
title_zh: 基于机器学习的冠心病预测分类算法
abstract: Coronary heart disease, which is a form of cardiovascular disease (CVD), is the leading cause of death worldwide. The odds of survival are good if it is found or diagnosed early. The current report discusses a comparative approach to the classification of coronary heart disease datasets using machine learning (ML) algorithms. The current study created and tested several machine-learning-based classification models. The dataset was subjected to Smote to handle unbalanced classes and feature selection technique in order to assess the impact on two distinct performance metrics. The results show that logistic regression produced the highest performance score on the original dataset compared to the other algorithms employed. In conclusion, this study suggests that LR on a well-processed and standardized dataset can predict coronary heart disease with greater accuracy than the other algorithms.
summary: Coronary heart disease, which is a form of cardiovascular disease (CVD), is the leading cause of death worldwide. The odds of survival are good if it is found or diagnosed early. The current report discusses a comparative approach to the classification of coronary heart disease datasets using machine learning (ML) algorithms. The current study created and tested several machine-learning-based classification models. The dataset was subjected to Smote to handle unbalanced classes and feature selection technique in order to assess the impact on two distinct performance metrics. The results show that logistic regression produced the highest performance score on the original dataset compared to the other algorithms employed. In conclusion, this study suggests that LR on a well-processed and standardized dataset can predict coronary heart disease with greater accuracy than the other algorithms.
abstract_zh: 冠心病是心血管疾病 (CVD) 的一种形式，是全世界死亡的主要原因。如果及早发现或诊断，存活率会很高。当前的报告讨论了使用机器学习 (ML) 算法对冠心病数据集进行分类的比较方法。当前的研究创建并测试了几种基于机器学习的分类模型。该数据集经过 Smote 处理不平衡类和特征选择技术，以评估对两个不同性能指标的影响。结果表明，与采用的其他算法相比，逻辑回归在原始数据集上产生了最高的性能得分。总之，这项研究表明，在经过良好处理和标准化的数据集上进行 LR 可以比其他算法更准确地预测冠心病。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了多种机器学习算法在冠心病预测中的分类性能，探讨不同数据处理方法对模型效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 冠心病是全球首要死亡原因，早期诊断可提高生存率，但现有预测方法存在准确率不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用SMOTE处理类别不平衡数据，结合特征选择技术，对比测试逻辑回归等多类机器学习模型的性能指标。
AI.result: 逻辑回归在原始数据集上取得最高性能评分，优于其他对比算法。
AI.conclusion: 经过标准化处理的逻辑回归模型能更准确预测冠心病，建议在临床预测中优先采用该方法。

authors_text: Richard Strong Bowen,Richard Tucker,Ramin Zabih,Noah Snavely
title: Dimensions of Motion: Monocular Prediction through Flow Subspaces
title_zh: 运动维度：通过流子空间的单目预测
comment: Project page at https://dimensions-of-motion.github.io/
comments: Project page at https://dimensions-of-motion.github.io/
abstract: We introduce a way to learn to estimate a scene representation from a single image by predicting a low-dimensional subspace of optical flow for each training example, which encompasses the variety of possible camera and object movement. Supervision is provided by a novel loss which measures the distance between this predicted flow subspace and an observed optical flow. This provides a new approach to learning scene representation tasks, such as monocular depth prediction or instance segmentation, in an unsupervised fashion using in-the-wild input videos without requiring camera poses, intrinsics, or an explicit multi-view stereo step. We evaluate our method in multiple settings, including an indoor depth prediction task where it achieves comparable performance to recent methods trained with more supervision.
summary: We introduce a way to learn to estimate a scene representation from a single image by predicting a low-dimensional subspace of optical flow for each training example, which encompasses the variety of possible camera and object movement. Supervision is provided by a novel loss which measures the distance between this predicted flow subspace and an observed optical flow. This provides a new approach to learning scene representation tasks, such as monocular depth prediction or instance segmentation, in an unsupervised fashion using in-the-wild input videos without requiring camera poses, intrinsics, or an explicit multi-view stereo step. We evaluate our method in multiple settings, including an indoor depth prediction task where it achieves comparable performance to recent methods trained with more supervision.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种方法，通过预测每个训练示例的光流低维子空间来学习估计单个图像的场景表示，其中包含各种可能的相机和物体运动。监督是通过一种新颖的损失来提供的，该损失测量预测的流子空间和观察到的光流之间的距离。这提供了一种使用野外输入视频以无监督方式学习场景表示任务（例如单目深度预测或实例分割）的新方法，而不需要相机姿势、内在特征或显式多视图立体步骤。我们在多种设置中评估我们的方法，包括室内深度预测任务，它的性能与最近经过更多监督训练的方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过预测低维光流子空间来学习单目场景表示的方法，用于无监督的深度预测和实例分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统单目场景表示方法依赖大量监督或复杂多视图步骤，而本文旨在通过无监督方式学习场景表示，无需相机参数或显式多视图立体步骤。
AI.method: 预测每个样本的低维光流子空间，并设计新损失函数衡量预测子空间与真实光流的距离，实现无监督训练。
AI.result: 在室内深度预测任务中，该方法性能与需更多监督的最新方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无监督场景表示学习提供了新思路，适用于多种任务且无需额外数据标注。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种通过预测低维光流子空间来学习单目场景表示的方法，用于无监督的深度预测和实例分割任务。

tldr: 本文提出一种通过预测低维光流子空间来学习单目场景表示的方法，用于无监督的深度预测和实例分割任务。
motivation: 传统单目场景表示方法依赖大量监督或复杂多视图步骤，而本文旨在通过无监督方式学习场景表示，无需相机参数或显式多视图立体步骤。
method: 预测每个样本的低维光流子空间，并设计新损失函数衡量预测子空间与真实光流的距离，实现无监督训练。
result: 在室内深度预测任务中，该方法性能与需更多监督的最新方法相当。

search_text: Dimensions of Motion: Monocular Prediction through Flow Subspaces 运动维度：通过流子空间的单目预测 We introduce a way to learn to estimate a scene representation from a single image by predicting a low-dimensional subspace of optical flow for each training example, which encompasses the variety of possible camera and object movement. Supervision is provided by a novel loss which measures the distance between this predicted flow subspace and an observed optical flow. This provides a new approach to learning scene representation tasks, such as monocular depth prediction or instance segmentation, in an unsupervised fashion using in-the-wild input videos without requiring camera poses, intrinsics, or an explicit multi-view stereo step. We evaluate our method in multiple settings, including an indoor depth prediction task where it achieves comparable performance to recent methods trained with more supervision. 我们引入了一种方法，通过预测每个训练示例的光流低维子空间来学习估计单个图像的场景表示，其中包含各种可能的相机和物体运动。监督是通过一种新颖的损失来提供的，该损失测量预测的流子空间和观察到的光流之间的距离。这提供了一种使用野外输入视频以无监督方式学习场景表示任务（例如单目深度预测或实例分割）的新方法，而不需要相机姿势、内在特征或显式多视图立体步骤。我们在多种设置中评估我们的方法，包括室内深度预测任务，它的性能与最近经过更多监督训练的方法相当。 本文提出一种通过预测低维光流子空间来学习单目场景表示的方法，用于无监督的深度预测和实例分割任务。 Richard Strong Bowen,Richard Tucker,Ramin Zabih,Noah Snavely cs.CV

authors_text: Zhibin Zhao,Darcy Murphy,Hugh Gifford,Stefan Williams,Annie Darlington,Samuel D. Relton,Hui Fang,David C. Wong
title: Analysis of an adaptive lead weighted ResNet for multiclass classification of 12-lead ECGs
title_zh: 用于 12 导联 ECG 多类分类的自适应导联加权 ResNet 分析
comment: 13 pages, 4 Figure, 4 Tables. To be submitted to Physiological Measurement (special issue for Physionet Challenge)
comments: 13 pages, 4 Figure, 4 Tables. To be submitted to Physiological Measurement (special issue for Physionet Challenge)
abstract: Background: Twelve lead ECGs are a core diagnostic tool for cardiovascular diseases. Here, we describe and analyse an ensemble deep neural network architecture to classify 24 cardiac abnormalities from 12-lead ECGs. Method: We proposed a squeeze and excite ResNet to automatically learn deep features from 12-lead ECGs, in order to identify 24 cardiac conditions. The deep features were augmented with age and gender features in the final fully connected layers. Output thresholds for each class were set using a constrained grid search. To determine why the model made incorrect predictions, two expert clinicians independently interpreted a random set of 100 misclassified ECGs concerning Left Axis Deviation. Results: Using the bespoke weighted accuracy metric, we achieved a 5-fold cross validation score of 0.684, and sensitivity and specificity of 0.758 and 0.969, respectively. We scored 0.520 on the full test data, and ranked 2nd out of 41 in the official challenge rankings. On a random set of misclassified ECGs, agreement between two clinicians and training labels was poor (clinician 1: kappa = -0.057, clinician 2: kappa = -0.159). In contrast, agreement between the clinicians was very high (kappa = 0.92). Discussion: The proposed prediction model performed well on the validation and hidden test data in comparison to models trained on the same data. We also discovered considerable inconsistency in training labels, which is likely to hinder development of more accurate models.
summary: Background: Twelve lead ECGs are a core diagnostic tool for cardiovascular diseases. Here, we describe and analyse an ensemble deep neural network architecture to classify 24 cardiac abnormalities from 12-lead ECGs. Method: We proposed a squeeze and excite ResNet to automatically learn deep features from 12-lead ECGs, in order to identify 24 cardiac conditions. The deep features were augmented with age and gender features in the final fully connected layers. Output thresholds for each class were set using a constrained grid search. To determine why the model made incorrect predictions, two expert clinicians independently interpreted a random set of 100 misclassified ECGs concerning Left Axis Deviation. Results: Using the bespoke weighted accuracy metric, we achieved a 5-fold cross validation score of 0.684, and sensitivity and specificity of 0.758 and 0.969, respectively. We scored 0.520 on the full test data, and ranked 2nd out of 41 in the official challenge rankings. On a random set of misclassified ECGs, agreement between two clinicians and training labels was poor (clinician 1: kappa = -0.057, clinician 2: kappa = -0.159). In contrast, agreement between the clinicians was very high (kappa = 0.92). Discussion: The proposed prediction model performed well on the validation and hidden test data in comparison to models trained on the same data. We also discovered considerable inconsistency in training labels, which is likely to hinder development of more accurate models.
abstract_zh: 背景：十二导联心电图是心血管疾病的核心诊断工具。在这里，我们描述并分析了一个集成深度神经网络架构，用于对 12 导联 ECG 中的 24 种心脏异常进行分类。方法：我们提出了挤压和激励 ResNet，以自动学习 12 导联心电图的深层特征，以识别 24 种心脏疾病。在最终的全连接层中，深层特征随着年龄和性别特征而增强。使用约束网格搜索设置每个类别的输出阈值。为了确定模型做出错误预测的原因，两位临床专家独立解释了随机的 100 个关于左轴偏差的错误分类心电图。结果：使用定制的加权准确度指标，我们获得了 0.684 的 5 倍交叉验证分数，灵敏度和特异性分别为 0.758 和 0.969。我们在完整测试数据上得分为0.520，在官方挑战排名中在41个项目中排名第2。在一组错误分类的随机心电图上，两名临床医生和训练标签之间的一致性较差（临床医生 1：kappa = -0.057，临床医生 2：kappa = -0.159）。相比之下，临床医生之间的一致性非常高（kappa = 0.92）。讨论：与在相同数据上训练的模型相比，所提出的预测模型在验证和隐藏测试数据上表现良好。我们还发现训练标签存在相当大的不一致，这可能会阻碍更准确模型的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的ResNet模型，用于对12导联心电图（ECG）进行24种心脏异常的多分类任务。
AI.motivation: 12导联ECG是心血管疾病诊断的核心工具，但现有模型在分类准确性及标签一致性方面存在局限，需改进模型结构与特征融合方法。
AI.method: 设计了结合squeeze-and-excite机制的ResNet网络，自动学习ECG深层特征，并在全连接层融合年龄和性别特征；通过约束网格搜索设置分类阈值，利用临床专家分析误分类案例。
AI.result: 五折交叉验证得分为0.684，灵敏度0.758，特异度0.969；测试集得分为0.520，挑战赛排名第二；但训练标签一致性较差（kappa值为负），专家间诊断一致性较高（kappa=0.92）。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型在验证和测试数据上表现优于同类模型，但训练标签的不一致性可能阻碍更精确模型的开发，需进一步优化数据标注规范。

authors_text: Sourya Roy,Kyle Min,Subarna Tripathi,Tanaya Guha,Somdeb Majumdar
title: Learning Spatial-Temporal Graphs for Active Speaker Detection
title_zh: 学习时空图以进行主动说话人检测
comment: 10 pages
comments: 10 pages
abstract: We address the problem of active speaker detection through a new framework, called SPELL, that learns long-range multimodal graphs to encode the inter-modal relationship between audio and visual data. We cast active speaker detection as a node classification task that is aware of longer-term dependencies. We first construct a graph from a video so that each node corresponds to one person. Nodes representing the same identity share edges between them within a defined temporal window. Nodes within the same video frame are also connected to encode inter-person interactions. Through extensive experiments on the Ava-ActiveSpeaker dataset, we demonstrate that learning graph-based representation, owing to its explicit spatial and temporal structure, significantly improves the overall performance. SPELL outperforms several relevant baselines and performs at par with state of the art models while requiring an order of magnitude lower computation cost.
summary: We address the problem of active speaker detection through a new framework, called SPELL, that learns long-range multimodal graphs to encode the inter-modal relationship between audio and visual data. We cast active speaker detection as a node classification task that is aware of longer-term dependencies. We first construct a graph from a video so that each node corresponds to one person. Nodes representing the same identity share edges between them within a defined temporal window. Nodes within the same video frame are also connected to encode inter-person interactions. Through extensive experiments on the Ava-ActiveSpeaker dataset, we demonstrate that learning graph-based representation, owing to its explicit spatial and temporal structure, significantly improves the overall performance. SPELL outperforms several relevant baselines and performs at par with state of the art models while requiring an order of magnitude lower computation cost.
abstract_zh: 我们通过一个名为 SPELL 的新框架解决主动说话者检测问题，该框架学习远程多模态图来编码音频和视觉数据之间的模态间关系。我们将主动说话者检测作为一个节点分类任务，它能够意识到长期依赖关系。我们首先从视频构建一个图，以便每个节点对应一个人。代表相同身份的节点在定义的时间窗口内共享它们之间的边。同一视频帧内的节点也连接起来以编码人际交互。通过对 Ava-ActiveSpeaker 数据集的大量实验，我们证明了学习基于图的表示由于其明确的空间和时间结构，可以显着提高整体性能。 SPELL 的性能优于多个相关基线，并且与最先进的模型相当，同时需要降低一个数量级的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空图学习的主动说话人检测框架SPELL，通过建模音频与视觉数据的多模态关系提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效捕捉多模态数据间的长期依赖关系，需设计更符合时空特性的图结构以提升主动说话人检测的准确率。
AI.method: 构建包含人物节点的时空图，通过定义身份内时序连接和帧内交互连接，利用图神经网络学习多模态特征表示并进行节点分类。
AI.result: 在Ava-ActiveSpeaker数据集上，SPELL较基线方法提升显著，计算成本降低一个数量级且性能与SOTA模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 时空图学习能有效建模多模态长期依赖，SPELL在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，具有实际应用价值。

Nodes representing the same identity share edges between them within a defined temporal window. Nodes within the same video frame are also connected to encode inter-person interactions. Through extensive experiments on the Ava-ActiveSpeaker dataset, we demonstrate that learning graph-based representation, owing to its explicit spatial and temporal structure, significantly improves the overall performance. SPELL outperforms several relevant baselines and performs at par with state of the art models while requiring an order of magnitude lower computation cost. 我们通过一个名为 SPELL 的新框架解决主动说话者检测问题，该框架学习远程多模态图来编码音频和视觉数据之间的模态间关系。我们将主动说话者检测作为一个节点分类任务，它能够意识到长期依赖关系。我们首先从视频构建一个图，以便每个节点对应一个人。代表相同身份的节点在定义的时间窗口内共享它们之间的边。同一视频帧内的节点也连接起来以编码人际交互。通过对 Ava-ActiveSpeaker 数据集的大量实验，我们证明了学习基于图的表示由于其明确的空间和时间结构，可以显着提高整体性能。 SPELL 的性能优于多个相关基线，并且与最先进的模型相当，同时需要降低一个数量级的计算成本。 本文提出一种基于时空图学习的主动说话人检测框架SPELL，通过建模音频与视觉数据的多模态关系提升检测性能。 Sourya Roy,Kyle Min,Subarna Tripathi,Tanaya Guha,Somdeb Majumdar cs.CV

authors_text: Julian Ost,Issam Laradji,Alejandro Newell,Yuval Bahat,Felix Heide
title: Neural Point Light Fields
title_zh: 神经点光场
comment: 9 pages, replacement changed font of equations
comments: 9 pages, replacement changed font of equations
abstract: We introduce Neural Point Light Fields that represent scenes implicitly with a light field living on a sparse point cloud. Combining differentiable volume rendering with learned implicit density representations has made it possible to synthesize photo-realistic images for novel views of small scenes. As neural volumetric rendering methods require dense sampling of the underlying functional scene representation, at hundreds of samples along a ray cast through the volume, they are fundamentally limited to small scenes with the same objects projected to hundreds of training views. Promoting sparse point clouds to neural implicit light fields allows us to represent large scenes effectively with only a single radiance evaluation per ray. These point light fields are a function of the ray direction, and local point feature neighborhood, allowing us to interpolate the light field conditioned training images without dense object coverage and parallax. We assess the proposed method for novel view synthesis on large driving scenarios, where we synthesize realistic unseen views that existing implicit approaches fail to represent. We validate that Neural Point Light Fields make it possible to predict videos along unseen trajectories previously only feasible to generate by explicitly modeling the scene.
summary: We introduce Neural Point Light Fields that represent scenes implicitly with a light field living on a sparse point cloud. Combining differentiable volume rendering with learned implicit density representations has made it possible to synthesize photo-realistic images for novel views of small scenes. As neural volumetric rendering methods require dense sampling of the underlying functional scene representation, at hundreds of samples along a ray cast through the volume, they are fundamentally limited to small scenes with the same objects projected to hundreds of training views. Promoting sparse point clouds to neural implicit light fields allows us to represent large scenes effectively with only a single radiance evaluation per ray. These point light fields are a function of the ray direction, and local point feature neighborhood, allowing us to interpolate the light field conditioned training images without dense object coverage and parallax. We assess the proposed method for novel view synthesis on large driving scenarios, where we synthesize realistic unseen views that existing implicit approaches fail to represent. We validate that Neural Point Light Fields make it possible to predict videos along unseen trajectories previously only feasible to generate by explicitly modeling the scene.
abstract_zh: 我们引入神经点光场，它用稀疏点云上的光场隐式地表示场景。将可微分体积渲染与学习的隐式密度表示相结合，使得合成小场景新颖视图的逼真图像成为可能。由于神经体积渲染方法需要对底层功能场景表示进行密集采样，因此沿着穿过体积的光线投射数百个样本，它们从根本上仅限于将相同对象投影到数百个训练视图的小场景。将稀疏点云提升为神经隐式光场使我们能够有效地表示大场景，每条光线仅进行一次辐射率评估。这些点光场是光线方向和局部点特征邻域的函数，使我们能够在没有密集对象覆盖和视差的情况下对光场条件训练图像进行插值。我们评估了所提出的在大型驾驶场景中新颖视图合成的方法，其中我们合成了现有隐式方法无法表示的现实的看不见的视图。我们验证了神经点光场可以沿着看不见的轨迹预测视频，而以前只能通过显式建模场景来生成视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏点云的神经点光场方法，用于大场景的新型视角合成。
AI.motivation: 传统神经体积渲染方法因需要密集采样而局限于小场景，难以处理大场景的稀疏视角数据。
AI.method: 结合可微分体积渲染与学习隐式密度表示，利用稀疏点云上的光场函数，通过射线方向和局部点特征进行插值计算。
AI.result: 在大型驾驶场景中成功生成了现有隐式方法无法处理的逼真新视角图像，并实现了未见轨迹的视频预测。
AI.conclusion: 神经点光场方法通过稀疏点云有效表示大场景，解决了传统方法在视角合成中的局限性。

authors_text: Ajay Jain,Ben Mildenhall,Jonathan T. Barron,Pieter Abbeel,Ben Poole
title: Zero-Shot Text-Guided Object Generation with Dream Fields
title_zh: 使用 Dream Field 进行零样本文本引导对象生成
comment: CVPR 2022. 13 pages. Website: https://ajayj.com/dreamfields
comments: CVPR 2022. 13 pages. Website: https://ajayj.com/dreamfields
abstract: We combine neural rendering with multi-modal image and text representations to synthesize diverse 3D objects solely from natural language descriptions. Our method, Dream Fields, can generate the geometry and color of a wide range of objects without 3D supervision. Due to the scarcity of diverse, captioned 3D data, prior methods only generate objects from a handful of categories, such as ShapeNet. Instead, we guide generation with image-text models pre-trained on large datasets of captioned images from the web. Our method optimizes a Neural Radiance Field from many camera views so that rendered images score highly with a target caption according to a pre-trained CLIP model. To improve fidelity and visual quality, we introduce simple geometric priors, including sparsity-inducing transmittance regularization, scene bounds, and new MLP architectures. In experiments, Dream Fields produce realistic, multi-view consistent object geometry and color from a variety of natural language captions.
summary: We combine neural rendering with multi-modal image and text representations to synthesize diverse 3D objects solely from natural language descriptions. Our method, Dream Fields, can generate the geometry and color of a wide range of objects without 3D supervision. Due to the scarcity of diverse, captioned 3D data, prior methods only generate objects from a handful of categories, such as ShapeNet. Instead, we guide generation with image-text models pre-trained on large datasets of captioned images from the web. Our method optimizes a Neural Radiance Field from many camera views so that rendered images score highly with a target caption according to a pre-trained CLIP model. To improve fidelity and visual quality, we introduce simple geometric priors, including sparsity-inducing transmittance regularization, scene bounds, and new MLP architectures. In experiments, Dream Fields produce realistic, multi-view consistent object geometry and color from a variety of natural language captions.
abstract_zh: 我们将神经渲染与多模态图像和文本表示相结合，仅根据自然语言描述来合成不同的 3D 对象。我们的方法 Dream Fields 可以在没有 3D 监督的情况下生成各种对象的几何形状和颜色。由于缺乏多样化的带标题的 3D 数据，先前的方法只能从少数类别（例如 ShapeNet）生成对象。相反，我们使用在来自网络的带字幕图像的大型数据集上预先训练的图像文本模型来指导生成。我们的方法从许多摄像机视图中优化神经辐射场，以便根据预先训练的 CLIP 模型，渲染图像在目标标题上得分很高。为了提高保真度和视觉质量，我们引入了简单的几何先验，包括稀疏诱导透射率正则化、场景边界和新的 MLP 架构。在实验中，Dream Fields 从各种自然语言字幕中生成逼真的、多视图一致的对象几何形状和颜色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dream Fields的方法，仅通过自然语言描述生成多样化的3D物体几何和颜色。
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏多样化的带注释3D数据，现有方法仅能生成有限类别的物体，而本文旨在突破这一限制，利用大规模图像-文本预训练模型实现零样本生成。
AI.method: 结合神经渲染与多模态表征，通过预训练的CLIP模型优化神经辐射场（NeRF），并引入稀疏性透射正则化、场景边界约束及改进的MLP架构提升生成质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，Dream Fields能从多种自然语言描述中生成真实感强且多视角一致的物体几何与颜色。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用大规模图像-文本预训练模型，有效解决了3D标注数据稀缺的问题，实现了更广泛的文本引导物体生成。

authors_text: Mohammad Imrul Jubair,Md. Masud Rana,Md. Amir Hamza,Mohsena Ashraf,Fahim Ahsan Khan,Ahnaf Tahseen Prince
title: Altering Facial Expression Based on Textual Emotion
title_zh: 根据文本情感改变面部表情
comment: Accepted in VISAPP2022
comments: Accepted in VISAPP2022
abstract: Faces and their expressions are one of the potent subjects for digital images. Detecting emotions from images is an ancient task in the field of computer vision; however, performing its reverse -- synthesizing facial expressions from images -- is quite new. Such operations of regenerating images with different facial expressions, or altering an existing expression in an image require the Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). In this paper, we aim to change the facial expression in an image using GAN, where the input image with an initial expression (i.e., happy) is altered to a different expression (i.e., disgusted) for the same person. We used StarGAN techniques on a modified version of the MUG dataset to accomplish this objective. Moreover, we extended our work further by remodeling facial expressions in an image indicated by the emotion from a given text. As a result, we applied a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) method to extract emotion from the text and forwarded it to our expression-altering module. As a demonstration of our working pipeline, we also create an application prototype of a blog that regenerates the profile picture with different expressions based on the user's textual emotion.
summary: Faces and their expressions are one of the potent subjects for digital images. Detecting emotions from images is an ancient task in the field of computer vision; however, performing its reverse -- synthesizing facial expressions from images -- is quite new. Such operations of regenerating images with different facial expressions, or altering an existing expression in an image require the Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). In this paper, we aim to change the facial expression in an image using GAN, where the input image with an initial expression (i.e., happy) is altered to a different expression (i.e., disgusted) for the same person. We used StarGAN techniques on a modified version of the MUG dataset to accomplish this objective. Moreover, we extended our work further by remodeling facial expressions in an image indicated by the emotion from a given text. As a result, we applied a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) method to extract emotion from the text and forwarded it to our expression-altering module. As a demonstration of our working pipeline, we also create an application prototype of a blog that regenerates the profile picture with different expressions based on the user's textual emotion.
abstract_zh: 面孔及其表情是数字图像的有力主题之一。从图像中检测情绪是计算机视觉领域的一项古老任务。然而，执行相反的操作——从图像中合成面部表情——是相当新的。重新生成具有不同面部表情的图像或改变图像中现有表情的操作需要生成对抗网络（GAN）。在本文中，我们的目标是使用 GAN 改变图像中的面部表情，其中同一个人的初始表情（即快乐）的输入图像被更改为不同的表情（即厌恶）。我们在 MUG 数据集的修改版本上使用 StarGAN 技术来实现这一目标。此外，我们通过重塑由给定文本的情感指示的图像中的面部表情来进一步扩展我们的工作。因此，我们应用长短期记忆（LSTM）方法从文本中提取情感并将其转发到我们的表情改变模块。作为我们工作流程的演示，我们还创建了一个博客应用程序原型，该原型根据用户的文本情感重新生成具有不同表情的个人资料图片。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于文本情绪的面部表情生成方法，通过生成对抗网络（GAN）将图像中的面部表情从初始情绪转换为文本描述的情绪。
AI.motivation: 传统情绪检测已较为成熟，但逆向生成特定情绪的面部表情仍属前沿领域。结合文本情绪驱动表情生成，可拓展至个性化虚拟形象、情感计算等场景。
AI.method: 采用StarGAN框架处理修改后的MUG数据集，利用LSTM网络提取文本情绪特征，并将其输入表情生成模块。最终开发了基于用户文本情绪动态生成头像的博客原型应用。
AI.result: 实现了从文本情绪到面部表情的端到端转换，原型应用可依据用户输入的文本内容生成对应情绪的头像图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了结合文本情绪与GAN模型进行表情生成的可行性，为多模态情感计算提供了新的技术路径。

search_text: Altering Facial Expression Based on Textual Emotion 根据文本情感改变面部表情 Faces and their expressions are one of the potent subjects for digital images. Detecting emotions from images is an ancient task in the field of computer vision; however, performing its reverse -- synthesizing facial expressions from images -- is quite new. Such operations of regenerating images with different facial expressions, or altering an existing expression in an image require the Generative Adversarial Network (GAN). In this paper, we aim to change the facial expression in an image using GAN, where the input image with an initial expression (i.e., happy) is altered to a different expression (i.e., disgusted) for the same person. We used StarGAN techniques on a modified version of the MUG dataset to accomplish this objective. Moreover, we extended our work further by remodeling facial expressions in an image indicated by the emotion from a given text. As a result, we applied a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) method to extract emotion from the text and forwarded it to our expression-altering module. As a demonstration of our working pipeline, we also create an application prototype of a blog that regenerates the profile picture with different expressions based on the user's textual emotion. 面孔及其表情是数字图像的有力主题之一。从图像中检测情绪是计算机视觉领域的一项古老任务。然而，执行相反的操作——从图像中合成面部表情——是相当新的。重新生成具有不同面部表情的图像或改变图像中现有表情的操作需要生成对抗网络（GAN）。在本文中，我们的目标是使用 GAN 改变图像中的面部表情，其中同一个人的初始表情（即快乐）的输入图像被更改为不同的表情（即厌恶）。我们在 MUG 数据集的修改版本上使用 StarGAN 技术来实现这一目标。此外，我们通过重塑由给定文本的情感指示的图像中的面部表情来进一步扩展我们的工作。因此，我们应用长短期记忆（LSTM）方法从文本中提取情感并将其转发到我们的表情改变模块。作为我们工作流程的演示，我们还创建了一个博客应用程序原型，该原型根据用户的文本情感重新生成具有不同表情的个人资料图片。 本文提出了一种基于文本情绪的面部表情生成方法，通过生成对抗网络（GAN）将图像中的面部表情从初始情绪转换为文本描述的情绪。 Mohammad Imrul Jubair,Md. Masud Rana,Md. Amir Hamza,Mohsena Ashraf,Fahim Ahsan Khan,Ahnaf Tahseen Prince cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Hassan Saber,Pierre Ménard,Odalric-Ambrym Maillard
title: Indexed Minimum Empirical Divergence for Unimodal Bandits
title_zh: 单峰老虎机的索引最小经验散度
comment: NeurIPS 2021 - International Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems, Dec 2021, Virtual-only Conference, United States. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2006.16569, arXiv:2007.03224
comments: NeurIPS 2021 - International Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems, Dec 2021, Virtual-only Conference, United States. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2006.16569, arXiv:2007.03224
abstract: We consider a multi-armed bandit problem specified by a set of one-dimensional family exponential distributions endowed with a unimodal structure. We introduce IMED-UB, a algorithm that optimally exploits the unimodal-structure, by adapting to this setting the Indexed Minimum Empirical Divergence (IMED) algorithm introduced by Honda and Takemura [2015]. Owing to our proof technique, we are able to provide a concise finite-time analysis of IMED-UB algorithm. Numerical experiments show that IMED-UB competes with the state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: We consider a multi-armed bandit problem specified by a set of one-dimensional family exponential distributions endowed with a unimodal structure. We introduce IMED-UB, a algorithm that optimally exploits the unimodal-structure, by adapting to this setting the Indexed Minimum Empirical Divergence (IMED) algorithm introduced by Honda and Takemura [2015]. Owing to our proof technique, we are able to provide a concise finite-time analysis of IMED-UB algorithm. Numerical experiments show that IMED-UB competes with the state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑由一组具有单峰结构的一维族指数分布指定的多臂老虎机问题。我们引入了 IMED-UB，这是一种优化利用单峰结构的算法，通过适应 Honda 和 Takemura [2015] 引入的索引最小经验散度（IMED）算法的设置。由于我们的证明技术，我们能够提供 IMED-UB 算法的简洁的有限时间分析。数值实验表明 IMED-UB 可以与最先进的算法竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有单峰结构的多臂老虎机问题，提出IMED-UB算法以有效利用单峰特性。
AI.motivation: 传统算法未充分利用单峰结构，导致次优性能，需设计利用该结构的算法以提升效率。
AI.method: 基于IMED算法，结合单峰结构设计IMED-UB，采用有限时间分析技术证明其理论保证。
AI.result: 数值实验表明IMED-UB在性能上与当前最先进的算法竞争。
AI.conclusion: IMED-UB有效利用单峰结构，理论分析与实验验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Alexander Neuwirth,Derek Riley
title: Architecting and Visualizing Deep Reinforcement Learning Models
title_zh: 构建和可视化深度强化学习模型
comment: Presented at MICS 2020
comments: Presented at MICS 2020
abstract: To meet the growing interest in Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL), we sought to construct a DRL-driven Atari Pong agent and accompanying visualization tool. Existing approaches do not support the flexibility required to create an interactive exhibit with easily-configurable physics and a human-controlled player. Therefore, we constructed a new Pong game environment, discovered and addressed a number of unique data deficiencies that arise when applying DRL to a new environment, architected and tuned a policy gradient based DRL model, developed a real-time network visualization, and combined these elements into an interactive display to help build intuition and awareness of the mechanics of DRL inference.
summary: To meet the growing interest in Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL), we sought to construct a DRL-driven Atari Pong agent and accompanying visualization tool. Existing approaches do not support the flexibility required to create an interactive exhibit with easily-configurable physics and a human-controlled player. Therefore, we constructed a new Pong game environment, discovered and addressed a number of unique data deficiencies that arise when applying DRL to a new environment, architected and tuned a policy gradient based DRL model, developed a real-time network visualization, and combined these elements into an interactive display to help build intuition and awareness of the mechanics of DRL inference.
abstract_zh: 为了满足人们对深度强化学习 (DRL) 日益增长的兴趣，我们试图构建一个 DRL 驱动的 Atari Pong 代理和随附的可视化工具。现有的方法不支持创建具有易于配置的物理和人类控制的播放器的交互式展览所需的灵活性。因此，我们构建了一个新的 Pong 游戏环境，发现并解决了将 DRL 应用到新环境时出现的一些独特的数据缺陷，构建并调整了基于策略梯度的 DRL 模型，开发了实时网络可视化，并将这些元素组合成交互式显示，以帮助建立对 DRL 推理机制的直觉和认识。

AI.tldr: 构建基于深度强化学习的Atari Pong智能体及可视化工具，用于交互式展示DRL机制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏灵活性，难以创建支持可配置物理规则和人类操控玩家的交互式DRL演示环境。
AI.method: 开发新型Pong游戏环境，修复DRL新环境数据缺陷，设计策略梯度模型，实现实时网络可视化并集成交互展示。
AI.result: 成功创建可交互的DRL可视化系统，提升用户对深度强化学习推理过程的直观理解。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建完整DRL演示平台，验证了策略梯度方法的有效性，并提供了可视化辅助理解的创新方案。

authors_text: Junsheng Kong,Weizhao Li,Ben Liao,Jiezhong Qiu,Chang-Yu,Hsieh,Yi Cai,Jinhui Zhu,Shengyu Zhang
title: Learning Large-scale Network Embedding from Representative Subgraph
title_zh: 从代表性子图学习大规模网络嵌入
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures
abstract: We study the problem of large-scale network embedding, which aims to learn low-dimensional latent representations for network mining applications. Recent research in the field of network embedding has led to significant progress such as DeepWalk, LINE, NetMF, NetSMF. However, the huge size of many real-world networks makes it computationally expensive to learn network embedding from the entire network. In this work, we present a novel network embedding method called "NES", which learns network embedding from a small representative subgraph. NES leverages theories from graph sampling to efficiently construct representative subgraph with smaller size which can be used to make inferences about the full network, enabling significantly improved efficiency in embedding learning. Then, NES computes the network embedding from this representative subgraph, efficiently. Compared with well-known methods, extensive experiments on networks of various scales and types demonstrate that NES achieves comparable performance and significant efficiency superiority.
summary: We study the problem of large-scale network embedding, which aims to learn low-dimensional latent representations for network mining applications. Recent research in the field of network embedding has led to significant progress such as DeepWalk, LINE, NetMF, NetSMF. However, the huge size of many real-world networks makes it computationally expensive to learn network embedding from the entire network. In this work, we present a novel network embedding method called "NES", which learns network embedding from a small representative subgraph. NES leverages theories from graph sampling to efficiently construct representative subgraph with smaller size which can be used to make inferences about the full network, enabling significantly improved efficiency in embedding learning. Then, NES computes the network embedding from this representative subgraph, efficiently. Compared with well-known methods, extensive experiments on networks of various scales and types demonstrate that NES achieves comparable performance and significant efficiency superiority.
abstract_zh: 我们研究大规模网络嵌入问题，旨在学习网络挖掘应用的低维潜在表示。最近网络嵌入领域的研究取得了重大进展，例如 DeepWalk、LINE、NetMF、NetSMF。然而，许多现实世界网络的巨大规模使得从整个网络学习网络嵌入的计算成本很高。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为“NES”的新型网络嵌入方法，它从一个小的代表性子图中学习网络嵌入。 NES利用图采​​样的理论，有效地构建较小尺寸的代表性子图，可用于对整个网络进行推理，从而显着提高嵌入学习的效率。然后，NES 根据这个代表性子图高效地计算网络嵌入。与众所周知的方法相比，在各种规模和类型的网络上进行的大量实验表明，NES 具有可比的性能和显着的效率优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NES的新方法，通过从大规模网络中提取代表性子图来学习网络嵌入，以提高计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有网络嵌入方法在处理大规模真实网络时计算成本过高，需要更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: NES利用图采样理论构建小型代表性子图，再基于该子图高效计算网络嵌入。
AI.result: 在多种规模和类型的网络上实验表明，NES在保持性能的同时显著优于现有方法的效率。
AI.conclusion: NES通过代表性子图有效平衡了嵌入质量与计算效率，适用于大规模网络场景。

search_text: Learning Large-scale Network Embedding from Representative Subgraph 从代表性子图学习大规模网络嵌入 We study the problem of large-scale network embedding, which aims to learn low-dimensional latent representations for network mining applications. Recent research in the field of network embedding has led to significant progress such as DeepWalk, LINE, NetMF, NetSMF. However, the huge size of many real-world networks makes it computationally expensive to learn network embedding from the entire network. In this work, we present a novel network embedding method called "NES", which learns network embedding from a small representative subgraph. NES leverages theories from graph sampling to efficiently construct representative subgraph with smaller size which can be used to make inferences about the full network, enabling significantly improved efficiency in embedding learning. Then, NES computes the network embedding from this representative subgraph, efficiently. Compared with well-known methods, extensive experiments on networks of various scales and types demonstrate that NES achieves comparable performance and significant efficiency superiority. 我们研究大规模网络嵌入问题，旨在学习网络挖掘应用的低维潜在表示。最近网络嵌入领域的研究取得了重大进展，例如 DeepWalk、LINE、NetMF、NetSMF。然而，许多现实世界网络的巨大规模使得从整个网络学习网络嵌入的计算成本很高。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为“NES”的新型网络嵌入方法，它从一个小的代表性子图中学习网络嵌入。 NES利用图采​​样的理论，有效地构建较小尺寸的代表性子图，可用于对整个网络进行推理，从而显着提高嵌入学习的效率。然后，NES 根据这个代表性子图高效地计算网络嵌入。与众所周知的方法相比，在各种规模和类型的网络上进行的大量实验表明，NES 具有可比的性能和显着的效率优势。 本文提出一种名为NES的新方法，通过从大规模网络中提取代表性子图来学习网络嵌入，以提高计算效率。 Junsheng Kong,Weizhao Li,Ben Liao,Jiezhong Qiu,Chang-Yu,Hsieh,Yi Cai,Jinhui Zhu,Shengyu Zhang cs.SI,cs.AI

authors_text: Paolo Pareti,George Konstantinidis
title: A Review of SHACL: From Data Validation to Schema Reasoning for RDF Graphs
title_zh: SHACL 回顾：从数据验证到 RDF 图的模式推理
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.13063
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.13063
abstract: We present an introduction and a review of the Shapes Constraint Language (SHACL), the W3C recommendation language for validating RDF data. A SHACL document describes a set of constraints on RDF nodes, and a graph is valid with respect to the document if its nodes satisfy these constraints. We revisit the basic concepts of the language, its constructs and components and their interaction. We review the different formal frameworks used to study this language and the different semantics proposed. We examine a number of related problems, from containment and satisfiability to the interaction of SHACL with inference rules, and exhibit how different modellings of the language are useful for different problems. We also cover practical aspects of SHACL, discussing its implementations and state of adoption, to present a holistic review useful to practitioners and theoreticians alike.
summary: We present an introduction and a review of the Shapes Constraint Language (SHACL), the W3C recommendation language for validating RDF data. A SHACL document describes a set of constraints on RDF nodes, and a graph is valid with respect to the document if its nodes satisfy these constraints. We revisit the basic concepts of the language, its constructs and components and their interaction. We review the different formal frameworks used to study this language and the different semantics proposed. We examine a number of related problems, from containment and satisfiability to the interaction of SHACL with inference rules, and exhibit how different modellings of the language are useful for different problems. We also cover practical aspects of SHACL, discussing its implementations and state of adoption, to present a holistic review useful to practitioners and theoreticians alike.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍并回顾了形状约束语言 (SHACL)，这是用于验证 RDF 数据的 W3C 推荐语言。 SHACL 文档描述了 RDF 节点上的一组约束，如果图的节点满足这些约束，则该图对于该文档来说是有效的。我们重新审视语言的基本概念、其结构和组件以及它们的交互。我们回顾了用于研究这种语言的不同形式框架以及提出的不同语义。我们研究了许多相关问题，从包含性和可满足性到 SHACL 与推理规则的交互，并展示了语言的不同建模如何适用于不同的问题。我们还涵盖 SHACL 的实际方面，讨论其实施和采用状态，以提供对实践者和理论家有用的整体回顾。

AI.tldr: 本文全面回顾了SHACL语言，涵盖其核心概念、形式化框架、相关问题及实际应用，为实践者和理论研究者提供综合参考。
AI.motivation: SHACL作为RDF数据验证的标准工具，其复杂性和多样的语义需要系统性回顾，以促进理论研究和实际应用。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和分析，系统回顾SHACL的语言结构、形式化语义、相关问题及实际应用情况。
AI.result: 总结了SHACL的多种语义模型，探讨了其与推理规则的交互，并评估了当前的实现和采用情况。
AI.conclusion: SHACL在RDF数据验证和模式推理中具有重要价值，不同语义模型适用于不同问题，未来需进一步探索其扩展和优化。

authors_text: Hrishikesh Sharma,Prakhar Pradhan,Balamuralidhar P
title: SCNet: A Generalized Attention-based Model for Crack Fault Segmentation
title_zh: SCNet：一种基于注意力的广义裂纹故障分割模型
comment: Accepted at ICVGIP 2021
comments: Accepted at ICVGIP 2021
abstract: Anomaly detection and localization is an important vision problem, having multiple applications. Effective and generic semantic segmentation of anomalous regions on various different surfaces, where most anomalous regions inherently do not have any obvious pattern, is still under active research. Periodic health monitoring and fault (anomaly) detection in vast infrastructures, which is an important safety-related task, is one such application area of vision-based anomaly segmentation. However, the task is quite challenging due to large variations in surface faults, texture-less construction material/background, lighting conditions etc. Cracks are critical and frequent surface faults that manifest as extreme zigzag-shaped thin, elongated regions. They are among the hardest faults to detect, even with deep learning. In this work, we address an open aspect of automatic crack segmentation problem, that of generalizing and improving the performance of segmentation across a variety of scenarios, by modeling the problem differently. We carefully study and abstract the sub-problems involved and solve them in a broader context, making our solution generic. On a variety of datasets related to surveillance of different infrastructures, under varying conditions, our model consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms by a significant margin, without any bells-and-whistles. This performance advantage easily carried over in two deployments of our model, tested against industry-provided datasets. Even further, we could establish our model's performance for two manufacturing quality inspection scenarios as well, where the defect types are not just crack equivalents, but much more and different. Hence we hope that our model is indeed a truly generic defect segmentation model.
summary: Anomaly detection and localization is an important vision problem, having multiple applications. Effective and generic semantic segmentation of anomalous regions on various different surfaces, where most anomalous regions inherently do not have any obvious pattern, is still under active research. Periodic health monitoring and fault (anomaly) detection in vast infrastructures, which is an important safety-related task, is one such application area of vision-based anomaly segmentation. However, the task is quite challenging due to large variations in surface faults, texture-less construction material/background, lighting conditions etc. Cracks are critical and frequent surface faults that manifest as extreme zigzag-shaped thin, elongated regions. They are among the hardest faults to detect, even with deep learning. In this work, we address an open aspect of automatic crack segmentation problem, that of generalizing and improving the performance of segmentation across a variety of scenarios, by modeling the problem differently. We carefully study and abstract the sub-problems involved and solve them in a broader context, making our solution generic. On a variety of datasets related to surveillance of different infrastructures, under varying conditions, our model consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms by a significant margin, without any bells-and-whistles. This performance advantage easily carried over in two deployments of our model, tested against industry-provided datasets. Even further, we could establish our model's performance for two manufacturing quality inspection scenarios as well, where the defect types are not just crack equivalents, but much more and different. Hence we hope that our model is indeed a truly generic defect segmentation model.
abstract_zh: 异常检测和定位是一个重要的视觉问题，具有多种应用。对各种不同表面上的异常区域进行有效且通用的语义分割仍在积极研究中，其中大多数异常区域本身不具有任何明显的模式。大型基础设施中的定期健康监测和故障（异常）检测是一项重要的安全相关任务，也是基于视觉的异常分割的应用领域之一。然而，由于表面断层、无纹理的建筑材料/背景、照明条件等的巨大变化，这项任务相当具有挑战性。裂缝是关键且频繁的表面断层，表现为极端锯齿形的细长区域。即使使用深度学习，它们也是最难检测的故障之一。在这项工作中，我们解决了自动裂纹分割问题的一个开放方面，即通过对问题进行不同的建模来概括和改进跨各种场景的分割性能。我们仔细研究和抽象所涉及的子问题，并在更广泛的背景下解决它们，使我们的解决方案具有通用性。在不同条件下与不同基础设施监控相关的各种数据集上，我们的模型始终明显优于最先进的算法，而且没有任何附加功能。这种性能优势很容易在我们模型的两次部署中得到体现，并针对行业提供的数据集进行了测试。更进一步，我们还可以建立我们的模型在两种制造质量检查场景中的性能，其中缺陷类型不仅仅是裂纹等价物，而是更多且不同的缺陷类型。因此，我们希望我们的模型确实是一个真正通用的缺陷分割模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCNet，一种基于注意力机制的通用模型，用于解决多种场景下的裂纹故障分割问题，并扩展至更广泛的缺陷检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理表面缺陷（如裂纹）时面临材质无纹理、光照变化及缺陷形态复杂等挑战，亟需一种无需复杂调整即可泛化的分割模型。
AI.method: 通过重新建模问题并抽象子任务，设计基于注意力机制的SCNet架构，使其在多样化的基础设施监控和制造质检场景中具备通用性。
AI.result: 在多个基础设施监测数据集及制造业质检场景中，SCNet显著优于现有算法，且无需额外优化策略，验证了其泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SCNet作为一种通用缺陷分割模型，不仅适用于裂纹检测，还能处理更复杂的制造缺陷，展示了其广泛的应用潜力。

This performance advantage easily carried over in two deployments of our model, tested against industry-provided datasets. Even further, we could establish our model's performance for two manufacturing quality inspection scenarios as well, where the defect types are not just crack equivalents, but much more and different. Hence we hope that our model is indeed a truly generic defect segmentation model. 异常检测和定位是一个重要的视觉问题，具有多种应用。对各种不同表面上的异常区域进行有效且通用的语义分割仍在积极研究中，其中大多数异常区域本身不具有任何明显的模式。大型基础设施中的定期健康监测和故障（异常）检测是一项重要的安全相关任务，也是基于视觉的异常分割的应用领域之一。然而，由于表面断层、无纹理的建筑材料/背景、照明条件等的巨大变化，这项任务相当具有挑战性。裂缝是关键且频繁的表面断层，表现为极端锯齿形的细长区域。即使使用深度学习，它们也是最难检测的故障之一。在这项工作中，我们解决了自动裂纹分割问题的一个开放方面，即通过对问题进行不同的建模来概括和改进跨各种场景的分割性能。我们仔细研究和抽象所涉及的子问题，并在更广泛的背景下解决它们，使我们的解决方案具有通用性。在不同条件下与不同基础设施监控相关的各种数据集上，我们的模型始终明显优于最先进的算法，而且没有任何附加功能。这种性能优势很容易在我们模型的两次部署中得到体现，并针对行业提供的数据集进行了测试。更进一步，我们还可以建立我们的模型在两种制造质量检查场景中的性能，其中缺陷类型不仅仅是裂纹等价物，而是更多且不同的缺陷类型。因此，我们希望我们的模型确实是一个真正通用的缺陷分割模型。 本文提出SCNet，一种基于注意力机制的通用模型，用于解决多种场景下的裂纹故障分割问题，并扩展至更广泛的缺陷检测任务。 Hrishikesh Sharma,Prakhar Pradhan,Balamuralidhar P cs.CV

authors_text: Fartash Faghri
title: Training Efficiency and Robustness in Deep Learning
title_zh: 深度学习的训练效率和鲁棒性
comment: A thesis submitted in conformity with the requirements for the degree of Doctor of Philosophy
comments: A thesis submitted in conformity with the requirements for the degree of Doctor of Philosophy
abstract: Deep Learning has revolutionized machine learning and artificial intelligence, achieving superhuman performance in several standard benchmarks. It is well-known that deep learning models are inefficient to train; they learn by processing millions of training data multiple times and require powerful computational resources to process large batches of data in parallel at the same time rather than sequentially. Deep learning models also have unexpected failure modes; they can be fooled into misbehaviour, producing unexpectedly incorrect predictions. In this thesis, we study approaches to improve the training efficiency and robustness of deep learning models. In the context of learning visual-semantic embeddings, we find that prioritizing learning on more informative training data increases convergence speed and improves generalization performance on test data. We formalize a simple trick called hard negative mining as a modification to the learning objective function with no computational overhead. Next, we seek improvements to optimization speed in general-purpose optimization methods in deep learning. We show that a redundancy-aware modification to the sampling of training data improves the training speed and develops an efficient method for detecting the diversity of training signal, namely, gradient clustering. Finally, we study adversarial robustness in deep learning and approaches to achieve maximal adversarial robustness without training with additional data. For linear models, we prove guaranteed maximal robustness achieved only by appropriate choice of the optimizer, regularization, or architecture.

Deep learning models also have unexpected failure modes; they can be fooled into misbehaviour, producing unexpectedly incorrect predictions. In this thesis, we study approaches to improve the training efficiency and robustness of deep learning models. In the context of learning visual-semantic embeddings, we find that prioritizing learning on more informative training data increases convergence speed and improves generalization performance on test data. We formalize a simple trick called hard negative mining as a modification to the learning objective function with no computational overhead. Next, we seek improvements to optimization speed in general-purpose optimization methods in deep learning. We show that a redundancy-aware modification to the sampling of training data improves the training speed and develops an efficient method for detecting the diversity of training signal, namely, gradient clustering. Finally, we study adversarial robustness in deep learning and approaches to achieve maximal adversarial robustness without training with additional data. For linear models, we prove guaranteed maximal robustness achieved only by appropriate choice of the optimizer, regularization, or architecture.
abstract_zh: 深度学习彻底改变了机器学习和人工智能，在多个标准基准测试中实现了超人的性能。众所周知，深度学习模型训练效率低下；它们通过多次处理数百万个训练数据来学习，并且需要强大的计算资源来同时并行处理大批量数据，而不是顺序处理。深度学习模型也有意想不到的失败模式；他们可能会被愚弄而做出不当行为，从而产生意想不到的错误预测。在本论文中，我们研究了提高深度学习模型的训练效率和鲁棒性的方法。在学习视觉语义嵌入的背景下，我们发现优先学习信息更丰富的训练数据可以提高收敛速度并提高测试数据的泛化性能。我们形式化了一个称为硬负挖掘的简单技巧，作为对学习目标函数的修改，没有计算开销。接下来，我们寻求提高深度学习中通用优化方法的优化速度。我们证明，对训练数据采样进行冗余感知修改可以提高训练速度，并开发出一种检测训练信号多样性的有效方法，即梯度聚类。最后，我们研究深度学习中的对抗鲁棒性以及无需使用额外数据进行训练即可实现最大对抗鲁棒性的方法。对于线性模型，我们证明只有通过适当选择优化器、正则化或架构才能保证最大的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 研究提高深度学习模型训练效率和鲁棒性的方法
AI.motivation: 解决深度学习模型训练效率低下和鲁棒性不足的问题，以提升其性能和可靠性
AI.method: 提出硬负样本挖掘优化学习目标、冗余感知采样策略与梯度聚类方法提升训练效率；通过优化器、正则化或架构选择实现对抗鲁棒性
AI.result: 加速模型收敛并提升泛化性能，开发高效训练信号多样性检测方法，在对抗鲁棒性方面获得理论保证
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升训练效率与模型鲁棒性，为深度学习优化提供新思路

authors_text: Jichao Zhang,Enver Sangineto,Hao Tang,Aliaksandr Siarohin,Zhun Zhong,Nicu Sebe,Wei Wang
title: 3D-Aware Semantic-Guided Generative Model for Human Synthesis
title_zh: 用于人体合成的 3D 感知语义引导生成模型
comment: ECCV 2022. 29 pages
comments: ECCV 2022. 29 pages
abstract: Generative Neural Radiance Field (GNeRF) models, which extract implicit 3D representations from 2D images, have recently been shown to produce realistic images representing rigid/semi-rigid objects, such as human faces or cars. However, they usually struggle to generate high-quality images representing non-rigid objects, such as the human body, which is of a great interest for many computer graphics applications. This paper proposes a 3D-aware Semantic-Guided Generative Model (3D-SGAN) for human image synthesis, which combines a GNeRF with a texture generator. The former learns an implicit 3D representation of the human body and outputs a set of 2D semantic segmentation masks. The latter transforms these semantic masks into a real image, adding a realistic texture to the human appearance. Without requiring additional 3D information, our model can learn 3D human representations with a photo-realistic, controllable generation. Our experiments on the DeepFashion dataset show that 3D-SGAN significantly outperforms the most recent baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/zhangqianhui/3DSGAN
summary: Generative Neural Radiance Field (GNeRF) models, which extract implicit 3D representations from 2D images, have recently been shown to produce realistic images representing rigid/semi-rigid objects, such as human faces or cars. However, they usually struggle to generate high-quality images representing non-rigid objects, such as the human body, which is of a great interest for many computer graphics applications. This paper proposes a 3D-aware Semantic-Guided Generative Model (3D-SGAN) for human image synthesis, which combines a GNeRF with a texture generator. The former learns an implicit 3D representation of the human body and outputs a set of 2D semantic segmentation masks. The latter transforms these semantic masks into a real image, adding a realistic texture to the human appearance. Without requiring additional 3D information, our model can learn 3D human representations with a photo-realistic, controllable generation. Our experiments on the DeepFashion dataset show that 3D-SGAN significantly outperforms the most recent baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/zhangqianhui/3DSGAN
abstract_zh: 生成神经辐射场 (GNeRF) 模型可从 2D 图像中提取隐式 3D 表示，最近已被证明可以生成表示刚性/半刚性对象（例如人脸或汽车）的逼真图像。然而，它们通常很难生成代表非刚性物体的高质量图像，例如人体，这对于许多计算机图形应用程序来说非常重要。本文提出了一种用于人体图像合成的 3D 感知语义引导生成模型 (3D-SGAN)，它将 GNeRF 与纹理生成器相结合。前者学习人体的隐式 3D 表示并输出一组 2D 语义分割掩模。后者将这些语义掩模转化为真实图像，为人类外表增添了真实的质感。无需额外的 3D 信息，我们的模型就可以通过逼真、可控的生成来学习 3D 人体表征。我们在 DeepFashion 数据集上的实验表明，3D-SGAN 的性能显着优于最新的基线。代码可在https://github.com/zhangqianhui/3DSGAN获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合隐式3D表示与纹理生成的3D-SGAN模型，用于生成高质量的人体图像。
AI.motivation: 现有GNeRF模型在生成非刚性物体（如人体）时效果不佳，而人体合成对计算机图形学应用至关重要。
AI.method: 将GNeRF与纹理生成器结合，前者学习人体隐式3D表示并输出语义分割掩码，后者将掩码转化为具有真实纹理的图像。
AI.result: 在DeepFashion数据集上显著优于最新基线方法，生成结果具有可控性和照片级真实感。
AI.conclusion: 3D-SGAN无需额外3D信息即可学习人体隐式表示，为可控的人体图像合成提供了有效方案。
