authors_text: Matthew Stevenson,Christophe Mues,Cristián Bravo
title: Deep residential representations: Using unsupervised learning to unlock elevation data for geo-demographic prediction
title_zh: 深度住宅表示：使用无监督学习解锁海拔数据以进行地理人口统计预测
comment: 29 pages, 13 figures. V2 - Published
comments: 29 pages, 13 figures. V2 - Published
abstract: LiDAR (short for "Light Detection And Ranging" or "Laser Imaging, Detection, And Ranging") technology can be used to provide detailed three-dimensional elevation maps of urban and rural landscapes. To date, airborne LiDAR imaging has been predominantly confined to the environmental and archaeological domains. However, the geographically granular and open-source nature of this data also lends itself to an array of societal, organizational and business applications where geo-demographic type data is utilised. Arguably, the complexity involved in processing this multi-dimensional data has thus far restricted its broader adoption. In this paper, we propose a series of convenient task-agnostic tile elevation embeddings to address this challenge, using recent advances from unsupervised Deep Learning. We test the potential of our embeddings by predicting seven English indices of deprivation (2019) for small geographies in the Greater London area. These indices cover a range of socio-economic outcomes and serve as a proxy for a wide variety of downstream tasks to which the embeddings can be applied. We consider the suitability of this data not just on its own but also as an auxiliary source of data in combination with demographic features, thus providing a realistic use case for the embeddings. Having trialled various model/embedding configurations, we find that our best performing embeddings lead to Root-Mean-Squared-Error (RMSE) improvements of up to 21% over using standard demographic features alone. We also demonstrate how our embedding pipeline, using Deep Learning combined with K-means clustering, produces coherent tile segments which allow the latent embedding features to be interpreted.
summary: LiDAR (short for "Light Detection And Ranging" or "Laser Imaging, Detection, And Ranging") technology can be used to provide detailed three-dimensional elevation maps of urban and rural landscapes. To date, airborne LiDAR imaging has been predominantly confined to the environmental and archaeological domains. However, the geographically granular and open-source nature of this data also lends itself to an array of societal, organizational and business applications where geo-demographic type data is utilised. Arguably, the complexity involved in processing this multi-dimensional data has thus far restricted its broader adoption. In this paper, we propose a series of convenient task-agnostic tile elevation embeddings to address this challenge, using recent advances from unsupervised Deep Learning. We test the potential of our embeddings by predicting seven English indices of deprivation (2019) for small geographies in the Greater London area. These indices cover a range of socio-economic outcomes and serve as a proxy for a wide variety of downstream tasks to which the embeddings can be applied. We consider the suitability of this data not just on its own but also as an auxiliary source of data in combination with demographic features, thus providing a realistic use case for the embeddings. Having trialled various model/embedding configurations, we find that our best performing embeddings lead to Root-Mean-Squared-Error (RMSE) improvements of up to 21% over using standard demographic features alone. We also demonstrate how our embedding pipeline, using Deep Learning combined with K-means clustering, produces coherent tile segments which allow the latent embedding features to be interpreted.
abstract_zh: LiDAR（“光探测和测距”或“激光成像、探测和测距”的缩写）技术可用于提供城乡景观的详细三维高程图。迄今为止，机载激光雷达成像主要局限于环境和考古领域。然而，这些数据的地理粒度和开源性质也适合使用地理人口统计类型数据的一系列社会、组织和商业应用程序。可以说，处理这种多维数据的复杂性迄今为止限制了其更广泛的采用。在本文中，我们利用无监督深度学习的最新进展，提出了一系列方便的与任务无关的平铺高程嵌入来应对这一挑战。我们通过预测大伦敦地区小地理区域的七个英国剥夺指数（2019 年）来测试嵌入的潜力。这些指数涵盖了一系列社会经济成果，并作为嵌入可以应用的各种下游任务的代理。我们不仅考虑这些数据本身的适用性，而且还考虑将其作为与人口统计特征相结合的辅助数据源，从而为嵌入提供现实的用例。在尝试了各种模型/嵌入配置后，我们发现性能最佳的嵌入比单独使用标准人口统计特征的均方根误差 (RMSE) 提高了高达 21%。我们还演示了我们的嵌入管道如何使用深度学习与 K 均值聚类相结合来生成连贯的图块片段，从而允许解释潜在的嵌入特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用无监督深度学习方法，从LiDAR高程数据中生成任务无关的嵌入表示，以提升地理人口统计预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: LiDAR数据具有地理粒度高和开源特性，但其多维数据处理复杂性限制了其在社会、商业等领域的应用，需开发更便捷的分析方法。
AI.method: 基于无监督深度学习构建高程嵌入模型，并结合K-means聚类生成可解释的瓦片分段，将嵌入特征与人口统计数据融合进行预测。
AI.result: 在伦敦地区预测7项贫困指数时，最佳嵌入模型使RMSE较纯人口统计特征下降21%，且生成的嵌入特征具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效挖掘了LiDAR数据的地理人口统计潜力，为多领域应用提供了可扩展的嵌入框架，验证了高程数据与社会经济指标的关联性。

search_text: Deep residential representations: Using unsupervised learning to unlock elevation data for geo-demographic prediction 深度住宅表示：使用无监督学习解锁海拔数据以进行地理人口统计预测 LiDAR (short for "Light Detection And Ranging" or "Laser Imaging, Detection, And Ranging") technology can be used to provide detailed three-dimensional elevation maps of urban and rural landscapes. To date, airborne LiDAR imaging has been predominantly confined to the environmental and archaeological domains. However, the geographically granular and open-source nature of this data also lends itself to an array of societal, organizational and business applications where geo-demographic type data is utilised. Arguably, the complexity involved in processing this multi-dimensional data has thus far restricted its broader adoption. In this paper, we propose a series of convenient task-agnostic tile elevation embeddings to address this challenge, using recent advances from unsupervised Deep Learning. We test the potential of our embeddings by predicting seven English indices of deprivation (2019) for small geographies in the Greater London area. These indices cover a range of socio-economic outcomes and serve as a proxy for a wide variety of downstream tasks to which the embeddings can be applied. We consider the suitability of this data not just on its own but also as an auxiliary source of data in combination with demographic features, thus providing a realistic use case for the embeddings. Having trialled various model/embedding configurations, we find that our best performing embeddings lead to Root-Mean-Squared-Error (RMSE) improvements of up to 21% over using standard demographic features alone. We also demonstrate how our embedding pipeline, using Deep Learning combined with K-means clustering, produces coherent tile segments which allow the latent embedding features to be interpreted. authors_text: Binhui Xie,Longhui Yuan,Shuang Li,Chi Harold Liu,Xinjing Cheng,Guoren Wang
title: Active Learning for Domain Adaptation: An Energy-Based Approach
title_zh: 领域适应的主动学习：一种基于能量的方法
comment: Camera ready for AAAI 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/BIT-DA/EADA
comments: Camera ready for AAAI 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/BIT-DA/EADA
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation has recently emerged as an effective paradigm for generalizing deep neural networks to new target domains. However, there is still enormous potential to be tapped to reach the fully supervised performance. In this paper, we present a novel active learning strategy to assist knowledge transfer in the target domain, dubbed active domain adaptation. We start from an observation that energy-based models exhibit \textit{free energy biases} when training (source) and test (target) data come from different distributions. Inspired by this inherent mechanism, we empirically reveal that a simple yet efficient energy-based sampling strategy sheds light on selecting the most valuable target samples than existing approaches requiring particular architectures or computation of the distances. Our algorithm, Energy-based Active Domain Adaptation (EADA), queries groups of target data that incorporate both domain characteristic and instance uncertainty into every selection round. Meanwhile, by aligning the free energy of target data compact around the source domain via a regularization term, domain gap can be implicitly diminished. Through extensive experiments, we show that EADA surpasses state-of-the-art methods on well-known challenging benchmarks with substantial improvements, making it a useful option in the open world. Code is available at https://github.com/BIT-DA/EADA.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation has recently emerged as an effective paradigm for generalizing deep neural networks to new target domains. However, there is still enormous potential to be tapped to reach the fully supervised performance. In this paper, we present a novel active learning strategy to assist knowledge transfer in the target domain, dubbed active domain adaptation. We start from an observation that energy-based models exhibit \textit{free energy biases} when training (source) and test (target) data come from different distributions. Inspired by this inherent mechanism, we empirically reveal that a simple yet efficient energy-based sampling strategy sheds light on selecting the most valuable target samples than existing approaches requiring particular architectures or computation of the distances. Our algorithm, Energy-based Active Domain Adaptation (EADA), queries groups of target data that incorporate both domain characteristic and instance uncertainty into every selection round. Meanwhile, by aligning the free energy of target data compact around the source domain via a regularization term, domain gap can be implicitly diminished. Through extensive experiments, we show that EADA surpasses state-of-the-art methods on well-known challenging benchmarks with substantial improvements, making it a useful option in the open world. Code is available at https://github.com/BIT-DA/EADA.
abstract_zh: 无监督领域适应最近已成为将深度神经网络推广到新目标领域的有效范例。然而，要达到完全监督的性能，仍然有巨大的潜力有待挖掘。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的主动学习策略来协助目标领域的知识迁移，称为主动领域适应。我们从观察到当训练（源）和测试（目标）数据来自不同分布时，基于能量的模型表现出 \textit{自由能量偏差}。受这种固有机制的启发，我们凭经验揭示，与需要特定架构或距离计算的现有方法相比，简单而有效的基于能量的采样策略有助于选择最有价值的目标样本。我们的算法基于能量的主动域适应 (EADA)，查询目标数据组，将域特征和实例不确定性纳入每轮选择中。同时，通过正则化项将目标数据紧凑的自由能对齐在源域周围，可以隐式地减小域间隙。通过大量的实验，我们表明 EADA 在众所周知的具有挑战性的基准上超越了最先进的方法，并进行了实质性改进，使其成为开放世界中的有用选择。代码可在 https://github.com/BIT-DA/EADA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于能量模型的主动学习策略（EADA），用于提升无监督领域适应的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域适应方法依赖特定架构或复杂距离计算，难以高效选择目标域关键样本，而能量模型的自由能偏差特性可提供更简洁的样本选择依据。
AI.method: 通过能量模型的自由能偏差机制，设计结合领域特征与样本不确定性的分组采样策略，并引入正则化项对齐目标域与源域的自由能分布。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著超越现有最先进方法，验证了EADA在开放世界场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: EADA通过能量模型的内在机制实现了高效领域适应，为无监督领域适应提供了实用的新思路。

search_text: Active Learning for Domain Adaptation: An Energy-Based Approach 领域适应的主动学习：一种基于能量的方法 Unsupervised domain adaptation has recently emerged as an effective paradigm for generalizing deep neural networks to new target domains. However, there is still enormous potential to be tapped to reach the fully supervised performance. In this paper, we present a novel active learning strategy to assist knowledge transfer in the target domain, dubbed active domain adaptation. We start from an observation that energy-based models exhibit \textit{free energy biases} when training (source) and test (target) data come from different distributions. Inspired by this inherent mechanism, we empirically reveal that a simple yet efficient energy-based sampling strategy sheds light on selecting the most valuable target samples than existing approaches requiring particular architectures or computation of the distances. Our algorithm, Energy-based Active Domain Adaptation (EADA), queries groups of target data that incorporate both domain characteristic and instance uncertainty into every selection round. Meanwhile, by aligning the free energy of target data compact around the source domain via a regularization term, domain gap can be implicitly diminished. Through extensive experiments, we show that EADA surpasses state-of-the-art methods on well-known challenging benchmarks with substantial improvements, making it a useful option in the open world. authors_text: Stefán Páll Sturluson,Samuel Trew,Luis Muñoz-González,Matei Grama,Jonathan Passerat-Palmbach,Daniel Rueckert,Amir Alansary
title: FedRAD: Federated Robust Adaptive Distillation
title_zh: FedRAD：联合鲁棒自适应蒸馏
comment: Accepted for 1st NeurIPS Workshop on New Frontiers in Federated Learning (NFFL 2021), Virtual Meeting
comments: Accepted for 1st NeurIPS Workshop on New Frontiers in Federated Learning (NFFL 2021), Virtual Meeting
abstract: The robustness of federated learning (FL) is vital for the distributed training of an accurate global model that is shared among large number of clients. The collaborative learning framework by typically aggregating model updates is vulnerable to model poisoning attacks from adversarial clients. Since the shared information between the global server and participants are only limited to model parameters, it is challenging to detect bad model updates. Moreover, real-world datasets are usually heterogeneous and not independent and identically distributed (Non-IID) among participants, which makes the design of such robust FL pipeline more difficult. In this work, we propose a novel robust aggregation method, Federated Robust Adaptive Distillation (FedRAD), to detect adversaries and robustly aggregate local models based on properties of the median statistic, and then performing an adapted version of ensemble Knowledge Distillation. We run extensive experiments to evaluate the proposed method against recently published works. The results show that FedRAD outperforms all other aggregators in the presence of adversaries, as well as in heterogeneous data distributions.
summary: The robustness of federated learning (FL) is vital for the distributed training of an accurate global model that is shared among large number of clients. The collaborative learning framework by typically aggregating model updates is vulnerable to model poisoning attacks from adversarial clients. Since the shared information between the global server and participants are only limited to model parameters, it is challenging to detect bad model updates. Moreover, real-world datasets are usually heterogeneous and not independent and identically distributed (Non-IID) among participants, which makes the design of such robust FL pipeline more difficult. In this work, we propose a novel robust aggregation method, Federated Robust Adaptive Distillation (FedRAD), to detect adversaries and robustly aggregate local models based on properties of the median statistic, and then performing an adapted version of ensemble Knowledge Distillation. We run extensive experiments to evaluate the proposed method against recently published works. The results show that FedRAD outperforms all other aggregators in the presence of adversaries, as well as in heterogeneous data distributions.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 的稳健性对于在大量客户端之间共享的准确全局模型的分布式训练至关重要。通常聚合模型更新的协作学习框架很容易受到来自敌对客户端的模型中毒攻击。由于全局服务器和参与者之间的共享信息仅限于模型参数，因此检测不良模型更新具有挑战性。此外，现实世界的数据集通常是异构的，并且参与者之间不独立且同分布（非独立同分布），这使得设计这种强大的 FL 管道变得更加困难。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的鲁棒聚合方法，即联合鲁棒自适应蒸馏（FedRAD），用于检测对手并根据中值统计的属性鲁棒地聚合本地模型，然后执行集成知识蒸馏的适应版本。我们进行了广泛的实验，根据最近发表的作品评估所提出的方法。结果表明，在存在对手以及异构数据分布的情况下，FedRAD 的表现优于所有其他聚合器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedRAD方法，通过鲁棒聚合和知识蒸馏提升联邦学习在对抗攻击和非独立同分布数据下的性能。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习易受恶意客户端模型中毒攻击，且现实数据分布异构，现有方法难以有效检测异常更新并鲁棒聚合模型。
AI.method: 基于中位数统计检测异常客户端，结合改进的集成知识蒸馏技术对本地模型进行鲁棒聚合。
AI.result: 实验表明FedRAD在存在对抗攻击和非独立同分布数据时，优于现有聚合方法。

search_text: FedRAD: Federated Robust Adaptive Distillation FedRAD：联合鲁棒自适应蒸馏 The robustness of federated learning (FL) is vital for the distributed training of an accurate global model that is shared among large number of clients. The collaborative learning framework by typically aggregating model updates is vulnerable to model poisoning attacks from adversarial clients. Since the shared information between the global server and participants are only limited to model parameters, it is challenging to detect bad model updates. Moreover, real-world datasets are usually heterogeneous and not independent and identically distributed (Non-IID) among participants, which makes the design of such robust FL pipeline more difficult. In this work, we propose a novel robust aggregation method, Federated Robust Adaptive Distillation (FedRAD), to detect adversaries and robustly aggregate local models based on properties of the median statistic, and then performing an adapted version of ensemble Knowledge Distillation. We run extensive experiments to evaluate the proposed method against recently published works. The results show that FedRAD outperforms all other aggregators in the presence of adversaries, as well as in heterogeneous data distributions. 联邦学习 (FL) 的稳健性对于在大量客户端之间共享的准确全局模型的分布式训练至关重要。通常聚合模型更新的协作学习框架很容易受到来自敌对客户端的模型中毒攻击。由于全局服务器和参与者之间的共享信息仅限于模型参数，因此检测不良模型更新具有挑战性。此外，现实世界的数据集通常是异构的，并且参与者之间不独立且同分布（非独立同分布），这使得设计这种强大的 FL 管道变得更加困难。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的鲁棒聚合方法，即联合鲁棒自适应蒸馏（FedRAD），用于检测对手并根据中值统计的属性鲁棒地聚合本地模型，然后执行集成知识蒸馏的适应版本。我们进行了广泛的实验，根据最近发表的作品评估所提出的方法。结果表明，在存在对手以及异构数据分布的情况下，FedRAD 的表现优于所有其他聚合器。 本文提出FedRAD方法，通过鲁棒聚合和知识蒸馏提升联邦学习在对抗攻击和非独立同分布数据下的性能。 Stefán Páll Sturluson,Samuel Trew,Luis Muñoz-González,Matei Grama,Jonathan Passerat-Palmbach,Daniel Rueckert,Amir Alansary cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.DC

authors_text: Shumin Deng,Jiacheng Yang,Hongbin Ye,Chuanqi Tan,Mosha Chen,Songfang Huang,Fei Huang,Huajun Chen,Ningyu Zhang
title: LOGEN: Few-shot Logical Knowledge-Conditioned Text Generation with Self-training
title_zh: LOGEN：具有自我训练的小样本逻辑知识条件文本生成
comment: Accepted by IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
comments: Accepted by IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
abstract: Natural language generation from structured data mainly focuses on surface-level descriptions, suffering from uncontrollable content selection and low fidelity. Previous works leverage logical forms to facilitate logical knowledge-conditioned text generation. Though achieving remarkable progress, they are data-hungry, which makes the adoption for real-world applications challenging with limited data. To this end, this paper proposes a unified framework for logical knowledge-conditioned text generation in the few-shot setting. With only a few seeds logical forms (e.g., 20/100 shot), our approach leverages self-training and samples pseudo logical forms based on content and structure consistency. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach can obtain better few-shot performance than baselines.
summary: Natural language generation from structured data mainly focuses on surface-level descriptions, suffering from uncontrollable content selection and low fidelity. Previous works leverage logical forms to facilitate logical knowledge-conditioned text generation. Though achieving remarkable progress, they are data-hungry, which makes the adoption for real-world applications challenging with limited data. To this end, this paper proposes a unified framework for logical knowledge-conditioned text generation in the few-shot setting. With only a few seeds logical forms (e.g., 20/100 shot), our approach leverages self-training and samples pseudo logical forms based on content and structure consistency. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach can obtain better few-shot performance than baselines.
abstract_zh: 结构化数据生成自然语言主要侧重于表层描述，存在内容选择不可控、保真度低等问题。以前的作品利用逻辑形式来促进逻辑知识条件文本的生成。尽管取得了显着的进步，但它们需要数据，这使得在数据有限的情况下在现实世界的应用程序中采用具有挑战性。为此，本文提出了一个统一的框架，用于在少镜头设置下生成逻辑知识条件文本。只有少数种子逻辑形式（例如 20/100 镜头），我们的方法利用自我训练并根据内容和结构一致性对伪逻辑形式进行采样。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以获得比基线更好的小样本性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于自训练的少样本逻辑知识条件文本生成框架。
AI.motivation: 现有逻辑知识条件文本生成方法依赖大量数据，难以适应实际应用中数据有限的场景。
AI.method: 通过自训练生成伪逻辑形式，结合内容与结构一致性约束，实现少样本下的逻辑知识条件文本生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，在少量样本（如20/100 shot）下，该方法优于现有基线。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了数据饥饿问题，提升了少样本场景下的生成质量与实用性。

authors_text: Dipika Singhania,Rahul Rahaman,Angela Yao
title: Iterative Contrast-Classify For Semi-supervised Temporal Action Segmentation
title_zh: 半监督时间动作分割的迭代对比分类
comment: AAAI-2022
comments: AAAI-2022
abstract: Temporal action segmentation classifies the action of each frame in (long) video sequences. Due to the high cost of frame-wise labeling, we propose the first semi-supervised method for temporal action segmentation. Our method hinges on unsupervised representation learning, which, for temporal action segmentation, poses unique challenges. Actions in untrimmed videos vary in length and have unknown labels and start/end times. Ordering of actions across videos may also vary. We propose a novel way to learn frame-wise representations from temporal convolutional networks (TCNs) by clustering input features with added time-proximity condition and multi-resolution similarity. By merging representation learning with conventional supervised learning, we develop an "Iterative-Contrast-Classify (ICC)" semi-supervised learning scheme. With more labelled data, ICC progressively improves in performance; ICC semi-supervised learning, with 40% labelled videos, performs similar to fully-supervised counterparts. Our ICC improves MoF by {+1.8, +5.6, +2.5}% on Breakfast, 50Salads and GTEA respectively for 100% labelled videos.
summary: Temporal action segmentation classifies the action of each frame in (long) video sequences. Due to the high cost of frame-wise labeling, we propose the first semi-supervised method for temporal action segmentation. Our method hinges on unsupervised representation learning, which, for temporal action segmentation, poses unique challenges. Actions in untrimmed videos vary in length and have unknown labels and start/end times. Ordering of actions across videos may also vary. We propose a novel way to learn frame-wise representations from temporal convolutional networks (TCNs) by clustering input features with added time-proximity condition and multi-resolution similarity. By merging representation learning with conventional supervised learning, we develop an "Iterative-Contrast-Classify (ICC)" semi-supervised learning scheme. With more labelled data, ICC progressively improves in performance; ICC semi-supervised learning, with 40% labelled videos, performs similar to fully-supervised counterparts. Our ICC improves MoF by {+1.8, +5.6, +2.5}% on Breakfast, 50Salads and GTEA respectively for 100% labelled videos.
abstract_zh: 时间动作分割对（长）视频序列中每个帧的动作进行分类。由于逐帧标记的成本很高，我们提出了第一个用于时间动作分割的半监督方法。我们的方法取决于无监督表示学习，这对于时间动作分割提出了独特的挑战。未经修剪的视频中的动作长度各不相同，并且具有未知的标签和开始/结束时间。视频中的动作顺序也可能有所不同。我们提出了一种新方法，通过添加时间邻近条件和多分辨率相似性对输入特征进行聚类，从时间卷积网络（TCN）中学习帧表示。通过将表示学习与传统的监督学习相结合，我们开发了一种“迭代对比分类（ICC）”半监督学习方案。随着标记数据的增多，ICC 的性能逐渐提高； ICC 半监督学习有 40% 的标记视频，其表现与全监督学习相似。对于 100% 标记的视频，我们的 ICC 在早餐、50Salads 和 GTEA 上分别将 MoF 提高了 {+1.8、+5.6、+2.5}%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督方法用于时间动作分割，通过迭代对比分类（ICC）框架在有限标注数据下提升性能。
AI.motivation: 由于帧级标注成本高昂，现有方法难以处理未剪辑视频中动作长度不一、标签未知及动作顺序变化等问题，需开发高效半监督学习方案。
AI.method: 基于时间卷积网络（TCN）学习帧级表征，结合时序邻近性约束和多分辨率相似性聚类，通过迭代对比学习与监督分类融合构建ICC框架。
AI.result: 在40%标注数据下ICC性能接近全监督方法，于 Breakfast、50Salads 和 GTEA 数据集上分别提升 MoF 指标 1.8%、5.6% 和 2.5%。
AI.conclusion: ICC 框架有效结合无监督表征学习与监督分类，为半监督时间动作分割提供了新思路，在标注数据有限时仍能保持竞争力。

authors_text: Ujjwal Thakur,Anuj Sharma
title: Newton methods based convolution neural networks using parallel processing
title_zh: 使用并行处理的基于牛顿法的卷积神经网络
abstract: Training of convolutional neural networks is a high dimensional and a non-convex optimization problem. At present, it is inefficient in situations where parametric learning rates can not be confidently set. Some past works have introduced Newton methods for training deep neural networks. Newton methods for convolutional neural networks involve complicated operations. Finding the Hessian matrix in second-order methods becomes very complex as we mainly use the finite differences method with the image data. Newton methods for convolutional neural networks deals with this by using the sub-sampled Hessian Newton methods. In this paper, we have used the complete data instead of the sub-sampled methods that only handle partial data at a time. Further, we have used parallel processing instead of serial processing in mini-batch computations. The results obtained using parallel processing in this study, outperform the time taken by the previous approach.
summary: Training of convolutional neural networks is a high dimensional and a non-convex optimization problem. At present, it is inefficient in situations where parametric learning rates can not be confidently set. Some past works have introduced Newton methods for training deep neural networks. Newton methods for convolutional neural networks involve complicated operations. Finding the Hessian matrix in second-order methods becomes very complex as we mainly use the finite differences method with the image data. Newton methods for convolutional neural networks deals with this by using the sub-sampled Hessian Newton methods. In this paper, we have used the complete data instead of the sub-sampled methods that only handle partial data at a time. Further, we have used parallel processing instead of serial processing in mini-batch computations. The results obtained using parallel processing in this study, outperform the time taken by the previous approach.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络的训练是一个高维非凸优化问题。目前，在无法自信地设置参数学习率的情况下，它的效率很低。过去的一些工作引入了牛顿方法来训练深度神经网络。卷积神经网络的牛顿法涉及复杂的运算。由于我们主要对图像数据使用有限差分法，因此在二阶方法中求 Hessian 矩阵变得非常复杂。卷积神经网络的牛顿方法通过使用子采样 Hessian 牛顿方法来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们使用完整的数据，而不是一次仅处理部分数据的子采样方法。此外，我们在小批量计算中使用并行处理而不是串行处理。本研究中使用并行处理获得的结果优于先前方法所花费的时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于牛顿法并结合并行处理的卷积神经网络训练方法，以提高训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络训练存在学习率设置困难及二阶方法计算复杂度高的问题，需更高效的优化方案。
AI.method: 采用完整数据集而非子采样方法，并行处理mini-batch计算以简化Hessian矩阵求解过程。
AI.result: 并行处理方法在时间效率上优于传统串行计算和子采样牛顿法。
AI.conclusion: 完整数据结合并行计算的牛顿法能有效提升卷积神经网络训练效率。

search_text: Newton methods based convolution neural networks using parallel processing 使用并行处理的基于牛顿法的卷积神经网络 Training of convolutional neural networks is a high dimensional and a non-convex optimization problem. At present, it is inefficient in situations where parametric learning rates can not be confidently set. Some past works have introduced Newton methods for training deep neural networks. Newton methods for convolutional neural networks involve complicated operations. Finding the Hessian matrix in second-order methods becomes very complex as we mainly use the finite differences method with the image data. Newton methods for convolutional neural networks deals with this by using the sub-sampled Hessian Newton methods. In this paper, we have used the complete data instead of the sub-sampled methods that only handle partial data at a time. Further, we have used parallel processing instead of serial processing in mini-batch computations. The results obtained using parallel processing in this study, outperform the time taken by the previous approach. 卷积神经网络的训练是一个高维非凸优化问题。目前，在无法自信地设置参数学习率的情况下，它的效率很低。过去的一些工作引入了牛顿方法来训练深度神经网络。卷积神经网络的牛顿法涉及复杂的运算。由于我们主要对图像数据使用有限差分法，因此在二阶方法中求 Hessian 矩阵变得非常复杂。卷积神经网络的牛顿方法通过使用子采样 Hessian 牛顿方法来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们使用完整的数据，而不是一次仅处理部分数据的子采样方法。此外，我们在小批量计算中使用并行处理而不是串行处理。本研究中使用并行处理获得的结果优于先前方法所花费的时间。 本文提出基于牛顿法并结合并行处理的卷积神经网络训练方法，以提高训练效率。 Ujjwal Thakur,Anuj Sharma cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Tan M. Dinh,Rang Nguyen,Binh-Son Hua
title: TISE: Bag of Metrics for Text-to-Image Synthesis Evaluation
title_zh: TISE：文本到图像合成评估的指标包
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022; TISE toolbox is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/tise-toolbox
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022; TISE toolbox is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/tise-toolbox
abstract: In this paper, we conduct a study on the state-of-the-art methods for text-to-image synthesis and propose a framework to evaluate these methods. We consider syntheses where an image contains a single or multiple objects. Our study outlines several issues in the current evaluation pipeline: (i) for image quality assessment, a commonly used metric, e.g., Inception Score (IS), is often either miscalibrated for the single-object case or misused for the multi-object case; (ii) for text relevance and object accuracy assessment, there is an overfitting phenomenon in the existing R-precision (RP) and Semantic Object Accuracy (SOA) metrics, respectively; (iii) for multi-object case, many vital factors for evaluation, e.g., object fidelity, positional alignment, counting alignment, are largely dismissed; (iv) the ranking of the methods based on current metrics is highly inconsistent with real images. To overcome these issues, we propose a combined set of existing and new metrics to systematically evaluate the methods. For existing metrics, we offer an improved version of IS named IS* by using temperature scaling to calibrate the confidence of the classifier used by IS; we also propose a solution to mitigate the overfitting issues of RP and SOA. For new metrics, we develop counting alignment, positional alignment, object-centric IS, and object-centric FID metrics for evaluating the multi-object case. We show that benchmarking with our bag of metrics results in a highly consistent ranking among existing methods that is well-aligned with human evaluation. As a by-product, we create AttnGAN++, a simple but strong baseline for the benchmark by stabilizing the training of AttnGAN using spectral normalization. We also release our toolbox, so-called TISE, for advocating fair and consistent evaluation of text-to-image models.
summary: In this paper, we conduct a study on the state-of-the-art methods for text-to-image synthesis and propose a framework to evaluate these methods. We consider syntheses where an image contains a single or multiple objects. Our study outlines several issues in the current evaluation pipeline: (i) for image quality assessment, a commonly used metric, e.g., Inception Score (IS), is often either miscalibrated for the single-object case or misused for the multi-object case; (ii) for text relevance and object accuracy assessment, there is an overfitting phenomenon in the existing R-precision (RP) and Semantic Object Accuracy (SOA) metrics, respectively; (iii) for multi-object case, many vital factors for evaluation, e.g., object fidelity, positional alignment, counting alignment, are largely dismissed; (iv) the ranking of the methods based on current metrics is highly inconsistent with real images. To overcome these issues, we propose a combined set of existing and new metrics to systematically evaluate the methods. For existing metrics, we offer an improved version of IS named IS* by using temperature scaling to calibrate the confidence of the classifier used by IS; we also propose a solution to mitigate the overfitting issues of RP and SOA. For new metrics, we develop counting alignment, positional alignment, object-centric IS, and object-centric FID metrics for evaluating the multi-object case. We show that benchmarking with our bag of metrics results in a highly consistent ranking among existing methods that is well-aligned with human evaluation. As a by-product, we create AttnGAN++, a simple but strong baseline for the benchmark by stabilizing the training of AttnGAN using spectral normalization. We also release our toolbox, so-called TISE, for advocating fair and consistent evaluation of text-to-image models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们对文本到图像合成的最先进方法进行了研究，并提出了一个评估这些方法的框架。我们考虑图像包含单个或多个对象的合成。我们的研究概述了当前评估流程中的几个问题：（i）对于图像质量评估，常用的度量标准，例如初始分数（IS），通常要么对单对象情况进行错误校准，要么对多对象情况误用； (ii)对于文本相关性和对象准确性评估，现有的R精度（RP）和语义对象准确性（SOA）指标分别存在过拟合现象； (iii) 对于多目标情况，许多评估的重要因素，例如目标保真度、位置对齐、计数对齐，在很大程度上被忽略； (iv) 基于当前指标的方法的排名与真实图像高度不一致。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一组现有的和新的指标来系统地评估这些方法。对于现有指标，我们提供了 IS* 的改进版本，通过使用温度缩放来校准 IS 使用的分类器的置信度；我们还提出了一个解决方案来缓解 RP 和 SOA 的过度拟合问题。对于新指标，我们开发了计数对齐、位置对齐、以对象为中心的 IS 和以对象为中心的 FID 指标来评估多对象情况。我们表明，使用我们的指标包进行基准测试会导致现有方法之间的排名高度一致，并且与人类评估非常一致。作为副产品，我们通过使用谱归一化稳定 AttnGAN 的训练，创建了 AttnGAN++，这是一个简单但强大的基准基线。我们还发布了我们的工具箱，即所谓的 TISE，用于倡导对文本到图像模型的公平和一致的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TISE框架，通过改进和新增指标系统评估文本到图像合成方法，解决现有评估体系中的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标在单物体/多物体场景下存在校准错误、过拟合、忽略关键因素等问题，导致方法排名与人类评价不一致。
AI.method: 改进Inception Score（IS*）并提出计数对齐、位置对齐等新指标；开发AttnGAN++基线模型并发布TISE工具箱。
AI.result: 使用TISE指标体系后，现有方法排名与人类评估高度一致，验证了评估框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TISE通过系统化指标改进，实现了更公平、一致的文本到图像生成模型评估体系。

authors_text: Zelu Deng,Yujie Zhong,Sheng Guo,Weilin Huang
title: InsCLR: Improving Instance Retrieval with Self-Supervision
title_zh: InsCLR：通过自我监督改进实例检索
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2022
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2022
abstract: This work aims at improving instance retrieval with self-supervision. We find that fine-tuning using the recently developed self-supervised (SSL) learning methods, such as SimCLR and MoCo, fails to improve the performance of instance retrieval. In this work, we identify that the learnt representations for instance retrieval should be invariant to large variations in viewpoint and background etc., whereas self-augmented positives applied by the current SSL methods can not provide strong enough signals for learning robust instance-level representations. To overcome this problem, we propose InsCLR, a new SSL method that builds on the \textit{instance-level} contrast, to learn the intra-class invariance by dynamically mining meaningful pseudo positive samples from both mini-batches and a memory bank during training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that InsCLR achieves similar or even better performance than the state-of-the-art SSL methods on instance retrieval. Code is available at https://github.com/zeludeng/insclr.
summary: This work aims at improving instance retrieval with self-supervision. We find that fine-tuning using the recently developed self-supervised (SSL) learning methods, such as SimCLR and MoCo, fails to improve the performance of instance retrieval. In this work, we identify that the learnt representations for instance retrieval should be invariant to large variations in viewpoint and background etc., whereas self-augmented positives applied by the current SSL methods can not provide strong enough signals for learning robust instance-level representations. To overcome this problem, we propose InsCLR, a new SSL method that builds on the \textit{instance-level} contrast, to learn the intra-class invariance by dynamically mining meaningful pseudo positive samples from both mini-batches and a memory bank during training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that InsCLR achieves similar or even better performance than the state-of-the-art SSL methods on instance retrieval. Code is available at https://github.com/zeludeng/insclr.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在通过自我监督改进实例检索。我们发现使用最近开发的自监督（SSL）学习方法（例如 SimCLR 和 MoCo）进行微调无法提高实例检索的性能。在这项工作中，我们发现用于实例检索的学习表示应该对于观点和背景等的巨大变化是不变的，而当前 SSL 方法应用的自我增强正值不能为学习鲁棒的实例级表示提供足够强的信号。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了 InsCLR，一种基于 \textit{instance-level} 对比的新 SSL 方法，通过在训练期间从小批量和内存库中动态挖掘有意义的伪正样本来学习类内不变性。大量实验表明，InsCLR 在实例检索方面实现了与最先进的 SSL 方法相似甚至更好的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zeludeng/insclr 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InsCLR方法，通过自监督学习提升实例检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法（如SimCLR、MoCo）在实例检索任务中表现不佳，因其无法有效处理视角和背景变化带来的不变性学习问题。
AI.method: 设计InsCLR方法，基于实例级对比学习，通过动态挖掘小批量和记忆库中的伪正样本，学习类内不变性表征。
AI.result: 实验表明，InsCLR在实例检索任务中达到或超越现有自监督方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: InsCLR通过实例级对比和动态伪样本挖掘，有效解决了自监督学习在实例检索中的关键问题。

conclusion: InsCLR通过实例级对比和动态伪样本挖掘，有效解决了自监督学习在实例检索中的关键问题。
search_text: InsCLR: Improving Instance Retrieval with Self-Supervision InsCLR：通过自我监督改进实例检索 This work aims at improving instance retrieval with self-supervision. We find that fine-tuning using the recently developed self-supervised (SSL) learning methods, such as SimCLR and MoCo, fails to improve the performance of instance retrieval. In this work, we identify that the learnt representations for instance retrieval should be invariant to large variations in viewpoint and background etc., whereas self-augmented positives applied by the current SSL methods can not provide strong enough signals for learning robust instance-level representations. To overcome this problem, we propose InsCLR, a new SSL method that builds on the \textit{instance-level} contrast, to learn the intra-class invariance by dynamically mining meaningful pseudo positive samples from both mini-batches and a memory bank during training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that InsCLR achieves similar or even better performance than the state-of-the-art SSL methods on instance retrieval. Code is available at https://github.com/zeludeng/insclr. 这项工作旨在通过自我监督改进实例检索。我们发现使用最近开发的自监督（SSL）学习方法（例如 SimCLR 和 MoCo）进行微调无法提高实例检索的性能。在这项工作中，我们发现用于实例检索的学习表示应该对于观点和背景等的巨大变化是不变的，而当前 SSL 方法应用的自我增强正值不能为学习鲁棒的实例级表示提供足够强的信号。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了 InsCLR，一种基于 \textit{instance-level} 对比的新 SSL 方法，通过在训练期间从小批量和内存库中动态挖掘有意义的伪正样本来学习类内不变性。大量实验表明，InsCLR 在实例检索方面实现了与最先进的 SSL 方法相似甚至更好的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/zeludeng/insclr 获取。 本文提出InsCLR方法，通过自监督学习提升实例检索性能。 Zelu Deng,Yujie Zhong,Sheng Guo,Weilin Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Vidya Samadi
title: Flood Analytics Information System (FAIS) Version 4.00 Manual
title_zh: 洪水分析信息系统 (FAIS) 4.00 版手册
abstract: This project was the first attempt to use big data analytics approaches and machine learning along with Natural Language Processing (NLP) of tweets for flood risk assessment and decision making. Multiple Python packages were developed and integrated within the Flood Analytics Information System (FAIS). FAIS workflow includes the use of IoTs-APIs and various machine learning approaches for transmitting, processing, and loading big data through which the application gathers information from various data servers and replicates it to a data warehouse (IBM database service). Users are allowed to directly stream and download flood related images/videos from the US Geological Survey (USGS) and Department of Transportation (DOT) and save the data on a local storage. The outcome of the river measurement, imagery, and tabular data is displayed on a web based remote dashboard and the information can be plotted in real-time. FAIS proved to be a robust and user-friendly tool for flood data analysis at regional scale that could help stakeholders for rapid assessment of flood situation and damages. FAIS also provides flood frequency analysis (FFA) to estimate flood quantiles including the associated uncertainties that combine the elements of observational analysis, stochastic probability distribution and design return periods. FAIS is publicly available and deployed on the Clemson-IBM cloud service.
summary: This project was the first attempt to use big data analytics approaches and machine learning along with Natural Language Processing (NLP) of tweets for flood risk assessment and decision making. Multiple Python packages were developed and integrated within the Flood Analytics Information System (FAIS). Users are allowed to directly stream and download flood related images/videos from the US Geological Survey (USGS) and Department of Transportation (DOT) and save the data on a local storage. The outcome of the river measurement, imagery, and tabular data is displayed on a web based remote dashboard and the information can be plotted in real-time. FAIS proved to be a robust and user-friendly tool for flood data analysis at regional scale that could help stakeholders for rapid assessment of flood situation and damages. FAIS also provides flood frequency analysis (FFA) to estimate flood quantiles including the associated uncertainties that combine the elements of observational analysis, stochastic probability distribution and design return periods. FAIS is publicly available and deployed on the Clemson-IBM cloud service.
abstract_zh: 该项目是首次尝试使用大数据分析方法和机器学习以及推文自然语言处理 (NLP) 来进行洪水风险评估和决策。开发了多个 Python 包并将其集成到洪水分析信息系统 (FAIS) 中。 FAIS 工作流程包括使用 IoT-API 和各种机器学习方法来传输、处理和加载大数据，应用程序通过这些方法从各种数据服务器收集信息并将其复制到数据仓库（IBM 数据库服务）。用户可以直接从美国地质调查局（USGS）和交通部（DOT）流式传输和下载与洪水相关的图像/视频，并将数据保存在本地存储中。河流测量、图像和表格数据的结果显示在基于网络的远程仪表板上，并且可以实时绘制信息。 FAIS 被证明是一个强大且用户友好的工具，用于区域范围内的洪水数据分析，可以帮助利益相关者快速评估洪水形势和损失。 FAIS 还提供洪水频率分析 (FFA) 来估计洪水分位数，包括结合了观测分析、随机概率分布和设计重现期要素的相关不确定性。 FAIS 是公开可用的，并部署在 Clemson-IBM 云服务上。

AI.tldr: 开发并部署Flood Analytics Information System (FAIS) 4.00系统，整合大数据分析、机器学习与自然语言处理技术，用于洪水风险评估与决策支持。
AI.motivation: 通过整合多源数据与先进技术，提升洪水灾害的实时监测、风险评估与应急响应能力，为利益相关者提供快速、准确的决策依据。
AI.method: 采用Python开发数据处理模块，集成IoT-APIs与机器学习算法，结合社交媒体NLP分析、USGS/DOT影像数据及IBM数据库，实现数据实时采集、处理与可视化展示。
AI.result: FAIS系统成功实现洪水数据实时分析与可视化，支持洪水频率分析及不确定性评估，验证其作为区域洪水管理有效工具的可行性。
AI.conclusion: FAIS 4.00通过技术创新与数据整合，为洪水灾害管理提供可靠工具，其公开部署模式可推广至其他自然灾害监测领域。

authors_text: Huaishao Luo,Lei Ji,Yanyong Huang,Bin Wang,Shenggong Ji,Tianrui Li
title: ScaleVLAD: Improving Multimodal Sentiment Analysis via Multi-Scale Fusion of Locally Descriptors
title_zh: ScaleVLAD：通过局部描述符的多尺度融合改进多模态情感分析
abstract: Fusion technique is a key research topic in multimodal sentiment analysis. The recent attention-based fusion demonstrates advances over simple operation-based fusion. However, these fusion works adopt single-scale, i.e., token-level or utterance-level, unimodal representation. Such single-scale fusion is suboptimal because that different modality should be aligned with different granularities. This paper proposes a fusion model named ScaleVLAD to gather multi-Scale representation from text, video, and audio with shared Vectors of Locally Aggregated Descriptors to improve unaligned multimodal sentiment analysis. These shared vectors can be regarded as shared topics to align different modalities. In addition, we propose a self-supervised shifted clustering loss to keep the fused feature differentiation among samples. The backbones are three Transformer encoders corresponding to three modalities, and the aggregated features generated from the fusion module are feed to a Transformer plus a full connection to finish task predictions. Experiments on three popular sentiment analysis benchmarks, IEMOCAP, MOSI, and MOSEI, demonstrate significant gains over baselines.
summary: Fusion technique is a key research topic in multimodal sentiment analysis. The recent attention-based fusion demonstrates advances over simple operation-based fusion. However, these fusion works adopt single-scale, i.e., token-level or utterance-level, unimodal representation. Such single-scale fusion is suboptimal because that different modality should be aligned with different granularities. This paper proposes a fusion model named ScaleVLAD to gather multi-Scale representation from text, video, and audio with shared Vectors of Locally Aggregated Descriptors to improve unaligned multimodal sentiment analysis. These shared vectors can be regarded as shared topics to align different modalities. In addition, we propose a self-supervised shifted clustering loss to keep the fused feature differentiation among samples. The backbones are three Transformer encoders corresponding to three modalities, and the aggregated features generated from the fusion module are feed to a Transformer plus a full connection to finish task predictions. Experiments on three popular sentiment analysis benchmarks, IEMOCAP, MOSI, and MOSEI, demonstrate significant gains over baselines.
abstract_zh: 融合技术是多模态情感分析中的一个关键研究课题。最近的基于注意力的融合展示了相对于简单的基于操作的融合的进步。然而，这些融合作品采用单尺度，即标记级或话语级的单峰表示。这种单尺度融合并不是最理想的，因为不同的模态应该与不同的粒度保持一致。本文提出了一种名为 ScaleVLAD 的融合模型，通过本地聚合描述符的共享向量从文本、视频和音频中收集多尺度表示，以改进未对齐的多模态情感分析。这些共享向量可以被视为共享主题来对齐不同的模态。此外，我们提出了一种自监督的移位聚类损失，以保持样本之间的融合特征差异。主干是三个 Transformer 编码器，对应于三种模态，融合模块生成的聚合特征被馈送到 Transformer 加上完整的连接来完成任务预测。对三个流行的情绪分析基准（IEMOCAP、MOSI 和 MOSEI）进行的实验表明，与基线相比有显着的收益。

AI.tldr: 提出ScaleVLAD模型，通过多尺度局部描述符融合提升多模态情感分析性能
AI.motivation: 现有融合方法采用单一尺度表示，无法满足不同模态对齐的粒度需求，导致性能受限
AI.method: 提出ScaleVLAD模型，利用共享VLAD向量融合多尺度模态特征，结合自监督聚类损失，采用多Transformer编码器与全连接层进行预测
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP、MOSI、MOSEI三个数据集上显著优于基线方法
AI.conclusion: 多尺度融合策略与共享VLAD向量能有效提升多模态情感分析性能

authors_text: Mohammad Azangoo,Amir Taherkordi,Jan Olaf Blech,Valeriy Vyatkin
title: Digital Twin-Assisted Controlling of AGVs in Flexible Manufacturing Environments
title_zh: 灵活制造环境中 AGV 的数字孪生辅助控制
abstract: Digital Twins are increasingly being introduced for smart manufacturing systems to improve the efficiency of the main disciplines of such systems. Formal techniques, such as graphs, are a common way of describing Digital Twin models, allowing broad types of tools to provide Digital Twin based services such as fault detection in production lines. Obtaining correct and complete formal Digital Twins of physical systems can be a complicated and time consuming process, particularly for manufacturing systems with plenty of physical objects and the associated manufacturing processes. Automatic generation of Digital Twins is an emerging research field and can reduce time and costs. In this paper, we focus on the generation of Digital Twins for flexible manufacturing systems with Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) on the factory floor. In particular, we propose an architectural framework and the associated design choices and software development tools that facilitate automatic generation of Digital Twins for AGVs. Specifically, the scope of the generated digital twins is controlling AGVs in the factory floor. To this end, we focus on different control levels of AGVs and utilize graph theory to generate the graph-based Digital Twin of the factory floor.
summary: Digital Twins are increasingly being introduced for smart manufacturing systems to improve the efficiency of the main disciplines of such systems. Formal techniques, such as graphs, are a common way of describing Digital Twin models, allowing broad types of tools to provide Digital Twin based services such as fault detection in production lines. Obtaining correct and complete formal Digital Twins of physical systems can be a complicated and time consuming process, particularly for manufacturing systems with plenty of physical objects and the associated manufacturing processes. Automatic generation of Digital Twins is an emerging research field and can reduce time and costs. In this paper, we focus on the generation of Digital Twins for flexible manufacturing systems with Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) on the factory floor. In particular, we propose an architectural framework and the associated design choices and software development tools that facilitate automatic generation of Digital Twins for AGVs. Specifically, the scope of the generated digital twins is controlling AGVs in the factory floor. To this end, we focus on different control levels of AGVs and utilize graph theory to generate the graph-based Digital Twin of the factory floor.
abstract_zh: 数字孪生越来越多地被引入智能制造系统，以提高此类系统主要学科的效率。图形等形式化技术是描述数字孪生模型的常用方法，允许多种类型的工具提供基于数字孪生的服务，例如生产线中的故障检测。获得物理系统的正确且完整的正式数字孪生可能是一个复杂且耗时的过程，特别是对于具有大量物理对象和相关制造流程的制造系统。自动生成数字孪生是一个新兴的研究领域，可以减少时间和成本。在本文中，我们重点关注工厂车间使用自动导引车 (AGV) 的灵活制造系统的数字孪生的生成。特别是，我们提出了一个架构框架以及相关的设计选择和软件开发工具，以促进自动生成 AGV 数字孪生。具体来说，生成的数字孪生的范围是控制工厂车间的 AGV。为此，我们关注 AGV 的不同控制级别，并利用图论生成基于图的工厂车间数字孪生。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生技术的自动引导车（AGV）控制框架，用于柔性制造环境中的数字孪生生成。
AI.motivation: 手动构建复杂制造系统的完整数字孪生模型耗时且成本高，尤其针对包含大量物理对象和工艺的柔性制造系统。
AI.method: 设计了一种架构框架及配套工具，利用图论自动生成工厂车间AGV控制的数字孪生模型，聚焦不同控制层级的建模。
AI.result: 实现了支持AGV车间控制的数字孪生自动生成功能，简化了传统手动建模流程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为柔性制造系统提供了高效、低成本的数字孪生生成方案，提升了智能工厂的运维效率。

search_text: Digital Twin-Assisted Controlling of AGVs in Flexible Manufacturing Environments 灵活制造环境中 AGV 的数字孪生辅助控制 Digital Twins are increasingly being introduced for smart manufacturing systems to improve the efficiency of the main disciplines of such systems. Formal techniques, such as graphs, are a common way of describing Digital Twin models, allowing broad types of tools to provide Digital Twin based services such as fault detection in production lines. Obtaining correct and complete formal Digital Twins of physical systems can be a complicated and time consuming process, particularly for manufacturing systems with plenty of physical objects and the associated manufacturing processes. Automatic generation of Digital Twins is an emerging research field and can reduce time and costs. In this paper, we focus on the generation of Digital Twins for flexible manufacturing systems with Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) on the factory floor. In particular, we propose an architectural framework and the associated design choices and software development tools that facilitate automatic generation of Digital Twins for AGVs. Specifically, the scope of the generated digital twins is controlling AGVs in the factory floor. To this end, we focus on different control levels of AGVs and utilize graph theory to generate the graph-based Digital Twin of the factory floor. 数字孪生越来越多地被引入智能制造系统，以提高此类系统主要学科的效率。图形等形式化技术是描述数字孪生模型的常用方法，允许多种类型的工具提供基于数字孪生的服务，例如生产线中的故障检测。获得物理系统的正确且完整的正式数字孪生可能是一个复杂且耗时的过程，特别是对于具有大量物理对象和相关制造流程的制造系统。自动生成数字孪生是一个新兴的研究领域，可以减少时间和成本。在本文中，我们重点关注工厂车间使用自动导引车 (AGV) 的灵活制造系统的数字孪生的生成。特别是，我们提出了一个架构框架以及相关的设计选择和软件开发工具，以促进自动生成 AGV 数字孪生。具体来说，生成的数字孪生的范围是控制工厂车间的 AGV。为此，我们关注 AGV 的不同控制级别，并利用图论生成基于图的工厂车间数字孪生。 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生技术的自动引导车（AGV）控制框架，用于柔性制造环境中的数字孪生生成。 Mohammad Azangoo,Amir Taherkordi,Jan Olaf Blech,Valeriy Vyatkin cs.RO,cs.SE

authors_text: Antonio Elia Forte,David Melancon,Leon M. Kamp,Benjamin Gorissen,Katia Bertoldi
title: MuA-Ori: Multimodal Actuated Origami
title_zh: MuA-Ori：多模式驱动折纸
abstract: Recently, inflatable elements integrated in robotics systems have enabled complex motions as a result of simple inputs. However, these fluidic actuators typically exhibit unimodal deformation upon inflation. Here, we present a new design concept for modular, fluidic actuators that can switch between deformation modes as a response to an input threshold. Our system comprises bistable origami modules in which snapping breaks rotational symmetry, giving access to a bending deformation. By tuning geometry, the modules can be designed to snap at different pressure thresholds, rotate clockwise or counterclockwise when actuated, and bend in different planes. Due to their ability to assume multiple deformation modes as response to a single pressure input we call our system MuA-Ori, or Multimodal Actuated Origami. MuA-Ori provides an ideal platform to design actuators that can switch between different configurations, reach multiple, pre-defined targets in space, and move along complex trajectories.
summary: Recently, inflatable elements integrated in robotics systems have enabled complex motions as a result of simple inputs. However, these fluidic actuators typically exhibit unimodal deformation upon inflation. Here, we present a new design concept for modular, fluidic actuators that can switch between deformation modes as a response to an input threshold. Our system comprises bistable origami modules in which snapping breaks rotational symmetry, giving access to a bending deformation. By tuning geometry, the modules can be designed to snap at different pressure thresholds, rotate clockwise or counterclockwise when actuated, and bend in different planes. Due to their ability to assume multiple deformation modes as response to a single pressure input we call our system MuA-Ori, or Multimodal Actuated Origami. MuA-Ori provides an ideal platform to design actuators that can switch between different configurations, reach multiple, pre-defined targets in space, and move along complex trajectories.
abstract_zh: 最近，集成在机器人系统中的充气元件通过简单的输入即可实现复杂的运动。然而，这些流体致动器通常在充气时表现出单峰变形。在这里，我们提出了一种模块化流体执行器的新设计概念，该执行器可以根据输入阈值在变形模式之间切换。我们的系统由双稳态折纸模块组成，其中捕捉打破了旋转对称性，从而实现了弯曲变形。通过调整几何形状，模块可以设计为在不同的压力阈值下卡合，在驱动时顺时针或逆时针旋转，并在不同的平面上弯曲。由于它们能够假设多种变形模式作为对单个压力输入的响应，我们将我们的系统称为 MuA-Ori，或多模式驱动折纸。 MuA-Ori 提供了一个理想的平台来设计执行器，这些执行器可以在不同的配置之间切换，到达空间中的多个预定义目标，并沿着复杂的轨迹移动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型模块化流体驱动器MuA-Ori，通过双稳态折纸结构实现多模态变形响应。
AI.motivation: 传统流体驱动器仅能实现单一变形模式，难以满足复杂运动需求，需开发可切换多变形模式的驱动系统。
AI.method: 设计双稳态折纸模块，利用几何参数调节实现不同压力阈值下的 snapping 变形，通过旋转对称性破缺实现多方向弯曲。
AI.result: 系统可基于单一压力输入切换多种变形模式，实现多预设目标定位及复杂轨迹运动。
AI.conclusion: MuA-Ori为可变形机器人提供了模块化设计平台，具备多自由度控制与复杂运动规划潜力。

authors_text: Param Budhraja,Mayank Baranwal,Kunal Garg,Ashish Hota
title: Breaking the Convergence Barrier: Optimization via Fixed-Time Convergent Flows
title_zh: 打破收敛障碍：通过固定时间收敛流进行优化
comment: Accepted at AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2022
comments: Accepted at AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2022
abstract: Accelerated gradient methods are the cornerstones of large-scale, data-driven optimization problems that arise naturally in machine learning and other fields concerning data analysis. We introduce a gradient-based optimization framework for achieving acceleration, based on the recently introduced notion of fixed-time stability of dynamical systems. The method presents itself as a generalization of simple gradient-based methods suitably scaled to achieve convergence to the optimizer in a fixed-time, independent of the initialization. We achieve this by first leveraging a continuous-time framework for designing fixed-time stable dynamical systems, and later providing a consistent discretization strategy, such that the equivalent discrete-time algorithm tracks the optimizer in a practically fixed number of iterations. We also provide a theoretical analysis of the convergence behavior of the proposed gradient flows, and their robustness to additive disturbances for a range of functions obeying strong convexity, strict convexity, and possibly nonconvexity but satisfying the Polyak-Łojasiewicz inequality. We also show that the regret bound on the convergence rate is constant by virtue of the fixed-time convergence. The hyperparameters have intuitive interpretations and can be tuned to fit the requirements on the desired convergence rates. We validate the accelerated convergence properties of the proposed schemes on a range of numerical examples against the state-of-the-art optimization algorithms. Our work provides insights on developing novel optimization algorithms via discretization of continuous-time flows.
summary: Accelerated gradient methods are the cornerstones of large-scale, data-driven optimization problems that arise naturally in machine learning and other fields concerning data analysis. We introduce a gradient-based optimization framework for achieving acceleration, based on the recently introduced notion of fixed-time stability of dynamical systems. The method presents itself as a generalization of simple gradient-based methods suitably scaled to achieve convergence to the optimizer in a fixed-time, independent of the initialization. We achieve this by first leveraging a continuous-time framework for designing fixed-time stable dynamical systems, and later providing a consistent discretization strategy, such that the equivalent discrete-time algorithm tracks the optimizer in a practically fixed number of iterations. We also provide a theoretical analysis of the convergence behavior of the proposed gradient flows, and their robustness to additive disturbances for a range of functions obeying strong convexity, strict convexity, and possibly nonconvexity but satisfying the Polyak-Łojasiewicz inequality. We also show that the regret bound on the convergence rate is constant by virtue of the fixed-time convergence. The hyperparameters have intuitive interpretations and can be tuned to fit the requirements on the desired convergence rates. We validate the accelerated convergence properties of the proposed schemes on a range of numerical examples against the state-of-the-art optimization algorithms. Our work provides insights on developing novel optimization algorithms via discretization of continuous-time flows.
abstract_zh: 加速梯度方法是机器学习和其他数据分析领域中自然出现的大规模数据驱动优化问题的基石。我们基于最近引入的动态系统固定时间稳定性的概念，引入了一种基于梯度的优化框架来实现加速。该方法本身是基于简单梯度的方法的推广，经过适当缩放以在固定时间内实现向优化器的收敛，而与初始化无关。我们首先利用连续时间框架来设计固定时间稳定动力系统，然后提供一致的离散化策略，以便等效的离散时间算法在几乎固定的迭代次数中跟踪优化器，从而实现这一目标。我们还对所提出的梯度流的收敛行为及其对服从强凸性、严格凸性和可能非凸性但满足 Polyak-Łojasiewicz 不等式的一系列函数的加性扰动的鲁棒性进行了理论分析。我们还表明，由于固定时间收敛，收敛速度的遗憾界限是恒定的。超参数具有直观的解释，并且可以进行调整以满足所需收敛速率的要求。我们通过一系列数值示例与最先进的优化算法验证了所提出方案的加速收敛特性。我们的工作提供了通过连续时间流的离散化开发新颖的优化算法的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于固定时间稳定性的梯度优化框架，实现了与初始化无关的固定时间收敛。
AI.motivation: 现有加速梯度方法在大规模数据优化中存在收敛时间依赖初始条件的问题，需突破传统方法的收敛限制。
AI.method: 通过连续时间动力系统设计固定时间稳定框架，并采用一致离散化策略转化为离散算法，结合理论分析保证收敛性与鲁棒性。
AI.result: 理论证明了算法在强凸、严格凸及满足Polyak-Łojasiewicz条件函数下的收敛性，数值实验验证了优于现有算法的加速效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为通过连续时间流离散化设计新型优化算法提供了理论支持与实践路径。

result: 理论证明了算法在强凸、严格凸及满足Polyak-Łojasiewicz条件函数下的收敛性，数值实验验证了优于现有算法的加速效果。
conclusion: 该方法为通过连续时间流离散化设计新型优化算法提供了理论支持与实践路径。
search_text: Breaking the Convergence Barrier: Optimization via Fixed-Time Convergent Flows 打破收敛障碍：通过固定时间收敛流进行优化 Accelerated gradient methods are the cornerstones of large-scale, data-driven optimization problems that arise naturally in machine learning and other fields concerning data analysis. We introduce a gradient-based optimization framework for achieving acceleration, based on the recently introduced notion of fixed-time stability of dynamical systems. The method presents itself as a generalization of simple gradient-based methods suitably scaled to achieve convergence to the optimizer in a fixed-time, independent of the initialization. We achieve this by first leveraging a continuous-time framework for designing fixed-time stable dynamical systems, and later providing a consistent discretization strategy, such that the equivalent discrete-time algorithm tracks the optimizer in a practically fixed number of iterations. We also provide a theoretical analysis of the convergence behavior of the proposed gradient flows, and their robustness to additive disturbances for a range of functions obeying strong convexity, strict convexity, and possibly nonconvexity but satisfying the Polyak-Łojasiewicz inequality. We also show that the regret bound on the convergence rate is constant by virtue of the fixed-time convergence. The hyperparameters have intuitive interpretations and can be tuned to fit the requirements on the desired convergence rates. We validate the accelerated convergence properties of the proposed schemes on a range of numerical examples against the state-of-the-art optimization algorithms. Our work provides insights on developing novel optimization algorithms via discretization of continuous-time flows. 加速梯度方法是机器学习和其他数据分析领域中自然出现的大规模数据驱动优化问题的基石。我们基于最近引入的动态系统固定时间稳定性的概念，引入了一种基于梯度的优化框架来实现加速。该方法本身是基于简单梯度的方法的推广，经过适当缩放以在固定时间内实现向优化器的收敛，而与初始化无关。我们首先利用连续时间框架来设计固定时间稳定动力系统，然后提供一致的离散化策略，以便等效的离散时间算法在几乎固定的迭代次数中跟踪优化器，从而实现这一目标。我们还对所提出的梯度流的收敛行为及其对服从强凸性、严格凸性和可能非凸性但满足 Polyak-Łojasiewicz 不等式的一系列函数的加性扰动的鲁棒性进行了理论分析。我们还表明，由于固定时间收敛，收敛速度的遗憾界限是恒定的。超参数具有直观的解释，并且可以进行调整以满足所需收敛速率的要求。我们通过一系列数值示例与最先进的优化算法验证了所提出方案的加速收敛特性。我们的工作提供了通过连续时间流的离散化开发新颖的优化算法的见解。 本文提出了一种基于固定时间稳定性的梯度优化框架，实现了与初始化无关的固定时间收敛。 Param Budhraja,Mayank Baranwal,Kunal Garg,Ashish Hota math.OC,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SY,stat.ML

authors_text: G. Melotti,W. Lu,P. Conde,D. Zhao,A. Asvadi,N. Gonçalves,C. Premebida
title: Probabilistic Approach for Road-Users Detection
title_zh: 道路使用者检测的概率方法
comment: This work has been accepted for publication as a REGULAR PAPER in the Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems-ITS
comments: This work has been accepted for publication as a REGULAR PAPER in the Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems-ITS
abstract: Object detection in autonomous driving applications implies that the detection and tracking of semantic objects are commonly native to urban driving environments, as pedestrians and vehicles. One of the major challenges in state-of-the-art deep-learning based object detection are false positives which occur with overconfident scores. This is highly undesirable in autonomous driving and other critical robotic-perception domains because of safety concerns. This paper proposes an approach to alleviate the problem of overconfident predictions by introducing a novel probabilistic layer to deep object detection networks in testing. The suggested approach avoids the traditional Sigmoid or Softmax prediction layer which often produces overconfident predictions. It is demonstrated that the proposed technique reduces overconfidence in the false positives without degrading the performance on the true positives. The approach is validated on the 2D-KITTI objection detection through the YOLOV4 and SECOND (Lidar-based detector). The proposed approach enables interpretable probabilistic predictions without the requirement of re-training the network and therefore is very practical.
summary: Object detection in autonomous driving applications implies that the detection and tracking of semantic objects are commonly native to urban driving environments, as pedestrians and vehicles. One of the major challenges in state-of-the-art deep-learning based object detection are false positives which occur with overconfident scores. This is highly undesirable in autonomous driving and other critical robotic-perception domains because of safety concerns. This paper proposes an approach to alleviate the problem of overconfident predictions by introducing a novel probabilistic layer to deep object detection networks in testing. The suggested approach avoids the traditional Sigmoid or Softmax prediction layer which often produces overconfident predictions. It is demonstrated that the proposed technique reduces overconfidence in the false positives without degrading the performance on the true positives. The approach is validated on the 2D-KITTI objection detection through the YOLOV4 and SECOND (Lidar-based detector). The proposed approach enables interpretable probabilistic predictions without the requirement of re-training the network and therefore is very practical.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶应用中的对象检测意味着语义对象的检测和跟踪通常原生于城市驾驶环境，如行人和​​车辆。最先进的基于深度学习的目标检测的主要挑战之一是分数过于自信时出现的误报。出于安全考虑，这在自动驾驶和其他关键的机器人感知领域是非常不受欢迎的。本文提出了一种通过在测试中向深度对象检测网络引入新颖的概率层来缓解过度自信预测问题的方法。建议的方法避免了传统的 Sigmoid 或 Softmax 预测层，它们经常产生过度自信的预测。事实证明，所提出的技术减少了对误报的过度自信，而不会降低真报的性能。该方法通过 YOLOV4 和 SECOND（基于激光雷达的检测器）在 2D-KITTI 物体检测上进行了验证。所提出的方法无需重新训练网络即可实现可解释的概率预测，因此非常实用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种概率方法解决自动驾驶中物体检测的过自信预测问题，减少误报而不影响正确检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有检测模型在测试阶段使用Sigmoid或Softmax层易产生过自信预测，导致安全风险，需在不重新训练网络的情况下降低误报置信度。
AI.method: 引入新颖的概率层替代传统Sigmoid/Softmax层，通过测试阶段修改预测分布，降低误报置信度而无需重新训练模型。
AI.result: 在2D-KITTI数据集上验证，该方法有效降低误报置信度，同时保持对正确检测的性能无损。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需网络再训练即可实现可解释的概率预测，为自动驾驶安全检测提供实用解决方案。

authors_text: Davide La Torre,Danilo Liuzzi,Marco Repetto,Matteo Rocca
title: Mixing Deep Learning and Multiple Criteria Optimization: An Application to Distributed Learning with Multiple Datasets
title_zh: 混合深度学习和多标准优化：多数据集分布式学习的应用
abstract: The training phase is the most important stage during the machine learning process. In the case of labeled data and supervised learning, machine training consists in minimizing the loss function subject to different constraints. In an abstract setting, it can be formulated as a multiple criteria optimization model in which each criterion measures the distance between the output associated with a specific input and its label. Therefore, the fitting term is a vector function and its minimization is intended in the Pareto sense. We provide stability results of the efficient solutions with respect to perturbations of input and output data. We then extend the same approach to the case of learning with multiple datasets. The multiple dataset environment is relevant when reducing the bias due to the choice of a specific training set. We propose a scalarization approach to implement this model and numerical experiments in digit classification using MNIST data.
summary: The training phase is the most important stage during the machine learning process. In the case of labeled data and supervised learning, machine training consists in minimizing the loss function subject to different constraints. In an abstract setting, it can be formulated as a multiple criteria optimization model in which each criterion measures the distance between the output associated with a specific input and its label. Therefore, the fitting term is a vector function and its minimization is intended in the Pareto sense. We provide stability results of the efficient solutions with respect to perturbations of input and output data. We then extend the same approach to the case of learning with multiple datasets. The multiple dataset environment is relevant when reducing the bias due to the choice of a specific training set. We propose a scalarization approach to implement this model and numerical experiments in digit classification using MNIST data.
abstract_zh: 训练阶段是机器学习过程中最重要的阶段。在标记数据和监督学习的情况下，机器训练在于最小化受不同约束的损失函数。在抽象设置中，它可以表示为多标准优化模型，其中每个标准测量与特定输入关联的输出与其标签之间的距离。因此，拟合项是一个向量函数，其最小化是在帕累托意义上的。我们提供关于输入和输出数据扰动的有效解决方案的稳定性结果。然后，我们将相同的方法扩展到使用多个数据集学习的情况。当减少由于选择特定训练集而导致的偏差时，多数据集环境是相关的。我们提出了一种标量化方法来实现该模型，并使用 MNIST 数据进行数字分类的数值实验。

AI.tldr: 将深度学习与多准则优化结合，应用于多数据集的分布式学习，解决训练稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习在单一数据集上易受偏差影响，需稳健方法处理多数据集环境。
AI.method: 采用多准则优化模型，将损失函数向量化并进行Pareto最小化，扩展至多数据集环境，提出标量化方法实现。
AI.result: 证明了有效解的稳定性，并通过MNIST实验验证方法在数字分类中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合多准则优化与深度学习，提升多数据集环境下的模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Jie Ren,Wenteng Liang,Ran Yan,Luo Mai,Shiwen Liu,Xiao Liu
title: MegBA: A GPU-Based Distributed Library for Large-Scale Bundle Adjustment
title_zh: MegBA：基于 GPU 的大规模束调整分布式库
comment: accepted by ECCV2022
comments: accepted by ECCV2022
abstract: Large-scale Bundle Adjustment (BA) requires massive memory and computation resources which are difficult to be fulfilled by existing BA libraries. In this paper, we propose MegBA, a GPU-based distributed BA library. MegBA can provide massive aggregated memory by automatically partitioning large BA problems, and assigning the solvers of sub-problems to parallel nodes. The parallel solvers adopt distributed Precondition Conjugate Gradient and distributed Schur Elimination, so that an effective solution, which can match the precision of those computed by a single node, can be efficiently computed. To accelerate BA computation, we implement end-to-end BA computation using high-performance primitives available on commodity GPUs. MegBA exposes easy-to-use APIs that are compatible with existing popular BA libraries. Experiments show that MegBA can significantly outperform state-of-the-art BA libraries: Ceres (41.45$\times$), RootBA (64.576$\times$) and DeepLM (6.769$\times$) in several large-scale BA benchmarks. The code of MegBA is available at https://github.com/MegviiRobot/MegBA.
summary: Large-scale Bundle Adjustment (BA) requires massive memory and computation resources which are difficult to be fulfilled by existing BA libraries. In this paper, we propose MegBA, a GPU-based distributed BA library. MegBA can provide massive aggregated memory by automatically partitioning large BA problems, and assigning the solvers of sub-problems to parallel nodes. The parallel solvers adopt distributed Precondition Conjugate Gradient and distributed Schur Elimination, so that an effective solution, which can match the precision of those computed by a single node, can be efficiently computed. To accelerate BA computation, we implement end-to-end BA computation using high-performance primitives available on commodity GPUs. MegBA exposes easy-to-use APIs that are compatible with existing popular BA libraries. Experiments show that MegBA can significantly outperform state-of-the-art BA libraries: Ceres (41.45$\times$), RootBA (64.576$\times$) and DeepLM (6.769$\times$) in several large-scale BA benchmarks. The code of MegBA is available at https://github.com/MegviiRobot/MegBA.
abstract_zh: 大规模束调整（BA）需要大量的内存和计算资源，现有的BA库很难满足。在本文中，我们提出了 MegBA，一个基于 GPU 的分布式 BA 库。 MegBA 可以通过自动划分大型 BA 问题并将子问题的求解器分配给并行节点来提供海量聚合内存。并行求解器采用分布式前置条件共轭梯度和分布式Schur消除，可以高效地计算出与单节点计算精度相匹配的有效解。为了加速 BA 计算，我们使用商用 GPU 上可用的高性能原语来实现端到端 BA 计算。 MegBA 公开了易于使用的 API，与现有流行的 BA 库兼容。实验表明，在几个大型 BA 基准测试中，MegBA 的性能明显优于最先进的 BA 库：Ceres (41.45$\times$)、RootBA (64.576$\times$) 和 DeepLM (6.769$\times$)。 MegBA的代码可以在https://github.com/MegviiRobot/MegBA获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于GPU的分布式库MegBA，用于高效解决大规模集束调整问题。
AI.motivation: 传统BA库在处理大规模问题时面临内存和计算资源不足的挑战，需更高效的分布式解决方案。
AI.method: 通过GPU分布式计算实现问题自动划分与并行求解，采用分布式预处理共轭梯度和舒尔消元法，结合GPU高性能原语加速计算。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，MegBA较Ceres、RootBA和DeepLM分别快41.45倍、64.576倍和6.769倍。
AI.conclusion: MegBA通过GPU分布式架构显著提升大规模BA计算效率，且兼容现有API，代码已开源验证有效性。

search_text: MegBA: A GPU-Based Distributed Library for Large-Scale Bundle Adjustment MegBA：基于 GPU 的大规模束调整分布式库 Large-scale Bundle Adjustment (BA) requires massive memory and computation resources which are difficult to be fulfilled by existing BA libraries. In this paper, we propose MegBA, a GPU-based distributed BA library. MegBA can provide massive aggregated memory by automatically partitioning large BA problems, and assigning the solvers of sub-problems to parallel nodes. The parallel solvers adopt distributed Precondition Conjugate Gradient and distributed Schur Elimination, so that an effective solution, which can match the precision of those computed by a single node, can be efficiently computed. To accelerate BA computation, we implement end-to-end BA computation using high-performance primitives available on commodity GPUs. MegBA exposes easy-to-use APIs that are compatible with existing popular BA libraries. Experiments show that MegBA can significantly outperform state-of-the-art BA libraries: Ceres (41.45$\times$), RootBA (64.576$\times$) and DeepLM (6.769$\times$) in several large-scale BA benchmarks. The code of MegBA is available at https://github.com/MegviiRobot/MegBA. 大规模束调整（BA）需要大量的内存和计算资源，现有的BA库很难满足。在本文中，我们提出了 MegBA，一个基于 GPU 的分布式 BA 库。 MegBA 可以通过自动划分大型 BA 问题并将子问题的求解器分配给并行节点来提供海量聚合内存。并行求解器采用分布式前置条件共轭梯度和分布式Schur消除，可以高效地计算出与单节点计算精度相匹配的有效解。为了加速 BA 计算，我们使用商用 GPU 上可用的高性能原语来实现端到端 BA 计算。 MegBA 公开了易于使用的 API，与现有流行的 BA 库兼容。实验表明，在几个大型 BA 基准测试中，MegBA 的性能明显优于最先进的 BA 库：Ceres (41.45$\times$)、RootBA (64.576$\times$) 和 DeepLM (6.769$\times$)。 MegBA的代码可以在https://github.com/MegviiRobot/MegBA获取。 提出一种基于GPU的分布式库MegBA，用于高效解决大规模集束调整问题。 Jie Ren,Wenteng Liang,Ran Yan,Luo Mai,Shiwen Liu,Xiao Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Ching-Yu Tseng,Po-Shao Lin,Yu-Jia Liou,Kuan-Chih Huang,Winston H. Hsu
title: 3rd Place Solution for NeurIPS 2021 Shifts Challenge: Vehicle Motion Prediction
title_zh: NeurIPS 2021 转变挑战赛第三名解决方案：车辆运动预测
comment: ef:Bayesian Deep Learning Workshop, NeurIPS 2021
comments: ef:Bayesian Deep Learning Workshop, NeurIPS 2021
abstract: Shifts Challenge: Robustness and Uncertainty under Real-World Distributional Shift is a competition held by NeurIPS 2021. The objective of this competition is to search for methods to solve the motion prediction problem in cross-domain. In the real world dataset, It exists variance between input data distribution and ground-true data distribution, which is called the domain shift problem. In this report, we propose a new architecture inspired by state of the art papers. The main contribution is the backbone architecture with self-attention mechanism and predominant loss function. Subsequently, we won 3rd place as shown on the leaderboard.
summary: Shifts Challenge: Robustness and Uncertainty under Real-World Distributional Shift is a competition held by NeurIPS 2021. The objective of this competition is to search for methods to solve the motion prediction problem in cross-domain. In the real world dataset, It exists variance between input data distribution and ground-true data distribution, which is called the domain shift problem. In this report, we propose a new architecture inspired by state of the art papers. The main contribution is the backbone architecture with self-attention mechanism and predominant loss function. Subsequently, we won 3rd place as shown on the leaderboard.
abstract_zh: Shifts Challenge: Robustness and Uncertainty under Real-World Distributional Shift 是 NeurIPS 2021 举办的一项竞赛。本次竞赛的目标是寻找解决跨域运动预测问题的方法。在现实世界的数据集中，输入数据分布与真实数据分布之间存在差异，这称为域转移问题。在本报告中，我们提出了一种受最先进论文启发的新架构。主要贡献是具有自注意力机制和主要损失函数的主干架构。随后，我们获得了排行榜上的第三名。

AI.tldr: 本文针对NeurIPS 2021 Shifts挑战赛中的跨领域车辆运动预测问题提出解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据中输入分布与真实标签分布存在差异（领域偏移问题），需提升模型鲁棒性与不确定性处理能力。
AI.method: 设计融合自注意力机制的主干网络架构，并采用主导损失函数优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在挑战赛中获得第三名成绩，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的架构通过有效应对领域偏移问题，在竞赛中取得了优异成绩。

authors_text: Shavrina Tatiana,Malykh Valentin
title: How not to Lie with a Benchmark: Rearranging NLP Leaderboards
title_zh: 如何不用基准说谎：重新排列 NLP 排行榜
comment: Accepted to ICBINB Workshop, NeurIPS 2021
comments: Accepted to ICBINB Workshop, NeurIPS 2021
abstract: Comparison with a human is an essential requirement for a benchmark for it to be a reliable measurement of model capabilities. Nevertheless, the methods for model comparison could have a fundamental flaw - the arithmetic mean of separate metrics is used for all tasks of different complexity, different size of test and training sets. In this paper, we examine popular NLP benchmarks' overall scoring methods and rearrange the models by geometric and harmonic mean (appropriate for averaging rates) according to their reported results. We analyze several popular benchmarks including GLUE, SuperGLUE, XGLUE, and XTREME. The analysis shows that e.g. human level on SuperGLUE is still not reached, and there is still room for improvement for the current models.
summary: Comparison with a human is an essential requirement for a benchmark for it to be a reliable measurement of model capabilities. Nevertheless, the methods for model comparison could have a fundamental flaw - the arithmetic mean of separate metrics is used for all tasks of different complexity, different size of test and training sets. In this paper, we examine popular NLP benchmarks' overall scoring methods and rearrange the models by geometric and harmonic mean (appropriate for averaging rates) according to their reported results. We analyze several popular benchmarks including GLUE, SuperGLUE, XGLUE, and XTREME. The analysis shows that e.g. human level on SuperGLUE is still not reached, and there is still room for improvement for the current models.
abstract_zh: 与人类进行比较是基准的基本要求，因为它是模型能力的可靠衡量标准。然而，模型比较的方法可能存在一个根本缺陷——不同复杂度、不同大小的测试和训练集的所有任务都使用单独指标的算术平均值。在本文中，我们研究了流行的 NLP 基准的整体评分方法，并根据其报告的结果通过几何平均和调和平均（适合平均率）重新排列模型。我们分析了几个流行的基准测试，包括 GLUE、SuperGLUE、XGLUE 和 XTREME。分析表明，例如SuperGLUE 尚未达到人类水平，当前模型仍有改进空间。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了NLP领域主流基准测试的评分方法，指出其使用算术平均值的缺陷，并采用几何和调和平均数重新排列模型排名。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试通过算术平均值综合不同任务表现，但未考虑任务复杂度和数据规模差异，可能导致排名失真。
AI.method: 对GLUE、SuperGLUE等基准的模型得分进行几何平均和调和平均计算，替代传统算术平均方法重新排序。
AI.result: 发现当前模型在SuperGLUE等基准上仍未达到人类水平，且不同平均方法下模型排名存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 基准评分方法需考虑任务特性选择合适平均方式，当前模型在部分任务上仍有提升空间。

authors_text: Marek Klonowski,Dariusz R. Kowalski,Dominik Pajak
title: Generalized Framework for Group Testing: Queries, Feedbacks and Adversaries
title_zh: 小组测试的通用框架：查询、反馈和对手
abstract: In the Group Testing problem, the objective is to learn a subset K of some much larger domain N, using the shortest-possible sequence of queries Q. A feedback to a query provides some information about the intersection between the query and subset K. Several specific feedbacks have been studied in the literature, often proving different formulas for the estimate of the query complexity of the problem, defined as the shortest length of queries' sequence solving Group Testing problem with specific feedback. In this paper we study what are the properties of the feedback that influence the query complexity of Group Testing and what is their measurable impact. We propose a generic framework that covers a vast majority of relevant settings considered in the literature, which depends on two fundamental parameters of the feedback: input capacity $α$ and output expressiveness $β$. They upper bound the logarithm of the size of the feedback function domain and image, respectively. To justify the value of the framework, we prove upper bounds on query complexity of non adaptive, deterministic Group Testing under some "efficient" feedbacks, for minimum, maximum and general expressiveness, and complement them with a lower bound on all feedbacks with given parameters $α,β$. Our upper bounds also hold if the feedback function could get an input twisted by a malicious adversary, in case the intersection of a query and the hidden set is bigger than the feedback capacity $α$. We also show that slight change in the feedback function may result in substantial worsening of the query complexity. Additionally, we analyze explicitly constructed randomized counterparts of the deterministic results. Our results provide some insights to what are the most useful bits of information an output-restricted feedback could provide, and open a number of challenging research directions.
summary: In the Group Testing problem, the objective is to learn a subset K of some much larger domain N, using the shortest-possible sequence of queries Q. A feedback to a query provides some information about the intersection between the query and subset K. Several specific feedbacks have been studied in the literature, often proving different formulas for the estimate of the query complexity of the problem, defined as the shortest length of queries' sequence solving Group Testing problem with specific feedback. In this paper we study what are the properties of the feedback that influence the query complexity of Group Testing and what is their measurable impact. We propose a generic framework that covers a vast majority of relevant settings considered in the literature, which depends on two fundamental parameters of the feedback: input capacity $α$ and output expressiveness $β$. They upper bound the logarithm of the size of the feedback function domain and image, respectively. To justify the value of the framework, we prove upper bounds on query complexity of non adaptive, deterministic Group Testing under some "efficient" feedbacks, for minimum, maximum and general expressiveness, and complement them with a lower bound on all feedbacks with given parameters $α,β$. Our upper bounds also hold if the feedback function could get an input twisted by a malicious adversary, in case the intersection of a query and the hidden set is bigger than the feedback capacity $α$. We also show that slight change in the feedback function may result in substantial worsening of the query complexity. Additionally, we analyze explicitly constructed randomized counterparts of the deterministic results. Our results provide some insights to what are the most useful bits of information an output-restricted feedback could provide, and open a number of challenging research directions.
abstract_zh: 在组测试问题中，目标是使用查询 Q 的最短可能序列来学习某个大得多的域 N 的子集 K。对查询的反馈提供了有关查询和子集 K 之间交集的一些信息。文献中研究了几种特定的反馈，通常证明了用于估计问题的查询复杂性的不同公式，定义为使用特定反馈解决组测试问题的查询序列的最短长度。在本文中，我们研究了影响组测试查询复杂性的反馈属性以及它们的可衡量影响是什么。我们提出了一个通用框架，涵盖文献中考虑的绝大多数相关设置，该框架取决于反馈的两个基本参数：输入能力$α$和输出表达力$β$。它们分别是反馈函数域和图像大小的对数的上限。为了证明该框架的价值，我们证明了在一些“有效”反馈下非自适应、确定性组测试的查询复杂性的上限，以实现最小、最大和一般表达能力，并用给定参数 $α,β$ 的所有反馈的下限来补充它们。如果反馈函数可能获得被恶意对手扭曲的输入，并且查询和隐藏集的交集大于反馈容量 $α$，那么我们的上限也成立。我们还表明，反馈函数的微小变化可能会导致查询复杂性大幅恶化。此外，我们还分析了确定性结果的明确构建的随机对应物。我们的研究结果提供了一些关于输出限制反馈可以提供的最有用信息的见解，并开辟了许多具有挑战性的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个通用群组测试框架，研究反馈机制对查询复杂度的影响，并基于输入容量α和输出表达性β两个参数建立理论分析模型。
AI.motivation: 现有群组测试研究针对不同反馈机制分别分析查询复杂度，缺乏统一框架。本文旨在建立通用理论模型，系统分析反馈属性对问题难度的影响，并探索对抗环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建包含输入容量α和输出表达性β的通用框架，通过证明非自适应确定性群组测试的查询复杂度上下界，并考虑对抗性输入和随机化方法的扩展分析。
AI.result: 证明了在有效反馈下查询复杂度的上界及给定α、β参数的下界，揭示反馈函数微小变化可能导致复杂度显著恶化，并分析了随机化方法的构造。
AI.conclusion: 该框架明确了输出受限反馈中最有价值的信息特征，为反馈设计与对抗环境下的群组测试研究提供了理论基础与新方向。
