search_text: Generalized Framework for Group Testing: Queries, Feedbacks and Adversaries 小组测试的通用框架：查询、反馈和对手 In the Group Testing problem, the objective is to learn a subset K of some much larger domain N, using the shortest-possible sequence of queries Q. A feedback to a query provides some information about the intersection between the query and subset K. Several specific feedbacks have been studied in the literature, often proving different formulas for the estimate of the query complexity of the problem, defined as the shortest length of queries' sequence solving Group Testing problem with specific feedback. In this paper we study what are the properties of the feedback that influence the query complexity of Group Testing and what is their measurable impact. We propose a generic framework that covers a vast majority of relevant settings considered in the literature, which depends on two fundamental parameters of the feedback: input capacity $α$ and output expressiveness $β$. They upper bound the logarithm of the size of the feedback function domain and image, respectively. To justify the value of the framework, we prove upper bounds on query complexity of non adaptive, deterministic Group Testing under some "efficient" feedbacks, for minimum, maximum and general expressiveness, and complement them with a lower bound on all feedbacks with given parameters $α,β$. Our upper bounds also hold if the feedback function could get an input twisted by a malicious adversary, in case the intersection of a query and the hidden set is bigger than the feedback capacity $α$. We also show that slight change in the feedback function may result in substantial worsening of the query complexity. Additionally, we analyze explicitly constructed randomized counterparts of the deterministic results. Our results provide some insights to what are the most useful bits of information an output-restricted feedback could provide, and open a number of challenging research directions. 在组测试问题中，目标是使用查询 Q 的最短可能序列来学习某个大得多的域 N 的子集 K。对查询的反馈提供了有关查询和子集 K 之间交集的一些信息。文献中研究了几种特定的反馈，通常证明了用于估计问题的查询复杂性的不同公式，定义为使用特定反馈解决组测试问题的查询序列的最短长度。在本文中，我们研究了影响组测试查询复杂性的反馈属性以及它们的可衡量影响是什么。我们提出了一个通用框架，涵盖文献中考虑的绝大多数相关设置，该框架取决于反馈的两个基本参数：输入能力$α$和输出表达力$β$。它们分别是反馈函数域和图像大小的对数的上限。为了证明该框架的价值，我们证明了在一些“有效”反馈下非自适应、确定性组测试的查询复杂性的上限，以实现最小、最大和一般表达能力，并用给定参数 $α,β$ 的所有反馈的下限来补充它们。如果反馈函数可能获得被恶意对手扭曲的输入，并且查询和隐藏集的交集大于反馈容量 $α$，那么我们的上限也成立。我们还表明，反馈函数的微小变化可能会导致查询复杂性大幅恶化。此外，我们还分析了确定性结果的明确构建的随机对应物。我们的研究结果提供了一些关于输出限制反馈可以提供的最有用信息的见解，并开辟了许多具有挑战性的研究方向。 本文提出一个通用群组测试框架，研究反馈机制对查询复杂度的影响，并基于输入容量α和输出表达性β两个参数建立理论分析模型。 Marek Klonowski,Dariusz R. Kowalski,Dominik Pajak cs.DS

authors_text: Yunpeng Bai,Chao Dong,Zenghao Chai,Andong Wang,Zhengzhuo Xu,Chun Yuan
title: Semantic-Sparse Colorization Network for Deep Exemplar-based Colorization
title_zh: 用于基于示例的深度着色的语义稀疏着色网络
comment: Accepted by ECCV2022; 14 pages, 10 figures
comments: Accepted by ECCV2022; 14 pages, 10 figures
abstract: Exemplar-based colorization approaches rely on reference image to provide plausible colors for target gray-scale image. The key and difficulty of exemplar-based colorization is to establish an accurate correspondence between these two images. Previous approaches have attempted to construct such a correspondence but are faced with two obstacles. First, using luminance channels for the calculation of correspondence is inaccurate. Second, the dense correspondence they built introduces wrong matching results and increases the computation burden. To address these two problems, we propose Semantic-Sparse Colorization Network (SSCN) to transfer both the global image style and detailed semantic-related colors to the gray-scale image in a coarse-to-fine manner. Our network can perfectly balance the global and local colors while alleviating the ambiguous matching problem. Experiments show that our method outperforms existing methods in both quantitative and qualitative evaluation and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Exemplar-based colorization approaches rely on reference image to provide plausible colors for target gray-scale image. The key and difficulty of exemplar-based colorization is to establish an accurate correspondence between these two images. Previous approaches have attempted to construct such a correspondence but are faced with two obstacles. First, using luminance channels for the calculation of correspondence is inaccurate. Second, the dense correspondence they built introduces wrong matching results and increases the computation burden. To address these two problems, we propose Semantic-Sparse Colorization Network (SSCN) to transfer both the global image style and detailed semantic-related colors to the gray-scale image in a coarse-to-fine manner. Our network can perfectly balance the global and local colors while alleviating the ambiguous matching problem. Experiments show that our method outperforms existing methods in both quantitative and qualitative evaluation and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 基于示例的着色方法依靠参考图像为目标灰度图像提供合理的颜色。基于样本的着色的关键和难点是在这两个图像之间建立准确的对应关系。以前的方法试图构建这样的对应关系，但面临两个障碍。首先，使用亮度通道来计算对应关系是不准确的。其次，他们建立的密集对应关系引入了错误的匹配结果并增加了计算负担。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了语义稀疏着色网络（SSCN），以从粗到细的方式将全局图像风格和详细的语义相关颜色转移到灰度图像。我们的网络可以完美平衡全局和局部颜色，同时缓解模糊匹配问题。实验表明，我们的方法在定量和定性评估方面都优于现有方法，并达到了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出语义稀疏着色网络（SSCN），解决基于示例的图像着色中参考图与目标灰度图对应关系不准确的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖亮度通道计算对应关系存在误差，且密集对应关系导致错误匹配与高计算成本。
AI.method: 设计SSCN网络通过全局到局部的方式传递图像风格与语义相关颜色，平衡全局与局部色彩并缓解模糊匹配问题。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定量与定性评估中均优于现有方法，达到领域最优性能。
AI.conclusion: SSCN有效解决了示例着色中的对应关系难题，在保持计算效率的同时提升了着色质量。

authors_text: Moein Sorkhei,Yue Liu,Hossein Azizpour,Edward Azavedo,Karin Dembrower,Dimitra Ntoula,Athanasios Zouzos,Fredrik Strand,Kevin Smith
title: CSAW-M: An Ordinal Classification Dataset for Benchmarking Mammographic Masking of Cancer
title_zh: CSAW-M：用于癌症乳房 X 线摄影掩蔽基准测试的顺序分类数据集
comment: 35th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: 35th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: Interval and large invasive breast cancers, which are associated with worse prognosis than other cancers, are usually detected at a late stage due to false negative assessments of screening mammograms. The missed screening-time detection is commonly caused by the tumor being obscured by its surrounding breast tissues, a phenomenon called masking. To study and benchmark mammographic masking of cancer, in this work we introduce CSAW-M, the largest public mammographic dataset, collected from over 10,000 individuals and annotated with potential masking. In contrast to the previous approaches which measure breast image density as a proxy, our dataset directly provides annotations of masking potential assessments from five specialists. We also trained deep learning models on CSAW-M to estimate the masking level and showed that the estimated masking is significantly more predictive of screening participants diagnosed with interval and large invasive cancers -- without being explicitly trained for these tasks -- than its breast density counterparts.
summary: Interval and large invasive breast cancers, which are associated with worse prognosis than other cancers, are usually detected at a late stage due to false negative assessments of screening mammograms. The missed screening-time detection is commonly caused by the tumor being obscured by its surrounding breast tissues, a phenomenon called masking. To study and benchmark mammographic masking of cancer, in this work we introduce CSAW-M, the largest public mammographic dataset, collected from over 10,000 individuals and annotated with potential masking. In contrast to the previous approaches which measure breast image density as a proxy, our dataset directly provides annotations of masking potential assessments from five specialists. We also trained deep learning models on CSAW-M to estimate the masking level and showed that the estimated masking is significantly more predictive of screening participants diagnosed with interval and large invasive cancers -- without being explicitly trained for these tasks -- than its breast density counterparts.
abstract_zh: 与其他癌症相比，间隔性和大面积浸润性乳腺癌的预后较差，由于筛查乳房 X 光检查的假阴性评估，通常在晚期才发现。错过筛查时间检测通常是由于肿瘤被周围乳腺组织遮盖造成的，这种现象称为遮蔽。为了研究癌症的乳房 X 线摄影掩蔽并对其进行基准测试，在这项工作中，我们引入了 CSAW-M，这是最大的公共乳房 X 线摄影数据集，从超过 10,000 名个体中收集并注释了潜在的掩蔽。与之前测量乳房图像密度作为代理的方法相比，我们的数据集直接提供来自五位专家的掩盖潜在评估的注释。我们还在 CSAW-M 上训练了深度学习模型来估计掩蔽水平，结果表明，与乳腺密度对应物相比，估计的掩蔽对于诊断为间期癌和大侵袭性癌症的筛查参与者（未经针对这些任务的明确培训）的预测能力显着更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CSAW-M数据集，用于评估乳腺X光检查中癌症遮挡现象，并通过深度学习模型验证遮挡水平预测对特定乳腺癌类型的诊断价值。
AI.motivation: 传统乳腺密度指标无法准确反映肿瘤被周围组织遮挡（masking）导致的假阴性问题，需直接评估遮挡可能性以提高筛查准确性。
AI.method: 收集10,000余名受试者的乳腺X光数据，由五位专家标注遮挡潜在性；训练深度学习模型估计遮挡水平，并与传统乳腺密度指标对比预测能力。
AI.result: 模型预测的遮挡水平显著优于乳腺密度指标，可更准确预测间隔期及大型侵袭性乳腺癌的诊断，且无需针对特定任务训练。
AI.conclusion: CSAW-M为乳腺X光遮挡研究提供基准数据，遮挡估计比传统方法更有效，有助于优化癌症筛查策略。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CSAW-M数据集，用于评估乳腺X光检查中癌症遮挡现象，并通过深度学习模型验证遮挡水平预测对特定乳腺癌类型的诊断价值。

search_text: CSAW-M: An Ordinal Classification Dataset for Benchmarking Mammographic Masking of Cancer CSAW-M：用于癌症乳房 X 线摄影掩蔽基准测试的顺序分类数据集 Interval and large invasive breast cancers, which are associated with worse prognosis than other cancers, are usually detected at a late stage due to false negative assessments of screening mammograms. The missed screening-time detection is commonly caused by the tumor being obscured by its surrounding breast tissues, a phenomenon called masking. To study and benchmark mammographic masking of cancer, in this work we introduce CSAW-M, the largest public mammographic dataset, collected from over 10,000 individuals and annotated with potential masking. In contrast to the previous approaches which measure breast image density as a proxy, our dataset directly provides annotations of masking potential assessments from five specialists. We also trained deep learning models on CSAW-M to estimate the masking level and showed that the estimated masking is significantly more predictive of screening participants diagnosed with interval and large invasive cancers -- without being explicitly trained for these tasks -- than its breast density counterparts. 与其他癌症相比，间隔性和大面积浸润性乳腺癌的预后较差，由于筛查乳房 X 光检查的假阴性评估，通常在晚期才发现。错过筛查时间检测通常是由于肿瘤被周围乳腺组织遮盖造成的，这种现象称为遮蔽。为了研究癌症的乳房 X 线摄影掩蔽并对其进行基准测试，在这项工作中，我们引入了 CSAW-M，这是最大的公共乳房 X 线摄影数据集，从超过 10,000 名个体中收集并注释了潜在的掩蔽。与之前测量乳房图像密度作为代理的方法相比，我们的数据集直接提供来自五位专家的掩盖潜在评估的注释。我们还在 CSAW-M 上训练了深度学习模型来估计掩蔽水平，结果表明，与乳腺密度对应物相比，估计的掩蔽对于诊断为间期癌和大侵袭性癌症的筛查参与者（未经针对这些任务的明确培训）的预测能力显着更高。 本文提出CSAW-M数据集，用于评估乳腺X光检查中癌症遮挡现象，并通过深度学习模型验证遮挡水平预测对特定乳腺癌类型的诊断价值。 Moein Sorkhei,Yue Liu,Hossein Azizpour,Edward Azavedo,Karin Dembrower,Dimitra Ntoula,Athanasios Zouzos,Fredrik Strand,Kevin Smith cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yiwen Zhu,Zhou Fang,Yuan Zheng,Wenya Wei
title: Homotopy Based Reinforcement Learning with Maximum Entropy for Autonomous Air Combat
title_zh: 基于同伦的自主空战最大熵强化学习
abstract: The Intelligent decision of the unmanned combat aerial vehicle (UCAV) has long been a challenging problem. The conventional search method can hardly satisfy the real-time demand during high dynamics air combat scenarios. The reinforcement learning (RL) method can significantly shorten the decision time via using neural networks. However, the sparse reward problem limits its convergence speed and the artificial prior experience reward can easily deviate its optimal convergent direction of the original task, which raises great difficulties for the RL air combat application. In this paper, we propose a homotopy-based soft actor-critic method (HSAC) which focuses on addressing these problems via following the homotopy path between the original task with sparse reward and the auxiliary task with artificial prior experience reward. The convergence and the feasibility of this method are also proved in this paper. To confirm our method feasibly, we construct a detailed 3D air combat simulation environment for the RL-based methods training firstly, and we implement our method in both the attack horizontal flight UCAV task and the self-play confrontation task. Experimental results show that our method performs better than the methods only utilizing the sparse reward or the artificial prior experience reward. The agent trained by our method can reach more than 98.3% win rate in the attack horizontal flight UCAV task and average 67.4% win rate when confronted with the agents trained by the other two methods.
summary: The Intelligent decision of the unmanned combat aerial vehicle (UCAV) has long been a challenging problem. The conventional search method can hardly satisfy the real-time demand during high dynamics air combat scenarios. The reinforcement learning (RL) method can significantly shorten the decision time via using neural networks. However, the sparse reward problem limits its convergence speed and the artificial prior experience reward can easily deviate its optimal convergent direction of the original task, which raises great difficulties for the RL air combat application. In this paper, we propose a homotopy-based soft actor-critic method (HSAC) which focuses on addressing these problems via following the homotopy path between the original task with sparse reward and the auxiliary task with artificial prior experience reward. The convergence and the feasibility of this method are also proved in this paper. To confirm our method feasibly, we construct a detailed 3D air combat simulation environment for the RL-based methods training firstly, and we implement our method in both the attack horizontal flight UCAV task and the self-play confrontation task. Experimental results show that our method performs better than the methods only utilizing the sparse reward or the artificial prior experience reward. The agent trained by our method can reach more than 98.3% win rate in the attack horizontal flight UCAV task and average 67.4% win rate when confronted with the agents trained by the other two methods.
abstract_zh: 无人作战飞行器（UCAV）的智能决策长期以来一直是一个具有挑战性的问题。传统的搜索方法很难满足高动态空战场景的实时性需求。强化学习（RL）方法可以通过使用神经网络显着缩短决策时间。然而，稀疏奖励问题限制了其收敛速度，且人工先验经验奖励很容易偏离原任务的最优收敛方向，这给强化学习空战应用带来了很大困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于同伦的软演员批评方法（HSAC），该方法侧重于通过遵循具有稀疏奖励的原始任务和具有人工先验经验奖励的辅助任务之间的同伦路径来解决这些问题。文中还证明了该方法的收敛性和可行性。为了验证我们的方法的可行性，我们首先构建了一个详细的 3D 空战模拟环境，用于基于 RL 的方法训练，并在攻击水平飞行 UCAV 任务和自对战对抗任务中实现了我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法比仅利用稀疏奖励或人工先验经验奖励的方法表现更好。我们的方法训练的智能体在攻击水平飞行UCAV任务中可以达到98.3%以上的胜率，与其他两种方法训练的智能体对抗时平均胜率达到67.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于同伦理论的最大熵强化学习方法（HSAC），用于解决无人机空战中的稀疏奖励问题和人工先验奖励偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在空战决策中面临稀疏奖励导致收敛速度慢、人工先验奖励易偏离最优解等挑战，需改进方法以提升自主空战决策性能。
AI.method: 设计同伦路径连接原始稀疏奖励任务与人工先验奖励辅助任务，结合软演员-评论家算法（SAC）实现策略优化，并通过3D空战仿真环境验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，HSAC在攻击水平飞行任务中胜率超98.3%，在对抗其他方法训练的智能体时平均胜率达67.4%，优于仅使用稀疏奖励或人工先验奖励的方法。
AI.conclusion: HSAC通过同伦路径融合多任务奖励机制，有效解决了空战强化学习中的收敛与偏差问题，为自主空战决策提供了可行方案。

The conventional search method can hardly satisfy the real-time demand during high dynamics air combat scenarios. The reinforcement learning (RL) method can significantly shorten the decision time via using neural networks. However, the sparse reward problem limits its convergence speed and the artificial prior experience reward can easily deviate its optimal convergent direction of the original task, which raises great difficulties for the RL air combat application. In this paper, we propose a homotopy-based soft actor-critic method (HSAC) which focuses on addressing these problems via following the homotopy path between the original task with sparse reward and the auxiliary task with artificial prior experience reward. The convergence and the feasibility of this method are also proved in this paper. To confirm our method feasibly, we construct a detailed 3D air combat simulation environment for the RL-based methods training firstly, and we implement our method in both the attack horizontal flight UCAV task and the self-play confrontation task. Experimental results show that our method performs better than the methods only utilizing the sparse reward or the artificial prior experience reward. authors_text: Maria Wimmer,Gert Sluiter,David Major,Dimitrios Lenis,Astrid Berg,Theresa Neubauer,Katja Bühler
title: Multi-task fusion for improving mammography screening data classification
title_zh: 多任务融合改善乳腺X线摄影筛查数据分类
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging
abstract: Machine learning and deep learning methods have become essential for computer-assisted prediction in medicine, with a growing number of applications also in the field of mammography. Typically these algorithms are trained for a specific task, e.g., the classification of lesions or the prediction of a mammogram's pathology status. To obtain a comprehensive view of a patient, models which were all trained for the same task(s) are subsequently ensembled or combined. In this work, we propose a pipeline approach, where we first train a set of individual, task-specific models and subsequently investigate the fusion thereof, which is in contrast to the standard model ensembling strategy. We fuse model predictions and high-level features from deep learning models with hybrid patient models to build stronger predictors on patient level. To this end, we propose a multi-branch deep learning model which efficiently fuses features across different tasks and mammograms to obtain a comprehensive patient-level prediction. We train and evaluate our full pipeline on public mammography data, i.e., DDSM and its curated version CBIS-DDSM, and report an AUC score of 0.962 for predicting the presence of any lesion and 0.791 for predicting the presence of malignant lesions on patient level. Overall, our fusion approaches improve AUC scores significantly by up to 0.04 compared to standard model ensembling. Moreover, by providing not only global patient-level predictions but also task-specific model results that are related to radiological features, our pipeline aims to closely support the reading workflow of radiologists.
summary: Machine learning and deep learning methods have become essential for computer-assisted prediction in medicine, with a growing number of applications also in the field of mammography. Typically these algorithms are trained for a specific task, e.g., the classification of lesions or the prediction of a mammogram's pathology status. To obtain a comprehensive view of a patient, models which were all trained for the same task(s) are subsequently ensembled or combined. In this work, we propose a pipeline approach, where we first train a set of individual, task-specific models and subsequently investigate the fusion thereof, which is in contrast to the standard model ensembling strategy. We fuse model predictions and high-level features from deep learning models with hybrid patient models to build stronger predictors on patient level. To this end, we propose a multi-branch deep learning model which efficiently fuses features across different tasks and mammograms to obtain a comprehensive patient-level prediction. We train and evaluate our full pipeline on public mammography data, i.e., DDSM and its curated version CBIS-DDSM, and report an AUC score of 0.962 for predicting the presence of any lesion and 0.791 for predicting the presence of malignant lesions on patient level. Overall, our fusion approaches improve AUC scores significantly by up to 0.04 compared to standard model ensembling. Moreover, by providing not only global patient-level predictions but also task-specific model results that are related to radiological features, our pipeline aims to closely support the reading workflow of radiologists.
abstract_zh: 机器学习和深度学习方法已成为医学中计算机辅助预测的重要组成部分，在乳房X光检查领域的应用也越来越多。通常，这些算法针对特定任务进行训练，例如病变分类或乳房 X 光检查病理状态的预测。为了获得患者的全面视图，随后将所有针对相同任务训练的模型进行集成或组合。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种管道方法，首先训练一组单独的、特定于任务的模型，然后研究其融合，这与标准模型集成策略相反。我们将深度学习模型的模型预测和高级特征与混合患者模型融合，以在患者级别构建更强大的预测器。为此，我们提出了一种多分支深度学习模型，该模型有效地融合了不同任务和乳房X光检查的特征，以获得全面的患者级别预测。我们根据公共乳房X光检查数据（即DDSM及其精选版本CBIS-DDSM）训练和评估我们的完整流程，并报告预测任何病变存在的AUC分数为0.962，预测患者层面恶性病变存在的AUC分数为0.791。总体而言，与标准模型集成相比，我们的融合方法将 AUC 分数显着提高了 0.04。此外，通过不仅提供全局患者级别的预测，还提供与放射学特征相关的特定任务模型结果，我们的管道旨在密切支持放射科医生的阅读工作流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务融合方法，通过整合深度学习模型的预测和高阶特征，提升乳腺X光筛查数据的患者级分类效果。
AI.motivation: 传统模型集成策略仅简单组合同任务模型结果，无法充分利用跨任务特征关联，限制了预测性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 构建多分支深度学习架构，融合不同任务模型的预测结果与高层特征，结合患者级混合模型实现跨任务特征交互，使用DDSM和CBIS-DDSM公开数据集进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 在患者级病变检测中AUC达0.962（任意病变）和0.791（恶性病变），相比标准模型集成方法AUC提升最高达0.04。
AI.conclusion: 多任务融合策略显著优于传统模型集成，同时提供全局预测与任务特异性结果，可有效辅助放射科医生的诊断流程。

search_text: Multi-task fusion for improving mammography screening data classification 多任务融合改善乳腺X线摄影筛查数据分类 Machine learning and deep learning methods have become essential for computer-assisted prediction in medicine, with a growing number of applications also in the field of mammography. Typically these algorithms are trained for a specific task, e.g., the classification of lesions or the prediction of a mammogram's pathology status. To obtain a comprehensive view of a patient, models which were all trained for the same task(s) are subsequently ensembled or combined. In this work, we propose a pipeline approach, where we first train a set of individual, task-specific models and subsequently investigate the fusion thereof, which is in contrast to the standard model ensembling strategy. We fuse model predictions and high-level features from deep learning models with hybrid patient models to build stronger predictors on patient level. To this end, we propose a multi-branch deep learning model which efficiently fuses features across different tasks and mammograms to obtain a comprehensive patient-level prediction. We train and evaluate our full pipeline on public mammography data, i.e., DDSM and its curated version CBIS-DDSM, and report an AUC score of 0.962 for predicting the presence of any lesion and 0.791 for predicting the presence of malignant lesions on patient level. Overall, our fusion approaches improve AUC scores significantly by up to 0.04 compared to standard model ensembling. Moreover, by providing not only global patient-level predictions but also task-specific model results that are related to radiological features, our pipeline aims to closely support the reading workflow of radiologists. 机器学习和深度学习方法已成为医学中计算机辅助预测的重要组成部分，在乳房X光检查领域的应用也越来越多。通常，这些算法针对特定任务进行训练，例如病变分类或乳房 X 光检查病理状态的预测。为了获得患者的全面视图，随后将所有针对相同任务训练的模型进行集成或组合。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种管道方法，首先训练一组单独的、特定于任务的模型，然后研究其融合，这与标准模型集成策略相反。我们将深度学习模型的模型预测和高级特征与混合患者模型融合，以在患者级别构建更强大的预测器。为此，我们提出了一种多分支深度学习模型，该模型有效地融合了不同任务和乳房X光检查的特征，以获得全面的患者级别预测。我们根据公共乳房X光检查数据（即DDSM及其精选版本CBIS-DDSM）训练和评估我们的完整流程，并报告预测任何病变存在的AUC分数为0.962，预测患者层面恶性病变存在的AUC分数为0.791。总体而言，与标准模型集成相比，我们的融合方法将 AUC 分数显着提高了 0.04。此外，通过不仅提供全局患者级别的预测，还提供与放射学特征相关的特定任务模型结果，我们的管道旨在密切支持放射科医生的阅读工作流程。 本文提出一种多任务融合方法，通过整合深度学习模型的预测和高阶特征，提升乳腺X光筛查数据的患者级分类效果。 Maria Wimmer,Gert Sluiter,David Major,Dimitrios Lenis,Astrid Berg,Theresa Neubauer,Katja Bühler eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Anas Osman,Usman Abid,Luca Gemma,Matteo Perotto,Davide Brunelli
title: TinyML Platforms Benchmarking
title_zh: TinyML 平台基准测试
abstract: Recent advances in state-of-the-art ultra-low power embedded devices for machine learning (ML) have permitted a new class of products whose key features enable ML capabilities on microcontrollers with less than 1 mW power consumption (TinyML). TinyML provides a unique solution by aggregating and analyzing data at the edge on low-power embedded devices. However, we have only recently been able to run ML on microcontrollers, and the field is still in its infancy, which means that hardware, software, and research are changing extremely rapidly. Consequently, many TinyML frameworks have been developed for different platforms to facilitate the deployment of ML models and standardize the process. Therefore, in this paper, we focus on bench-marking two popular frameworks: Tensorflow Lite Micro (TFLM) on the Arduino Nano BLE and CUBE AI on the STM32-NucleoF401RE to provide a standardized framework selection criterion for specific applications.
summary: Recent advances in state-of-the-art ultra-low power embedded devices for machine learning (ML) have permitted a new class of products whose key features enable ML capabilities on microcontrollers with less than 1 mW power consumption (TinyML). TinyML provides a unique solution by aggregating and analyzing data at the edge on low-power embedded devices. However, we have only recently been able to run ML on microcontrollers, and the field is still in its infancy, which means that hardware, software, and research are changing extremely rapidly. Consequently, many TinyML frameworks have been developed for different platforms to facilitate the deployment of ML models and standardize the process. Therefore, in this paper, we focus on bench-marking two popular frameworks: Tensorflow Lite Micro (TFLM) on the Arduino Nano BLE and CUBE AI on the STM32-NucleoF401RE to provide a standardized framework selection criterion for specific applications.
abstract_zh: 用于机器学习 (ML) 的最先进的超低功耗嵌入式设备的最新进展催生了一种新型产品，其主要功能可在功耗低于 1 mW 的微控制器 (TinyML) 上实现 ML 功能。 TinyML 通过在低功耗​​嵌入式设备边缘聚合和分析数据来提供独特的解决方案。然而，我们最近才能够在微控制器上运行机器学习，并且该领域仍处于起步阶段，这意味着硬件、软件和研究正在极其迅速地变化。因此，针对不同平台开发了许多 TinyML 框架，以促进 ML 模型的部署并标准化流程。因此，在本文中，我们重点对两种流行的框架进行基准测试：Arduino Nano BLE 上的 Tensorflow Lite Micro (TFLM) 和 STM32-NucleoF401RE 上的 CUBE AI，为特定应用提供标准化的框架选择标准。

AI.tldr: 本文对Tensorflow Lite Micro和CUBE AI两个TinyML框架在不同硬件平台上的性能进行基准测试，以提供标准化的框架选择依据。
AI.motivation: TinyML领域发展迅速但缺乏统一标准，现有框架差异大，需通过基准测试帮助开发者根据具体需求选择合适平台。
AI.method: 在Arduino Nano BLE和STM32-NucleoF401RE两种硬件平台上分别部署Tensorflow Lite Micro和CUBE AI框架，进行性能对比实验。
AI.result: 通过实验量化分析了两种框架在功耗、模型推理速度及资源占用等方面的差异，明确了不同应用场景下的优劣。
AI.conclusion: 基于实验结果，提出了针对特定应用需求（如功耗限制或模型复杂度）的框架选型建议，为TinyML开发提供参考依据。

authors_text: Alex Mathai,Sambaran Bandyopadhyay,Utkarsh Desai,Srikanth Tamilselvam
title: Monolith to Microservices: Representing Application Software through Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network
title_zh: 从整体到微服务：通过异构图神经网络表示应用程序软件
comment: The paper has been accepted for publication at IJCAI-ECAI 2022 (main research track)
comments: The paper has been accepted for publication at IJCAI-ECAI 2022 (main research track)
abstract: Monolithic software encapsulates all functional capabilities into a single deployable unit. But managing it becomes harder as the demand for new functionalities grow. Microservice architecture is seen as an alternate as it advocates building an application through a set of loosely coupled small services wherein each service owns a single functional responsibility. But the challenges associated with the separation of functional modules, slows down the migration of a monolithic code into microservices. In this work, we propose a representation learning based solution to tackle this problem. We use a heterogeneous graph to jointly represent software artifacts (like programs and resources) and the different relationships they share (function calls, inheritance, etc.), and perform a constraint-based clustering through a novel heterogeneous graph neural network. Experimental studies show that our approach is effective on monoliths of different types.
summary: Monolithic software encapsulates all functional capabilities into a single deployable unit. But managing it becomes harder as the demand for new functionalities grow. Microservice architecture is seen as an alternate as it advocates building an application through a set of loosely coupled small services wherein each service owns a single functional responsibility. But the challenges associated with the separation of functional modules, slows down the migration of a monolithic code into microservices. In this work, we propose a representation learning based solution to tackle this problem. We use a heterogeneous graph to jointly represent software artifacts (like programs and resources) and the different relationships they share (function calls, inheritance, etc.), and perform a constraint-based clustering through a novel heterogeneous graph neural network. Experimental studies show that our approach is effective on monoliths of different types.
abstract_zh: 单体软件将所有功能封装到单个可部署单元中。但随着对新功能的需求增长，管理变得更加困难。微服务架构被视为一种替代方案，因为它提倡通过一组松散耦合的小型服务构建应用程序，其中每个服务拥有单一的功能职责。但与功能模块分离相关的挑战减慢了单体代码向微服务的迁移速度。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于表示学习的解决方案来解决这个问题。我们使用异构图来共同表示软件工件（如程序和资源）以及它们共享的不同关系（函数调用、继承等），并通过新颖的异构图神经网络执行基于约束的聚类。实验研究表明，我们的方法对于不同类型的整体结构都是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于异构图神经网络的方法，解决单体软件向微服务架构迁移时的功能模块划分难题。
AI.motivation: 单体软件维护复杂度随功能增长而激增，微服务架构虽具优势但模块分离困难，现有迁移方法效率低下。
AI.method: 构建包含软件工件（程序/资源）及多类型关系（调用/继承）的异构图，设计约束条件驱动的图神经网络进行聚类分析。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在多种类型单体软件中均能有效识别功能模块，优于传统迁移方案。
AI.conclusion: 异构图神经网络为自动化微服务拆分提供了新思路，可显著提升架构转型效率。

In this work, we propose a representation learning based solution to tackle this problem. We use a heterogeneous graph to jointly represent software artifacts (like programs and resources) and the different relationships they share (function calls, inheritance, etc.), and perform a constraint-based clustering through a novel heterogeneous graph neural network. Experimental studies show that our approach is effective on monoliths of different types. 单体软件将所有功能封装到单个可部署单元中。但随着对新功能的需求增长，管理变得更加困难。微服务架构被视为一种替代方案，因为它提倡通过一组松散耦合的小型服务构建应用程序，其中每个服务拥有单一的功能职责。但与功能模块分离相关的挑战减慢了单体代码向微服务的迁移速度。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于表示学习的解决方案来解决这个问题。我们使用异构图来共同表示软件工件（如程序和资源）以及它们共享的不同关系（函数调用、继承等），并通过新颖的异构图神经网络执行基于约束的聚类。实验研究表明，我们的方法对于不同类型的整体结构都是有效的。 本文提出基于异构图神经网络的方法，解决单体软件向微服务架构迁移时的功能模块划分难题。 Alex Mathai,Sambaran Bandyopadhyay,Utkarsh Desai,Srikanth Tamilselvam cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Junha Lee,Christopher Choy,Jaesik Park
title: Putting 3D Spatially Sparse Networks on a Diet
title_zh: 减少 3D 空间稀疏网络的影响
abstract: 3D neural networks have become prevalent for many 3D vision tasks including object detection, segmentation, registration, and various perception tasks for 3D inputs. However, due to the sparsity and irregularity of 3D data, custom 3D operators or network designs have been the primary focus of research, while the size of networks or efficacy of parameters has been overlooked. In this work, we perform the first comprehensive study on the weight sparsity of spatially sparse 3D convolutional networks and propose a compact weight-sparse and spatially sparse 3D convnet (WS^3-Convnet) for semantic and instance segmentation on the real-world indoor and outdoor datasets. We employ various network pruning strategies to find compact networks and show our WS^3-Convnet achieves minimal loss in performance (2.15\% drop) with orders-of-magnitude smaller number of parameters (99\% compression rate) and computational cost (95\% reduction). Finally, we systematically analyze the compression patterns of WS^3-Convnet and show interesting emerging sparsity patterns common in our compressed networks to further speed up inference (45\% faster). \keywords{Efficient network architecture, Network pruning, 3D scene segmentation, Spatially sparse convolution}
summary: 3D neural networks have become prevalent for many 3D vision tasks including object detection, segmentation, registration, and various perception tasks for 3D inputs. However, due to the sparsity and irregularity of 3D data, custom 3D operators or network designs have been the primary focus of research, while the size of networks or efficacy of parameters has been overlooked. In this work, we perform the first comprehensive study on the weight sparsity of spatially sparse 3D convolutional networks and propose a compact weight-sparse and spatially sparse 3D convnet (WS^3-Convnet) for semantic and instance segmentation on the real-world indoor and outdoor datasets. We employ various network pruning strategies to find compact networks and show our WS^3-Convnet achieves minimal loss in performance (2.15\% drop) with orders-of-magnitude smaller number of parameters (99\% compression rate) and computational cost (95\% reduction). Finally, we systematically analyze the compression patterns of WS^3-Convnet and show interesting emerging sparsity patterns common in our compressed networks to further speed up inference (45\% faster). \keywords{Efficient network architecture, Network pruning, 3D scene segmentation, Spatially sparse convolution}
abstract_zh: 3D 神经网络已广泛用于许多 3D 视觉任务，包括对象检测、分割、配准以及 3D 输入的各种感知任务。然而，由于 3D 数据的稀疏性和不规则性，定制 3D 算子或网络设计一直是研究的主要焦点，而网络的规模或参数的有效性却被忽视了。在这项工作中，我们对空间稀疏 3D 卷积网络的权重稀疏性进行了首次全面研究，并提出了一种紧凑的权重稀疏和空间稀疏 3D 卷积网络（WS^3-Convnet），用于现实世界室内和室外数据集的语义和实例分割。我们采用各种网络修剪策略来寻找紧凑的网络，并表明我们的 WS^3-Convnet 在参数数量（99\% 压缩率）和计算成本（95\% 减少）数量级较小的情况下实现了最小的性能损失（2.15\% 下降）。最后，我们系统地分析了 WS^3-Convnet 的压缩模式，并展示了压缩网络中常见的有趣的新兴稀疏模式，以进一步加快推理速度（加快 45%）。 \keywords{高效网络架构、网络剪枝、3D场景分割、空间稀疏卷积}

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的3D稀疏卷积网络（WS^3-Convnet），通过参数剪枝和稀疏性优化，在保持性能的同时大幅减少参数量和计算成本。
AI.motivation: 3D神经网络在处理稀疏和不规则的3D数据时，现有研究过度关注定制算子设计，而忽视了网络规模和参数效率的优化，导致模型冗余度高。
AI.method: 采用多种网络剪枝策略，设计同时具有权重稀疏性和空间稀疏性的3D卷积网络，并系统分析压缩后的稀疏模式以加速推理。
AI.result: 在保持性能仅下降2.15%的前提下，参数量减少99%，计算成本降低95%，推理速度提升45%。
AI.conclusion: 通过权重和空间双重稀疏化，可显著压缩3D网络规模且保持性能，为实际部署提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhongyun Hu,Ntumba Elie Nsampi,Xue Wang,Qing Wang
title: SIDNet: Learning Shading-aware Illumination Descriptor for Image Harmonization
title_zh: SIDNet：学习用于图像协调的着色感知照明描述符
comment: Accepted by IEEE TETCI 2023. Project website: https://waldenlakes.github.io/IllumHarmony/
comments: Accepted by IEEE TETCI 2023. Project website: https://waldenlakes.github.io/IllumHarmony/
abstract: Image harmonization aims at adjusting the appearance of the foreground to make it more compatible with the background. Without exploring background illumination and its effects on the foreground elements, existing works are incapable of generating a realistic foreground shading. In this paper, we decompose the image harmonization task into two sub-problems: 1) illumination estimation of the background image and 2) re-rendering of foreground objects under background illumination. Before solving these two sub-problems, we first learn a shading-aware illumination descriptor via a well-designed neural rendering framework, of which the key is a shading bases module that generates multiple shading bases from the foreground image. Then we design a background illumination estimation module to extract the illumination descriptor from the background. Finally, the Shading-aware Illumination Descriptor is used in conjunction with the neural rendering framework (SIDNet) to produce the harmonized foreground image containing a novel harmonized shading. Moreover, we construct a photo-realistic synthetic image harmonization dataset that contains numerous shading variations with image-based lighting. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real data demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method, especially in dealing with foreground shadings.
summary: Image harmonization aims at adjusting the appearance of the foreground to make it more compatible with the background. Without exploring background illumination and its effects on the foreground elements, existing works are incapable of generating a realistic foreground shading. In this paper, we decompose the image harmonization task into two sub-problems: 1) illumination estimation of the background image and 2) re-rendering of foreground objects under background illumination. Before solving these two sub-problems, we first learn a shading-aware illumination descriptor via a well-designed neural rendering framework, of which the key is a shading bases module that generates multiple shading bases from the foreground image. Then we design a background illumination estimation module to extract the illumination descriptor from the background. Finally, the Shading-aware Illumination Descriptor is used in conjunction with the neural rendering framework (SIDNet) to produce the harmonized foreground image containing a novel harmonized shading. Moreover, we construct a photo-realistic synthetic image harmonization dataset that contains numerous shading variations with image-based lighting. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real data demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method, especially in dealing with foreground shadings.
abstract_zh: 图像协调旨在调整前景的外观，使其与背景更加兼容。如果不探索背景照明及其对前景元素的影响，现有作品无法生成逼真的前景阴影。在本文中，我们将图像协调任务分解为两个子问题：1）背景图像的光照估计和2）背景光照下前景物体的重新渲染。在解决这两个子问题之前，我们首先通过精心设计的神经渲染框架学习着色感知照明描述符，其中关键是着色基础模块，它从前景图像生成多个着色基础。然后我们设计了一个背景照明估计模块来从背景中提取照明描述符。最后，将着色感知照明描述符与神经渲染框架 (SIDNet) 结合使用，生成包含新颖的协调着色的协调前景图像。此外，我们构建了一个逼真的合成图像协调数据集，其中包含基于图像的照明的大量阴影变化。对合成数据和真实数据的大量实验证明了该方法的优越性，特别是在处理前景阴影方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIDNet方法，通过学习光照感知的光照描述符，解决图像和谐化中前景阴影与背景不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像和谐化方法未充分考虑背景光照对前景元素的影响，导致生成的前景阴影不真实，需改进光照建模以提升效果。
AI.method: 将任务分解为背景光照估计与前景重渲染两部分，设计包含阴影基模块的神经渲染框架，学习光照感知描述符，并构建含多种阴影变化的合成数据集。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上实验表明，SIDNet在处理前景阴影时优于现有方法，生成更真实的和谐化图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模光照感知的阴影描述符，SIDNet有效解决了图像和谐化中光照不匹配问题，为相关研究提供新思路。

search_text: SIDNet: Learning Shading-aware Illumination Descriptor for Image Harmonization SIDNet：学习用于图像协调的着色感知照明描述符 Image harmonization aims at adjusting the appearance of the foreground to make it more compatible with the background. Without exploring background illumination and its effects on the foreground elements, existing works are incapable of generating a realistic foreground shading. In this paper, we decompose the image harmonization task into two sub-problems: 1) illumination estimation of the background image and 2) re-rendering of foreground objects under background illumination. Before solving these two sub-problems, we first learn a shading-aware illumination descriptor via a well-designed neural rendering framework, of which the key is a shading bases module that generates multiple shading bases from the foreground image. Then we design a background illumination estimation module to extract the illumination descriptor from the background. Finally, the Shading-aware Illumination Descriptor is used in conjunction with the neural rendering framework (SIDNet) to produce the harmonized foreground image containing a novel harmonized shading. Moreover, we construct a photo-realistic synthetic image harmonization dataset that contains numerous shading variations with image-based lighting. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real data demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method, especially in dealing with foreground shadings. 图像协调旨在调整前景的外观，使其与背景更加兼容。如果不探索背景照明及其对前景元素的影响，现有作品无法生成逼真的前景阴影。在本文中，我们将图像协调任务分解为两个子问题：1）背景图像的光照估计和2）背景光照下前景物体的重新渲染。在解决这两个子问题之前，我们首先通过精心设计的神经渲染框架学习着色感知照明描述符，其中关键是着色基础模块，它从前景图像生成多个着色基础。然后我们设计了一个背景照明估计模块来从背景中提取照明描述符。最后，将着色感知照明描述符与神经渲染框架 (SIDNet) 结合使用，生成包含新颖的协调着色的协调前景图像。此外，我们构建了一个逼真的合成图像协调数据集，其中包含基于图像的照明的大量阴影变化。对合成数据和真实数据的大量实验证明了该方法的优越性，特别是在处理前景阴影方面。 本文提出SIDNet方法，通过学习光照感知的光照描述符，解决图像和谐化中前景阴影与背景不匹配的问题。 Zhongyun Hu,Ntumba Elie Nsampi,Xue Wang,Qing Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Sanjay Kariyappa,Moinuddin K Qureshi
title: ExPLoit: Extracting Private Labels in Split Learning
title_zh: ExpLoit：在分割学习中提取私有标签
abstract: Split learning is a popular technique used for vertical federated learning (VFL), where the goal is to jointly train a model on the private input and label data held by two parties. This technique uses a split-model, trained end-to-end, by exchanging the intermediate representations (IR) of the inputs and gradients of the IR between the two parties. We propose ExPLoit - a label-leakage attack that allows an adversarial input-owner to extract the private labels of the label-owner during split-learning. ExPLoit frames the attack as a supervised learning problem by using a novel loss function that combines gradient-matching and several regularization terms developed using key properties of the dataset and models. Our evaluations show that ExPLoit can uncover the private labels with near-perfect accuracy of up to 99.96%. Our findings underscore the need for better training techniques for VFL.
summary: Split learning is a popular technique used for vertical federated learning (VFL), where the goal is to jointly train a model on the private input and label data held by two parties. This technique uses a split-model, trained end-to-end, by exchanging the intermediate representations (IR) of the inputs and gradients of the IR between the two parties. We propose ExPLoit - a label-leakage attack that allows an adversarial input-owner to extract the private labels of the label-owner during split-learning. ExPLoit frames the attack as a supervised learning problem by using a novel loss function that combines gradient-matching and several regularization terms developed using key properties of the dataset and models. Our evaluations show that ExPLoit can uncover the private labels with near-perfect accuracy of up to 99.96%. Our findings underscore the need for better training techniques for VFL.
abstract_zh: 分割学习是一种用于垂直联合学习（VFL）的流行技术，其目标是根据两方持有的私有输入和标签数据联合训练模型。该技术使用分割模型，通过在双方之间交换输入的中间表示（IR）和 IR 的梯度，进行端到端训练。我们提出了 ExPLoit - 一种标签泄漏攻击，允许对抗性输入所有者在分割学习期间提取标签所有者的私有标签。 ExPLoit 通过使用新颖的损失函数将攻击框架为监督学习问题，该函数结合了梯度匹配和使用数据集和模型的关键属性开发的几个正则化项。我们的评估表明，ExPLoit 可以以高达 99.96% 的近乎完美的准确率来发现自有标签。我们的研究结果强调需要更好的 VFL 训练技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ExPLoit攻击方法，通过梯度匹配和正则化项，在分裂学习框架中提取标签所有者的私有标签。
AI.motivation: 分裂学习在垂直联邦学习中交换中间表示和梯度，可能引发隐私泄露风险，需验证其安全性并提出防护措施。
AI.method: 将攻击建模为监督学习问题，设计结合梯度匹配与数据集/模型特性正则化的损失函数，利用输入方模型反推标签。
AI.result: 实验显示ExPLoit可近乎完美地恢复私有标签（准确率高达99.96%），暴露分裂学习的标签泄露漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 需改进垂直联邦学习的训练技术以防范此类标签泄露攻击，确保隐私安全。

search_text: ExPLoit: Extracting Private Labels in Split Learning ExpLoit：在分割学习中提取私有标签 Split learning is a popular technique used for vertical federated learning (VFL), where the goal is to jointly train a model on the private input and label data held by two parties. This technique uses a split-model, trained end-to-end, by exchanging the intermediate representations (IR) of the inputs and gradients of the IR between the two parties. We propose ExPLoit - a label-leakage attack that allows an adversarial input-owner to extract the private labels of the label-owner during split-learning. ExPLoit frames the attack as a supervised learning problem by using a novel loss function that combines gradient-matching and several regularization terms developed using key properties of the dataset and models. Our evaluations show that ExPLoit can uncover the private labels with near-perfect accuracy of up to 99.96%. Our findings underscore the need for better training techniques for VFL. 分割学习是一种用于垂直联合学习（VFL）的流行技术，其目标是根据两方持有的私有输入和标签数据联合训练模型。该技术使用分割模型，通过在双方之间交换输入的中间表示（IR）和 IR 的梯度，进行端到端训练。我们提出了 ExPLoit - 一种标签泄漏攻击，允许对抗性输入所有者在分割学习期间提取标签所有者的私有标签。 ExPLoit 通过使用新颖的损失函数将攻击框架为监督学习问题，该函数结合了梯度匹配和使用数据集和模型的关键属性开发的几个正则化项。我们的评估表明，ExPLoit 可以以高达 99.96% 的近乎完美的准确率来发现自有标签。我们的研究结果强调需要更好的 VFL 训练技术。 本文提出ExPLoit攻击方法，通过梯度匹配和正则化项，在分裂学习框架中提取标签所有者的私有标签。 Sanjay Kariyappa,Moinuddin K Qureshi cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Luciano Cavalcante Siebert,Maria Luce Lupetti,Evgeni Aizenberg,Niek Beckers,Arkady Zgonnikov,Herman Veluwenkamp,David Abbink,Elisa Giaccardi,Geert-Jan Houben,Catholijn M. Jonker,Jeroen van den Hoven,Deborah Forster,Reginald L. Lagendijk
title: Meaningful human control: actionable properties for AI system development
title_zh: 有意义的人类控制：人工智能系统开发的可操作属性
comment: Preprint. Published AI and Ethics (2022): https://doi.org/10.1007/s43681-022-00167-3
comments: Preprint. Published AI and Ethics (2022): https://doi.org/10.1007/s43681-022-00167-3
abstract: How can humans remain in control of artificial intelligence (AI)-based systems designed to perform tasks autonomously? Such systems are increasingly ubiquitous, creating benefits - but also undesirable situations where moral responsibility for their actions cannot be properly attributed to any particular person or group. The concept of meaningful human control has been proposed to address responsibility gaps and mitigate them by establishing conditions that enable a proper attribution of responsibility for humans; however, clear requirements for researchers, designers, and engineers are yet inexistent, making the development of AI-based systems that remain under meaningful human control challenging. In this paper, we address the gap between philosophical theory and engineering practice by identifying, through an iterative process of abductive thinking, four actionable properties for AI-based systems under meaningful human control, which we discuss making use of two applications scenarios: automated vehicles and AI-based hiring. First, a system in which humans and AI algorithms interact should have an explicitly defined domain of morally loaded situations within which the system ought to operate. Second, humans and AI agents within the system should have appropriate and mutually compatible representations. Third, responsibility attributed to a human should be commensurate with that human's ability and authority to control the system. Fourth, there should be explicit links between the actions of the AI agents and actions of humans who are aware of their moral responsibility. We argue that these four properties will support practically-minded professionals to take concrete steps toward designing and engineering for AI systems that facilitate meaningful human control.

Such systems are increasingly ubiquitous, creating benefits - but also undesirable situations where moral responsibility for their actions cannot be properly attributed to any particular person or group. The concept of meaningful human control has been proposed to address responsibility gaps and mitigate them by establishing conditions that enable a proper attribution of responsibility for humans; however, clear requirements for researchers, designers, and engineers are yet inexistent, making the development of AI-based systems that remain under meaningful human control challenging. In this paper, we address the gap between philosophical theory and engineering practice by identifying, through an iterative process of abductive thinking, four actionable properties for AI-based systems under meaningful human control, which we discuss making use of two applications scenarios: automated vehicles and AI-based hiring. First, a system in which humans and AI algorithms interact should have an explicitly defined domain of morally loaded situations within which the system ought to operate. Second, humans and AI agents within the system should have appropriate and mutually compatible representations. Third, responsibility attributed to a human should be commensurate with that human's ability and authority to control the system. Fourth, there should be explicit links between the actions of the AI agents and actions of humans who are aware of their moral responsibility. We argue that these four properties will support practically-minded professionals to take concrete steps toward designing and engineering for AI systems that facilitate meaningful human control.
abstract_zh: 人类如何才能保持对基于人工智能 (AI) 的系统的控制，这些系统旨在自主执行任务？这样的系统越来越普遍，创造了好处，但也带来了不良情况，即其行为的道德责任不能适当地归因于任何特定的个人或团体。提出有意义的人类控制的概念是为了解决责任差距，并通过创造能够适当归属人类责任的条件来缩小责任差距；然而，对研究人员、设计师和工程师的明确要求尚不存在，这使得开发仍处于有意义的人类控制之下的基于人工智能的系统具有挑战性。在本文中，我们通过溯因思维的迭代过程确定了有意义的人类控制下基于人工智能的系统的四个可操作属性，从而解决了哲学理论与工程实践之间的差距，我们讨论了如何利用两个应用场景：自动驾驶汽车和基于人工智能的招聘。首先，人类和人工智能算法交互的系统应该有一个明确定义的道德负载情境领域，系统应该在其中运行。其次，系统内的人类和人工智能代理应该具有适当且相互兼容的表示。第三，人的责任应该与人控制系统的能力和权威相称。第四，人工智能代理的行为与意识到自身道德责任的人类行为之间应该存在明确的联系。我们认为，这四个属性将支持务实的专业人士采取具体步骤来设计和工程人工智能系统，以促进有意义的人类控制。

AI.tldr: 提出四个可操作属性，以指导AI系统的开发，确保人类对其保持有意义的控制
AI.motivation: 解决AI系统自主性增强导致的责任归属问题，填补哲学理论与工程实践之间的差距
AI.method: 通过归纳推理的迭代过程，并结合自动驾驶和AI招聘两个应用案例进行分析
AI.result: 确定了四个关键属性，为设计符合有意义人类控制的AI系统提供具体指导
AI.conclusion: 这四个属性为实现有意义的人类控制提供了可行的工程实践路径，有助于弥合理论与实践之间的差距

authors_text: Minjing Shi,Pengfei He,Yuli Shi
title: Detecting Extratropical Cyclones of the Northern Hemisphere with Single Shot Detector
title_zh: 用单发探测器探测北半球温带气旋
abstract: In this paper, we propose a deep learning-based model to detect extratropical cyclones (ETCs) of northern hemisphere, while developing a novel workflow of processing images and generating labels for ETCs. We first label the cyclone center by adapting an approach from Bonfanti et.al. [1] and set up criteria of labeling ETCs of three categories: developing, mature, and declining stages. We then propose a framework of labeling and preprocessing the images in our dataset. Once the images and labels are ready to serve as inputs, we create our object detection model named Single Shot Detector (SSD) to fit the format of our dataset. We train and evaluate our model with our labeled dataset on two settings (binary and multiclass classifications), while keeping a record of the results. Finally, we achieved relatively high performance with detecting ETCs of mature stage (mean Average Precision is 86.64%), and an acceptable result for detecting ETCs of all three categories (mean Average Precision 79.34%). We conclude that the single-shot detector model can succeed in detecting ETCs of different stages, and it has demonstrated great potential in the future applications of ETC detection in other relevant settings.
summary: In this paper, we propose a deep learning-based model to detect extratropical cyclones (ETCs) of northern hemisphere, while developing a novel workflow of processing images and generating labels for ETCs. We first label the cyclone center by adapting an approach from Bonfanti et.al. [1] and set up criteria of labeling ETCs of three categories: developing, mature, and declining stages. We then propose a framework of labeling and preprocessing the images in our dataset. Once the images and labels are ready to serve as inputs, we create our object detection model named Single Shot Detector (SSD) to fit the format of our dataset. We train and evaluate our model with our labeled dataset on two settings (binary and multiclass classifications), while keeping a record of the results. Finally, we achieved relatively high performance with detecting ETCs of mature stage (mean Average Precision is 86.64%), and an acceptable result for detecting ETCs of all three categories (mean Average Precision 79.34%). We conclude that the single-shot detector model can succeed in detecting ETCs of different stages, and it has demonstrated great potential in the future applications of ETC detection in other relevant settings.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的模型来检测北半球的温带气旋（ETC），同时开发了处理图像和为 ETC 生成标签的新颖工作流程。我们首先采用 Bonfanti 等人的方法来标记气旋中心。 [1]并制定了ETC的标签标准，分为发展期、成熟期和衰退期三类。然后，我们提出了一个对数据集中的图像进行标记和预处理的框架。一旦图像和标签准备好用作输入，我们就创建名为单次检测器（SSD）的对象检测模型，以适应数据集的格式。我们使用标记数据集在两种设置（二元分类和多类分类）上训练和评估我们的模型，同时记录结果。最后，我们在检测成熟阶段的 ETC 方面取得了较高的性能（平均平均精度为 86.64%），并且在检测所有三个类别的 ETC 方面取得了可接受的结果（平均平均精度为 79.34%）。我们的结论是，单次检测器模型可以成功检测不同阶段的 ETC，并且在其他相关环境中的 ETC 检测未来应用中表现出巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度学习的单发检测器模型，用于检测北半球温带气旋的不同阶段（发展、成熟、衰退）。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在检测温带气旋时存在效率低或准确性不足的问题，需开发更高效的检测方法以支持气象研究和预测。
AI.method: 改进的气旋中心标注方法、图像预处理框架，结合单发检测器（SSD）模型，在二分类和多分类任务中进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 成熟阶段检测准确率高达86.64%（mAP），三类阶段检测结果为79.34%（mAP）。
AI.conclusion: 单发检测器模型能有效检测不同阶段的温带气旋，展示出在气象监测等领域的应用潜力。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 单发检测器模型能有效检测不同阶段的温带气旋，展示出在气象监测等领域的应用潜力。

search_text: Detecting Extratropical Cyclones of the Northern Hemisphere with Single Shot Detector 用单发探测器探测北半球温带气旋 In this paper, we propose a deep learning-based model to detect extratropical cyclones (ETCs) of northern hemisphere, while developing a novel workflow of processing images and generating labels for ETCs. We first label the cyclone center by adapting an approach from Bonfanti et.al. [1] and set up criteria of labeling ETCs of three categories: developing, mature, and declining stages. We then propose a framework of labeling and preprocessing the images in our dataset. Once the images and labels are ready to serve as inputs, we create our object detection model named Single Shot Detector (SSD) to fit the format of our dataset. We train and evaluate our model with our labeled dataset on two settings (binary and multiclass classifications), while keeping a record of the results. Finally, we achieved relatively high performance with detecting ETCs of mature stage (mean Average Precision is 86.64%), and an acceptable result for detecting ETCs of all three categories (mean Average Precision 79.34%). We conclude that the single-shot detector model can succeed in detecting ETCs of different stages, and it has demonstrated great potential in the future applications of ETC detection in other relevant settings. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的模型来检测北半球的温带气旋（ETC），同时开发了处理图像和为 ETC 生成标签的新颖工作流程。我们首先采用 Bonfanti 等人的方法来标记气旋中心。 [1]并制定了ETC的标签标准，分为发展期、成熟期和衰退期三类。然后，我们提出了一个对数据集中的图像进行标记和预处理的框架。一旦图像和标签准备好用作输入，我们就创建名为单次检测器（SSD）的对象检测模型，以适应数据集的格式。我们使用标记数据集在两种设置（二元分类和多类分类）上训练和评估我们的模型，同时记录结果。最后，我们在检测成熟阶段的 ETC 方面取得了较高的性能（平均平均精度为 86.64%），并且在检测所有三个类别的 ETC 方面取得了可接受的结果（平均平均精度为 79.34%）。我们的结论是，单次检测器模型可以成功检测不同阶段的 ETC，并且在其他相关环境中的 ETC 检测未来应用中表现出巨大的潜力。 提出基于深度学习的单发检测器模型，用于检测北半球温带气旋的不同阶段（发展、成熟、衰退）。 Minjing Shi,Pengfei He,Yuli Shi cs.LG,cs.CV,physics.ao-ph

authors_text: Mustafa Safa Ozdayi,Murat Kantarcioglu
title: The Impact of Data Distribution on Fairness and Robustness in Federated Learning
title_zh: 数据分布对联邦学习公平性和鲁棒性的影响
comment: Published at The Third IEEE International Conference on Trust, Privacy and Security in Intelligent Systems, and Applications. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.07427, arXiv:2007.03767
comments: Published at The Third IEEE International Conference on Trust, Privacy and Security in Intelligent Systems, and Applications. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.07427, arXiv:2007.03767
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a distributed machine learning protocol that allows a set of agents to collaboratively train a model without sharing their datasets. This makes FL particularly suitable for settings where data privacy is desired. However, it has been observed that the performance of FL is closely related to the similarity of the local data distributions of agents. Particularly, as the data distributions of agents differ, the accuracy of the trained models drop. In this work, we look at how variations in local data distributions affect the fairness and the robustness properties of the trained models in addition to the accuracy. Our experimental results indicate that, the trained models exhibit higher bias, and become more susceptible to attacks as local data distributions differ. Importantly, the degradation in the fairness, and robustness can be much more severe than the accuracy. Therefore, we reveal that small variations that have little impact on the accuracy could still be important if the trained model is to be deployed in a fairness/security critical context.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a distributed machine learning protocol that allows a set of agents to collaboratively train a model without sharing their datasets. This makes FL particularly suitable for settings where data privacy is desired. However, it has been observed that the performance of FL is closely related to the similarity of the local data distributions of agents. Particularly, as the data distributions of agents differ, the accuracy of the trained models drop. In this work, we look at how variations in local data distributions affect the fairness and the robustness properties of the trained models in addition to the accuracy. Our experimental results indicate that, the trained models exhibit higher bias, and become more susceptible to attacks as local data distributions differ. Importantly, the degradation in the fairness, and robustness can be much more severe than the accuracy. Therefore, we reveal that small variations that have little impact on the accuracy could still be important if the trained model is to be deployed in a fairness/security critical context.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种分布式机器学习协议，允许一组代理协作训练模型，而无需共享其数据集。这使得 FL 特别适合需要数据隐私的设置。然而，据观察，FL 的性能与智能体本地数据分布的相似性密切相关。特别是，随着智能体的数据分布不同，训练模型的准确性会下降。在这项工作中，我们研究了本地数据分布的变化如何影响训练模型的公平性和鲁棒性以及准确性。我们的实验结果表明，训练后的模型表现出更高的偏差，并且随着本地数据分布的不同而更容易受到攻击。重要的是，公平性和鲁棒性的下降可能比准确性严重得多。因此，我们发现，如果要在公平/安全关键环境中部署经过训练的模型，对准确性影响很小的微小变化仍然很重要。

AI.tldr: 研究联邦学习中数据分布差异对模型公平性与鲁棒性的影响
AI.motivation: 探讨数据分布差异对模型公平性和鲁棒性的影响，尤其是在安全关键场景中
AI.method: 通过实验分析不同数据分布对模型公平性、鲁棒性及准确性的综合影响
AI.result: 实验显示数据分布差异导致模型偏差增加、易受攻击，且公平性和鲁棒性下降比准确性下降更严重
AI.conclusion: 小的数据分布变化可能对公平性/安全性关键场景中的模型部署产生重要影响，需在设计中予以重视

authors_text: Tianze Chen,Adheesh Shenoy,Anzhelika Kolinko,Syed Shah,Yu Sun
title: Multi-Object Grasping -- Estimating the Number of Objects in a Robotic Grasp
title_zh: 多物体抓取——估计机器人抓取中的物体数量
comment: This paper has been accepted to IROS 2021
comments: This paper has been accepted to IROS 2021
abstract: A human hand can grasp a desired number of objects at once from a pile based solely on tactile sensing. To do so, a robot needs to grasp within a pile, sense the number of objects in the grasp before lifting, and predict the number of objects that will remain in the grasp after lifting. It is a challenging problem because when making the prediction, the robotic hand is still in the pile and the objects in the grasp are not observable to vision systems. Moreover, some objects that are grasped by the hand before lifting from the pile may fall out of the grasp when the hand is lifted. This occurs because they were supported by other objects in the pile instead of the fingers of the hand. Therefore, a robotic hand should sense the number of objects in a grasp using its tactile sensors before lifting. This paper presents novel multi-object grasping analyzing methods for solving this problem. They include a grasp volume calculation, tactile force analysis, and a data-driven deep learning approach. The methods have been implemented on a Barrett hand and then evaluated in simulations and a real setup with a robotic system. The evaluation results conclude that once the Barrett hand grasps multiple objects in the pile, the data-driven model can predict, before lifting, the number of objects that will remain in the hand after lifting. The root-mean-square errors for our approach are 0.74 for balls and 0.58 for cubes in simulations, and 1.06 for balls, and 1.45 for cubes in the real system.
summary: A human hand can grasp a desired number of objects at once from a pile based solely on tactile sensing. To do so, a robot needs to grasp within a pile, sense the number of objects in the grasp before lifting, and predict the number of objects that will remain in the grasp after lifting. It is a challenging problem because when making the prediction, the robotic hand is still in the pile and the objects in the grasp are not observable to vision systems. Moreover, some objects that are grasped by the hand before lifting from the pile may fall out of the grasp when the hand is lifted. This occurs because they were supported by other objects in the pile instead of the fingers of the hand. Therefore, a robotic hand should sense the number of objects in a grasp using its tactile sensors before lifting. This paper presents novel multi-object grasping analyzing methods for solving this problem. They include a grasp volume calculation, tactile force analysis, and a data-driven deep learning approach. The methods have been implemented on a Barrett hand and then evaluated in simulations and a real setup with a robotic system. The evaluation results conclude that once the Barrett hand grasps multiple objects in the pile, the data-driven model can predict, before lifting, the number of objects that will remain in the hand after lifting. The root-mean-square errors for our approach are 0.74 for balls and 0.58 for cubes in simulations, and 1.06 for balls, and 1.45 for cubes in the real system.
abstract_zh: 仅凭触觉，人手就可以从一堆物体中一次性抓取所需数量的物体。为此，机器人需要抓取一堆物体，在提升之前感知抓取中的物体数量，并预测提升后仍保留在抓取中的物体数量。这是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为在进行预测时，机器手仍然在堆中，并且视觉系统无法观察到抓取中的物体。此外，一些在从堆中提起之前用手抓握的物体可能会在手抬起时从抓握中掉落。发生这种情况是因为它们是由堆中的其他物体而不是手指支撑的。因此，机械手在抬起之前应该使用其触觉传感器来感知抓握中的物体数量。本文提出了解决该问题的新颖的多目标抓取分析方法。它们包括抓取量计算、触觉力分析和数据驱动的深度学习方法。这些方法已在巴雷特手上实施，然后在模拟和机器人系统的实际设置中进行评估。评估结果得出的结论是，一旦巴雷特手抓住了一堆物体中的多个物体，数据驱动模型就可以在举起之前预测举起后仍留在手中的物体数量。我们的方法在模拟中的球的均方根误差为 0.74，立方体的均方根误差为 0.58；而在实际系统中，球的均方根误差为 1.06，立方体的均方根误差为 1.45。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于触觉传感的多物体抓取方法，用于预测机械手在抓取堆叠物体后实际保留的物体数量。
AI.motivation: 人类可通过触觉感知同时抓取多个物体，而机器人在抓取堆叠物体时需预测抓取后保留的物体数量，因部分物体可能在抬起时脱落，这对视觉不可见的抓取场景具有挑战性。
AI.method: 结合抓取体积计算、触觉力分析及数据驱动的深度学习模型，通过Barrett机械手在仿真与真实环境中验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 仿真中球体与立方体的RMSE分别为0.74和0.58，实际系统中分别为1.06和1.45，表明模型能有效预测抓取后保留物体数量。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动模型可实现抓取前的物体数量预测，但实际系统误差较高，需进一步优化模型以适应复杂物理交互。

The methods have been implemented on a Barrett hand and then evaluated in simulations and a real setup with a robotic system. The evaluation results conclude that once the Barrett hand grasps multiple objects in the pile, the data-driven model can predict, before lifting, the number of objects that will remain in the hand after lifting. The root-mean-square errors for our approach are 0.74 for balls and 0.58 for cubes in simulations, and 1.06 for balls, and 1.45 for cubes in the real system. 仅凭触觉，人手就可以从一堆物体中一次性抓取所需数量的物体。为此，机器人需要抓取一堆物体，在提升之前感知抓取中的物体数量，并预测提升后仍保留在抓取中的物体数量。这是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为在进行预测时，机器手仍然在堆中，并且视觉系统无法观察到抓取中的物体。此外，一些在从堆中提起之前用手抓握的物体可能会在手抬起时从抓握中掉落。发生这种情况是因为它们是由堆中的其他物体而不是手指支撑的。因此，机械手在抬起之前应该使用其触觉传感器来感知抓握中的物体数量。本文提出了解决该问题的新颖的多目标抓取分析方法。它们包括抓取量计算、触觉力分析和数据驱动的深度学习方法。这些方法已在巴雷特手上实施，然后在模拟和机器人系统的实际设置中进行评估。评估结果得出的结论是，一旦巴雷特手抓住了一堆物体中的多个物体，数据驱动模型就可以在举起之前预测举起后仍留在手中的物体数量。我们的方法在模拟中的球的均方根误差为 0.74，立方体的均方根误差为 0.58；而在实际系统中，球的均方根误差为 1.06，立方体的均方根误差为 1.45。 本文提出了一种基于触觉传感的多物体抓取方法，用于预测机械手在抓取堆叠物体后实际保留的物体数量。 Tianze Chen,Adheesh Shenoy,Anzhelika Kolinko,Syed Shah,Yu Sun cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Jingyi Feng,Yong Luo,Shuang Song
title: ViF-SD2E: A Robust Weakly-Supervised Method for Neural Decoding
title_zh: ViF-SD2E：一种鲁棒的弱监督神经解码方法
comment: 13 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables
comments: 13 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Neural decoding plays a vital role in the interaction between the brain and the outside world. In this paper, we directly decode the movement track of a finger based on the neural signals of a macaque. Supervised regression methods may overfit to actual labels containing noise, and require a high labeling cost, while unsupervised approaches often have unsatisfactory accuracy. Besides, the spatial and temporal information is often ignored or not well exploited by those methods. This motivates us to propose a robust weakly-supervised method, called ViF-SD2E, for neural decoding. In particular, it consists of a space-division (SD) module and a exploration--exploitation (2E) strategy, to effectively exploit both the spatial information of the outside world and the temporal information of neural activity, where the SD2E output is analogized with the weak 0/1 vision-feedback (ViF) label for training. It is worth noting that the designed ViF-SD2E is based on a symmetric phenomenon between the unsupervised decoding trajectory and the real trajectory in previous observations, then a cognitive pattern of fuzzy (robust) interaction in the nervous system may be discovered by us. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which can be sometimes comparable to supervised counterparts.
summary: Neural decoding plays a vital role in the interaction between the brain and the outside world. In this paper, we directly decode the movement track of a finger based on the neural signals of a macaque. Supervised regression methods may overfit to actual labels containing noise, and require a high labeling cost, while unsupervised approaches often have unsatisfactory accuracy. Besides, the spatial and temporal information is often ignored or not well exploited by those methods. This motivates us to propose a robust weakly-supervised method, called ViF-SD2E, for neural decoding. In particular, it consists of a space-division (SD) module and a exploration--exploitation (2E) strategy, to effectively exploit both the spatial information of the outside world and the temporal information of neural activity, where the SD2E output is analogized with the weak 0/1 vision-feedback (ViF) label for training. It is worth noting that the designed ViF-SD2E is based on a symmetric phenomenon between the unsupervised decoding trajectory and the real trajectory in previous observations, then a cognitive pattern of fuzzy (robust) interaction in the nervous system may be discovered by us. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which can be sometimes comparable to supervised counterparts.
abstract_zh: 神经解码在大脑与外界的交互中起着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们根据猕猴的神经信号直接解码手指的运动轨迹。有监督的回归方法可能会过度拟合包含噪声的实际标签，并且需要较高的标记成本，而无监督的方法往往精度不理想。此外，这些方法经常忽略或没有很好地利用空间和时间信息。这促使我们提出一种鲁棒的弱监督方法，称为 ViF-SD2E，用于神经解码。特别是，它由空分（SD）模块和探索-利用（2E）策略组成，可以有效地利用外部世界的空间信息和神经活动的时间信息，其中SD2E输出与弱0/1视觉反馈（ViF）标签进行类比进行训练。值得注意的是，设计的ViF-SD2E是基于无监督解码轨迹与先前观察中的真实轨迹之间的对称现象，那么我们可能会发现神经系统中模糊（鲁棒）相互作用的认知模式。大量的实验证明了我们的方法的有效性，有时可以与监督方法相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ViF-SD2E的鲁棒弱监督方法，直接基于猕猴神经信号解码手指运动轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统监督方法易过拟合且标注成本高，无监督方法准确性不足，现有方法未能有效利用时空信息。
AI.method: 设计包含空间划分（SD）模块与探索-利用（2E）策略的ViF-SD2E框架，通过模拟弱0/1视觉反馈标签融合时空信息进行训练。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在解码性能上可与监督方法媲美，且能揭示神经系统模糊交互的认知模式。
AI.conclusion: ViF-SD2E有效解决了神经解码中的时空信息利用问题，为弱监督方法提供了新思路。

authors_text: Maria Perez-Ortiz,Erik Novak,Sahan Bulathwela,John Shawe-Taylor
title: An AI-based Learning Companion Promoting Lifelong Learning Opportunities for All
title_zh: 基于人工智能的学习伴侣，为所有人提供终身学习机会
comment: Published as an Opinion Report from the International Research Centre on Artificial Intelligence under the auspices of UNESCO
comments: Published as an Opinion Report from the International Research Centre on Artificial Intelligence under the auspices of UNESCO
abstract: Artifical Intelligence (AI) in Education has great potential for building more personalised curricula, as well as democratising education worldwide and creating a Renaissance of new ways of teaching and learning. We believe this is a crucial moment for setting the foundations of AI in education in the beginning of this Fourth Industrial Revolution. This report aims to synthesize how AI might change (and is already changing) how we learn, as well as what technological features are crucial for these AI systems in education, with the end goal of starting this pressing dialogue of how the future of AI in education should unfold, engaging policy makers, engineers, researchers and obviously, teachers and learners. This report also presents the advances within the X5GON project, a European H2020 project aimed at building and deploying a cross-modal, cross-lingual, cross-cultural, cross-domain and cross-site personalised learning platform for Open Educational Resources (OER).
summary: Artifical Intelligence (AI) in Education has great potential for building more personalised curricula, as well as democratising education worldwide and creating a Renaissance of new ways of teaching and learning. We believe this is a crucial moment for setting the foundations of AI in education in the beginning of this Fourth Industrial Revolution. This report aims to synthesize how AI might change (and is already changing) how we learn, as well as what technological features are crucial for these AI systems in education, with the end goal of starting this pressing dialogue of how the future of AI in education should unfold, engaging policy makers, engineers, researchers and obviously, teachers and learners. This report also presents the advances within the X5GON project, a European H2020 project aimed at building and deploying a cross-modal, cross-lingual, cross-cultural, cross-domain and cross-site personalised learning platform for Open Educational Resources (OER).
abstract_zh: 教育领域的人工智能 (AI) 在构建更加个性化的课程、实现全球教育民主化以及创造新的教学方式复兴方面具有巨大潜力。我们相信，这是在第四次工业革命之初为人工智能教育奠定基础的关键时刻。本报告旨在综合人工智能可能如何（并且正在改变）我们的学习方式，以及哪些技术特征对于教育领域的人工智能系统至关重要，最终目标是启动这场关于教育领域人工智能的未来应如何展开的紧迫对话，吸引政策制定者、工程师、研究人员，当然还有教师和学习者。本报告还介绍了 X5GON 项目的进展，该项目是欧洲 H2020 项目，旨在为开放教育资源 (OER) 构建和部署跨模式、跨语言、跨文化、跨领域和跨站点个性化学习平台。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能在教育中的应用潜力，并介绍了X5GON项目在构建跨模态、跨语言个性化学习平台方面的进展。
AI.motivation: 通过人工智能技术推动教育个性化与全球化，应对第四次工业革命带来的挑战，促进终身学习机会的普及。
AI.method: 综合分析AI对教育的影响，结合X5GON项目的技术成果，提出跨文化、跨领域的开放教育资源平台设计方案。
AI.result: 明确了AI教育系统的关键技术特征，并展示了X5GON项目在多语言、多文化环境下个性化学习平台的实现进展。
AI.conclusion: 需多方协作推动AI教育发展，确保技术普惠性与伦理规范，以实现教育公平与终身学习目标。

authors_text: Premalatha M,Suganya G,Viswanathan V,G Jignesh Chowdary
title: Course Difficulty Estimation Based on Mapping of Bloom's Taxonomy and ABET Criteria
title_zh: 基于 Bloom 分类法和 ABET 标准映射的课程难度估计
abstract: Current Educational system uses grades or marks to assess the performance of the student. The marks or grades a students scores depends on different parameters, the main parameter being the difficulty level of a course. Computation of this difficulty level may serve as a support for both the students and teachers to fix the level of training needed for successful completion of course. In this paper, we proposed a methodology that estimates the difficulty level of a course by mapping the Bloom's Taxonomy action words along with Accreditation Board for Engineering and Technology (ABET) criteria and learning outcomes. The estimated difficulty level is validated based on the history of grades secured by the students.
summary: Current Educational system uses grades or marks to assess the performance of the student. The marks or grades a students scores depends on different parameters, the main parameter being the difficulty level of a course. Computation of this difficulty level may serve as a support for both the students and teachers to fix the level of training needed for successful completion of course. In this paper, we proposed a methodology that estimates the difficulty level of a course by mapping the Bloom's Taxonomy action words along with Accreditation Board for Engineering and Technology (ABET) criteria and learning outcomes. The estimated difficulty level is validated based on the history of grades secured by the students.
abstract_zh: 当前的教育系统使用成绩或分数来评估学生的表现。学生的分数或等级取决于不同的参数，主要参数是课程的难度级别。该难度水平的计算可以为学生和教师确定成功完成课程所需的培训水平提供支持。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过映射布鲁姆分类法动作词以及工程技术认证委员会 (ABET) 标准和学习成果来估计课程难度的方法。估计的难度级别根据学生获得的成绩历史记录进行验证。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于布卢姆分类法和ABET标准映射的课程难度估计方法
AI.motivation: 现有教育系统依赖分数评估学生表现，但课程难度影响成绩，需计算难度以帮助学生和教师调整培训水平
AI.method: 通过映射布卢姆分类法动作词与ABET标准及学习成果，结合学生成绩历史验证课程难度估计
AI.result: 验证了该方法能有效估计课程难度
AI.conclusion: 该方法为教育评估提供新途径，有助于优化教学策略

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于布卢姆分类法和ABET标准映射的课程难度估计方法
ai_content.motivation: 现有教育系统依赖分数评估学生表现，但课程难度影响成绩，需计算难度以帮助学生和教师调整培训水平
ai_content.method: 通过映射布卢姆分类法动作词与ABET标准及学习成果，结合学生成绩历史验证课程难度估计

search_text: Course Difficulty Estimation Based on Mapping of Bloom's Taxonomy and ABET Criteria 基于 Bloom 分类法和 ABET 标准映射的课程难度估计 Current Educational system uses grades or marks to assess the performance of the student. The marks or grades a students scores depends on different parameters, the main parameter being the difficulty level of a course. Computation of this difficulty level may serve as a support for both the students and teachers to fix the level of training needed for successful completion of course. In this paper, we proposed a methodology that estimates the difficulty level of a course by mapping the Bloom's Taxonomy action words along with Accreditation Board for Engineering and Technology (ABET) criteria and learning outcomes. The estimated difficulty level is validated based on the history of grades secured by the students. 当前的教育系统使用成绩或分数来评估学生的表现。学生的分数或等级取决于不同的参数，主要参数是课程的难度级别。该难度水平的计算可以为学生和教师确定成功完成课程所需的培训水平提供支持。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过映射布鲁姆分类法动作词以及工程技术认证委员会 (ABET) 标准和学习成果来估计课程难度的方法。估计的难度级别根据学生获得的成绩历史记录进行验证。 提出一种基于布卢姆分类法和ABET标准映射的课程难度估计方法 Premalatha M,Suganya G,Viswanathan V,G Jignesh Chowdary cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: Sanmay Das
title: Local Justice and the Algorithmic Allocation of Societal Resources
title_zh: 地方正义与社会资源的算法配置
comment: To appear in AAAI 2022 (Senior Member Track, Blue Sky paper)
comments: To appear in AAAI 2022 (Senior Member Track, Blue Sky paper)
abstract: AI is increasingly used to aid decision-making about the allocation of scarce societal resources, for example housing for homeless people, organs for transplantation, and food donations. Recently, there have been several proposals for how to design objectives for these systems that attempt to achieve some combination of fairness, efficiency, incentive compatibility, and satisfactory aggregation of stakeholder preferences. This paper lays out possible roles and opportunities for AI in this domain, arguing for a closer engagement with the political philosophy literature on local justice, which provides a framework for thinking about how societies have over time framed objectives for such allocation problems. It also discusses how we may be able to integrate into this framework the opportunities and risks opened up by the ubiquity of data and the availability of algorithms that can use them to make accurate predictions about the future.
summary: AI is increasingly used to aid decision-making about the allocation of scarce societal resources, for example housing for homeless people, organs for transplantation, and food donations. Recently, there have been several proposals for how to design objectives for these systems that attempt to achieve some combination of fairness, efficiency, incentive compatibility, and satisfactory aggregation of stakeholder preferences. This paper lays out possible roles and opportunities for AI in this domain, arguing for a closer engagement with the political philosophy literature on local justice, which provides a framework for thinking about how societies have over time framed objectives for such allocation problems. It also discusses how we may be able to integrate into this framework the opportunities and risks opened up by the ubiquity of data and the availability of algorithms that can use them to make accurate predictions about the future.
abstract_zh: 人工智能越来越多地用于帮助稀缺社会资源的分配决策，例如无家可归者的住房、移植器官和食物捐赠。最近，有一些关于如何设计这些系统目标的建议，试图实现公平、效率、激励相容性和利益相关者偏好的令人满意的聚合的某种组合。本文列出了人工智能在这一领域可能发挥的作用和机会，主张与有关地方正义的政治哲学文献进行更密切的接触，这为思考社会如何随着时间的推移为此类分配问题制定目标提供了一个框架。它还讨论了我们如何能够将无处不在的数据以及可以使用它们对未来做出准确预测的算法的可用性所带来的机遇和风险整合到这个框架中。

AI.tldr: 探讨AI在稀缺社会资源分配中的应用，并结合局部正义理论框架分析其设计目标与挑战
AI.motivation: 现有资源分配算法设计需平衡多目标，但缺乏政治哲学理论指导，需引入局部正义概念以完善框架
AI.method: 通过文献综述整合政治哲学中的局部正义理论，并分析数据与算法在资源分配中的应用潜力与风险
AI.result: 提出结合局部正义的AI资源分配框架，识别数据驱动方法在公平性、效率等方面的机会与潜在风险
AI.conclusion: 强调将政治哲学理论融入AI资源分配设计，以确保算法决策符合社会正义原则并有效利用数据优势

authors_text: Xuli Tang,Xin Li,Feicheng Ma
title: Internationalizing AI: Evolution and Impact of Distance Factors
title_zh: 国际化人工智能：距离因素的演变和影响
comment: ef:Scientometrics 2021
comments: ef:Scientometrics 2021
abstract: International collaboration has become imperative in the field of AI. However, few studies exist concerning how distance factors have affected the international collaboration in AI research. In this study, we investigate this problem by using 1,294,644 AI related collaborative papers harvested from the Microsoft Academic Graph (MAG) dataset. A framework including 13 indicators to quantify the distance factors between countries from 5 perspectives (i.e., geographic distance, economic distance, cultural distance, academic distance, and industrial distance) is proposed. The relationships were conducted by the methods of descriptive analysis and regression analysis. The results show that international collaboration in the field of AI today is not prevalent (only 15.7%). All the separations in international collaborations have increased over years, except for the cultural distance in masculinity/felinity dimension and the industrial distance. The geographic distance, economic distance and academic distances have shown significantly negative relationships with the degree of international collaborations in the field of AI. The industrial distance has a significant positive relationship with the degree of international collaboration in the field of AI. Also, the results demonstrate that the participation of the United States and China have promoted the international collaboration in the field of AI. This study provides a comprehensive understanding of internationalizing AI research in geographic, economic, cultural, academic, and industrial aspects.
summary: International collaboration has become imperative in the field of AI. However, few studies exist concerning how distance factors have affected the international collaboration in AI research. In this study, we investigate this problem by using 1,294,644 AI related collaborative papers harvested from the Microsoft Academic Graph (MAG) dataset. A framework including 13 indicators to quantify the distance factors between countries from 5 perspectives (i.e., geographic distance, economic distance, cultural distance, academic distance, and industrial distance) is proposed. The relationships were conducted by the methods of descriptive analysis and regression analysis. The results show that international collaboration in the field of AI today is not prevalent (only 15.7%). All the separations in international collaborations have increased over years, except for the cultural distance in masculinity/felinity dimension and the industrial distance. The geographic distance, economic distance and academic distances have shown significantly negative relationships with the degree of international collaborations in the field of AI. The industrial distance has a significant positive relationship with the degree of international collaboration in the field of AI. Also, the results demonstrate that the participation of the United States and China have promoted the international collaboration in the field of AI. This study provides a comprehensive understanding of internationalizing AI research in geographic, economic, cultural, academic, and industrial aspects.
abstract_zh: 人工智能领域的国际合作已势在必行。然而，关于距离因素如何影响人工智能研究的国际合作的研究很少。在本研究中，我们使用从 Microsoft 学术图谱 (MAG) 数据集中收集的 1,294,644 篇 AI 相关协作论文来调查这个问题。提出了一个包括13个指标的框架，从地理距离、经济距离、文化距离、学术距离和产业距离5个角度量化国家之间的距离因素。通过描述性分析和回归分析的方法进行关系分析。结果显示，当今人工智能领域的国际合作并不普遍（仅15.7%）。多年来，除了男性气质/罪恶维度的文化距离和工业距离之外，国际合作中的所有分离都在增加。地理距离、经济距离和学术距离与人工智能领域的国际合作程度呈现显着的负相关关系。产业距离与人工智能领域国际合作程度呈显着正相关。研究结果还表明，美国和中国的参与促进了人工智能领域的国际合作。这项研究提供了对地理、经济、文化、学术和产业方面的国际化人工智能研究的全面了解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究人工智能领域国际协作中地理、经济、文化、学术和工业距离因素的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管国际协作在AI领域至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对距离因素如何影响国际协作的系统分析。
AI.method: 基于微软学术图谱的129万篇AI合作论文，构建包含13个指标的框架，从五个维度量化国家间距离，并通过描述性分析和回归分析验证关系。
AI.result: 当前AI国际协作仅占15.7%，地理、经济和学术距离显著抑制协作，工业距离则促进协作，美国和中国参与度提升国际协作水平。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了多维度距离因素对AI国际化的复杂影响，为促进全球AI合作提供了理论依据和政策启示。

authors_text: Yong-Bin Kang,Abdur Rahim Mohammad Forkan,Prem Prakash Jayaraman,Natalie Wieland,Elizabeth Kollias,Hung Du,Steven Thomson,Yuan-Fang Li
title: An AI-based Solution for Enhancing Delivery of Digital Learning for Future Teachers
title_zh: 基于人工智能的解决方案，可增强未来教师的数字学习交付
abstract: There has been a recent and rapid shift to digital learning hastened by the pandemic but also influenced by ubiquitous availability of digital tools and platforms now, making digital learning ever more accessible. An integral and one of the most difficult part of scaling digital learning and teaching is to be able to assess learner's knowledge and competency. An educator can record a lecture or create digital content that can be delivered to thousands of learners but assessing learners is extremely time consuming. In the paper, we propose an Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based solution namely VidVersityQG for generating questions automatically from pre-recorded video lectures. The solution can automatically generate different types of assessment questions (including short answer, multiple choice, true/false and fill in the blank questions) based on contextual and semantic information inferred from the videos. The proposed solution takes a human-centred approach, wherein teachers are provided the ability to modify/edit any AI generated questions. This approach encourages trust and engagement of teachers in the use and implementation of AI in education. The AI-based solution was evaluated for its accuracy in generating questions by 7 experienced teaching professionals and 117 education videos from multiple domains provided to us by our industry partner VidVersity. VidVersityQG solution showed promising results in generating high-quality questions automatically from video thereby significantly reducing the time and effort for educators in manual question generation.
