The proposed solution takes a human-centred approach, wherein teachers are provided the ability to modify/edit any AI generated questions. The AI-based solution was evaluated for its accuracy in generating questions by 7 experienced teaching professionals and 117 education videos from multiple domains provided to us by our industry partner VidVersity. VidVersityQG solution showed promising results in generating high-quality questions automatically from video thereby significantly reducing the time and effort for educators in manual question generation.
abstract_zh: 最近，流行病加速了向数字学习的快速转变，但也受到现在无处不在的数字工具和平台的影响，使数字学习变得更加容易。扩展数字学习和教学的一个组成部分也是最困难的部分之一是能够评估学习者的知识和能力。教育者可以录制讲座或创建可以交付给数千名学习者的数字内容，但评估学习者非常耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于人工智能（AI）的解决方案，即 VidVersityQG，用于从预先录制的视频讲座中自动生成问题。该解决方案可以根据从视频中推断出的上下文和语义信息自动生成不同类型的评估问题（包括简答题、多项选择题、对错题和填空题）。所提出的解决方案采用以人为本的方法，其中教师能够修改/编辑任何人工智能生成的问题。这种方法鼓励教师对人工智能在教育中的使用和实施的信任和参与。由 7 位经验丰富的教学专业人员和我们的行业合作伙伴 VidVersity 向我们提供的来自多个领域的 117 个教育视频对基于人工智能的解决方案生成问题的准确性进行了评估。 VidVersityQG 解决方案在从视频自动生成高质量问题方面显示出可喜的结果，从而显着减少了教育工作者手动生成问题的时间和精力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人工智能的解决方案VidVersityQG，通过从预录视频中自动生成多样化评估问题，以提升数字学习的效率。
AI.motivation: 数字学习普及后，教师面临评估学生知识与能力的耗时难题，需自动化工具辅助减少人工出题负担。
AI.method: 利用AI技术分析视频内容语义，自动生成选择题、判断题等题目类型，并提供教师编辑功能以增强信任感。
AI.result: 经7名教育专家与117个领域视频测试，系统生成题目质量高，显著降低教师手动出题时间与工作量。
AI.conclusion: VidVersityQG验证了AI在教育评估中的有效性，为未来教师提供高效工具，促进AI技术在教育领域的应用。

search_text: An AI-based Solution for Enhancing Delivery of Digital Learning for Future Teachers 基于人工智能的解决方案，可增强未来教师的数字学习交付 There has been a recent and rapid shift to digital learning hastened by the pandemic but also influenced by ubiquitous availability of digital tools and platforms now, making digital learning ever more accessible. An integral and one of the most difficult part of scaling digital learning and teaching is to be able to assess learner's knowledge and competency. An educator can record a lecture or create digital content that can be delivered to thousands of learners but assessing learners is extremely time consuming. In the paper, we propose an Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based solution namely VidVersityQG for generating questions automatically from pre-recorded video lectures. The solution can automatically generate different types of assessment questions (including short answer, multiple choice, true/false and fill in the blank questions) based on contextual and semantic information inferred from the videos. The proposed solution takes a human-centred approach, wherein teachers are provided the ability to modify/edit any AI generated questions. This approach encourages trust and engagement of teachers in the use and implementation of AI in education. The AI-based solution was evaluated for its accuracy in generating questions by 7 experienced teaching professionals and 117 education videos from multiple domains provided to us by our industry partner VidVersity. VidVersityQG solution showed promising results in generating high-quality questions automatically from video thereby significantly reducing the time and effort for educators in manual question generation. 最近，流行病加速了向数字学习的快速转变，但也受到现在无处不在的数字工具和平台的影响，使数字学习变得更加容易。扩展数字学习和教学的一个组成部分也是最困难的部分之一是能够评估学习者的知识和能力。教育者可以录制讲座或创建可以交付给数千名学习者的数字内容，但评估学习者非常耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于人工智能（AI）的解决方案，即 VidVersityQG，用于从预先录制的视频讲座中自动生成问题。该解决方案可以根据从视频中推断出的上下文和语义信息自动生成不同类型的评估问题（包括简答题、多项选择题、对错题和填空题）。所提出的解决方案采用以人为本的方法，其中教师能够修改/编辑任何人工智能生成的问题。这种方法鼓励教师对人工智能在教育中的使用和实施的信任和参与。由 7 位经验丰富的教学专业人员和我们的行业合作伙伴 VidVersity 向我们提供的来自多个领域的 117 个教育视频对基于人工智能的解决方案生成问题的准确性进行了评估。 VidVersityQG 解决方案在从视频自动生成高质量问题方面显示出可喜的结果，从而显着减少了教育工作者手动生成问题的时间和精力。 本文提出一种基于人工智能的解决方案VidVersityQG，通过从预录视频中自动生成多样化评估问题，以提升数字学习的效率。 Yong-Bin Kang,Abdur Rahim Mohammad Forkan,Prem Prakash Jayaraman,Natalie Wieland,Elizabeth Kollias,Hung Du,Steven Thomson,Yuan-Fang Li cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: Haiquan Wang,Hans-DietrichHaasis,Panpan Du,Xiaobin Xu,Menghao Su,Shengjun Wen,Wenxuan Yue,Shanshan Zhang
title: Adaptive Group Collaborative Artificial Bee Colony Algorithm
title_zh: 自适应群体协作人工蜂群算法
abstract: As an effective algorithm for solving complex optimization problems, artificial bee colony (ABC) algorithm has shown to be competitive, but the same as other population-based algorithms, it is poor at balancing the abilities of global searching in the whole solution space (named as exploration) and quick searching in local solution space which is defined as exploitation. For improving the performance of ABC, an adaptive group collaborative ABC (AgABC) algorithm is introduced where the population in different phases is divided to specific groups and different search strategies with different abilities are assigned to the members in groups, and the member or strategy which obtains the best solution will be employed for further searching. Experimental results on benchmark functions show that the proposed algorithm with dynamic mechanism is superior to other algorithms in searching accuracy and stability. Furthermore, numerical experiments show that the proposed method can generate the optimal solution for the complex scheduling problem.
summary: As an effective algorithm for solving complex optimization problems, artificial bee colony (ABC) algorithm has shown to be competitive, but the same as other population-based algorithms, it is poor at balancing the abilities of global searching in the whole solution space (named as exploration) and quick searching in local solution space which is defined as exploitation. For improving the performance of ABC, an adaptive group collaborative ABC (AgABC) algorithm is introduced where the population in different phases is divided to specific groups and different search strategies with different abilities are assigned to the members in groups, and the member or strategy which obtains the best solution will be employed for further searching. Experimental results on benchmark functions show that the proposed algorithm with dynamic mechanism is superior to other algorithms in searching accuracy and stability. Furthermore, numerical experiments show that the proposed method can generate the optimal solution for the complex scheduling problem.
abstract_zh: 作为解决复杂优化问题的有效算法，人工蜂群（ABC）算法已表现出一定的竞争力，但与其他基于种群的算法一样，它在平衡整个解空间中的全局搜索（称为探索）和局部解空间中的快速搜索（定义为开发）的能力方面较差。为了提高ABC的性能，引入了自适应群体协作ABC（AgABC）算法，将不同阶段的群体划分到特定的群体中，并为群体中的成员分配不同能力的不同搜索策略，并采用获得最佳解决方案的成员或策略进行进一步搜索。基准函数实验结果表明，所提出的动态机制算法在搜索精度和稳定性方面均优于其他算法。此外，数值实验表明，该方法可以生成复杂调度问题的最优解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应群体协作的人工蜂群算法（AgABC），以提高其解决复杂优化问题的性能。
AI.motivation: 人工蜂群算法虽然在解决复杂优化问题方面表现出色，但在探索全局解空间和利用局部解空间之间存在平衡不足的问题。
AI.method: AgABC算法通过将不同阶段的种群划分为特定群体，并为每个群体分配不同搜索策略，利用表现最佳的个体或策略进行进一步搜索。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，AgABC算法在搜索精度和稳定性方面优于其他算法，并能为复杂调度问题生成最优解。
AI.conclusion: AgABC算法通过动态机制有效提升了人工蜂群算法的性能，适用于复杂优化问题的求解。

authors_text: Jan Pöppel,Sebastian Kahl,Stefan Kopp
title: Resonating Minds -- Emergent Collaboration Through Hierarchical Active Inference
title_zh: 心灵共鸣——通过分层主动推理进行紧急协作
comment: This version of the article has been accepted for publication, after peer review but is not the Version of Record and does not reflect post-acceptance improvements, or any corrections. The Version of Record is available online at: http://dx.doi.org/10.1007/s12559-021-09960-4, Cogn Comput (2021)
comments: This version of the article has been accepted for publication, after peer review but is not the Version of Record and does not reflect post-acceptance improvements, or any corrections. The Version of Record is available online at: http://dx.doi.org/10.1007/s12559-021-09960-4, Cogn Comput (2021)
abstract: Working together on complex collaborative tasks requires agents to coordinate their actions. Doing this explicitly or completely prior to the actual interaction is not always possible nor sufficient. Agents also need to continuously understand the current actions of others and quickly adapt their own behavior appropriately. Here we investigate how efficient, automatic coordination processes at the level of mental states (intentions, goals), which we call belief resonance, can lead to collaborative situated problem-solving. We present a model of hierarchical active inference for collaborative agents (HAICA). It combines efficient Bayesian Theory of Mind processes with a perception-action system based on predictive processing and active inference. Belief resonance is realized by letting the inferred mental states of one agent influence another agent's predictive beliefs about its own goals and intentions. This way, the inferred mental states influence the agent's own task behavior without explicit collaborative reasoning. We implement and evaluate this model in the Overcooked domain, in which two agents with varying degrees of belief resonance team up to fulfill meal orders. Our results demonstrate that agents based on HAICA achieve a team performance comparable to recent state of the art approaches, while incurring much lower computational costs. We also show that belief resonance is especially beneficial in settings were the agents have asymmetric knowledge about the environment. The results indicate that belief resonance and active inference allow for quick and efficient agent coordination, and thus can serve as a building block for collaborative cognitive agents.
summary: Working together on complex collaborative tasks requires agents to coordinate their actions. Doing this explicitly or completely prior to the actual interaction is not always possible nor sufficient. Agents also need to continuously understand the current actions of others and quickly adapt their own behavior appropriately. Here we investigate how efficient, automatic coordination processes at the level of mental states (intentions, goals), which we call belief resonance, can lead to collaborative situated problem-solving. We present a model of hierarchical active inference for collaborative agents (HAICA). It combines efficient Bayesian Theory of Mind processes with a perception-action system based on predictive processing and active inference. Belief resonance is realized by letting the inferred mental states of one agent influence another agent's predictive beliefs about its own goals and intentions. This way, the inferred mental states influence the agent's own task behavior without explicit collaborative reasoning. We implement and evaluate this model in the Overcooked domain, in which two agents with varying degrees of belief resonance team up to fulfill meal orders. Our results demonstrate that agents based on HAICA achieve a team performance comparable to recent state of the art approaches, while incurring much lower computational costs. We also show that belief resonance is especially beneficial in settings were the agents have asymmetric knowledge about the environment. The results indicate that belief resonance and active inference allow for quick and efficient agent coordination, and thus can serve as a building block for collaborative cognitive agents.
abstract_zh: 共同完成复杂的协作任务需要代理协调他们的行动。在实际交互之前明确或完全执行此操作并不总是可行或充分的。智能体还需要不断了解他人当前的行为，并快速适当地调整自己的行为。在这里，我们研究精神状态（意图、目标）层面的高效、自动协调过程（我们称之为信念共鸣）如何导致协作解决问题。我们提出了一种协作代理的分层主动推理模型（HAICA）。它将高效的贝叶斯心理理论过程与基于预测处理和主动推理的感知-行动系统相结合。信念共鸣是通过让一个代理人推断的心理状态影响另一个代理人对其自身目标和意图的预测信念来实现的。这样，推断的心理状态就会影响代理自己的任务行为，而无需明确的协作推理。我们在 Overcooked 领域实现并评估了这个模型，其中两个具有不同程度信念共鸣的智能体联手完成餐单。我们的结果表明，基于 HAICA 的代理实现了与最新最先进方法相当的团队绩效，同时计算成本低得多。我们还表明，信念共鸣在代理人对环境有不对称知识的环境中特别有益。结果表明，信念共振和主动推理可以实现快速有效的代理协调，因此可以作为协作认知代理的构建块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于层级主动推理的协作智能体模型（HAICA），通过信念共振实现高效协作。
AI.motivation: 复杂任务协作需要智能体在动态交互中自动协调行为，传统显式协调方式存在计算成本高、适应性差等问题。
AI.method: 结合贝叶斯心智理论与预测处理框架，通过信念共振机制使智能体间隐式共享目标意图，无需显式通信即可动态调整行为。
AI.result: 在Overcooked环境中，HAICA模型在保持团队性能与最先进方法相当的同时，计算成本降低；在环境知识不对称场景中表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: 信念共振与主动推理机制为构建高效协作认知智能体提供了新范式，可作为复杂协作任务的基础模块。

search_text: Resonating Minds -- Emergent Collaboration Through Hierarchical Active Inference 心灵共鸣——通过分层主动推理进行紧急协作 Working together on complex collaborative tasks requires agents to coordinate their actions. Doing this explicitly or completely prior to the actual interaction is not always possible nor sufficient. Agents also need to continuously understand the current actions of others and quickly adapt their own behavior appropriately. Here we investigate how efficient, automatic coordination processes at the level of mental states (intentions, goals), which we call belief resonance, can lead to collaborative situated problem-solving. We present a model of hierarchical active inference for collaborative agents (HAICA). It combines efficient Bayesian Theory of Mind processes with a perception-action system based on predictive processing and active inference. Belief resonance is realized by letting the inferred mental states of one agent influence another agent's predictive beliefs about its own goals and intentions. This way, the inferred mental states influence the agent's own task behavior without explicit collaborative reasoning. We implement and evaluate this model in the Overcooked domain, in which two agents with varying degrees of belief resonance team up to fulfill meal orders. Our results demonstrate that agents based on HAICA achieve a team performance comparable to recent state of the art approaches, while incurring much lower computational costs. We also show that belief resonance is especially beneficial in settings were the agents have asymmetric knowledge about the environment. The results indicate that belief resonance and active inference allow for quick and efficient agent coordination, and thus can serve as a building block for collaborative cognitive agents. 共同完成复杂的协作任务需要代理协调他们的行动。在实际交互之前明确或完全执行此操作并不总是可行或充分的。智能体还需要不断了解他人当前的行为，并快速适当地调整自己的行为。在这里，我们研究精神状态（意图、目标）层面的高效、自动协调过程（我们称之为信念共鸣）如何导致协作解决问题。我们提出了一种协作代理的分层主动推理模型（HAICA）。它将高效的贝叶斯心理理论过程与基于预测处理和主动推理的感知-行动系统相结合。信念共鸣是通过让一个代理人推断的心理状态影响另一个代理人对其自身目标和意图的预测信念来实现的。这样，推断的心理状态就会影响代理自己的任务行为，而无需明确的协作推理。我们在 Overcooked 领域实现并评估了这个模型，其中两个具有不同程度信念共鸣的智能体联手完成餐单。我们的结果表明，基于 HAICA 的代理实现了与最新最先进方法相当的团队绩效，同时计算成本低得多。我们还表明，信念共鸣在代理人对环境有不对称知识的环境中特别有益。结果表明，信念共振和主动推理可以实现快速有效的代理协调，因此可以作为协作认知代理的构建块。 本文提出了一种基于层级主动推理的协作智能体模型（HAICA），通过信念共振实现高效协作。 Jan Pöppel,Sebastian Kahl,Stefan Kopp cs.MA,cs.AI

authors_text: Wenkai Chen,Chuang Zhu,Yi Chen,Mengting Li,Tiejun Huang
title: Sample Prior Guided Robust Model Learning to Suppress Noisy Labels
title_zh: 用于抑制噪声标签的先验引导稳健模型学习示例
abstract: Imperfect labels are ubiquitous in real-world datasets and seriously harm the model performance. Several recent effective methods for handling noisy labels have two key steps: 1) dividing samples into cleanly labeled and wrongly labeled sets by training loss, 2) using semi-supervised methods to generate pseudo-labels for samples in the wrongly labeled set. However, current methods always hurt the informative hard samples due to the similar loss distribution between the hard samples and the noisy ones. In this paper, we proposed PGDF (Prior Guided Denoising Framework), a novel framework to learn a deep model to suppress noise by generating the samples' prior knowledge, which is integrated into both dividing samples step and semi-supervised step. Our framework can save more informative hard clean samples into the cleanly labeled set. Besides, our framework also promotes the quality of pseudo-labels during the semi-supervised step by suppressing the noise in the current pseudo-labels generating scheme. To further enhance the hard samples, we reweight the samples in the cleanly labeled set during training. We evaluated our method using synthetic datasets based on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, as well as on the real-world datasets WebVision and Clothing1M. The results demonstrate substantial improvements over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Imperfect labels are ubiquitous in real-world datasets and seriously harm the model performance. Several recent effective methods for handling noisy labels have two key steps: 1) dividing samples into cleanly labeled and wrongly labeled sets by training loss, 2) using semi-supervised methods to generate pseudo-labels for samples in the wrongly labeled set. However, current methods always hurt the informative hard samples due to the similar loss distribution between the hard samples and the noisy ones. In this paper, we proposed PGDF (Prior Guided Denoising Framework), a novel framework to learn a deep model to suppress noise by generating the samples' prior knowledge, which is integrated into both dividing samples step and semi-supervised step. Our framework can save more informative hard clean samples into the cleanly labeled set. Besides, our framework also promotes the quality of pseudo-labels during the semi-supervised step by suppressing the noise in the current pseudo-labels generating scheme. To further enhance the hard samples, we reweight the samples in the cleanly labeled set during training. We evaluated our method using synthetic datasets based on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, as well as on the real-world datasets WebVision and Clothing1M. The results demonstrate substantial improvements over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 不完美的标签在现实世界的数据集中普遍存在，并严重损害模型的性能。最近几种处理噪声标签的有效方法有两个关键步骤：1）通过训练损失将样本分为干净标记集和错误标记集，2）使用半监督方法为错误标记集中的样本生成伪标签。然而，由于硬样本和噪声样本之间的损失分布相似，当前的方法总是损害信息丰富的硬样本。在本文中，我们提出了PGDF（先验引导去噪框架），这是一种通过生成样本先验知识来学习深度模型来抑制噪声的新颖框架，该框架集成到划分样本步骤和半监督步骤中。我们的框架可以将更多信息丰富的硬清洁样本保存到干净标记集中。此外，我们的框架还通过抑制当前伪标签生成方案中的噪声来提高半监督步骤中伪标签的质量。为了进一步增强硬样本，我们在训练期间重新加权干净标记集中的样本。我们使用基于 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 以及现实世界数据集 WebVision 和 Clothing1M 的合成数据集评估了我们的方法。结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于样本先验知识的去噪框架PGDF，用于在存在噪声标签的现实数据集中提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪方法因难以区分硬样本与噪声样本，导致信息量大的清洁样本被错误归类，影响模型训练效果。
AI.method: 通过生成样本先验知识，改进样本划分策略和伪标签生成过程，同时对清洁样本集进行重加权以增强硬样本学习。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、WebVision和Clothing1M数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PGDF框架有效抑制了噪声干扰，提升了模型鲁棒性，为噪声标签处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Oleg Svidchenko,Aleksei Shpilman
title: Maximum Entropy Model-based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于最大熵模型的强化学习
comment: NeurIPS'2021 Deep Reinforcement Learning Workshop
comments: NeurIPS'2021 Deep Reinforcement Learning Workshop
abstract: Recent advances in reinforcement learning have demonstrated its ability to solve hard agent-environment interaction tasks on a super-human level. However, the application of reinforcement learning methods to practical and real-world tasks is currently limited due to most RL state-of-art algorithms' sample inefficiency, i.e., the need for a vast number of training episodes. For example, OpenAI Five algorithm that has beaten human players in Dota 2 has trained for thousands of years of game time. Several approaches exist that tackle the issue of sample inefficiency, that either offers a more efficient usage of already gathered experience or aim to gain a more relevant and diverse experience via a better exploration of an environment. However, to our knowledge, no such approach exists for model-based algorithms, that showed their high sample efficiency in solving hard control tasks with high-dimensional state space. This work connects exploration techniques and model-based reinforcement learning. We have designed a novel exploration method that takes into account features of the model-based approach. We also demonstrate through experiments that our method significantly improves the performance of the model-based algorithm Dreamer.
summary: Recent advances in reinforcement learning have demonstrated its ability to solve hard agent-environment interaction tasks on a super-human level. However, the application of reinforcement learning methods to practical and real-world tasks is currently limited due to most RL state-of-art algorithms' sample inefficiency, i.e., the need for a vast number of training episodes. For example, OpenAI Five algorithm that has beaten human players in Dota 2 has trained for thousands of years of game time. Several approaches exist that tackle the issue of sample inefficiency, that either offers a more efficient usage of already gathered experience or aim to gain a more relevant and diverse experience via a better exploration of an environment. However, to our knowledge, no such approach exists for model-based algorithms, that showed their high sample efficiency in solving hard control tasks with high-dimensional state space. This work connects exploration techniques and model-based reinforcement learning. We have designed a novel exploration method that takes into account features of the model-based approach. We also demonstrate through experiments that our method significantly improves the performance of the model-based algorithm Dreamer.
abstract_zh: 强化学习的最新进展证明了其在超人类水平上解决智能体与环境交互任务的能力。然而，由于大多数 RL 最先进算法的样本效率低下，即需要大量的训练集，强化学习方法在实际和现实世界任务中的应用目前受到限制。例如，在 Dota 2 中击败人类玩家的 OpenAI Five 算法已经训练了数千年的游戏时间。存在几种解决样本效率低下问题的方法，这些方法要么更有效地利用已经收集的经验，要么旨在通过更好地探索环境来获得更相关和更多样化的经验。然而，据我们所知，基于模型的算法不存在这样的方法，该方法在解决高维状态空间的硬控制任务时显示出高样本效率。这项工作将探索技术和基于模型的强化学习联系起来。我们设计了一种新颖的探索方法，考虑到基于模型的方法的特征。我们还通过实验证明，我们的方法显着提高了基于模型的算法 Dreamer 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合探索技术的模型基于强化学习方法，以解决模型基于算法在样本效率上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习算法在实际应用中因样本效率低而受限，而模型基于方法虽具高样本效率但缺乏有效探索策略，需结合探索技术提升性能。
AI.method: 设计一种新型探索方法，结合模型预测的不确定性与最大熵原则，优化模型基于算法的探索效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升了模型基于算法Dreamer在复杂任务中的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将探索技术与模型基于强化学习结合，验证了其在提升样本效率方面的有效性，为实际应用提供了新思路。

However, to our knowledge, no such approach exists for model-based algorithms, that showed their high sample efficiency in solving hard control tasks with high-dimensional state space. This work connects exploration techniques and model-based reinforcement learning. We have designed a novel exploration method that takes into account features of the model-based approach. We also demonstrate through experiments that our method significantly improves the performance of the model-based algorithm Dreamer. 强化学习的最新进展证明了其在超人类水平上解决智能体与环境交互任务的能力。然而，由于大多数 RL 最先进算法的样本效率低下，即需要大量的训练集，强化学习方法在实际和现实世界任务中的应用目前受到限制。例如，在 Dota 2 中击败人类玩家的 OpenAI Five 算法已经训练了数千年的游戏时间。存在几种解决样本效率低下问题的方法，这些方法要么更有效地利用已经收集的经验，要么旨在通过更好地探索环境来获得更相关和更多样化的经验。然而，据我们所知，基于模型的算法不存在这样的方法，该方法在解决高维状态空间的硬控制任务时显示出高样本效率。这项工作将探索技术和基于模型的强化学习联系起来。我们设计了一种新颖的探索方法，考虑到基于模型的方法的特征。我们还通过实验证明，我们的方法显着提高了基于模型的算法 Dreamer 的性能。 本文提出一种结合探索技术的模型基于强化学习方法，以解决模型基于算法在样本效率上的不足。 Oleg Svidchenko,Aleksei Shpilman cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Rui Yan,Mike Zheng Shou,Yixiao Ge,Alex Jinpeng Wang,Xudong Lin,Guanyu Cai,Jinhui Tang
title: Video-Text Pre-training with Learned Regions
title_zh: 使用学习区域进行视频-文本预训练
abstract: Video-Text pre-training aims at learning transferable representations from large-scale video-text pairs via aligning the semantics between visual and textual information. State-of-the-art approaches extract visual features from raw pixels in an end-to-end fashion. However, these methods operate at frame-level directly and thus overlook the spatio-temporal structure of objects in video, which yet has a strong synergy with nouns in textual descriptions. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective module for video-text representation learning, namely RegionLearner, which can take into account the structure of objects during pre-training on large-scale video-text pairs. Given a video, our module (1) first quantizes visual features into semantic clusters, then (2) generates learnable masks and uses them to aggregate the features belonging to the same semantic region, and finally (3) models the interactions between different aggregated regions. In contrast to using off-the-shelf object detectors, our proposed module does not require explicit supervision and is much more computationally efficient. We pre-train the proposed approach on the public WebVid2M and CC3M datasets. Extensive evaluations on four downstream video-text retrieval benchmarks clearly demonstrate the effectiveness of our RegionLearner. The code will be available at https://github.com/ruiyan1995/Region_Learner.
summary: Video-Text pre-training aims at learning transferable representations from large-scale video-text pairs via aligning the semantics between visual and textual information. State-of-the-art approaches extract visual features from raw pixels in an end-to-end fashion. However, these methods operate at frame-level directly and thus overlook the spatio-temporal structure of objects in video, which yet has a strong synergy with nouns in textual descriptions. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective module for video-text representation learning, namely RegionLearner, which can take into account the structure of objects during pre-training on large-scale video-text pairs. Given a video, our module (1) first quantizes visual features into semantic clusters, then (2) generates learnable masks and uses them to aggregate the features belonging to the same semantic region, and finally (3) models the interactions between different aggregated regions. In contrast to using off-the-shelf object detectors, our proposed module does not require explicit supervision and is much more computationally efficient. We pre-train the proposed approach on the public WebVid2M and CC3M datasets. Extensive evaluations on four downstream video-text retrieval benchmarks clearly demonstrate the effectiveness of our RegionLearner. The code will be available at https://github.com/ruiyan1995/Region_Learner.
abstract_zh: 视频-文本预训练旨在通过对齐视觉和文本信息之间的语义，从大规模视频-文本对中学习可转移的表示。最先进的方法以端到端的方式从原始像素中提取视觉特征。然而，这些方法直接在帧级操作，因此忽略了视频中对象的时空结构，而视频中的对象与文本描述中的名词具有很强的协同作用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单而有效的视频文本表示学习模块，即 RegionLearner，它可以在大规模视频文本对的预训练期间考虑对象的结构。给定一个视频，我们的模块（1）首先将视觉特征量化为语义簇，然后（2）生成可学习的掩模并使用它们来聚合属于同一语义区域的特征，最后（3）对不同聚合区域之间的交互进行建模。与使用现成的目标检测器相比，我们提出的模块不需要显式监督，并且计算效率更高。我们在公共 WebVid2M 和 CC3M 数据集上预训练所提出的方法。对四个下游视频文本检索基准的广泛评估清楚地证明了我们的 RegionLearner 的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/ruiyan1995/Region_Learner 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RegionLearner的模块，通过学习视频中的语义区域结构来提升视频-文本预训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在帧级别操作，忽略了视频中物体的时空结构，而这些结构与文本描述中的名词有强关联。
AI.method: 该方法通过量化视觉特征为语义聚类，生成可学习的掩码聚合同一区域的特征，并建模不同区域间的交互。
AI.result: 在四个下游视频-文本检索基准测试中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需显式监督且计算高效，证明了其有效性。

authors_text: Kai Kang,Fangzhen Lin
title: Computing Class Hierarchies from Classifiers
title_zh: 从分类器计算类层次结构
abstract: A class or taxonomic hierarchy is often manually constructed, and part of our knowledge about the world. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm for automatically acquiring a class hierarchy from a classifier which is often a large neural network these days. The information that we need from a classifier is its confusion matrix which contains, for each pair of base classes, the number of errors the classifier makes by mistaking one for another. Our algorithm produces surprisingly good hierarchies for some well-known deep neural network models trained on the CIFAR-10 dataset, a neural network model for predicting the native language of a non-native English speaker, a neural network model for detecting the language of a written text, and a classifier for identifying music genre. In the literature, such class hierarchies have been used to provide interpretability to the neural networks. We also discuss some other potential uses of the acquired hierarchies.
summary: A class or taxonomic hierarchy is often manually constructed, and part of our knowledge about the world. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm for automatically acquiring a class hierarchy from a classifier which is often a large neural network these days. The information that we need from a classifier is its confusion matrix which contains, for each pair of base classes, the number of errors the classifier makes by mistaking one for another. Our algorithm produces surprisingly good hierarchies for some well-known deep neural network models trained on the CIFAR-10 dataset, a neural network model for predicting the native language of a non-native English speaker, a neural network model for detecting the language of a written text, and a classifier for identifying music genre. In the literature, such class hierarchies have been used to provide interpretability to the neural networks. We also discuss some other potential uses of the acquired hierarchies.
abstract_zh: 类或分类层次结构通常是手动构建的，是我们关于世界的知识的一部分。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的算法，用于从分类器自动获取类层次结构，分类器目前通常是大型神经网络。我们需要从分类器获得的信息是其混淆矩阵，其中对于每对基类，包含分类器因将一个基类误认为另一个基类而产生的错误数。我们的算法为一些在 CIFAR-10 数据集上训练的著名深度神经网络模型、用于预测非英语母语人士的母语的神经网络模型、用于检测书面文本语言的神经网络模型以及用于识别音乐流派的分类器生成了令人惊讶的良好层次结构。在文献中，此类层次结构已被用来为神经网络提供可解释性。我们还讨论了所获得的层次结构的一些其他潜在用途。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从分类器中自动生成类别层次结构的新算法。
AI.motivation: 传统类别层次结构多为人工构建，耗时且缺乏灵活性，需通过自动方法提升模型可解释性并拓展应用场景。
AI.method: 基于分类器的混淆矩阵，通过分析类别间错误率的关联性，自动推导出层次化分类结构。
AI.result: 算法在CIFAR-10图像分类、语言识别及音乐流派分类等多任务中生成了高质量的类别层次结构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了分类器可解释性增强，为模型分析和应用拓展提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xixi Wang,Xiao Wang,Bo Jiang,Jin Tang,Bin Luo
title: MutualFormer: Multi-Modality Representation Learning via Cross-Diffusion Attention
title_zh: MutualFormer：通过交叉扩散注意力进行多模态表示学习
abstract: Aggregating multi-modality data to obtain reliable data representation attracts more and more attention. Recent studies demonstrate that Transformer models usually work well for multi-modality tasks. Existing Transformers generally either adopt the Cross-Attention (CA) mechanism or simple concatenation to achieve the information interaction among different modalities which generally ignore the issue of modality gap. In this work, we re-think Transformer and extend it to MutualFormer for multi-modality data representation. Rather than CA in Transformer, MutualFormer employs our new design of Cross-Diffusion Attention (CDA) to conduct the information communication among different modalities. Comparing with CA, the main advantages of the proposed CDA are three aspects. First, the crossaffinities in CDA are defined based on the individual modality affinities in the metric space which thus can naturally avoid the issue of modality/domain gap in feature based CA definition. Second, CDA provides a general scheme which can either be used for multimodality representation or serve as the post-optimization for existing CA models. Third, CDA is implemented efficiently. We successfully apply the MutualFormer on different multi-modality learning tasks (i.e., RGB-Depth SOD, RGB-NIR object ReID). Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed MutualFormer.
summary: Aggregating multi-modality data to obtain reliable data representation attracts more and more attention. Recent studies demonstrate that Transformer models usually work well for multi-modality tasks. Existing Transformers generally either adopt the Cross-Attention (CA) mechanism or simple concatenation to achieve the information interaction among different modalities which generally ignore the issue of modality gap. In this work, we re-think Transformer and extend it to MutualFormer for multi-modality data representation. Rather than CA in Transformer, MutualFormer employs our new design of Cross-Diffusion Attention (CDA) to conduct the information communication among different modalities. Comparing with CA, the main advantages of the proposed CDA are three aspects. First, the crossaffinities in CDA are defined based on the individual modality affinities in the metric space which thus can naturally avoid the issue of modality/domain gap in feature based CA definition. Second, CDA provides a general scheme which can either be used for multimodality representation or serve as the post-optimization for existing CA models. Third, CDA is implemented efficiently. We successfully apply the MutualFormer on different multi-modality learning tasks (i.e., RGB-Depth SOD, RGB-NIR object ReID). Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed MutualFormer.
abstract_zh: 聚合多模态数据以获得可靠的数据表示引起越来越多的关注。最近的研究表明，Transformer 模型通常适用于多模态任务。现有的Transformers一般采用交叉注意力（CA）机制或简单的级联来实现不同模态之间的信息交互，但通常忽略了模态间隙问题。在这项工作中，我们重新思考 Transformer 并将其扩展到 MutualFormer 以实现多模态数据表示。 MutualFormer 采用我们新设计的交叉扩散注意力（CDA）来进行不同模态之间的信息通信，而不是 Transformer 中的 CA。与CA相比，所提出的CDA的主要优点是三个方面。首先，CDA中的交叉亲和力是基于度量空间中的个体模态亲和力来定义的，因此可以自然地避免基于特征的CA定义中的模态/域差距问题。其次，CDA 提供了一个通用方案，既可以用于多模态表示，也可以作为现有 CA 模型的后优化。三是CDA高效实施。我们成功地将 MutualFormer 应用于不同的多模态学习任务（即 RGB-Depth SOD、RGB-NIR 对象 ReID）。大量的实验证明了所提出的 MutualFormer 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MutualFormer模型，通过跨扩散注意力机制（CDA）解决多模态数据表示中的模态差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在多模态任务中存在模态间隙问题，传统交叉注意力机制（CA）未能有效处理不同模态间的特征差异。
AI.method: 设计跨扩散注意力（CDA）机制，基于个体模态亲和力定义交叉亲和力，避免模态域差距，并实现高效信息交互。
AI.result: MutualFormer在RGB-Depth显著性检测和RGB-NIR目标重识别任务中表现出色，实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CDA机制为多模态表征学习提供了通用框架，MutualFormer在处理模态差异问题上具有显著优势。

search_text: MutualFormer: Multi-Modality Representation Learning via Cross-Diffusion Attention MutualFormer：通过交叉扩散注意力进行多模态表示学习 Aggregating multi-modality data to obtain reliable data representation attracts more and more attention. Recent studies demonstrate that Transformer models usually work well for multi-modality tasks. Existing Transformers generally either adopt the Cross-Attention (CA) mechanism or simple concatenation to achieve the information interaction among different modalities which generally ignore the issue of modality gap. In this work, we re-think Transformer and extend it to MutualFormer for multi-modality data representation. Rather than CA in Transformer, MutualFormer employs our new design of Cross-Diffusion Attention (CDA) to conduct the information communication among different modalities. Comparing with CA, the main advantages of the proposed CDA are three aspects. First, the crossaffinities in CDA are defined based on the individual modality affinities in the metric space which thus can naturally avoid the issue of modality/domain gap in feature based CA definition. Second, CDA provides a general scheme which can either be used for multimodality representation or serve as the post-optimization for existing CA models. Third, CDA is implemented efficiently. We successfully apply the MutualFormer on different multi-modality learning tasks (i.e., RGB-Depth SOD, RGB-NIR object ReID). Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed MutualFormer. 聚合多模态数据以获得可靠的数据表示引起越来越多的关注。最近的研究表明，Transformer 模型通常适用于多模态任务。现有的Transformers一般采用交叉注意力（CA）机制或简单的级联来实现不同模态之间的信息交互，但通常忽略了模态间隙问题。在这项工作中，我们重新思考 Transformer 并将其扩展到 MutualFormer 以实现多模态数据表示。 MutualFormer 采用我们新设计的交叉扩散注意力（CDA）来进行不同模态之间的信息通信，而不是 Transformer 中的 CA。与CA相比，所提出的CDA的主要优点是三个方面。首先，CDA中的交叉亲和力是基于度量空间中的个体模态亲和力来定义的，因此可以自然地避免基于特征的CA定义中的模态/域差距问题。其次，CDA 提供了一个通用方案，既可以用于多模态表示，也可以作为现有 CA 模型的后优化。三是CDA高效实施。我们成功地将 MutualFormer 应用于不同的多模态学习任务（即 RGB-Depth SOD、RGB-NIR 对象 ReID）。大量的实验证明了所提出的 MutualFormer 的有效性。 本文提出MutualFormer模型，通过跨扩散注意力机制（CDA）解决多模态数据表示中的模态差异问题。 Xixi Wang,Xiao Wang,Bo Jiang,Jin Tang,Bin Luo cs.CV

authors_text: Semih Günel,Florian Aymanns,Sina Honari,Pavan Ramdya,Pascal Fua
title: Overcoming the Domain Gap in Neural Action Representations
title_zh: 克服神经动作表示中的领域差距
abstract: Relating animal behaviors to brain activity is a fundamental goal in neuroscience, with practical applications in building robust brain-machine interfaces. However, the domain gap between individuals is a major issue that prevents the training of general models that work on unlabeled subjects. Since 3D pose data can now be reliably extracted from multi-view video sequences without manual intervention, we propose to use it to guide the encoding of neural action representations together with a set of neural and behavioral augmentations exploiting the properties of microscopy imaging. To reduce the domain gap, during training, we swap neural and behavioral data across animals that seem to be performing similar actions. To demonstrate this, we test our methods on three very different multimodal datasets; one that features flies and their neural activity, one that contains human neural Electrocorticography (ECoG) data, and lastly the RGB video data of human activities from different viewpoints.
summary: Relating animal behaviors to brain activity is a fundamental goal in neuroscience, with practical applications in building robust brain-machine interfaces. However, the domain gap between individuals is a major issue that prevents the training of general models that work on unlabeled subjects. Since 3D pose data can now be reliably extracted from multi-view video sequences without manual intervention, we propose to use it to guide the encoding of neural action representations together with a set of neural and behavioral augmentations exploiting the properties of microscopy imaging. To reduce the domain gap, during training, we swap neural and behavioral data across animals that seem to be performing similar actions. To demonstrate this, we test our methods on three very different multimodal datasets; one that features flies and their neural activity, one that contains human neural Electrocorticography (ECoG) data, and lastly the RGB video data of human activities from different viewpoints.
abstract_zh: 将动物行为与大脑活动联系起来是神经科学的一个基本目标，在构建强大的脑机接口方面具有实际应用。然而，个体之间的领域差距是一个主要问题，阻碍了对未标记主题的通用模型的训练。由于现在可以从多视图视频序列中可靠地提取 3D 姿势数据，而无需人工干预，因此我们建议使用它来指导神经动作表示的编码以及利用显微镜成像特性的一组神经和行为增强。为了缩小领域差距，在训练期间，我们在似乎执行类似动作的动物之间交换神经和行为数据。为了证明这一点，我们在三个非常不同的多模态数据集上测试我们的方法；一份包含果蝇及其神经活动，一份包含人类神经皮质电图 (ECoG) 数据，最后一份包含不同视角的人类活动的 RGB 视频数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用3D姿态数据与神经行为增强方法，通过跨动物数据交换来克服神经动作表示中的领域差距，构建通用模型。
AI.motivation: 个体间的领域差距阻碍了通用模型的训练，尤其在缺乏标记数据的脑机接口应用中，需寻找跨个体的鲁棒表示方法。
AI.method: 结合多视角视频提取的3D姿态数据，利用显微成像特性设计神经/行为增强模块，并在训练中交换相似动作的跨动物神经行为数据以缩小领域差异。
AI.result: 方法在果蝇神经活动、人类ECoG数据及多视角人类行为视频三个异构数据集上均有效验证了跨领域表征学习的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 跨动物数据交换机制有效缓解了领域差距问题，为构建通用神经动作表征模型提供了新思路，具有脑机接口等应用潜力。

authors_text: Nitish Srivastava,Walter Talbott,Martin Bertran Lopez,Shuangfei Zhai,Josh Susskind
title: Robust Robotic Control from Pixels using Contrastive Recurrent State-Space Models
title_zh: 使用对比循环状态空间模型从像素进行鲁棒机器人控制
comment: NeurIPS Deep Reinforcement Learning Workshop 2021. Code can be found at https://github.com/apple/ml-core
comments: NeurIPS Deep Reinforcement Learning Workshop 2021. Code can be found at https://github.com/apple/ml-core
abstract: Modeling the world can benefit robot learning by providing a rich training signal for shaping an agent's latent state space. However, learning world models in unconstrained environments over high-dimensional observation spaces such as images is challenging. One source of difficulty is the presence of irrelevant but hard-to-model background distractions, and unimportant visual details of task-relevant entities. We address this issue by learning a recurrent latent dynamics model which contrastively predicts the next observation. This simple model leads to surprisingly robust robotic control even with simultaneous camera, background, and color distractions. We outperform alternatives such as bisimulation methods which impose state-similarity measures derived from divergence in future reward or future optimal actions. We obtain state-of-the-art results on the Distracting Control Suite, a challenging benchmark for pixel-based robotic control.
summary: Modeling the world can benefit robot learning by providing a rich training signal for shaping an agent's latent state space. However, learning world models in unconstrained environments over high-dimensional observation spaces such as images is challenging. One source of difficulty is the presence of irrelevant but hard-to-model background distractions, and unimportant visual details of task-relevant entities. We address this issue by learning a recurrent latent dynamics model which contrastively predicts the next observation. This simple model leads to surprisingly robust robotic control even with simultaneous camera, background, and color distractions. We outperform alternatives such as bisimulation methods which impose state-similarity measures derived from divergence in future reward or future optimal actions. We obtain state-of-the-art results on the Distracting Control Suite, a challenging benchmark for pixel-based robotic control.
abstract_zh: 对世界进行建模可以通过提供丰富的训练信号来塑造代理的潜在状态空间，从而有利于机器人的学习。然而，在图像等高维观察空间的无约束环境中学习世界模型具有挑战性。困难的来源之一是存在不相关但难以建模的背景干扰，以及与任务相关的实体的不重要的视觉细节。我们通过学习循环潜在动力学模型来解决这个问题，该模型可以对比地预测下一个观察结果。即使同时存在相机、背景和颜色干扰，这个简单的模型也能实现令人惊讶的强大机器人控制。我们优于诸如互模拟方法之类的替代方法，这些方法强加了源自未来奖励或未来最优行动的差异的状态相似性度量。我们在 Distracting Control Suite 上获得了最先进的结果，这是基于像素的机器人控制的一个具有挑战性的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比循环状态空间模型的方法，通过建模高维观测中的关键信息，实现鲁棒的像素级机器人控制。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理高维图像观测时易受背景干扰和无关视觉细节影响，导致机器人控制不稳定。
AI.method: 设计对比循环潜动力学模型，通过对比预测下一帧观测，过滤无关信息并增强对任务相关状态的建模能力。
AI.result: 在Distracting Control Suite基准测试中显著优于现有方法，实现像素级控制的最先进效果。
AI.conclusion: 对比循环状态空间模型能有效应对视觉干扰，为复杂环境下的机器人控制提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比循环状态空间模型的方法，通过建模高维观测中的关键信息，实现鲁棒的像素级机器人控制。

authors_text: Youjian Zhang,Chaoyue Wang,Dacheng Tao
title: Video Frame Interpolation without Temporal Priors
title_zh: 无时间先验的视频帧插值
comment: Accepted by Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2020
comments: Accepted by Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2020
abstract: Video frame interpolation, which aims to synthesize non-exist intermediate frames in a video sequence, is an important research topic in computer vision. Existing video frame interpolation methods have achieved remarkable results under specific assumptions, such as instant or known exposure time. However, in complicated real-world situations, the temporal priors of videos, i.e. frames per second (FPS) and frame exposure time, may vary from different camera sensors. When test videos are taken under different exposure settings from training ones, the interpolated frames will suffer significant misalignment problems. In this work, we solve the video frame interpolation problem in a general situation, where input frames can be acquired under uncertain exposure (and interval) time. Unlike previous methods that can only be applied to a specific temporal prior, we derive a general curvilinear motion trajectory formula from four consecutive sharp frames or two consecutive blurry frames without temporal priors. Moreover, utilizing constraints within adjacent motion trajectories, we devise a novel optical flow refinement strategy for better interpolation results. Finally, experiments demonstrate that one well-trained model is enough for synthesizing high-quality slow-motion videos under complicated real-world situations. Codes are available on https://github.com/yjzhang96/UTI-VFI.
summary: Video frame interpolation, which aims to synthesize non-exist intermediate frames in a video sequence, is an important research topic in computer vision. Existing video frame interpolation methods have achieved remarkable results under specific assumptions, such as instant or known exposure time. However, in complicated real-world situations, the temporal priors of videos, i.e. frames per second (FPS) and frame exposure time, may vary from different camera sensors. When test videos are taken under different exposure settings from training ones, the interpolated frames will suffer significant misalignment problems. In this work, we solve the video frame interpolation problem in a general situation, where input frames can be acquired under uncertain exposure (and interval) time. Unlike previous methods that can only be applied to a specific temporal prior, we derive a general curvilinear motion trajectory formula from four consecutive sharp frames or two consecutive blurry frames without temporal priors. Moreover, utilizing constraints within adjacent motion trajectories, we devise a novel optical flow refinement strategy for better interpolation results. Finally, experiments demonstrate that one well-trained model is enough for synthesizing high-quality slow-motion videos under complicated real-world situations. Codes are available on https://github.com/yjzhang96/UTI-VFI.
abstract_zh: 视频帧插值旨在合成视频序列中不存在的中间帧，是计算机视觉中的一个重要研究课题。现有的视频帧插值方法在特定假设（例如即时或已知曝光时间）下取得了显着的结果。然而，在复杂的现实情况下，视频的时间先验，即每秒帧数 (FPS) 和帧曝光时间，可能因不同的相机传感器而异。当测试视频在与训练视频不同的曝光设置下拍摄时，插值帧将遭受严重的未对准问题。在这项工作中，我们解决了一般情况下的视频帧插值问题，其中可以在不确定的曝光（和间隔）时间下获取输入帧。与之前只能应用于特定时间先验的方法不同，我们从四个连续的清晰帧或两个连续的模糊帧（没有时间先验）推导出通用的曲线运动轨迹公式。此外，利用相邻运动轨迹内的约束，我们设计了一种新颖的光流细化策略，以获得更好的插值结果。最后，实验证明，一个训练有素的模型足以在复杂的现实情况下合成高质量的慢动作视频。代码可在 https://github.com/yjzhang96/UTI-VFI 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需时间先验信息的视频帧插值方法，解决复杂真实场景下因曝光设置不同导致的帧对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频帧插值方法依赖特定时间先验（如固定帧率或曝光时间），但在实际应用中相机参数变化会导致插值帧严重错位，需开发通用解决方案。
AI.method: 通过四张清晰帧或两张模糊帧推导通用曲线运动轨迹公式，并利用相邻运动轨迹约束设计光流优化策略，实现无时间先验的插值。
AI.result: 训练一个模型即可在复杂真实场景下生成高质量慢动作视频，代码已开源验证效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统时间先验限制，为实际应用中动态变化的视频插值提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Wenjie Wang,Fuli Feng,Xiangnan He,Liqiang Nie,Tat-Seng Chua
title: Learning Robust Recommender from Noisy Implicit Feedback
title_zh: 从嘈杂的隐式反馈中学习鲁棒推荐器
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2006.04153
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2006.04153
abstract: The ubiquity of implicit feedback makes it indispensable for building recommender systems. However, it does not actually reflect the actual satisfaction of users. For example, in E-commerce, a large portion of clicks do not translate to purchases, and many purchases end up with negative reviews. As such, it is of importance to account for the inevitable noises in implicit feedback. However, little work on recommendation has taken the noisy nature of implicit feedback into consideration. In this work, we explore the central theme of denoising implicit feedback for recommender learning, including training and inference. By observing the process of normal recommender training, we find that noisy feedback typically has large loss values in the early stages. Inspired by this observation, we propose a new training strategy named Adaptive Denoising Training (ADT), which adaptively prunes the noisy interactions by two paradigms (i.e., Truncated Loss and Reweighted Loss). Furthermore, we consider extra feedback (e.g., rating) as auxiliary signal and propose three strategies to incorporate extra feedback into ADT: finetuning, warm-up training, and colliding inference. We instantiate the two paradigms on the widely used binary cross-entropy loss and test them on three representative recommender models. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate that ADT significantly improves the quality of recommendation over normal training without using extra feedback. Besides, the proposed three strategies for using extra feedback largely enhance the denoising ability of ADT.
summary: The ubiquity of implicit feedback makes it indispensable for building recommender systems. However, it does not actually reflect the actual satisfaction of users. For example, in E-commerce, a large portion of clicks do not translate to purchases, and many purchases end up with negative reviews. As such, it is of importance to account for the inevitable noises in implicit feedback. However, little work on recommendation has taken the noisy nature of implicit feedback into consideration. In this work, we explore the central theme of denoising implicit feedback for recommender learning, including training and inference. By observing the process of normal recommender training, we find that noisy feedback typically has large loss values in the early stages. Inspired by this observation, we propose a new training strategy named Adaptive Denoising Training (ADT), which adaptively prunes the noisy interactions by two paradigms (i.e., Truncated Loss and Reweighted Loss). Furthermore, we consider extra feedback (e.g., rating) as auxiliary signal and propose three strategies to incorporate extra feedback into ADT: finetuning, warm-up training, and colliding inference. We instantiate the two paradigms on the widely used binary cross-entropy loss and test them on three representative recommender models. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate that ADT significantly improves the quality of recommendation over normal training without using extra feedback. Besides, the proposed three strategies for using extra feedback largely enhance the denoising ability of ADT.
abstract_zh: 隐式反馈的普遍存在使得它对于构建推荐系统不可或缺。但实际上并不能反映用户的实际满意度。例如，在电子商务中，很大一部分点击不会转化为购买，并且许多购买最终都会得到负面评论。因此，考虑隐式反馈中不可避免的噪音非常重要。然而，很少有关于推荐的工作考虑到隐式反馈的噪声性质。在这项工作中，我们探讨了推荐学习的隐式反馈去噪的中心主题，包括训练和推理。通过观察正常推荐训练的过程，我们发现噪声反馈通常在早期阶段具有较大的损失值。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一种名为自适应去噪训练（ADT）的新训练策略，它通过两种范式（即截断损失和重新加权损失）自适应地修剪噪声交互。此外，我们将额外反馈（例如评分）视为辅助信号，并提出了三种将额外反馈纳入 ADT 的策略：微调、热身训练和碰撞推理。我们在广泛使用的二元交叉熵损失上实例化了这两种范式，并在三个代表性推荐模型上对其进行了测试。对三个基准的广泛实验表明，ADT 在不使用额外反馈的情况下，比正常训练显着提高了推荐质量。此外，提出的三种使用额外反馈的策略很大程度上增强了 ADT 的去噪能力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从存在噪声的隐式反馈中学习鲁棒的推荐系统，提出自适应去噪训练方法（ADT）以提升推荐质量。
AI.motivation: 隐式反馈（如点击、购买）无法准确反映用户真实满意度，噪声数据会影响推荐效果，但现有研究对此关注不足。
AI.method: 提出ADT方法，通过截断损失和重新加权损失两种范式过滤噪声，并结合额外反馈（如评分）的微调、预热训练和碰撞推理策略增强去噪能力。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，ADT在不使用额外反馈时显著优于常规训练，结合额外反馈的策略进一步提升了推荐效果。
AI.conclusion: ADT有效应对隐式反馈噪声问题，提升推荐系统鲁棒性，且额外反馈策略能进一步增强去噪能力。

authors_text: Thibault Simonetto,Salijona Dyrmishi,Salah Ghamizi,Maxime Cordy,Yves Le Traon
title: A Unified Framework for Adversarial Attack and Defense in Constrained Feature Space
title_zh: 受限特征空间中对抗性攻防的统一框架
abstract: The generation of feasible adversarial examples is necessary for properly assessing models that work in constrained feature space. However, it remains a challenging task to enforce constraints into attacks that were designed for computer vision. We propose a unified framework to generate feasible adversarial examples that satisfy given domain constraints. Our framework can handle both linear and non-linear constraints. We instantiate our framework into two algorithms: a gradient-based attack that introduces constraints in the loss function to maximize, and a multi-objective search algorithm that aims for misclassification, perturbation minimization, and constraint satisfaction. We show that our approach is effective in four different domains, with a success rate of up to 100%, where state-of-the-art attacks fail to generate a single feasible example. In addition to adversarial retraining, we propose to introduce engineered non-convex constraints to improve model adversarial robustness. We demonstrate that this new defense is as effective as adversarial retraining. Our framework forms the starting point for research on constrained adversarial attacks and provides relevant baselines and datasets that future research can exploit.
summary: The generation of feasible adversarial examples is necessary for properly assessing models that work in constrained feature space. However, it remains a challenging task to enforce constraints into attacks that were designed for computer vision. We propose a unified framework to generate feasible adversarial examples that satisfy given domain constraints. Our framework can handle both linear and non-linear constraints. We instantiate our framework into two algorithms: a gradient-based attack that introduces constraints in the loss function to maximize, and a multi-objective search algorithm that aims for misclassification, perturbation minimization, and constraint satisfaction. We show that our approach is effective in four different domains, with a success rate of up to 100%, where state-of-the-art attacks fail to generate a single feasible example. In addition to adversarial retraining, we propose to introduce engineered non-convex constraints to improve model adversarial robustness. We demonstrate that this new defense is as effective as adversarial retraining. Our framework forms the starting point for research on constrained adversarial attacks and provides relevant baselines and datasets that future research can exploit.
abstract_zh: 生成可行的对抗性示例对于正确评估在受限特征空间中工作的模型是必要的。然而，对针对计算机视觉设计的攻击实施限制仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。我们提出了一个统一的框架来生成满足给定领域约束的可行的对抗性示例。我们的框架可以处理线性和非线性约束。我们将我们的框架实例化为两种算法：基于梯度的攻击，在损失函数中引入约束以最大化，以及多目标搜索算法，旨在错误分类、扰动最小化和约束满足。我们证明，我们的方法在四个不同的领域是有效的，成功率高达 100%，其中最先进的攻击无法生成单个可行的示例。除了对抗性再训练之外，我们建议引入工程非凸约束来提高模型对抗性鲁棒性。我们证明这种新的防御与对抗性再训练一样有效。我们的框架构成了受限对抗性攻击研究的起点，并提供了未来研究可以利用的相关基线和数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一框架，在受限特征空间中生成满足域约束的对抗样本，并设计防御方法提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法难以有效处理受限特征空间的约束条件，导致无法生成可行对抗样本，需设计兼顾约束的攻击与防御方案。
AI.method: 构建统一框架处理线性/非线性约束，包含基于梯度的约束损失函数攻击算法和多目标搜索算法；防御方面引入工程化非凸约束增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在四个领域实现100%对抗成功率（现有方法失败），防御方法效果与对抗重训练相当，提供基准数据集推动后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 框架为受限空间对抗攻击防御研究奠定基础，通过约束整合与多目标优化实现攻击有效性与防御鲁棒性的突破。

search_text: A Unified Framework for Adversarial Attack and Defense in Constrained Feature Space 受限特征空间中对抗性攻防的统一框架 The generation of feasible adversarial examples is necessary for properly assessing models that work in constrained feature space. However, it remains a challenging task to enforce constraints into attacks that were designed for computer vision. We propose a unified framework to generate feasible adversarial examples that satisfy given domain constraints. Our framework can handle both linear and non-linear constraints. We instantiate our framework into two algorithms: a gradient-based attack that introduces constraints in the loss function to maximize, and a multi-objective search algorithm that aims for misclassification, perturbation minimization, and constraint satisfaction. We show that our approach is effective in four different domains, with a success rate of up to 100%, where state-of-the-art attacks fail to generate a single feasible example. In addition to adversarial retraining, we propose to introduce engineered non-convex constraints to improve model adversarial robustness. We demonstrate that this new defense is as effective as adversarial retraining. Our framework forms the starting point for research on constrained adversarial attacks and provides relevant baselines and datasets that future research can exploit. 生成可行的对抗性示例对于正确评估在受限特征空间中工作的模型是必要的。然而，对针对计算机视觉设计的攻击实施限制仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。我们提出了一个统一的框架来生成满足给定领域约束的可行的对抗性示例。我们的框架可以处理线性和非线性约束。我们将我们的框架实例化为两种算法：基于梯度的攻击，在损失函数中引入约束以最大化，以及多目标搜索算法，旨在错误分类、扰动最小化和约束满足。我们证明，我们的方法在四个不同的领域是有效的，成功率高达 100%，其中最先进的攻击无法生成单个可行的示例。除了对抗性再训练之外，我们建议引入工程非凸约束来提高模型对抗性鲁棒性。我们证明这种新的防御与对抗性再训练一样有效。我们的框架构成了受限对抗性攻击研究的起点，并提供了未来研究可以利用的相关基线和数据集。 本文提出一个统一框架，在受限特征空间中生成满足域约束的对抗样本，并设计防御方法提升模型鲁棒性。 Thibault Simonetto,Salijona Dyrmishi,Salah Ghamizi,Maxime Cordy,Yves Le Traon cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Junghun Oh,Heewon Kim,Sungyong Baik,Cheeun Hong,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: Batch Normalization Tells You Which Filter is Important
title_zh: 批量归一化告诉您哪个过滤器很重要
abstract: The goal of filter pruning is to search for unimportant filters to remove in order to make convolutional neural networks (CNNs) efficient without sacrificing the performance in the process. The challenge lies in finding information that can help determine how important or relevant each filter is with respect to the final output of neural networks. In this work, we share our observation that the batch normalization (BN) parameters of pre-trained CNNs can be used to estimate the feature distribution of activation outputs, without processing of training data. Upon observation, we propose a simple yet effective filter pruning method by evaluating the importance of each filter based on the BN parameters of pre-trained CNNs. The experimental results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet demonstrate that the proposed method can achieve outstanding performance with and without fine-tuning in terms of the trade-off between the accuracy drop and the reduction in computational complexity and number of parameters of pruned networks.
summary: The goal of filter pruning is to search for unimportant filters to remove in order to make convolutional neural networks (CNNs) efficient without sacrificing the performance in the process. The challenge lies in finding information that can help determine how important or relevant each filter is with respect to the final output of neural networks. In this work, we share our observation that the batch normalization (BN) parameters of pre-trained CNNs can be used to estimate the feature distribution of activation outputs, without processing of training data. Upon observation, we propose a simple yet effective filter pruning method by evaluating the importance of each filter based on the BN parameters of pre-trained CNNs. The experimental results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet demonstrate that the proposed method can achieve outstanding performance with and without fine-tuning in terms of the trade-off between the accuracy drop and the reduction in computational complexity and number of parameters of pruned networks.
abstract_zh: 过滤器剪枝的目标是搜索不重要的过滤器并删除，以使卷积神经网络 (CNN) 高效，同时又不牺牲该过程的性能。挑战在于找到可以帮助确定每个过滤器对于神经网络最终输出的重要性或相关性的信息。在这项工作中，我们分享了我们的观察结果，即预训练 CNN 的批量归一化 (BN) 参数可用于估计激活输出的特征分布，而无需处理训练数据。经过观察，我们根据预训练 CNN 的 BN 参数评估每个滤波器的重要性，提出了一种简单而有效的滤波器剪枝方法。 CIFAR-10和ImageNet上的实验结果表明，在精度下降与计算复杂度和剪枝网络参数数量减少之间的权衡方面，无论是否进行微调，所提出的方法都可以获得出色的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练卷积神经网络中批归一化参数的滤波器剪枝方法，以提升模型效率。
AI.motivation: 滤波器剪枝需有效评估滤波器重要性，传统方法依赖训练数据或复杂计算，而批归一化参数可无需训练数据直接反映特征分布。
AI.method: 通过分析预训练模型的批归一化参数估计激活输出分布，基于此评估各滤波器重要性并进行剪枝。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上，该方法在保持模型性能的同时显著减少参数量和计算复杂度，且无需微调即可取得优异效果。
AI.conclusion: 利用批归一化参数可有效指导滤波器剪枝，提供了一种无需额外训练数据的简单高效模型压缩方案。

authors_text: Yu Feng,Benteng Ma,Jing Zhang,Shanshan Zhao,Yong Xia,Dacheng Tao
title: FIBA: Frequency-Injection based Backdoor Attack in Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: FIBA：医学图像分析中基于频率注入的后门攻击
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022
abstract: In recent years, the security of AI systems has drawn increasing research attention, especially in the medical imaging realm. To develop a secure medical image analysis (MIA) system, it is a must to study possible backdoor attacks (BAs), which can embed hidden malicious behaviors into the system. However, designing a unified BA method that can be applied to various MIA systems is challenging due to the diversity of imaging modalities (e.g., X-Ray, CT, and MRI) and analysis tasks (e.g., classification, detection, and segmentation). Most existing BA methods are designed to attack natural image classification models, which apply spatial triggers to training images and inevitably corrupt the semantics of poisoned pixels, leading to the failures of attacking dense prediction models. To address this issue, we propose a novel Frequency-Injection based Backdoor Attack method (FIBA) that is capable of delivering attacks in various MIA tasks. Specifically, FIBA leverages a trigger function in the frequency domain that can inject the low-frequency information of a trigger image into the poisoned image by linearly combining the spectral amplitude of both images. Since it preserves the semantics of the poisoned image pixels, FIBA can perform attacks on both classification and dense prediction models. Experiments on three benchmarks in MIA (i.e., ISIC-2019 for skin lesion classification, KiTS-19 for kidney tumor segmentation, and EAD-2019 for endoscopic artifact detection), validate the effectiveness of FIBA and its superiority over state-of-the-art methods in attacking MIA models as well as bypassing backdoor defense. Source code will be available at https://github.com/HazardFY/FIBA.
summary: In recent years, the security of AI systems has drawn increasing research attention, especially in the medical imaging realm. To develop a secure medical image analysis (MIA) system, it is a must to study possible backdoor attacks (BAs), which can embed hidden malicious behaviors into the system. However, designing a unified BA method that can be applied to various MIA systems is challenging due to the diversity of imaging modalities (e.g., X-Ray, CT, and MRI) and analysis tasks (e.g., classification, detection, and segmentation). Most existing BA methods are designed to attack natural image classification models, which apply spatial triggers to training images and inevitably corrupt the semantics of poisoned pixels, leading to the failures of attacking dense prediction models. To address this issue, we propose a novel Frequency-Injection based Backdoor Attack method (FIBA) that is capable of delivering attacks in various MIA tasks. Specifically, FIBA leverages a trigger function in the frequency domain that can inject the low-frequency information of a trigger image into the poisoned image by linearly combining the spectral amplitude of both images. Since it preserves the semantics of the poisoned image pixels, FIBA can perform attacks on both classification and dense prediction models. Experiments on three benchmarks in MIA (i.e., ISIC-2019 for skin lesion classification, KiTS-19 for kidney tumor segmentation, and EAD-2019 for endoscopic artifact detection), validate the effectiveness of FIBA and its superiority over state-of-the-art methods in attacking MIA models as well as bypassing backdoor defense. Source code will be available at https://github.com/HazardFY/FIBA.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能系统的安全性引起了越来越多的研究关注，特别是在医学成像领域。为了开发安全的医学图像分析（MIA）系统，必须研究可能的后门攻击（BA），它可以将隐藏的恶意行为嵌入到系统中。然而，由于成像模式（例如 X 射线、CT 和 MRI）和分析任务（例如分类、检测和分割）的多样性，设计可应用于各种 MIA 系统的统一 BA 方法具有挑战性。大多数现有的 BA 方法都是为了攻击自然图像分类模型而设计的，这些模型将空间触发应用于训练图像，不可避免地破坏了中毒像素的语义，导致攻击密集预测模型的失败。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于频率注入的后门攻击方法（FIBA），该方法能够在各种 MIA 任务中提供攻击。具体来说，FIBA 利用频域中的触发函数，通过线性组合两个图像的频谱幅度，将触发图像的低频信息注入到中毒图像中。由于它保留了中毒图像像素的语义，因此 FIBA​​ 可以对分类模型和密集预测模型进行攻击。在 MIA 的三个基准（即用于皮肤病变分类的 ISIC-2019、用于肾肿瘤分割的 KiTS-19 和用于内窥镜伪影检测的 EAD-2019）上进行的实验验证了 FIBA​​ 的有效性及其在攻击 MIA 模型以及绕过后门防御方面相对于最先进方法的优越性。源代码可在 https://github.com/HazardFY/FIBA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频率注入的后门攻击方法（FIBA），用于针对医疗图像分析系统的安全威胁研究，能够有效攻击多种医学影像任务。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击方法多针对自然图像分类模型，通过空间触发器破坏图像语义，难以适用于医疗图像分析中的密集预测模型（如分割任务），且缺乏跨模态和跨任务的统一攻击方法。
AI.method: FIBA在频域中设计触发函数，通过线性组合触发图像与中毒图像的频谱幅度，注入低频信息，从而在不破坏图像语义的前提下实现对分类和密集预测模型的攻击。
AI.result: 在三个医学影像基准数据集（ISIC-2019、KiTS-19、EAD-2019）上的实验验证了FIBA的有效性，其攻击成功率优于现有方法，并能有效绕过后门防御机制。
AI.conclusion: FIBA通过频域注入策略解决了传统方法在医疗图像分析中的语义破坏问题，为跨模态、跨任务的后门攻击提供了统一解决方案，提升了医疗AI系统的安全性研究价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频率注入的后门攻击方法（FIBA），用于针对医疗图像分析系统的安全威胁研究，能够有效攻击多种医学影像任务。

search_text: FIBA: Frequency-Injection based Backdoor Attack in Medical Image Analysis FIBA：医学图像分析中基于频率注入的后门攻击 In recent years, the security of AI systems has drawn increasing research attention, especially in the medical imaging realm. To develop a secure medical image analysis (MIA) system, it is a must to study possible backdoor attacks (BAs), which can embed hidden malicious behaviors into the system. However, designing a unified BA method that can be applied to various MIA systems is challenging due to the diversity of imaging modalities (e.g., X-Ray, CT, and MRI) and analysis tasks (e.g., classification, detection, and segmentation). Most existing BA methods are designed to attack natural image classification models, which apply spatial triggers to training images and inevitably corrupt the semantics of poisoned pixels, leading to the failures of attacking dense prediction models. To address this issue, we propose a novel Frequency-Injection based Backdoor Attack method (FIBA) that is capable of delivering attacks in various MIA tasks. Specifically, FIBA leverages a trigger function in the frequency domain that can inject the low-frequency information of a trigger image into the poisoned image by linearly combining the spectral amplitude of both images. Since it preserves the semantics of the poisoned image pixels, FIBA can perform attacks on both classification and dense prediction models. Experiments on three benchmarks in MIA (i.e., ISIC-2019 for skin lesion classification, KiTS-19 for kidney tumor segmentation, and EAD-2019 for endoscopic artifact detection), validate the effectiveness of FIBA and its superiority over state-of-the-art methods in attacking MIA models as well as bypassing backdoor defense. Source code will be available at https://github.com/HazardFY/FIBA. 近年来，人工智能系统的安全性引起了越来越多的研究关注，特别是在医学成像领域。为了开发安全的医学图像分析（MIA）系统，必须研究可能的后门攻击（BA），它可以将隐藏的恶意行为嵌入到系统中。然而，由于成像模式（例如 X 射线、CT 和 MRI）和分析任务（例如分类、检测和分割）的多样性，设计可应用于各种 MIA 系统的统一 BA 方法具有挑战性。大多数现有的 BA 方法都是为了攻击自然图像分类模型而设计的，这些模型将空间触发应用于训练图像，不可避免地破坏了中毒像素的语义，导致攻击密集预测模型的失败。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于频率注入的后门攻击方法（FIBA），该方法能够在各种 MIA 任务中提供攻击。具体来说，FIBA 利用频域中的触发函数，通过线性组合两个图像的频谱幅度，将触发图像的低频信息注入到中毒图像中。由于它保留了中毒图像像素的语义，因此 FIBA​​ 可以对分类模型和密集预测模型进行攻击。在 MIA 的三个基准（即用于皮肤病变分类的 ISIC-2019、用于肾肿瘤分割的 KiTS-19 和用于内窥镜伪影检测的 EAD-2019）上进行的实验验证了 FIBA​​ 的有效性及其在攻击 MIA 模型以及绕过后门防御方面相对于最先进方法的优越性。源代码可在 https://github.com/HazardFY/FIBA 获取。 本文提出了一种基于频率注入的后门攻击方法（FIBA），用于针对医疗图像分析系统的安全威胁研究，能够有效攻击多种医学影像任务。 Yu Feng,Benteng Ma,Jing Zhang,Shanshan Zhao,Yong Xia,Dacheng Tao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Fabio Catania,Micol Spitale,Franca Garzotto
title: Conversational Agents in Therapeutic Interventions for Neurodevelopmental Disorders: A Survey
title_zh: 神经发育障碍治疗干预中的对话代理：一项调查
abstract: Neurodevelopmental Disorders (NDD) are a group of conditions with onset in the developmental period characterized by deficits in the cognitive and social areas. Conversational agents have been increasingly explored to support therapeutic interventions for people with NDD. This survey provides a structured view of the crucial design features of these systems, the types of therapeutic goals they address, and the empirical methods adopted for their evaluation. From this analysis, we elaborate a set of recommendations and highlight the gaps left unsolved in the state of the art, upon which we ground a research agenda on conversational agents for NDD.
summary: Neurodevelopmental Disorders (NDD) are a group of conditions with onset in the developmental period characterized by deficits in the cognitive and social areas. Conversational agents have been increasingly explored to support therapeutic interventions for people with NDD. This survey provides a structured view of the crucial design features of these systems, the types of therapeutic goals they address, and the empirical methods adopted for their evaluation. From this analysis, we elaborate a set of recommendations and highlight the gaps left unsolved in the state of the art, upon which we ground a research agenda on conversational agents for NDD.
abstract_zh: 神经发育障碍 (NDD) 是一组在发育期发病的疾病，其特征是认知和社交领域的缺陷。人们越来越多地探索会话代理来支持 NDD 患者的治疗干预。这项调查提供了这些系统的关键设计特征、它们所解决的治疗目标类型以及评估所采用的经验方法的结构化视图。根据这一分析，我们详细阐述了一系列建议，并强调了现有技术中尚未解决的空白，在此基础上我们制定了 NDD 会话代理的研究议程。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了对话代理在神经发育障碍治疗干预中的应用，分析其设计特点、治疗目标及评估方法，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 神经发育障碍患者需要有效的治疗支持，而对话代理在该领域应用逐渐增多，但缺乏系统性总结和评估，需明确设计要素与研究空白以推动进一步发展。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统分析现有对话代理在NDD治疗中的设计特征、目标类型及评估方法，总结共性与差异。
AI.result: 总结了对话代理的关键设计要素、适用治疗目标及评估方法，识别出当前研究在个性化、长期效果等方面存在的不足。
AI.conclusion: 提出优化对话代理设计的建议，强调需解决个性化干预和长期疗效验证等未决问题，为未来研究提供方向。

authors_text: Shaarad Ayyagari,Ambedkar Dukkipati
title: Risk-Aware Algorithms for Combinatorial Semi-Bandits
title_zh: 组合半老虎机的风险感知算法
abstract: In this paper, we study the stochastic combinatorial multi-armed bandit problem under semi-bandit feedback. While much work has been done on algorithms that optimize the expected reward for linear as well as some general reward functions, we study a variant of the problem, where the objective is to be risk-aware. More specifically, we consider the problem of maximizing the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR), a risk measure that takes into account only the worst-case rewards. We propose new algorithms that maximize the CVaR of the rewards obtained from the super arms of the combinatorial bandit for the two cases of Gaussian and bounded arm rewards. We further analyze these algorithms and provide regret bounds. We believe that our results provide the first theoretical insights into combinatorial semi-bandit problems in the risk-aware case.
summary: In this paper, we study the stochastic combinatorial multi-armed bandit problem under semi-bandit feedback. While much work has been done on algorithms that optimize the expected reward for linear as well as some general reward functions, we study a variant of the problem, where the objective is to be risk-aware. More specifically, we consider the problem of maximizing the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR), a risk measure that takes into account only the worst-case rewards. We propose new algorithms that maximize the CVaR of the rewards obtained from the super arms of the combinatorial bandit for the two cases of Gaussian and bounded arm rewards. We further analyze these algorithms and provide regret bounds. We believe that our results provide the first theoretical insights into combinatorial semi-bandit problems in the risk-aware case.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了半老虎机反馈下的随机组合多臂老虎机问题。虽然在优化线性和一些一般奖励函数的预期奖励的算法方面已经做了很多工作，但我们研究了该问题的一个变体，其目标是具有风险意识。更具体地说，我们考虑最大化条件风险价值（CVaR）的问题，这是一种仅考虑最坏情况回报的风险衡量标准。我们提出了新的算法，可以在高斯和有界臂奖励两种情况下最大化从组合老虎机的超级臂获得的奖励的 CVaR。我们进一步分析这些算法并提供遗憾界限。我们相信，我们的结果为风险意识情况下的组合半强盗问题提供了第一个理论见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在半带反馈下的随机组合多臂老虎机问题，提出风险感知算法以最大化条件风险价值（CVaR），并分析了两种奖励情况下的算法及遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 现有算法主要优化期望奖励，但风险感知（如CVaR）的研究不足，需针对最坏情况奖励设计新方法。
AI.method: 提出两种新算法分别处理高斯和有界臂奖励，通过分析其 regret bounds 实现 CVaR 最大化。
AI.result: 首次为组合半带问题的风险感知场景提供了理论分析，包括算法设计和 regret 上界证明。
AI.conclusion: 本研究填补了组合半带问题在风险感知领域的理论空白，为后续研究奠定基础。

We propose new algorithms that maximize the CVaR of the rewards obtained from the super arms of the combinatorial bandit for the two cases of Gaussian and bounded arm rewards. We further analyze these algorithms and provide regret bounds. We believe that our results provide the first theoretical insights into combinatorial semi-bandit problems in the risk-aware case. 在本文中，我们研究了半老虎机反馈下的随机组合多臂老虎机问题。虽然在优化线性和一些一般奖励函数的预期奖励的算法方面已经做了很多工作，但我们研究了该问题的一个变体，其目标是具有风险意识。更具体地说，我们考虑最大化条件风险价值（CVaR）的问题，这是一种仅考虑最坏情况回报的风险衡量标准。我们提出了新的算法，可以在高斯和有界臂奖励两种情况下最大化从组合老虎机的超级臂获得的奖励的 CVaR。我们进一步分析这些算法并提供遗憾界限。我们相信，我们的结果为风险意识情况下的组合半强盗问题提供了第一个理论见解。 本文研究了在半带反馈下的随机组合多臂老虎机问题，提出风险感知算法以最大化条件风险价值（CVaR），并分析了两种奖励情况下的算法及遗憾界。 Shaarad Ayyagari,Ambedkar Dukkipati cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Dieuwertje Alblas,Christoph Brune,Jelmer M. Wolterink
title: Deep Learning-Based Carotid Artery Vessel Wall Segmentation in Black-Blood MRI Using Anatomical Priors
title_zh: 使用解剖先验在黑血 MRI 中进行基于深度学习的颈动脉血管壁分割
comment: SPIE Medical Imaging 2022
comments: SPIE Medical Imaging 2022
abstract: Carotid artery vessel wall thickness measurement is an essential step in the monitoring of patients with atherosclerosis. This requires accurate segmentation of the vessel wall, i.e., the region between an artery's lumen and outer wall, in black-blood magnetic resonance (MR) images. Commonly used convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for semantic segmentation are suboptimal for this task as their use does not guarantee a contiguous ring-shaped segmentation. Instead, in this work, we cast vessel wall segmentation as a multi-task regression problem in a polar coordinate system. For each carotid artery in each axial image slice, we aim to simultaneously find two non-intersecting nested contours that together delineate the vessel wall. CNNs applied to this problem enable an inductive bias that guarantees ring-shaped vessel walls. Moreover, we identify a problem-specific training data augmentation technique that substantially affects segmentation performance. We apply our method to segmentation of the internal and external carotid artery wall, and achieve top-ranking quantitative results in a public challenge, i.e., a median Dice similarity coefficient of 0.813 for the vessel wall and median Hausdorff distances of 0.552 mm and 0.776 mm for lumen and outer wall, respectively. Moreover, we show how the method improves over a conventional semantic segmentation approach. These results show that it is feasible to automatically obtain anatomically plausible segmentations of the carotid vessel wall with high accuracy.

This requires accurate segmentation of the vessel wall, i.e., the region between an artery's lumen and outer wall, in black-blood magnetic resonance (MR) images. Instead, in this work, we cast vessel wall segmentation as a multi-task regression problem in a polar coordinate system. For each carotid artery in each axial image slice, we aim to simultaneously find two non-intersecting nested contours that together delineate the vessel wall. CNNs applied to this problem enable an inductive bias that guarantees ring-shaped vessel walls. Moreover, we identify a problem-specific training data augmentation technique that substantially affects segmentation performance. We apply our method to segmentation of the internal and external carotid artery wall, and achieve top-ranking quantitative results in a public challenge, i.e., a median Dice similarity coefficient of 0.813 for the vessel wall and median Hausdorff distances of 0.552 mm and 0.776 mm for lumen and outer wall, respectively. Moreover, we show how the method improves over a conventional semantic segmentation approach. These results show that it is feasible to automatically obtain anatomically plausible segmentations of the carotid vessel wall with high accuracy.
abstract_zh: 颈动脉血管壁厚度测量是监测动脉粥样硬化患者的重要步骤。这需要在黑血磁共振 (MR) 图像中准确分割血管壁，即动脉管腔和外壁之间的区域。用于语义分割的常用卷积神经网络（CNN）对于该任务来说并不是最佳选择，因为它们的使用不能保证连续的环形分割。相反，在这项工作中，我们将血管壁分割视为极坐标系中的多任务回归问题。对于每个轴向图像切片中的每个颈动脉，我们的目标是同时找到两个不相交的嵌套轮廓，它们一起描绘血管壁。应用于此问题的 CNN 可实现感应偏置，从而保证环形血管壁。此外，我们还确定了一种针对具体问题的训练数据增强技术，该技术会极大地影响分割性能。我们将我们的方法应用于颈内动脉和颈外动脉壁的分割，并在公开挑战中取得了一流的定量结果，即血管壁的中位 Dice 相似系数为 0.813，管腔和外壁的中位 Hausdorff 距离分别为 0.552 毫米和 0.776 毫米。此外，我们还展示了该方法如何优于传统的语义分割方法。这些结果表明，以高精度自动获得颈动脉血管壁的解剖学上合理的分割是可行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的颈动脉血管壁分割方法，利用解剖学先验知识在黑血MRI中实现精确分割。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在分割颈动脉血管壁时难以保证连续环形结构，影响动脉粥样硬化患者的监测准确性。
AI.method: 将血管壁分割转化为极坐标系下的多任务回归问题，通过同时预测两个非交叠嵌套轮廓实现环形分割，并设计特定数据增强技术。
AI.result: 在公开挑战中取得最优结果：血管壁Dice系数中位数0.813，管腔与外壁霍夫距离中位数分别为0.552mm和0.776mm。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了利用解剖先验知识实现高精度颈动脉血管壁自动分割的可行性。

authors_text: Jun Cen,Peng Yun,Junhao Cai,Michael Yu Wang,Ming Liu
title: Open-set 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 开集 3D 物体检测
comment: Received by 3DV 2021
comments: Received by 3DV 2021
abstract: 3D object detection has been wildly studied in recent years, especially for robot perception systems. However, existing 3D object detection is under a closed-set condition, meaning that the network can only output boxes of trained classes. Unfortunately, this closed-set condition is not robust enough for practical use, as it will identify unknown objects as known by mistake. Therefore, in this paper, we propose an open-set 3D object detector, which aims to (1) identify known objects, like the closed-set detection, and (2) identify unknown objects and give their accurate bounding boxes. Specifically, we divide the open-set 3D object detection problem into two steps: (1) finding out the regions containing the unknown objects with high probability and (2) enclosing the points of these regions with proper bounding boxes. The first step is solved by the finding that unknown objects are often classified as known objects with low confidence, and we show that the Euclidean distance sum based on metric learning is a better confidence score than the naive softmax probability to differentiate unknown objects from known objects. On this basis, unsupervised clustering is used to refine the bounding boxes of unknown objects. The proposed method combining metric learning and unsupervised clustering is called the MLUC network. Our experiments show that our MLUC network achieves state-of-the-art performance and can identify both known and unknown objects as expected.
summary: 3D object detection has been wildly studied in recent years, especially for robot perception systems. However, existing 3D object detection is under a closed-set condition, meaning that the network can only output boxes of trained classes. Unfortunately, this closed-set condition is not robust enough for practical use, as it will identify unknown objects as known by mistake. Therefore, in this paper, we propose an open-set 3D object detector, which aims to (1) identify known objects, like the closed-set detection, and (2) identify unknown objects and give their accurate bounding boxes. Specifically, we divide the open-set 3D object detection problem into two steps: (1) finding out the regions containing the unknown objects with high probability and (2) enclosing the points of these regions with proper bounding boxes. The first step is solved by the finding that unknown objects are often classified as known objects with low confidence, and we show that the Euclidean distance sum based on metric learning is a better confidence score than the naive softmax probability to differentiate unknown objects from known objects. On this basis, unsupervised clustering is used to refine the bounding boxes of unknown objects. The proposed method combining metric learning and unsupervised clustering is called the MLUC network. Our experiments show that our MLUC network achieves state-of-the-art performance and can identify both known and unknown objects as expected.
abstract_zh: 近年来，3D 物体检测得到了广泛的研究，特别是对于机器人感知系统。然而，现有的 3D 物体检测是在闭集条件下进行的，这意味着网络只能输出经过训练的类的框。不幸的是，这种闭集条件对于实际应用来说不够稳健，因为它会将未知对象识别为错误已知的对象。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种开放集 3D 对象检测器，其目的是（1）识别已知对象，如闭集检测，以及（2）识别未知对象并给出其准确的边界框。具体来说，我们将开放集 3D 对象检测问题分为两个步骤：（1）找出高概率包含未知对象的区域；（2）用适当的边界框包围这些区域的点。第一步是通过发现未知对象通常被分类为低置信度的已知对象来解决的，并且我们证明基于度量学习的欧几里得距离和是比朴素 softmax 概率更好的置信度得分，可以区分未知对象和已知对象。在此基础上，采用无监督聚类来细化未知对象的边界框。所提出的结合度量学习和无监督聚类的方法称为 MLUC 网络。我们的实验表明，我们的 MLUC 网络实现了最先进的性能，并且可以按预期识别已知和未知物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种开放集3D目标检测方法，能够同时识别已知和未知对象。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D目标检测方法在封闭集条件下运行，无法有效识别未知对象，这在实际应用中存在较大风险。
AI.method: 本文将开放集3D目标检测分为两个步骤：首先通过度量学习计算欧几里得距离和，以区分已知和未知对象；然后使用无监督聚类优化未知对象的边界框。该方法称为MLUC网络。
AI.result: 实验表明，MLUC网络在识别已知和未知对象方面均取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的MLUC网络有效解决了开放集3D目标检测问题，为实际应用提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。
