authors_text: Matti Henning,Johannes Müller,Fabian Gies,Michael Buchholz,Klaus Dietmayer
title: Situation-Aware Environment Perception Using a Multi-Layer Attention Map
title_zh: 使用多层注意力图进行情境感知环境感知
comment: Update 1: Removed minor typos, corrected FKZ. Update 2: Extension of Section III-E. Rewording in some sections to improve clarity. Added IEEE Copyright Notice
comments: Update 1: Removed minor typos, corrected FKZ. Update 2: Extension of Section III-E. Rewording in some sections to improve clarity. Added IEEE Copyright Notice
abstract: Within the field of automated driving, a clear trend in environment perception tends towards more sensors, higher redundancy, and overall increase in computational power. This is mainly driven by the paradigm to perceive the entire environment as best as possible at all times. However, due to the ongoing rise in functional complexity, compromises have to be considered to ensure real-time capabilities of the perception system. In this work, we introduce a concept for situation-aware environment perception to control the resource allocation towards processing relevant areas within the data as well as towards employing only a subset of functional modules for environment perception, if sufficient for the current driving task. Specifically, we propose to evaluate the context of an automated vehicle to derive a multi-layer attention map (MLAM) that defines relevant areas. Using this MLAM, the optimum of active functional modules is dynamically configured and intra-module processing of only relevant data is enforced. We outline the feasibility of application of our concept using real-world data in a straight-forward implementation for our system at hand. While retaining overall functionality, we achieve a reduction of accumulated processing time of 59%.
summary: Within the field of automated driving, a clear trend in environment perception tends towards more sensors, higher redundancy, and overall increase in computational power. This is mainly driven by the paradigm to perceive the entire environment as best as possible at all times. However, due to the ongoing rise in functional complexity, compromises have to be considered to ensure real-time capabilities of the perception system. In this work, we introduce a concept for situation-aware environment perception to control the resource allocation towards processing relevant areas within the data as well as towards employing only a subset of functional modules for environment perception, if sufficient for the current driving task. Specifically, we propose to evaluate the context of an automated vehicle to derive a multi-layer attention map (MLAM) that defines relevant areas. Using this MLAM, the optimum of active functional modules is dynamically configured and intra-module processing of only relevant data is enforced. We outline the feasibility of application of our concept using real-world data in a straight-forward implementation for our system at hand. While retaining overall functionality, we achieve a reduction of accumulated processing time of 59%.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶领域，环境感知的一个明显趋势是更多的传感器、更高的冗余度和计算能力的整体提高。这主要是由始终尽可能最好地感知整个环境的范式驱动的。然而，由于功能复杂性不断增加，必须考虑妥协以确保感知系统的实时能力。在这项工作中，我们引入了情境感知环境感知的概念，以控制资源分配以处理数据中的相关区域，以及仅采用功能模块的子集进行环境感知（如果足以满足当前的驾驶任务）。具体来说，我们建议评估自动驾驶汽车的环境，以导出定义相关区域的多层注意力图（MLAM）。使用此 MLAM，可以动态配置活动功能模块的最佳值，并且仅强制执行相关数据的模块内处理。我们概述了使用真实世界数据直接实施我们现有系统的概念的可行性。在保留整体功能的同时，我们将累计处理时间减少了 59%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于多层注意力图的态势感知环境感知方法，通过动态资源分配和模块优化提升自动驾驶系统的实时性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶环境感知系统在功能复杂度提升时难以兼顾全面感知与实时性，需优化资源分配策略。
AI.method: 通过多层注意力图（MLAM）识别关键区域，动态调整功能模块配置，仅处理相关数据以优化计算资源。
AI.result: 在保留系统整体功能的前提下，实现累计处理时间减少59%。
AI.conclusion: 多层注意力图方法有效平衡环境感知功能与计算效率，为自动驾驶系统提供了一种可行的实时性优化方案。

authors_text: Jack Stelling,Amir Atapour-Abarghouei
title: "Just Drive": Colour Bias Mitigation for Semantic Segmentation in the Context of Urban Driving
title_zh: “Just Drive”：城市驾驶背景下语义分割的颜色偏差缓解
comment: 2021 IEEE International Conference on Big Data (IEEE BigData 2021)
comments: 2021 IEEE International Conference on Big Data (IEEE BigData 2021)
abstract: Biases can filter into AI technology without our knowledge. Oftentimes, seminal deep learning networks champion increased accuracy above all else. In this paper, we attempt to alleviate biases encountered by semantic segmentation models in urban driving scenes, via an iteratively trained unlearning algorithm. Convolutional neural networks have been shown to rely on colour and texture rather than geometry. This raises issues when safety-critical applications, such as self-driving cars, encounter images with covariate shift at test time - induced by variations such as lighting changes or seasonality. Conceptual proof of bias unlearning has been shown on simple datasets such as MNIST. However, the strategy has never been applied to the safety-critical domain of pixel-wise semantic segmentation of highly variable training data - such as urban scenes. Trained models for both the baseline and bias unlearning scheme have been tested for performance on colour-manipulated validation sets showing a disparity of up to 85.50% in mIoU from the original RGB images - confirming segmentation networks strongly depend on the colour information in the training data to make their classification. The bias unlearning scheme shows improvements of handling this covariate shift of up to 61% in the best observed case - and performs consistently better at classifying the "human" and "vehicle" classes compared to the baseline model.
summary: Biases can filter into AI technology without our knowledge. Oftentimes, seminal deep learning networks champion increased accuracy above all else. In this paper, we attempt to alleviate biases encountered by semantic segmentation models in urban driving scenes, via an iteratively trained unlearning algorithm. Convolutional neural networks have been shown to rely on colour and texture rather than geometry. This raises issues when safety-critical applications, such as self-driving cars, encounter images with covariate shift at test time - induced by variations such as lighting changes or seasonality. Conceptual proof of bias unlearning has been shown on simple datasets such as MNIST. However, the strategy has never been applied to the safety-critical domain of pixel-wise semantic segmentation of highly variable training data - such as urban scenes. Trained models for both the baseline and bias unlearning scheme have been tested for performance on colour-manipulated validation sets showing a disparity of up to 85.50% in mIoU from the original RGB images - confirming segmentation networks strongly depend on the colour information in the training data to make their classification. The bias unlearning scheme shows improvements of handling this covariate shift of up to 61% in the best observed case - and performs consistently better at classifying the "human" and "vehicle" classes compared to the baseline model.
abstract_zh: 偏见可能会在我们不知情的情况下渗透到人工智能技术中。通常，开创性的深度学习网络最重要的是提高准确性。在本文中，我们尝试通过迭代训练的取消学习算法来减轻城市驾驶场景中语义分割模型遇到的偏差。卷积神经网络已被证明依赖于颜色和纹理而不是几何形状。当自动驾驶汽车等安全关键型应用在测试时遇到由照明变化或季节性等变化引起的协变量变化的图像时，就会出现问题。偏差消除的概念证明已在 MNIST 等简单数据集上得到展示。然而，该策略从未应用于高度可变训练数据的像素级语义分割的安全关键领域——例如城市场景。基线和偏差消除学习方案的训练模型已经在颜色操作验证集上进行了性能测试，显示 mIoU 与原始 RGB 图像的差异高达 85.50% - 确认分割网络强烈依赖于训练数据中的颜色信息来进行分类。在最佳观察情况下，偏差消除方案在处理这种协变量偏移方面表现出高达 61% 的改进，并且与基线模型相比，在对“人类”和“车辆”类别进行分类方面始终表现得更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种迭代训练的去学习算法，用于缓解城市驾驶场景中语义分割模型的颜色偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割模型过度依赖颜色和纹理信息，导致在光照变化等协变量偏移场景下性能显著下降，影响自动驾驶等安全关键应用。
AI.method: 通过迭代训练的去学习算法，减少模型对颜色信息的依赖，提升对几何特征的识别能力。
AI.result: 在颜色篡改验证集上，模型mIoU差异达85.50%，而去学习方案在最佳情况下将协变量偏移影响降低61%，且在'人'和'车辆'分类上优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该去学习方案有效缓解了语义分割模型的颜色偏差问题，显著提升了模型在协变量偏移场景下的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Enrica Rossi,Marco Tognon,Ruggero Carli,Antonio Franchi,Luca Schenato
title: Control of over-redundant cooperative manipulation via sampled communication
title_zh: 通过采样通信控制过度冗余的协作操纵
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures
abstract: In this work we consider the problem of mobile robots that need to manipulate/transport an object via cables or robotic arms. We consider the scenario where the number of manipulating robots is redundant, i.e. a desired object configuration can be obtained by different configurations of the robots. The objective of this work is to show that communication can be used to implement cooperative local feedback controllers in the robots to improve disturbance rejection and reduce structural stress in the object. In particular we consider the realistic scenario where measurements are sampled and transmitted over wireless, and the sampling period is comparable with the system dynamics time constants. We first propose a kinematic model which is consistent with the overall systems dynamics under high-gain control and then we provide sufficient conditions for the exponential stability and monotonic decrease of the configuration error under different norms. Finally, we test the proposed controllers on the full dynamical systems showing the benefit of local communication.
summary: In this work we consider the problem of mobile robots that need to manipulate/transport an object via cables or robotic arms. We consider the scenario where the number of manipulating robots is redundant, i.e. a desired object configuration can be obtained by different configurations of the robots. The objective of this work is to show that communication can be used to implement cooperative local feedback controllers in the robots to improve disturbance rejection and reduce structural stress in the object. In particular we consider the realistic scenario where measurements are sampled and transmitted over wireless, and the sampling period is comparable with the system dynamics time constants. We first propose a kinematic model which is consistent with the overall systems dynamics under high-gain control and then we provide sufficient conditions for the exponential stability and monotonic decrease of the configuration error under different norms. Finally, we test the proposed controllers on the full dynamical systems showing the benefit of local communication.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们考虑需要通过电缆或机械臂操纵/运输物体的移动机器人的问题。我们考虑操纵机器人数量冗余的场景，即可以通过机器人的不同配置来获得所需的物体配置。这项工作的目的是表明通信可用于在机器人中实现协作本地反馈控制器，以改善干扰抑制并减少物体的结构应力。我们特别考虑了通过无线对测量进行采样和传输的现实场景，并且采样周期与系统动态时间常数相当。我们首先提出了一个与高增益控制下的整体系统动力学一致的运动学模型，然后为不同规范下配置误差的指数稳定性和单调递减提供了充分的条件。最后，我们在全动态系统上测试了所提出的控制器，显示了本地通信的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过采样通信控制冗余协作机械臂系统，以提升抗干扰能力和降低物体结构应力。
AI.motivation: 在多机器人协作搬运物体时，冗余机器人配置可能导致系统稳定性下降和结构应力集中，需通过通信优化控制策略。
AI.method: 提出高增益控制下的运动学模型，建立配置误差的指数稳定性条件，并基于采样通信设计局部反馈控制器。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提控制器在全动态系统中的有效性，证明局部通信可显著提升抗干扰性能并降低物体应力。
AI.conclusion: 采样通信辅助的局部反馈控制能有效解决冗余协作系统的稳定性与应力问题，为多机器人协同操作提供新方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了通过采样通信控制冗余协作机械臂系统，以提升抗干扰能力和降低物体结构应力。
ai_content.motivation: 在多机器人协作搬运物体时，冗余机器人配置可能导致系统稳定性下降和结构应力集中，需通过通信优化控制策略。
ai_content.method: 提出高增益控制下的运动学模型，建立配置误差的指数稳定性条件，并基于采样通信设计局部反馈控制器。
ai_content.result: 实验验证了所提控制器在全动态系统中的有效性，证明局部通信可显著提升抗干扰性能并降低物体应力。

search_text: Control of over-redundant cooperative manipulation via sampled communication 通过采样通信控制过度冗余的协作操纵 In this work we consider the problem of mobile robots that need to manipulate/transport an object via cables or robotic arms. We consider the scenario where the number of manipulating robots is redundant, i.e. a desired object configuration can be obtained by different configurations of the robots. The objective of this work is to show that communication can be used to implement cooperative local feedback controllers in the robots to improve disturbance rejection and reduce structural stress in the object. In particular we consider the realistic scenario where measurements are sampled and transmitted over wireless, and the sampling period is comparable with the system dynamics time constants. We first propose a kinematic model which is consistent with the overall systems dynamics under high-gain control and then we provide sufficient conditions for the exponential stability and monotonic decrease of the configuration error under different norms. Finally, we test the proposed controllers on the full dynamical systems showing the benefit of local communication. 在这项工作中，我们考虑需要通过电缆或机械臂操纵/运输物体的移动机器人的问题。我们考虑操纵机器人数量冗余的场景，即可以通过机器人的不同配置来获得所需的物体配置。这项工作的目的是表明通信可用于在机器人中实现协作本地反馈控制器，以改善干扰抑制并减少物体的结构应力。我们特别考虑了通过无线对测量进行采样和传输的现实场景，并且采样周期与系统动态时间常数相当。我们首先提出了一个与高增益控制下的整体系统动力学一致的运动学模型，然后为不同规范下配置误差的指数稳定性和单调递减提供了充分的条件。最后，我们在全动态系统上测试了所提出的控制器，显示了本地通信的好处。 本文研究了通过采样通信控制冗余协作机械臂系统，以提升抗干扰能力和降低物体结构应力。 Enrica Rossi,Marco Tognon,Ruggero Carli,Antonio Franchi,Luca Schenato cs.RO,cs.MA

authors_text: Surabhi Gupta,Ashwath Shetty,Avinash Sharma
title: Attention based Occlusion Removal for Hybrid Telepresence Systems
title_zh: 混合远程呈现系统中基于注意力的遮挡去除
abstract: Traditionally, video conferencing is a widely adopted solution for telecommunication, but a lack of immersiveness comes inherently due to the 2D nature of facial representation. The integration of Virtual Reality (VR) in a communication/telepresence system through Head Mounted Displays (HMDs) promises to provide users a much better immersive experience. However, HMDs cause hindrance by blocking the facial appearance and expressions of the user. To overcome these issues, we propose a novel attention-enabled encoder-decoder architecture for HMD de-occlusion. We also propose to train our person-specific model using short videos (1-2 minutes) of the user, captured in varying appearances, and demonstrated generalization to unseen poses and appearances of the user. We report superior qualitative and quantitative results over state-of-the-art methods. We also present applications of this approach to hybrid video teleconferencing using existing animation and 3D face reconstruction pipelines.
summary: Traditionally, video conferencing is a widely adopted solution for telecommunication, but a lack of immersiveness comes inherently due to the 2D nature of facial representation. The integration of Virtual Reality (VR) in a communication/telepresence system through Head Mounted Displays (HMDs) promises to provide users a much better immersive experience. However, HMDs cause hindrance by blocking the facial appearance and expressions of the user. To overcome these issues, we propose a novel attention-enabled encoder-decoder architecture for HMD de-occlusion. We also propose to train our person-specific model using short videos (1-2 minutes) of the user, captured in varying appearances, and demonstrated generalization to unseen poses and appearances of the user. We report superior qualitative and quantitative results over state-of-the-art methods. We also present applications of this approach to hybrid video teleconferencing using existing animation and 3D face reconstruction pipelines.
abstract_zh: 传统上，视频会议是一种广泛采用的电信解决方案，但由于面部表示的 2D 性质，本质上缺乏沉浸感。通过头戴式显示器 (HMD) 将虚拟现实 (VR) 集成到通信/远程呈现系统中，有望为用户提供更好的沉浸式体验。然而，头戴式显示器会遮挡用户的面部外观和表情，从而造成障碍。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的启用注意力的编码器-解码器架构，用于 HMD 去遮挡。我们还建议使用用户的短视频（1-2 分钟）来训练我们的特定于人的模型，这些视频以不同的外观捕获，并展示了对用户未见过的姿势和外观的泛化。我们报告了优于最先进方法的定性和定量结果。我们还展示了这种方法在使用现有动画和 3D 面部重建管道的混合视频电话会议中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的编码器-解码器架构，用于解决混合式远程呈现系统中头戴式显示器（HMD）导致的面部遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视频会议因2D面部表现缺乏沉浸感，而VR设备虽提升沉浸感却会遮挡用户面部表情，需解决此矛盾以增强远程交互体验。
AI.method: 设计注意力驱动的编码器-解码器模型，利用用户短时多姿态视频进行个性化训练，实现对未见姿态和外观的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在定性和定量指标上优于现有方法，并成功应用于混合视频会议的动画与3D面部重建流程中。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效恢复HMD遮挡区域的面部信息，为个性化沉浸式远程通信提供了可行的技术方案。

authors_text: Guillaume Perez,Sebastian Ament,Carla Gomes,Arnaud Lallouet
title: Constrained Machine Learning: The Bagel Framework
title_zh: 受限机器学习：Bagel 框架
abstract: Machine learning models are widely used for real-world applications, such as document analysis and vision. Constrained machine learning problems are problems where learned models have to both be accurate and respect constraints. For continuous convex constraints, many works have been proposed, but learning under combinatorial constraints is still a hard problem. The goal of this paper is to broaden the modeling capacity of constrained machine learning problems by incorporating existing work from combinatorial optimization. We propose first a general framework called BaGeL (Branch, Generate and Learn) which applies Branch and Bound to constrained learning problems where a learning problem is generated and trained at each node until only valid models are obtained. Because machine learning has specific requirements, we also propose an extended table constraint to split the space of hypotheses. We validate the approach on two examples: a linear regression under configuration constraints and a non-negative matrix factorization with prior knowledge for latent semantics analysis.
summary: Machine learning models are widely used for real-world applications, such as document analysis and vision. Constrained machine learning problems are problems where learned models have to both be accurate and respect constraints. For continuous convex constraints, many works have been proposed, but learning under combinatorial constraints is still a hard problem. The goal of this paper is to broaden the modeling capacity of constrained machine learning problems by incorporating existing work from combinatorial optimization. We propose first a general framework called BaGeL (Branch, Generate and Learn) which applies Branch and Bound to constrained learning problems where a learning problem is generated and trained at each node until only valid models are obtained. Because machine learning has specific requirements, we also propose an extended table constraint to split the space of hypotheses. We validate the approach on two examples: a linear regression under configuration constraints and a non-negative matrix factorization with prior knowledge for latent semantics analysis.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型广泛用于现实世界的应用，例如文档分析和视觉。受限机器学习问题是学习模型必须准确且尊重约束的问题。对于连续凸约束，已经提出了许多工作，但组合约束下的学习仍然是一个难题。本文的目标是通过结合组合优化的现有工作来扩大受限机器学习问题的建模能力。我们首先提出了一个称为 BaGeL（分支、生成和学习）的通用框架，它将分支定界应用于约束学习问题，其中在每个节点生成并训练学习问题，直到仅获得有效模型。由于机器学习有特定的要求，我们还提出了扩展表约束来分割假设空间。我们在两个示例上验证了该方法：配置约束下的线性回归和具有用于潜在语义分析的先验知识的非负矩阵分解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BaGeL的框架，用于解决具有组合约束的约束机器学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要处理连续凸约束，但组合约束下的学习仍是一个难题，需扩展建模能力。
AI.method: 结合分支定界法与机器学习，通过生成和训练子问题，并引入扩展表约束分割假设空间。
AI.result: 在配置约束下的线性回归和带有先验知识的非负矩阵分解任务中验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: BaGeL框架通过整合组合优化技术，提升了约束机器学习问题的建模能力。

ai_content.conclusion: BaGeL框架通过整合组合优化技术，提升了约束机器学习问题的建模能力。

authors_text: Felix Staudigl,Hazem Al Indari,Daniel Schön,Dominik Sisejkovic,Farhad Merchant,Jan Moritz Joseph,Vikas Rana,Stephan Menzel,Rainer Leupers
title: NeuroHammer: Inducing Bit-Flips in Memristive Crossbar Memories
title_zh: NeuroHammer：在忆阻横杆存储器中诱导位翻转
abstract: Emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies offer unique advantages in energy efficiency, latency, and features such as computing-in-memory. Consequently, emerging NVM technologies are considered an ideal substrate for computation and storage in future-generation neuromorphic platforms. These technologies need to be evaluated for fundamental reliability and security issues. In this paper, we present \emph{NeuroHammer}, a security threat in ReRAM crossbars caused by thermal crosstalk between memory cells. We demonstrate that bit-flips can be deliberately induced in ReRAM devices in a crossbar by systematically writing adjacent memory cells. A simulation flow is developed to evaluate NeuroHammer and the impact of physical parameters on the effectiveness of the attack. Finally, we discuss the security implications in the context of possible attack scenarios.
summary: Emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies offer unique advantages in energy efficiency, latency, and features such as computing-in-memory. Consequently, emerging NVM technologies are considered an ideal substrate for computation and storage in future-generation neuromorphic platforms. These technologies need to be evaluated for fundamental reliability and security issues. In this paper, we present \emph{NeuroHammer}, a security threat in ReRAM crossbars caused by thermal crosstalk between memory cells. We demonstrate that bit-flips can be deliberately induced in ReRAM devices in a crossbar by systematically writing adjacent memory cells. A simulation flow is developed to evaluate NeuroHammer and the impact of physical parameters on the effectiveness of the attack. Finally, we discuss the security implications in the context of possible attack scenarios.
abstract_zh: 新兴的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 技术在能源效率、延迟和内存计算等功能方面提供了独特的优势。因此，新兴的 NVM 技术被认为是未来一代神经形态平台中计算和存储的理想基础。需要评估这些技术的基本可靠性和安全性问题。在本文中，我们提出了 \emph{NeuroHammer}，这是由存储单元之间的热串扰引起的 ReRAM 交叉开关中的安全威胁。我们证明，通过系统地写入相邻的存储单元，可以在交叉开关中的 ReRAM 器件中故意引发位翻转。开发了一个模拟流程来评估 NeuroHammer 以及物理参数对攻击有效性的影响。最后，我们讨论可能的攻击场景中的安全影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NeuroHammer的安全威胁，通过热串扰在忆阻器交叉条存储器中诱导位翻转。
AI.motivation: 新兴非易失性存储器技术虽具能效优势，但其可靠性与安全性尚未充分验证，尤其需评估交叉条结构的潜在安全风险。
AI.method: 开发仿真流程，通过系统性写入相邻存储单元触发热串扰，并分析物理参数对攻击效果的影响。
AI.result: 验证了NeuroHammer攻击的可行性，不同物理参数显著影响位翻转成功率，并探讨了其在攻击场景中的安全威胁。
AI.conclusion: NeuroHammer揭示了基于忆阻器交叉条的神经形态计算平台存在潜在安全漏洞，需加强存储器设计的可靠性防护机制。

search_text: NeuroHammer: Inducing Bit-Flips in Memristive Crossbar Memories NeuroHammer：在忆阻横杆存储器中诱导位翻转 Emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies offer unique advantages in energy efficiency, latency, and features such as computing-in-memory. Consequently, emerging NVM technologies are considered an ideal substrate for computation and storage in future-generation neuromorphic platforms. These technologies need to be evaluated for fundamental reliability and security issues. In this paper, we present \emph{NeuroHammer}, a security threat in ReRAM crossbars caused by thermal crosstalk between memory cells. We demonstrate that bit-flips can be deliberately induced in ReRAM devices in a crossbar by systematically writing adjacent memory cells. A simulation flow is developed to evaluate NeuroHammer and the impact of physical parameters on the effectiveness of the attack. Finally, we discuss the security implications in the context of possible attack scenarios. 新兴的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 技术在能源效率、延迟和内存计算等功能方面提供了独特的优势。因此，新兴的 NVM 技术被认为是未来一代神经形态平台中计算和存储的理想基础。需要评估这些技术的基本可靠性和安全性问题。在本文中，我们提出了 \emph{NeuroHammer}，这是由存储单元之间的热串扰引起的 ReRAM 交叉开关中的安全威胁。我们证明，通过系统地写入相邻的存储单元，可以在交叉开关中的 ReRAM 器件中故意引发位翻转。开发了一个模拟流程来评估 NeuroHammer 以及物理参数对攻击有效性的影响。最后，我们讨论可能的攻击场景中的安全影响。 本文提出一种名为NeuroHammer的安全威胁，通过热串扰在忆阻器交叉条存储器中诱导位翻转。 Felix Staudigl,Hazem Al Indari,Daniel Schön,Dominik Sisejkovic,Farhad Merchant,Jan Moritz Joseph,Vikas Rana,Stephan Menzel,Rainer Leupers cs.ET

authors_text: Ziao Yang,Xiangrui Yang,Qifeng Lin
title: PTCT: Patches with 3D-Temporal Convolutional Transformer Network for Precipitation Nowcasting
title_zh: PTCT：用于降水临近预报的 3D 时间卷积变压器网络补丁
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures
comments: 9 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Precipitation nowcasting is to predict the future rainfall intensity over a short period of time, which mainly relies on the prediction of radar echo sequences. Though convolutional neural network (CNN) and recurrent neural network (RNN) are widely used to generate radar echo frames, they suffer from inductive bias (i.e., translation invariance and locality) and seriality, respectively. Recently, Transformer-based methods also gain much attention due to the great potential of Transformer structure, whereas short-term dependencies and autoregressive characteristic are ignored. In this paper, we propose a variant of Transformer named patches with 3D-temporal convolutional Transformer network (PTCT), where original frames are split into multiple patches to remove the constraint of inductive bias and 3D-temporal convolution is employed to capture short-term dependencies efficiently. After training, the inference of PTCT is performed in an autoregressive way to ensure the quality of generated radar echo frames. To validate our algorithm, we conduct experiments on two radar echo dataset: Radar Echo Guangzhou and HKO-7. The experimental results show that PTCT achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance compared with existing methods.
summary: Precipitation nowcasting is to predict the future rainfall intensity over a short period of time, which mainly relies on the prediction of radar echo sequences. Though convolutional neural network (CNN) and recurrent neural network (RNN) are widely used to generate radar echo frames, they suffer from inductive bias (i.e., translation invariance and locality) and seriality, respectively. Recently, Transformer-based methods also gain much attention due to the great potential of Transformer structure, whereas short-term dependencies and autoregressive characteristic are ignored. In this paper, we propose a variant of Transformer named patches with 3D-temporal convolutional Transformer network (PTCT), where original frames are split into multiple patches to remove the constraint of inductive bias and 3D-temporal convolution is employed to capture short-term dependencies efficiently. After training, the inference of PTCT is performed in an autoregressive way to ensure the quality of generated radar echo frames. To validate our algorithm, we conduct experiments on two radar echo dataset: Radar Echo Guangzhou and HKO-7. The experimental results show that PTCT achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance compared with existing methods.
abstract_zh: 临近降水预报是对未来短时间内降雨强度的预测，主要依靠雷达回波序列的预测。尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）和循环神经网络（RNN）被广泛用于生成雷达回波帧，但它们分别受到归纳偏差（即平移不变性和局部性）和序列性的影响。最近，由于 Transformer 结构的巨大潜力，基于 Transformer 的方法也受到了广泛的关注，而短期依赖性和自回归特性却被忽略了。在本文中，我们提出了一种 Transformer 的变体，名为带有 3D 时域卷积 Transformer 网络（PTCT）的 patch，其中原始帧被分割成多个 patch 以消除归纳偏差的约束，并采用 3D 时域卷积来有效地捕获短期依赖性。训练后，以自回归的方式进行PTCT的推理，以保证生成的雷达回波帧的质量。为了验证我们的算法，我们对两个雷达回波数据集进行了实验：雷达回波广州和 HKO-7。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，PTCT 实现了最先进（SOTA）的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D时序卷积Transformer网络（PTCT）的补丁方法，用于提高降水临近预报的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN和RNN在降水预测中存在归纳偏置和序列处理局限，而现有Transformer方法忽视了短期依赖和自回归特性，需改进模型以提升预测效果。
AI.method: 将雷达回波帧分割为补丁以消除归纳偏置约束，结合3D时序卷积捕捉短期依赖，并采用自回归方式生成预测结果。
AI.result: 在Guangzhou和HKO-7数据集上实验表明，PTCT在降水临近预报任务中达到最先进水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: PTCT通过补丁划分与3D卷积的结合，有效解决了传统方法的局限性，显著提升了雷达回波预测的精度。

authors_text: Yitian Yuan,Lin Ma,Jingwen Wang,Wenwu Zhu
title: Controllable Video Captioning with an Exemplar Sentence
title_zh: 带有示例句子的可控视频字幕
comment: ef:[C]//Proceedings of the 28th ACM International Conference on Multimedia. 2020: 1085-1093
comments: ef:[C]//Proceedings of the 28th ACM International Conference on Multimedia. 2020: 1085-1093
abstract: In this paper, we investigate a novel and challenging task, namely controllable video captioning with an exemplar sentence. Formally, given a video and a syntactically valid exemplar sentence, the task aims to generate one caption which not only describes the semantic contents of the video, but also follows the syntactic form of the given exemplar sentence. In order to tackle such an exemplar-based video captioning task, we propose a novel Syntax Modulated Caption Generator (SMCG) incorporated in an encoder-decoder-reconstructor architecture. The proposed SMCG takes video semantic representation as an input, and conditionally modulates the gates and cells of long short-term memory network with respect to the encoded syntactic information of the given exemplar sentence. Therefore, SMCG is able to control the states for word prediction and achieve the syntax customized caption generation. We conduct experiments by collecting auxiliary exemplar sentences for two public video captioning datasets. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on generating syntax controllable and semantic preserved video captions. By providing different exemplar sentences, our approach is capable of producing different captions with various syntactic structures, thus indicating a promising way to strengthen the diversity of video captioning.
summary: In this paper, we investigate a novel and challenging task, namely controllable video captioning with an exemplar sentence. Formally, given a video and a syntactically valid exemplar sentence, the task aims to generate one caption which not only describes the semantic contents of the video, but also follows the syntactic form of the given exemplar sentence. In order to tackle such an exemplar-based video captioning task, we propose a novel Syntax Modulated Caption Generator (SMCG) incorporated in an encoder-decoder-reconstructor architecture. The proposed SMCG takes video semantic representation as an input, and conditionally modulates the gates and cells of long short-term memory network with respect to the encoded syntactic information of the given exemplar sentence. Therefore, SMCG is able to control the states for word prediction and achieve the syntax customized caption generation. We conduct experiments by collecting auxiliary exemplar sentences for two public video captioning datasets. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on generating syntax controllable and semantic preserved video captions. By providing different exemplar sentences, our approach is capable of producing different captions with various syntactic structures, thus indicating a promising way to strengthen the diversity of video captioning.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了一项新颖且具有挑战性的任务，即带有示例句子的可控视频字幕。形式上，给定一个视频和一个语法上有效的范例句子，该任务的目标是生成一个标题，该字幕不仅描述视频的语义内容，而且遵循给定范例句子的句法形式。为了解决这种基于样本的视频字幕任务，我们提出了一种新颖的语法调制字幕生成器（SMCG），它结合在编码器-解码器-重构器架构中。所提出的 SMCG 以视频语义表示作为输入，并根据给定示例句子的编码句法信息有条件地调制长短期记忆网络的门和单元。因此，SMCG能够控制单词预测的状态并实现语法定制的字幕生成。我们通过收集两个公共视频字幕数据集的辅助示例句子来进行实验。大量的实验结果证明了我们的方法在生成语法可控和语义保留的视频字幕方面的有效性。通过提供不同的示例句子，我们的方法能够生成具有不同句法结构的不同字幕，从而表明了一种增强视频字幕多样性的有前途的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于示例句子的可控视频字幕生成方法，使生成的字幕既符合视频语义又遵循示例句法结构。
AI.motivation: 传统视频字幕生成无法控制输出句法结构，而通过示例句子引导生成具有特定语法结构的字幕可提升描述多样性与可控性。
AI.method: 设计Syntax Modulated Caption Generator（SMCG）模型，结合编码器-解码器-重建器架构，利用示例句法信息调节LSTM门控机制实现句法控制。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实验表明，该方法能有效生成符合示例句法且保留视频语义的字幕，通过不同示例句可生成多样化的句法结构。
AI.conclusion: SMCG模型验证了通过示例句子控制视频字幕生成句法结构的可行性，为提升字幕生成多样性提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于示例句子的可控视频字幕生成方法，使生成的字幕既符合视频语义又遵循示例句法结构。
motivation: 传统视频字幕生成无法控制输出句法结构，而通过示例句子引导生成具有特定语法结构的字幕可提升描述多样性与可控性。
method: 设计Syntax Modulated Caption Generator（SMCG）模型，结合编码器-解码器-重建器架构，利用示例句法信息调节LSTM门控机制实现句法控制。
result: 在两个公开数据集上实验表明，该方法能有效生成符合示例句法且保留视频语义的字幕，通过不同示例句可生成多样化的句法结构。
conclusion: SMCG模型验证了通过示例句子控制视频字幕生成句法结构的可行性，为提升字幕生成多样性提供了新思路。
search_text: Controllable Video Captioning with an Exemplar Sentence 带有示例句子的可控视频字幕 In this paper, we investigate a novel and challenging task, namely controllable video captioning with an exemplar sentence. Formally, given a video and a syntactically valid exemplar sentence, the task aims to generate one caption which not only describes the semantic contents of the video, but also follows the syntactic form of the given exemplar sentence. In order to tackle such an exemplar-based video captioning task, we propose a novel Syntax Modulated Caption Generator (SMCG) incorporated in an encoder-decoder-reconstructor architecture. The proposed SMCG takes video semantic representation as an input, and conditionally modulates the gates and cells of long short-term memory network with respect to the encoded syntactic information of the given exemplar sentence. Therefore, SMCG is able to control the states for word prediction and achieve the syntax customized caption generation. We conduct experiments by collecting auxiliary exemplar sentences for two public video captioning datasets. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on generating syntax controllable and semantic preserved video captions. By providing different exemplar sentences, our approach is capable of producing different captions with various syntactic structures, thus indicating a promising way to strengthen the diversity of video captioning. 在本文中，我们研究了一项新颖且具有挑战性的任务，即带有示例句子的可控视频字幕。形式上，给定一个视频和一个语法上有效的范例句子，该任务的目标是生成一个标题，该字幕不仅描述视频的语义内容，而且遵循给定范例句子的句法形式。为了解决这种基于样本的视频字幕任务，我们提出了一种新颖的语法调制字幕生成器（SMCG），它结合在编码器-解码器-重构器架构中。所提出的 SMCG 以视频语义表示作为输入，并根据给定示例句子的编码句法信息有条件地调制长短期记忆网络的门和单元。因此，SMCG能够控制单词预测的状态并实现语法定制的字幕生成。我们通过收集两个公共视频字幕数据集的辅助示例句子来进行实验。大量的实验结果证明了我们的方法在生成语法可控和语义保留的视频字幕方面的有效性。通过提供不同的示例句子，我们的方法能够生成具有不同句法结构的不同字幕，从而表明了一种增强视频字幕多样性的有前途的方法。 本文提出一种基于示例句子的可控视频字幕生成方法，使生成的字幕既符合视频语义又遵循示例句法结构。 Yitian Yuan,Lin Ma,Jingwen Wang,Wenwu Zhu cs.CV,cs.CL
